authors_text: Zhiqiang Yuan,Wenkai Zhang,Kun Fu,Xuan Li,Chubo Deng,Hongqi Wang,Xian Sun
title: Exploring a Fine-Grained Multiscale Method for Cross-Modal Remote Sensing Image Retrieval
title_zh: 探索跨模态遥感图像检索的细粒度多尺度方法
comment: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, vol. 60, pp. 1-19, 2022, Art no. 4404119
comments: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, vol. 60, pp. 1-19, 2022, Art no. 4404119
abstract: Remote sensing (RS) cross-modal text-image retrieval has attracted extensive attention for its advantages of flexible input and efficient query. However, traditional methods ignore the characteristics of multi-scale and redundant targets in RS image, leading to the degradation of retrieval accuracy. To cope with the problem of multi-scale scarcity and target redundancy in RS multimodal retrieval task, we come up with a novel asymmetric multimodal feature matching network (AMFMN). Our model adapts to multi-scale feature inputs, favors multi-source retrieval methods, and can dynamically filter redundant features. AMFMN employs the multi-scale visual self-attention (MVSA) module to extract the salient features of RS image and utilizes visual features to guide the text representation. Furthermore, to alleviate the positive samples ambiguity caused by the strong intraclass similarity in RS image, we propose a triplet loss function with dynamic variable margin based on prior similarity of sample pairs. Finally, unlike the traditional RS image-text dataset with coarse text and higher intraclass similarity, we construct a fine-grained and more challenging Remote sensing Image-Text Match dataset (RSITMD), which supports RS image retrieval through keywords and sentence separately and jointly. Experiments on four RS text-image datasets demonstrate that the proposed model can achieve state-of-the-art performance in cross-modal RS text-image retrieval task.
summary: Remote sensing (RS) cross-modal text-image retrieval has attracted extensive attention for its advantages of flexible input and efficient query. However, traditional methods ignore the characteristics of multi-scale and redundant targets in RS image, leading to the degradation of retrieval accuracy. To cope with the problem of multi-scale scarcity and target redundancy in RS multimodal retrieval task, we come up with a novel asymmetric multimodal feature matching network (AMFMN). Our model adapts to multi-scale feature inputs, favors multi-source retrieval methods, and can dynamically filter redundant features. AMFMN employs the multi-scale visual self-attention (MVSA) module to extract the salient features of RS image and utilizes visual features to guide the text representation. Furthermore, to alleviate the positive samples ambiguity caused by the strong intraclass similarity in RS image, we propose a triplet loss function with dynamic variable margin based on prior similarity of sample pairs. Finally, unlike the traditional RS image-text dataset with coarse text and higher intraclass similarity, we construct a fine-grained and more challenging Remote sensing Image-Text Match dataset (RSITMD), which supports RS image retrieval through keywords and sentence separately and jointly. Experiments on four RS text-image datasets demonstrate that the proposed model can achieve state-of-the-art performance in cross-modal RS text-image retrieval task.
abstract_zh: 遥感(RS)跨模态文本图像检索以其输入灵活、查询高效等优点受到广泛关注。然而，传统方法忽略了遥感图像中多尺度、冗余目标的特点，导致检索精度下降。为了解决RS多模态检索任务中的多尺度稀缺性和目标冗余问题，我们提出了一种新型的非对称多模态特征匹配网络（AFMMN）。我们的模型适应多尺度特征输入，支持多源检索方法，并且可以动态过滤冗余特征。 AMFMN采用多尺度视觉自注意力（MVSA）模块来提取RS图像的显着特征，并利用视觉特征来指导文本表示。此外，为了减轻RS图像中强类内相似性引起的正样本模糊性，我们提出了一种基于样本对先验相似性的具有动态可变边距的三元组损失函数。最后，与传统的遥感图像文本数据集的粗文本和类内相似度较高不同，我们构建了一个细粒度且更具挑战性的遥感图像文本匹配数据集（RSITMD），它支持通过关键词和句子单独和联合进行遥感图像检索。在四个 RS 文本图像数据集上的实验表明，所提出的模型可以在跨模态 RS 文本图像检索任务中实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种细粒度多尺度方法，用于跨模态遥感图像检索任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法忽视了遥感图像中多尺度和冗余目标的特性，导致检索精度下降，因此需要一种新的方法来解决多尺度稀缺性和目标冗余问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种非对称多模态特征匹配网络（AMFMN），采用多尺度视觉自注意力（MVSA）模块提取遥感图像的显著特征，并利用视觉特征引导文本表示。此外，提出了一种基于样本对先验相似性的动态可变边距三元组损失函数，以缓解由强类内相似性引起的正样本模糊问题。
AI.result: 在四个遥感文本-图像数据集上的实验表明，该模型在跨模态遥感文本-图像检索任务中达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的AMFMN方法有效提升了跨模态遥感图像检索的精度，并构建了一个细粒度且更具挑战性的遥感图像-文本匹配数据集（RSITMD）。

authors_text: Yu Cao,Wei Bi,Meng Fang,Shuming Shi,Dacheng Tao
title: A Model-Agnostic Data Manipulation Method for Persona-based Dialogue Generation
title_zh: 用于基于角色的对话生成的与模型无关的数据操作方法
comment: Accepted to ACL 2022 (long paper)
comments: Accepted to ACL 2022 (long paper)
abstract: Towards building intelligent dialogue agents, there has been a growing interest in introducing explicit personas in generation models. However, with limited persona-based dialogue data at hand, it may be difficult to train a dialogue generation model well. We point out that the data challenges of this generation task lie in two aspects: first, it is expensive to scale up current persona-based dialogue datasets; second, each data sample in this task is more complex to learn with than conventional dialogue data. To alleviate the above data issues, we propose a data manipulation method, which is model-agnostic to be packed with any persona-based dialogue generation model to improve its performance. The original training samples will first be distilled and thus expected to be fitted more easily. Next, we show various effective ways that can diversify such easier distilled data. A given base model will then be trained via the constructed data curricula, i.e. first on augmented distilled samples and then on original ones. Experiments illustrate the superiority of our method with two strong base dialogue models (Transformer encoder-decoder and GPT2).
summary: Towards building intelligent dialogue agents, there has been a growing interest in introducing explicit personas in generation models. However, with limited persona-based dialogue data at hand, it may be difficult to train a dialogue generation model well. We point out that the data challenges of this generation task lie in two aspects: first, it is expensive to scale up current persona-based dialogue datasets; second, each data sample in this task is more complex to learn with than conventional dialogue data. To alleviate the above data issues, we propose a data manipulation method, which is model-agnostic to be packed with any persona-based dialogue generation model to improve its performance. The original training samples will first be distilled and thus expected to be fitted more easily. Next, we show various effective ways that can diversify such easier distilled data. A given base model will then be trained via the constructed data curricula, i.e. first on augmented distilled samples and then on original ones. Experiments illustrate the superiority of our method with two strong base dialogue models (Transformer encoder-decoder and GPT2).
abstract_zh: 为了构建智能对话代理，人们越来越有兴趣在生成模型中引入显式角色。然而，由于手头基于角色的对话数据有限，可能很难训练好对话生成模型。我们指出，这一生成任务的数据挑战在于两个方面：首先，扩展当前基于角色的对话数据集的成本很高；其次，该任务中的每个数据样本比传统对话数据更难以学习。为了缓解上述数据问题，我们提出了一种数据操作方法，该方法与模型无关，可以与任何基于角色的对话生成模型一起打包以提高其性能。原始训练样本将首先被蒸馏，因此预计更容易拟合。接下来，我们展示了各种有效的方法，可以使这些更容易提取的数据多样化。然后，将通过构建的数据课程来训练给定的基础模型，即首先在增强的蒸馏样本上进行训练，然后在原始样本上进行训练。实验证明了我们的方法具有两个强大的基础对话模型（Transformer 编码器-解码器和 GPT2）的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种与模型无关的数据操作方法，用于改进基于角色的对话生成模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 基于角色的对话数据集规模有限且样本复杂，导致训练效果不佳，需解决数据扩展和复杂性问题。
AI.method: 通过数据蒸馏简化原始样本，再通过多样化手段扩展数据，并采用渐进式课程学习训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在Transformer和GPT2两种强基模型上均显著提升生成效果。
AI.conclusion: 该数据操作方法能有效缓解基于角色对话生成的数据挑战，且适用于多种生成模型。

ai_content.conclusion: 该数据操作方法能有效缓解基于角色对话生成的数据挑战，且适用于多种生成模型。

authors_text: Chao Wen,Yinda Zhang,Chenjie Cao,Zhuwen Li,Xiangyang Xue,Yanwei Fu
title: Pixel2Mesh++: 3D Mesh Generation and Refinement from Multi-View Images
title_zh: Pixel2Mesh++：多视图图像的 3D 网格生成和细化
comment: Accepted by TPAMI2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1908.01491
comments: Accepted by TPAMI2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1908.01491
abstract: We study the problem of shape generation in 3D mesh representation from a small number of color images with or without camera poses. While many previous works learn to hallucinate the shape directly from priors, we adopt to further improve the shape quality by leveraging cross-view information with a graph convolution network. Instead of building a direct mapping function from images to 3D shape, our model learns to predict series of deformations to improve a coarse shape iteratively. Inspired by traditional multiple view geometry methods, our network samples nearby area around the initial mesh's vertex locations and reasons an optimal deformation using perceptual feature statistics built from multiple input images. Extensive experiments show that our model produces accurate 3D shapes that are not only visually plausible from the input perspectives, but also well aligned to arbitrary viewpoints. With the help of physically driven architecture, our model also exhibits generalization capability across different semantic categories, and the number of input images. Model analysis experiments show that our model is robust to the quality of the initial mesh and the error of camera pose, and can be combined with a differentiable renderer for test-time optimization.
summary: We study the problem of shape generation in 3D mesh representation from a small number of color images with or without camera poses. While many previous works learn to hallucinate the shape directly from priors, we adopt to further improve the shape quality by leveraging cross-view information with a graph convolution network. Instead of building a direct mapping function from images to 3D shape, our model learns to predict series of deformations to improve a coarse shape iteratively. Inspired by traditional multiple view geometry methods, our network samples nearby area around the initial mesh's vertex locations and reasons an optimal deformation using perceptual feature statistics built from multiple input images. Extensive experiments show that our model produces accurate 3D shapes that are not only visually plausible from the input perspectives, but also well aligned to arbitrary viewpoints. With the help of physically driven architecture, our model also exhibits generalization capability across different semantic categories, and the number of input images. Model analysis experiments show that our model is robust to the quality of the initial mesh and the error of camera pose, and can be combined with a differentiable renderer for test-time optimization.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了少量带有或不带有相机姿势的彩色图像的 3D 网格表示中的形状生成问题。虽然许多以前的作品学习直接从先验中幻觉形状，但我们采用通过图卷积网络利用交叉视图信息来进一步提高形状质量。我们的模型不是构建从图像到 3D 形状的直接映射函数，而是学习预测一系列变形以迭代地改进粗略形状。受传统多视图几何方法的启发，我们的网络对初始网格顶点位置周围的附近区域进行采样，并使用从多个输入图像构建的感知特征统计来推理最佳变形。大量实验表明，我们的模型可以生成准确的 3D 形状，这些形状不仅从输入角度来看在视觉上合理，而且与任意视点也很好地对齐。在物理驱动架构的帮助下，我们的模型还展示了跨不同语义类别和输入图像数量的泛化能力。模型分析实验表明，我们的模型对初始网格的质量和相机位姿的误差具有鲁棒性，并且可以与可微分渲染器相结合以进行测试时优化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究从少量彩色图像（有或无相机姿态）生成高质量3D网格表示的形状，通过跨视图信息和图卷积网络提升形状质量。
AI.motivation: 传统方法直接从先验生成形状，但难以保证质量。本文旨在通过跨视图信息和迭代变形优化，提升3D网格的精度和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用图卷积网络预测迭代变形，基于多视角图像的感知特征统计优化初始网格顶点位置，结合物理驱动架构和可微渲染器实现测试时优化。
AI.result: 生成的3D形状在输入视角和任意视角下均视觉合理且对齐，具备跨语义类别和输入图像数量的泛化能力，对初始网格质量和相机误差鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨视图信息与迭代变形结合，本文方法在3D网格生成任务中实现了更高的精度、鲁棒性和泛化能力。

search_text: Pixel2Mesh++: 3D Mesh Generation and Refinement from Multi-View Images Pixel2Mesh++：多视图图像的 3D 网格生成和细化 We study the problem of shape generation in 3D mesh representation from a small number of color images with or without camera poses. While many previous works learn to hallucinate the shape directly from priors, we adopt to further improve the shape quality by leveraging cross-view information with a graph convolution network. Instead of building a direct mapping function from images to 3D shape, our model learns to predict series of deformations to improve a coarse shape iteratively. Inspired by traditional multiple view geometry methods, our network samples nearby area around the initial mesh's vertex locations and reasons an optimal deformation using perceptual feature statistics built from multiple input images. Extensive experiments show that our model produces accurate 3D shapes that are not only visually plausible from the input perspectives, but also well aligned to arbitrary viewpoints. With the help of physically driven architecture, our model also exhibits generalization capability across different semantic categories, and the number of input images. Model analysis experiments show that our model is robust to the quality of the initial mesh and the error of camera pose, and can be combined with a differentiable renderer for test-time optimization. 我们研究了少量带有或不带有相机姿势的彩色图像的 3D 网格表示中的形状生成问题。虽然许多以前的作品学习直接从先验中幻觉形状，但我们采用通过图卷积网络利用交叉视图信息来进一步提高形状质量。我们的模型不是构建从图像到 3D 形状的直接映射函数，而是学习预测一系列变形以迭代地改进粗略形状。受传统多视图几何方法的启发，我们的网络对初始网格顶点位置周围的附近区域进行采样，并使用从多个输入图像构建的感知特征统计来推理最佳变形。大量实验表明，我们的模型可以生成准确的 3D 形状，这些形状不仅从输入角度来看在视觉上合理，而且与任意视点也很好地对齐。在物理驱动架构的帮助下，我们的模型还展示了跨不同语义类别和输入图像数量的泛化能力。模型分析实验表明，我们的模型对初始网格的质量和相机位姿的误差具有鲁棒性，并且可以与可微分渲染器相结合以进行测试时优化。 本文研究从少量彩色图像（有或无相机姿态）生成高质量3D网格表示的形状，通过跨视图信息和图卷积网络提升形状质量。 Chao Wen,Yinda Zhang,Chenjie Cao,Zhuwen Li,Xiangyang Xue,Yanwei Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiqiang Yuan,Wenkai Zhang,Changyuan Tian,Xuee Rong,Zhengyuan Zhang,Hongqi Wang,Kun Fu,Xian Sun
title: Remote Sensing Cross-Modal Text-Image Retrieval Based on Global and Local Information
title_zh: 基于全局和局部信息的遥感跨模态文图检索
comment: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, vol. 60, pp. 1-16, 2022, Art no. 5620616
comments: ef:in IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, vol. 60, pp. 1-16, 2022, Art no. 5620616
abstract: Cross-modal remote sensing text-image retrieval (RSCTIR) has recently become an urgent research hotspot due to its ability of enabling fast and flexible information extraction on remote sensing (RS) images. However, current RSCTIR methods mainly focus on global features of RS images, which leads to the neglect of local features that reflect target relationships and saliency. In this article, we first propose a novel RSCTIR framework based on global and local information (GaLR), and design a multi-level information dynamic fusion (MIDF) module to efficaciously integrate features of different levels. MIDF leverages local information to correct global information, utilizes global information to supplement local information, and uses the dynamic addition of the two to generate prominent visual representation. To alleviate the pressure of the redundant targets on the graph convolution network (GCN) and to improve the model s attention on salient instances during modeling local features, the de-noised representation matrix and the enhanced adjacency matrix (DREA) are devised to assist GCN in producing superior local representations. DREA not only filters out redundant features with high similarity, but also obtains more powerful local features by enhancing the features of prominent objects. Finally, to make full use of the information in the similarity matrix during inference, we come up with a plug-and-play multivariate rerank (MR) algorithm. The algorithm utilizes the k nearest neighbors of the retrieval results to perform a reverse search, and improves the performance by combining multiple components of bidirectional retrieval. Extensive experiments on public datasets strongly demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of GaLR methods on the RSCTIR task. The code of GaLR method, MR algorithm, and corresponding files have been made available at https://github.com/xiaoyuan1996/GaLR .

However, current RSCTIR methods mainly focus on global features of RS images, which leads to the neglect of local features that reflect target relationships and saliency. In this article, we first propose a novel RSCTIR framework based on global and local information (GaLR), and design a multi-level information dynamic fusion (MIDF) module to efficaciously integrate features of different levels. MIDF leverages local information to correct global information, utilizes global information to supplement local information, and uses the dynamic addition of the two to generate prominent visual representation. To alleviate the pressure of the redundant targets on the graph convolution network (GCN) and to improve the model s attention on salient instances during modeling local features, the de-noised representation matrix and the enhanced adjacency matrix (DREA) are devised to assist GCN in producing superior local representations. DREA not only filters out redundant features with high similarity, but also obtains more powerful local features by enhancing the features of prominent objects. Finally, to make full use of the information in the similarity matrix during inference, we come up with a plug-and-play multivariate rerank (MR) algorithm. The algorithm utilizes the k nearest neighbors of the retrieval results to perform a reverse search, and improves the performance by combining multiple components of bidirectional retrieval. Extensive experiments on public datasets strongly demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of GaLR methods on the RSCTIR task. The code of GaLR method, MR algorithm, and corresponding files have been made available at https://github.com/xiaoyuan1996/GaLR .
abstract_zh: 跨模态遥感文本图像检索（RSCTIR）由于其能够快速、灵活地提取遥感（RS）图像信息而成为一个紧迫的研究热点。然而，当前的RSCTIR方法主要关注RS图像的全局特征，这导致忽略了反映目标关系和显着性的局部特征。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种基于全局和局部信息（GaLR）的新型RSCTIR框架，并设计了多级信息动态融合（MIDF）模块来有效地集成不同级别的特征。 MIDF利用局部信息来纠正全局信息，利用全局信息来补充局部信息，并利用两者的动态相加来生成突出的视觉表示。为了减轻冗余目标对图卷积网络（GCN）的压力并提高模型在局部特征建模过程中对显着实例的关注，设计了去噪表示矩阵和增强邻接矩阵（DREA）来帮助GCN产生优越的局部表示。 DREA不仅过滤掉相似度高的冗余特征，而且通过增强突出物体的特征来获得更强大的局部特征。最后，为了在推理过程中充分利用相似度矩阵中的信息，我们提出了一种即插即用的多元重排序（MR）算法。该算法利用检索结果的k个最近邻进行反向搜索，并通过组合双向检索的多个组成部分来提高性能。对公共数据集的大量实验有力地证明了 GaLR 方法在 RSCTIR 任务上的最先进性能。 GaLR方法、MR算法的代码及相应文件已发布在https://github.com/xiaoyuan1996/GaLR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局和局部信息的遥感跨模态文本-图像检索框架GaLR，以提升遥感图像与文本的检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感跨模态检索方法仅关注全局特征，忽略了反映目标关系和显著性的局部特征，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 设计多级信息动态融合模块（MIDF）整合全局与局部特征，并通过去噪表示矩阵和增强邻接矩阵（DREA）优化图卷积网络，最后提出可插拔的多变量重排序算法（MR）提升检索结果。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，GaLR方法在遥感跨模态检索任务中达到最先进水平，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态融合全局与局部信息并优化特征表示，GaLR有效提升了遥感图像与文本的跨模态检索准确率。

However, current RSCTIR methods mainly focus on global features of RS images, which leads to the neglect of local features that reflect target relationships and saliency. In this article, we first propose a novel RSCTIR framework based on global and local information (GaLR), and design a multi-level information dynamic fusion (MIDF) module to efficaciously integrate features of different levels. To alleviate the pressure of the redundant targets on the graph convolution network (GCN) and to improve the model s attention on salient instances during modeling local features, the de-noised representation matrix and the enhanced adjacency matrix (DREA) are devised to assist GCN in producing superior local representations. DREA not only filters out redundant features with high similarity, but also obtains more powerful local features by enhancing the features of prominent objects. authors_text: Tejas Panambur,Deep Chakraborty,Melissa Meyer,Ralph Milliken,Erik Learned-Miller,Mario Parente
title: Self-Supervised Learning to Guide Scientifically Relevant Categorization of Martian Terrain Images
title_zh: 自监督学习指导火星地形图像的科学相关分类
comment: Earthvision at CVPR Workshops 2022, Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/TejasPanambur/mastcam
comments: Earthvision at CVPR Workshops 2022, Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/TejasPanambur/mastcam
abstract: Automatic terrain recognition in Mars rover images is an important problem not just for navigation, but for scientists interested in studying rock types, and by extension, conditions of the ancient Martian paleoclimate and habitability. Existing approaches to label Martian terrain either involve the use of non-expert annotators producing taxonomies of limited granularity (e.g. soil, sand, bedrock, float rock, etc.), or rely on generic class discovery approaches that tend to produce perceptual classes such as rover parts and landscape, which are irrelevant to geologic analysis. Expert-labeled datasets containing granular geological/geomorphological terrain categories are rare or inaccessible to public, and sometimes require the extraction of relevant categorical information from complex annotations. In order to facilitate the creation of a dataset with detailed terrain categories, we present a self-supervised method that can cluster sedimentary textures in images captured from the Mast camera onboard the Curiosity rover (Mars Science Laboratory). We then present a qualitative analysis of these clusters and describe their geologic significance via the creation of a set of granular terrain categories. The precision and geologic validation of these automatically discovered clusters suggest that our methods are promising for the rapid classification of important geologic features and will therefore facilitate our long-term goal of producing a large, granular, and publicly available dataset for Mars terrain recognition.
summary: Automatic terrain recognition in Mars rover images is an important problem not just for navigation, but for scientists interested in studying rock types, and by extension, conditions of the ancient Martian paleoclimate and habitability. Existing approaches to label Martian terrain either involve the use of non-expert annotators producing taxonomies of limited granularity (e.g. soil, sand, bedrock, float rock, etc.), or rely on generic class discovery approaches that tend to produce perceptual classes such as rover parts and landscape, which are irrelevant to geologic analysis. Expert-labeled datasets containing granular geological/geomorphological terrain categories are rare or inaccessible to public, and sometimes require the extraction of relevant categorical information from complex annotations. In order to facilitate the creation of a dataset with detailed terrain categories, we present a self-supervised method that can cluster sedimentary textures in images captured from the Mast camera onboard the Curiosity rover (Mars Science Laboratory). We then present a qualitative analysis of these clusters and describe their geologic significance via the creation of a set of granular terrain categories. The precision and geologic validation of these automatically discovered clusters suggest that our methods are promising for the rapid classification of important geologic features and will therefore facilitate our long-term goal of producing a large, granular, and publicly available dataset for Mars terrain recognition.
abstract_zh: 火星漫游者图像中的自动地形识别不仅对于导航来说是一个重要问题，对于有兴趣研究岩石类型以及进而研究古代火星古气候和可居住性条件的科学家来说也是一个重要问题。标记火星地形的现有方法要么涉及使用非专家注释器来生成有限粒度的分类法（例如土壤、沙子、基岩、浮岩等），要么依赖通用类发现方法，这些方法往往会生成与地质分析无关的感知类，例如漫游器部件和景观。包含粒度地质/地貌地形类别的专家标记数据集很少或公众无法访问，有时需要从复杂的注释中提取相关的分类信息。为了便于创建具有详细地形类别的数据集，我们提出了一种自监督方法，可以对好奇号火星车（火星科学实验室）上的桅杆相机捕获的图像中的沉积纹理进行聚类。然后，我们对这些聚类进行定性分析，并通过创建一组粒状地形类别来描述其地质意义。这些自动发现的簇的精度和地质验证表明，我们的方法有望对重要地质特征进行快速分类，因此将有助于我们为火星地形识别生成大型、细粒度且公开可用的数据集的长期目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法，用于自动分类火星地形图像并生成科学相关的详细地质类别。
AI.motivation: 现有火星地形分类方法存在粒度不足或与地质分析无关的问题，且专家标注数据集稀缺且难以获取。
AI.method: 基于好奇号火星车拍摄的图像，采用自监督学习聚类沉积纹理，并通过定性分析建立地质意义的细粒度类别。
AI.result: 自动发现的聚类在精度和地质验证中表现良好，可有效识别关键地质特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建大型、细粒度且公开的火星地形数据集提供了可行路径，助力地质研究。

search_text: Self-Supervised Learning to Guide Scientifically Relevant Categorization of Martian Terrain Images 自监督学习指导火星地形图像的科学相关分类 Automatic terrain recognition in Mars rover images is an important problem not just for navigation, but for scientists interested in studying rock types, and by extension, conditions of the ancient Martian paleoclimate and habitability. Existing approaches to label Martian terrain either involve the use of non-expert annotators producing taxonomies of limited granularity (e.g. soil, sand, bedrock, float rock, etc.), or rely on generic class discovery approaches that tend to produce perceptual classes such as rover parts and landscape, which are irrelevant to geologic analysis. Expert-labeled datasets containing granular geological/geomorphological terrain categories are rare or inaccessible to public, and sometimes require the extraction of relevant categorical information from complex annotations. In order to facilitate the creation of a dataset with detailed terrain categories, we present a self-supervised method that can cluster sedimentary textures in images captured from the Mast camera onboard the Curiosity rover (Mars Science Laboratory). We then present a qualitative analysis of these clusters and describe their geologic significance via the creation of a set of granular terrain categories. The precision and geologic validation of these automatically discovered clusters suggest that our methods are promising for the rapid classification of important geologic features and will therefore facilitate our long-term goal of producing a large, granular, and publicly available dataset for Mars terrain recognition. 火星漫游者图像中的自动地形识别不仅对于导航来说是一个重要问题，对于有兴趣研究岩石类型以及进而研究古代火星古气候和可居住性条件的科学家来说也是一个重要问题。标记火星地形的现有方法要么涉及使用非专家注释器来生成有限粒度的分类法（例如土壤、沙子、基岩、浮岩等），要么依赖通用类发现方法，这些方法往往会生成与地质分析无关的感知类，例如漫游器部件和景观。包含粒度地质/地貌地形类别的专家标记数据集很少或公众无法访问，有时需要从复杂的注释中提取相关的分类信息。为了便于创建具有详细地形类别的数据集，我们提出了一种自监督方法，可以对好奇号火星车（火星科学实验室）上的桅杆相机捕获的图像中的沉积纹理进行聚类。然后，我们对这些聚类进行定性分析，并通过创建一组粒状地形类别来描述其地质意义。这些自动发现的簇的精度和地质验证表明，我们的方法有望对重要地质特征进行快速分类，因此将有助于我们为火星地形识别生成大型、细粒度且公开可用的数据集的长期目标。 本文提出一种自监督学习方法，用于自动分类火星地形图像并生成科学相关的详细地质类别。 Tejas Panambur,Deep Chakraborty,Melissa Meyer,Ralph Milliken,Erik Learned-Miller,Mario Parente cs.CV

authors_text: Samson Tan,Araz Taeihagh,Kathy Baxter
title: The Risks of Machine Learning Systems
title_zh: 机器学习系统的风险
abstract: The speed and scale at which machine learning (ML) systems are deployed are accelerating even as an increasing number of studies highlight their potential for negative impact. There is a clear need for companies and regulators to manage the risk from proposed ML systems before they harm people. To achieve this, private and public sector actors first need to identify the risks posed by a proposed ML system. A system's overall risk is influenced by its direct and indirect effects. However, existing frameworks for ML risk/impact assessment often address an abstract notion of risk or do not concretize this dependence. We propose to address this gap with a context-sensitive framework for identifying ML system risks comprising two components: a taxonomy of the first- and second-order risks posed by ML systems, and their contributing factors. First-order risks stem from aspects of the ML system, while second-order risks stem from the consequences of first-order risks. These consequences are system failures that result from design and development choices. We explore how different risks may manifest in various types of ML systems, the factors that affect each risk, and how first-order risks may lead to second-order effects when the system interacts with the real world. Throughout the paper, we show how real events and prior research fit into our Machine Learning System Risk framework (MLSR). MLSR operates on ML systems rather than technologies or domains, recognizing that a system's design, implementation, and use case all contribute to its risk. In doing so, it unifies the risks that are commonly discussed in the ethical AI community (e.g., ethical/human rights risks) with system-level risks (e.g., application, design, control risks), paving the way for holistic risk assessments of ML systems.

First-order risks stem from aspects of the ML system, while second-order risks stem from the consequences of first-order risks. These consequences are system failures that result from design and development choices. We explore how different risks may manifest in various types of ML systems, the factors that affect each risk, and how first-order risks may lead to second-order effects when the system interacts with the real world. Throughout the paper, we show how real events and prior research fit into our Machine Learning System Risk framework (MLSR). MLSR operates on ML systems rather than technologies or domains, recognizing that a system's design, implementation, and use case all contribute to its risk. In doing so, it unifies the risks that are commonly discussed in the ethical AI community (e.g., ethical/human rights risks) with system-level risks (e.g., application, design, control risks), paving the way for holistic risk assessments of ML systems.
abstract_zh: 尽管越来越多的研究强调机器学习 (ML) 系统潜在的负面影响，但其部署速度和规模仍在加快。公司和监管机构显然需要在拟议的机器学习系统伤害人们之前对其风险进行管理。为了实现这一目标，私营和公共部门参与者首先需要识别拟议的机器学习系统带来的风险。系统的整体风险受到其直接和间接影响的影响。然而，现有的机器学习风险/影响评估框架通常涉及抽象的风险概念，或者没有具体化这种依赖性。我们建议通过上下文敏感的框架来解决这一差距，该框架用于识别机器学习系统风险，该框架包括两个组成部分：机器学习系统带来的一阶和二阶风险的分类及其影响因素。一阶风险源于机器学习系统的各个方面，而二阶风险则源于一阶风险的后果。这些后果是由设计和开发选择导致的系统故障。我们探讨了不同类型的机器学习系统中如何体现不同的风险、影响每种风险的因素，以及当系统与现实世界交互时，一阶风险如何导致二阶效应。在整篇论文中，我们展示了真实事件和先前的研究如何融入我们的机器学习系统风险框架（MLSR）。 MLSR 在 ML 系统而不是技术或领域上运行，认识到系统的设计、实现和用例都会增加其风险。在此过程中，它将道德人工智能社区中常见的风险（例如道德/人权风险）与系统级风险（例如应用、设计、控制风险）统一起来，为机器学习系统的整体风险评估铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种上下文敏感的机器学习系统风险识别框架（MLSR），用于系统化分析ML系统的直接和间接风险。
AI.motivation: 现有ML风险评估框架过于抽象，未能明确风险依赖关系，导致企业与监管机构难以有效管理ML系统的潜在危害。
AI.method: 构建包含一阶风险（系统自身属性）和二阶风险（系统与现实世界交互引发的后果）的分类体系，并分析不同风险因素在各类ML系统中的表现机制。
AI.result: MLSR框架统一了伦理AI风险与系统级风险，通过实际案例验证了其对风险传导路径的解释能力，为全维度风险评估提供方法论支持。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过区分风险层级与交互影响，为企业和监管机构提供了更精准的ML系统风险管控工具，推动风险评估从技术维度向系统维度延伸。

authors_text: Lu Zhang,Zhiyong Liu,Xiangyu Zhu,Zhan Song,Xu Yang,Zhen Lei,Hong Qiao
title: Weakly Aligned Feature Fusion for Multimodal Object Detection
title_zh: 用于多模态目标检测的弱对齐特征融合
comment: Journal extension of the previous conference paper arXiv:1901.02645, see IEEE page https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9523596
comments: Journal extension of the previous conference paper arXiv:1901.02645, see IEEE page https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9523596
abstract: To achieve accurate and robust object detection in the real-world scenario, various forms of images are incorporated, such as color, thermal, and depth. However, multimodal data often suffer from the position shift problem, i.e., the image pair is not strictly aligned, making one object has different positions in different modalities. For the deep learning method, this problem makes it difficult to fuse multimodal features and puzzles the convolutional neural network (CNN) training. In this article, we propose a general multimodal detector named aligned region CNN (AR-CNN) to tackle the position shift problem. First, a region feature (RF) alignment module with adjacent similarity constraint is designed to consistently predict the position shift between two modalities and adaptively align the cross-modal RFs. Second, we propose a novel region of interest (RoI) jitter strategy to improve the robustness to unexpected shift patterns. Third, we present a new multimodal feature fusion method that selects the more reliable feature and suppresses the less useful one via feature reweighting. In addition, by locating bounding boxes in both modalities and building their relationships, we provide novel multimodal labeling named KAIST-Paired. Extensive experiments on 2-D and 3-D object detection, RGB-T, and RGB-D datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method.
summary: To achieve accurate and robust object detection in the real-world scenario, various forms of images are incorporated, such as color, thermal, and depth. However, multimodal data often suffer from the position shift problem, i.e., the image pair is not strictly aligned, making one object has different positions in different modalities. For the deep learning method, this problem makes it difficult to fuse multimodal features and puzzles the convolutional neural network (CNN) training. In this article, we propose a general multimodal detector named aligned region CNN (AR-CNN) to tackle the position shift problem. First, a region feature (RF) alignment module with adjacent similarity constraint is designed to consistently predict the position shift between two modalities and adaptively align the cross-modal RFs. Second, we propose a novel region of interest (RoI) jitter strategy to improve the robustness to unexpected shift patterns. Third, we present a new multimodal feature fusion method that selects the more reliable feature and suppresses the less useful one via feature reweighting. In addition, by locating bounding boxes in both modalities and building their relationships, we provide novel multimodal labeling named KAIST-Paired. Extensive experiments on 2-D and 3-D object detection, RGB-T, and RGB-D datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method.
abstract_zh: 为了在现实场景中实现准确、鲁棒的目标检测，需要结合各种形式的图像，例如颜色、热和深度。然而，多模态数据经常遇到位置偏移问题，即图像对不严格对齐，使得一个对象在不同模态下具有不同的位置。对于深度学习方法来说，这个问题使得融合多模​​态特征变得困难，给卷积神经网络（CNN）的训练带来困扰。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为对齐区域 CNN (AR-CNN) 的通用多模态检测器来解决位置偏移问题。首先，设计具有相邻相似性约束的区域特征（RF）对齐模块，以一致地预测两种模态之间的位置偏移并自适应地对齐跨模态 RF。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的感兴趣区域（RoI）抖动策略，以提高对意外转变模式的鲁棒性。第三，我们提出了一种新的多模态特征融合方法，该方法选择更可靠的特征并通过特征重新加权来抑制不太有用的特征。此外，通过在两种模态中定位边界框并建立它们的关系，我们提供了名为 KAIST-Paired 的新型多模态标签。对 2-D 和 3-D 对象检测、RGB-T 和 RGB-D 数据集的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AR-CNN的多模态目标检测方法，通过解决多模态数据的位置偏移问题来提升检测准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中多模态数据（如可见光、热成像、深度图像）常存在位置偏移问题，导致传统深度学习方法难以有效融合多模态特征并训练CNN。
AI.method: 设计了带相邻相似性约束的区域特征对齐模块预测位置偏移并实现跨模态对齐；提出RoI抖动策略增强对意外偏移的鲁棒性；通过特征重加权选择可靠特征并抑制无效特征；构建了新型多模态标注数据集KAIST-Paired。
AI.result: 在RGB-T、RGB-D及2D/3D目标检测数据集上的大量实验验证了方法的有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过位置对齐、特征重加权及新型标注的综合设计，本文方法显著提升了多模态目标检测在位置偏移场景下的性能。

search_text: Weakly Aligned Feature Fusion for Multimodal Object Detection 用于多模态目标检测的弱对齐特征融合 To achieve accurate and robust object detection in the real-world scenario, various forms of images are incorporated, such as color, thermal, and depth. However, multimodal data often suffer from the position shift problem, i.e., the image pair is not strictly aligned, making one object has different positions in different modalities. For the deep learning method, this problem makes it difficult to fuse multimodal features and puzzles the convolutional neural network (CNN) training. In this article, we propose a general multimodal detector named aligned region CNN (AR-CNN) to tackle the position shift problem. First, a region feature (RF) alignment module with adjacent similarity constraint is designed to consistently predict the position shift between two modalities and adaptively align the cross-modal RFs. Second, we propose a novel region of interest (RoI) jitter strategy to improve the robustness to unexpected shift patterns. Third, we present a new multimodal feature fusion method that selects the more reliable feature and suppresses the less useful one via feature reweighting. In addition, by locating bounding boxes in both modalities and building their relationships, we provide novel multimodal labeling named KAIST-Paired. Extensive experiments on 2-D and 3-D object detection, RGB-T, and RGB-D datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method. 为了在现实场景中实现准确、鲁棒的目标检测，需要结合各种形式的图像，例如颜色、热和深度。然而，多模态数据经常遇到位置偏移问题，即图像对不严格对齐，使得一个对象在不同模态下具有不同的位置。对于深度学习方法来说，这个问题使得融合多模​​态特征变得困难，给卷积神经网络（CNN）的训练带来困扰。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为对齐区域 CNN (AR-CNN) 的通用多模态检测器来解决位置偏移问题。首先，设计具有相邻相似性约束的区域特征（RF）对齐模块，以一致地预测两种模态之间的位置偏移并自适应地对齐跨模态 RF。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的感兴趣区域（RoI）抖动策略，以提高对意外转变模式的鲁棒性。第三，我们提出了一种新的多模态特征融合方法，该方法选择更可靠的特征并通过特征重新加权来抑制不太有用的特征。此外，通过在两种模态中定位边界框并建立它们的关系，我们提供了名为 KAIST-Paired 的新型多模态标签。对 2-D 和 3-D 对象检测、RGB-T 和 RGB-D 数据集的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性和鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种名为AR-CNN的多模态目标检测方法，通过解决多模态数据的位置偏移问题来提升检测准确性与鲁棒性。 Lu Zhang,Zhiyong Liu,Xiangyu Zhu,Zhan Song,Xu Yang,Zhen Lei,Hong Qiao cs.CV

authors_text: Lu Zhang,Siqi Zhang,Xu Yang,Hong Qiao,Zhiyong Liu
title: Unseen Object Instance Segmentation with Fully Test-time RGB-D Embeddings Adaptation
title_zh: 具有完全测试时间 RGB-D 嵌入自适应的看不见的对象实例分割
comment: Accepted to ICRA 2023
comments: Accepted to ICRA 2023
abstract: Segmenting unseen objects is a crucial ability for the robot since it may encounter new environments during the operation. Recently, a popular solution is leveraging RGB-D features of large-scale synthetic data and directly applying the model to unseen real-world scenarios. However, the domain shift caused by the sim2real gap is inevitable, posing a crucial challenge to the segmentation model. In this paper, we emphasize the adaptation process across sim2real domains and model it as a learning problem on the BatchNorm parameters of a simulation-trained model. Specifically, we propose a novel non-parametric entropy objective, which formulates the learning objective for the test-time adaptation in an open-world manner. Then, a cross-modality knowledge distillation objective is further designed to encourage the test-time knowledge transfer for feature enhancement. Our approach can be efficiently implemented with only test images, without requiring annotations or revisiting the large-scale synthetic training data. Besides significant time savings, the proposed method consistently improves segmentation results on the overlap and boundary metrics, achieving state-of-the-art performance on unseen object instance segmentation.
summary: Segmenting unseen objects is a crucial ability for the robot since it may encounter new environments during the operation. Recently, a popular solution is leveraging RGB-D features of large-scale synthetic data and directly applying the model to unseen real-world scenarios. However, the domain shift caused by the sim2real gap is inevitable, posing a crucial challenge to the segmentation model. In this paper, we emphasize the adaptation process across sim2real domains and model it as a learning problem on the BatchNorm parameters of a simulation-trained model. Specifically, we propose a novel non-parametric entropy objective, which formulates the learning objective for the test-time adaptation in an open-world manner. Then, a cross-modality knowledge distillation objective is further designed to encourage the test-time knowledge transfer for feature enhancement. Our approach can be efficiently implemented with only test images, without requiring annotations or revisiting the large-scale synthetic training data. Besides significant time savings, the proposed method consistently improves segmentation results on the overlap and boundary metrics, achieving state-of-the-art performance on unseen object instance segmentation.
abstract_zh: 分割看不见的物体对于机器人来说是一项至关重要的能力，因为它在操作过程中可能会遇到新的环境。最近，一种流行的解决方案是利用大规模合成数据的 RGB-D 特征，并将模型直接应用于未见过的现实场景。然而，sim2real差距引起的域转移是不可避免的，这对分割模型提出了严峻的挑战。在本文中，我们强调跨 sim2real 域的适应过程，并将其建模为模拟训练模型的 BatchNorm 参数的学习问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的非参数熵目标，它以开放世界的方式制定了测试时间适应的学习目标。然后，进一步设计跨模态知识蒸馏目标，以鼓励测试时知识转移以增强特征。我们的方法可以仅使用测试图像来有效实现，而不需要注释或重新访问大规模合成训练数据。除了显着节省时间之外，所提出的方法还持续改进了重叠和边界指标的分割结果，在不可见的对象实例分割上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于测试时RGB-D嵌入自适应的方法，解决机器人在真实场景中分割未见过物体的领域迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法直接应用合成数据训练的模型到真实场景时，因sim2real领域差异导致分割效果下降，亟需有效适应策略。
AI.method: 将领域适应建模为对预训练模型BatchNorm参数的学习问题，提出非参数熵目标实现开放世界自适应，并设计跨模态知识蒸馏增强特征表达，无需标注数据和重新访问合成数据。
AI.result: 在重叠区域和边界指标上显著提升分割精度，达到未见过物体实例分割的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过测试时自适应有效缓解领域差异，在无需额外数据的情况下提升分割性能，具有实际应用价值。

Recently, a popular solution is leveraging RGB-D features of large-scale synthetic data and directly applying the model to unseen real-world scenarios. However, the domain shift caused by the sim2real gap is inevitable, posing a crucial challenge to the segmentation model. In this paper, we emphasize the adaptation process across sim2real domains and model it as a learning problem on the BatchNorm parameters of a simulation-trained model. Specifically, we propose a novel non-parametric entropy objective, which formulates the learning objective for the test-time adaptation in an open-world manner. Our approach can be efficiently implemented with only test images, without requiring annotations or revisiting the large-scale synthetic training data. authors_text: Steve T. M. Ataky,Diego Saqui,Jonathan de Matos,Alceu S. Britto Jr.,Alessandro L. Koerich
title: Multiscale Analysis for Improving Texture Classification
title_zh: 用于改进纹理分类的多尺度分析
comment: 6 pages
comments: 6 pages
abstract: Information from an image occurs over multiple and distinct spatial scales. Image pyramid multiresolution representations are a useful data structure for image analysis and manipulation over a spectrum of spatial scales. This paper employs the Gaussian-Laplacian pyramid to treat different spatial frequency bands of a texture separately. First, we generate three images corresponding to three levels of the Gaussian-Laplacian pyramid for an input image to capture intrinsic details. Then we aggregate features extracted from gray and color texture images using bio-inspired texture descriptors, information-theoretic measures, gray-level co-occurrence matrix features, and Haralick statistical features into a single feature vector. Such an aggregation aims at producing features that characterize textures to their maximum extent, unlike employing each descriptor separately, which may lose some relevant textural information and reduce the classification performance. The experimental results on texture and histopathologic image datasets have shown the advantages of the proposed method compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Such findings emphasize the importance of multiscale image analysis and corroborate that the descriptors mentioned above are complementary.
summary: Information from an image occurs over multiple and distinct spatial scales. Image pyramid multiresolution representations are a useful data structure for image analysis and manipulation over a spectrum of spatial scales. This paper employs the Gaussian-Laplacian pyramid to treat different spatial frequency bands of a texture separately. First, we generate three images corresponding to three levels of the Gaussian-Laplacian pyramid for an input image to capture intrinsic details. Then we aggregate features extracted from gray and color texture images using bio-inspired texture descriptors, information-theoretic measures, gray-level co-occurrence matrix features, and Haralick statistical features into a single feature vector. Such an aggregation aims at producing features that characterize textures to their maximum extent, unlike employing each descriptor separately, which may lose some relevant textural information and reduce the classification performance. The experimental results on texture and histopathologic image datasets have shown the advantages of the proposed method compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Such findings emphasize the importance of multiscale image analysis and corroborate that the descriptors mentioned above are complementary.
abstract_zh: 来自图像的信息发生在多个不同的空间尺度上。图像金字塔多分辨率表示是一种有用的数据结构，可用于在一系列空间尺度上进行图像分析和操作。本文采用高斯-拉普拉斯金字塔来分别处理纹理的不同空间频带。首先，我们为输入图像生成与高斯拉普拉斯金字塔的三个级别相对应的三个图像，以捕获内在细节。然后，我们使用仿生纹理描述符、信息论测量、灰度共生矩阵特征和 Haralick 统计特征将从灰度和彩色纹理图像中提取的特征聚合到单个特征向量中。这种聚合的目的是产生最大程度地表征纹理的特征，这与单独使用每个描述符不同，这可能会丢失一些相关的纹理信息并降低分类性能。纹理和组织病理学图像数据集的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法具有优势。这些发现强调了多尺度图像分析的重要性，并证实了上述描述符是互补的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过多尺度分析改进纹理分类，利用高斯-拉普拉斯金字塔分离不同空间频率的纹理细节，并融合多种纹理描述子以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 纹理信息分布在多尺度空间中，单一尺度分析可能丢失关键细节，而现有方法未充分利用多尺度特征的互补性。
AI.method: 构建高斯-拉普拉斯金字塔提取三尺度纹理细节，结合生物启发式描述子、信息论指标、灰度共生矩阵及Haralick特征，聚合为统一特征向量进行分类。
AI.result: 在纹理及组织病理学图像数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有先进算法，验证了多尺度分析与特征融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度分析对纹理分类至关重要，所采用的描述子在多尺度下具有互补性，可显著提升分类准确率。

search_text: Multiscale Analysis for Improving Texture Classification 用于改进纹理分类的多尺度分析 Information from an image occurs over multiple and distinct spatial scales. Image pyramid multiresolution representations are a useful data structure for image analysis and manipulation over a spectrum of spatial scales. This paper employs the Gaussian-Laplacian pyramid to treat different spatial frequency bands of a texture separately. First, we generate three images corresponding to three levels of the Gaussian-Laplacian pyramid for an input image to capture intrinsic details. Then we aggregate features extracted from gray and color texture images using bio-inspired texture descriptors, information-theoretic measures, gray-level co-occurrence matrix features, and Haralick statistical features into a single feature vector. Such an aggregation aims at producing features that characterize textures to their maximum extent, unlike employing each descriptor separately, which may lose some relevant textural information and reduce the classification performance. The experimental results on texture and histopathologic image datasets have shown the advantages of the proposed method compared to state-of-the-art approaches. Such findings emphasize the importance of multiscale image analysis and corroborate that the descriptors mentioned above are complementary. 来自图像的信息发生在多个不同的空间尺度上。图像金字塔多分辨率表示是一种有用的数据结构，可用于在一系列空间尺度上进行图像分析和操作。本文采用高斯-拉普拉斯金字塔来分别处理纹理的不同空间频带。首先，我们为输入图像生成与高斯拉普拉斯金字塔的三个级别相对应的三个图像，以捕获内在细节。然后，我们使用仿生纹理描述符、信息论测量、灰度共生矩阵特征和 Haralick 统计特征将从灰度和彩色纹理图像中提取的特征聚合到单个特征向量中。这种聚合的目的是产生最大程度地表征纹理的特征，这与单独使用每个描述符不同，这可能会丢失一些相关的纹理信息并降低分类性能。纹理和组织病理学图像数据集的实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法具有优势。这些发现强调了多尺度图像分析的重要性，并证实了上述描述符是互补的。 本文通过多尺度分析改进纹理分类，利用高斯-拉普拉斯金字塔分离不同空间频率的纹理细节，并融合多种纹理描述子以提升分类性能。 Steve T. M. Ataky,Diego Saqui,Jonathan de Matos,Alceu S. Britto Jr.,Alessandro L. Koerich cs.CV

authors_text: Tianyu Cui,Gaopeng Gou,Gang Xiong,Chang Liu,Peipei Fu,Zhen Li
title: 6GAN: IPv6 Multi-Pattern Target Generation via Generative Adversarial Nets with Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 6GAN：通过强化学习的生成对抗网络生成 IPv6 多模式目标
comment: The paper has been accepted at the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Computer Communications (INFOCOM 2021). The source code has been published at https://github.com/CuiTianyu961030/6GAN
comments: The paper has been accepted at the 2021 IEEE International Conference on Computer Communications (INFOCOM 2021). The source code has been published at https://github.com/CuiTianyu961030/6GAN
abstract: Global IPv6 scanning has always been a challenge for researchers because of the limited network speed and computational power. Target generation algorithms are recently proposed to overcome the problem for Internet assessments by predicting a candidate set to scan. However, IPv6 custom address configuration emerges diverse addressing patterns discouraging algorithmic inference. Widespread IPv6 alias could also mislead the algorithm to discover aliased regions rather than valid host targets. In this paper, we introduce 6GAN, a novel architecture built with Generative Adversarial Net (GAN) and reinforcement learning for multi-pattern target generation. 6GAN forces multiple generators to train with a multi-class discriminator and an alias detector to generate non-aliased active targets with different addressing pattern types. The rewards from the discriminator and the alias detector help supervise the address sequence decision-making process. After adversarial training, 6GAN's generators could keep a strong imitating ability for each pattern and 6GAN's discriminator obtains outstanding pattern discrimination ability with a 0.966 accuracy. Experiments indicate that our work outperformed the state-of-the-art target generation algorithms by reaching a higher-quality candidate set.
summary: Global IPv6 scanning has always been a challenge for researchers because of the limited network speed and computational power. Target generation algorithms are recently proposed to overcome the problem for Internet assessments by predicting a candidate set to scan. However, IPv6 custom address configuration emerges diverse addressing patterns discouraging algorithmic inference. Widespread IPv6 alias could also mislead the algorithm to discover aliased regions rather than valid host targets. In this paper, we introduce 6GAN, a novel architecture built with Generative Adversarial Net (GAN) and reinforcement learning for multi-pattern target generation. 6GAN forces multiple generators to train with a multi-class discriminator and an alias detector to generate non-aliased active targets with different addressing pattern types. The rewards from the discriminator and the alias detector help supervise the address sequence decision-making process. After adversarial training, 6GAN's generators could keep a strong imitating ability for each pattern and 6GAN's discriminator obtains outstanding pattern discrimination ability with a 0.966 accuracy. Experiments indicate that our work outperformed the state-of-the-art target generation algorithms by reaching a higher-quality candidate set.
abstract_zh: 由于网络速度和计算能力有限，全球 IPv6 扫描一直是研究人员面临的挑战。最近提出了目标生成算法，通过预测要扫描的候选集来克服互联网评估的问题。然而，IPv6 自定义地址配置出现了多种寻址模式，阻碍了算法推理。广泛的 IPv6 别名还可能误导算法发现别名区域而不是有效的主机目标。在本文中，我们介绍了 6GAN，这是一种利用生成对抗网络（GAN）和强化学习构建的用于多模式目标生成的新颖架构。 6GAN 强制多个生成器使用多类鉴别器和混叠检测器进行训练，以生成具有不同寻址模式类型的非混叠活动目标。来自鉴别器和别名检测器的奖励有助于监督地址序列决策过程。经过对抗性训练，6GAN 的生成器对每种模式都能保持很强的模仿能力，6GAN 的判别器获得了出色的模式判别能力，准确率达到 0.966。实验表明，我们的工作通过达到更高质量的候选集，优于最先进的目标生成算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出6GAN，一种结合生成对抗网络（GAN）和强化学习的IPv6多模式目标生成方法，用于解决IPv6网络扫描中目标生成的挑战。
AI.motivation: IPv6地址配置的多样性及别名问题导致传统算法难以生成有效扫描目标，现有方法在处理多模式地址和别名干扰时存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计包含多个生成器的GAN架构，结合多类判别器和别名检测器，通过强化学习奖励机制指导地址序列生成，确保输出非别名的有效目标。
AI.result: 6GAN的判别器达到0.966的分类准确率，生成的目标集质量优于现有算法，有效应对IPv6多模式地址和别名干扰问题。
AI.conclusion: 6GAN通过融合GAN与强化学习，成功解决了IPv6地址生成中的模式多样性和别名干扰问题，为网络评估提供了高质量候选目标生成方案。

authors_text: Jieru Mei,Yucheng Han,Yutong Bai,Yixiao Zhang,Yingwei Li,Xianhang Li,Alan Yuille,Cihang Xie
title: Fast AdvProp
title_zh: 快速高级道具
comment: ICLR 2022 camera ready version
comments: ICLR 2022 camera ready version
abstract: Adversarial Propagation (AdvProp) is an effective way to improve recognition models, leveraging adversarial examples. Nonetheless, AdvProp suffers from the extremely slow training speed, mainly because: a) extra forward and backward passes are required for generating adversarial examples; b) both original samples and their adversarial counterparts are used for training (i.e., 2$\times$ data). In this paper, we introduce Fast AdvProp, which aggressively revamps AdvProp's costly training components, rendering the method nearly as cheap as the vanilla training. Specifically, our modifications in Fast AdvProp are guided by the hypothesis that disentangled learning with adversarial examples is the key for performance improvements, while other training recipes (e.g., paired clean and adversarial training samples, multi-step adversarial attackers) could be largely simplified. Our empirical results show that, compared to the vanilla training baseline, Fast AdvProp is able to further model performance on a spectrum of visual benchmarks, without incurring extra training cost. Additionally, our ablations find Fast AdvProp scales better if larger models are used, is compatible with existing data augmentation methods (i.e., Mixup and CutMix), and can be easily adapted to other recognition tasks like object detection. The code is available here: https://github.com/meijieru/fast_advprop.
summary: Adversarial Propagation (AdvProp) is an effective way to improve recognition models, leveraging adversarial examples. Nonetheless, AdvProp suffers from the extremely slow training speed, mainly because: a) extra forward and backward passes are required for generating adversarial examples; b) both original samples and their adversarial counterparts are used for training (i.e., 2$\times$ data). In this paper, we introduce Fast AdvProp, which aggressively revamps AdvProp's costly training components, rendering the method nearly as cheap as the vanilla training. Specifically, our modifications in Fast AdvProp are guided by the hypothesis that disentangled learning with adversarial examples is the key for performance improvements, while other training recipes (e.g., paired clean and adversarial training samples, multi-step adversarial attackers) could be largely simplified. Our empirical results show that, compared to the vanilla training baseline, Fast AdvProp is able to further model performance on a spectrum of visual benchmarks, without incurring extra training cost. Additionally, our ablations find Fast AdvProp scales better if larger models are used, is compatible with existing data augmentation methods (i.e., Mixup and CutMix), and can be easily adapted to other recognition tasks like object detection. The code is available here: https://github.com/meijieru/fast_advprop.
abstract_zh: 对抗性传播（AdvProp）是利用对抗性示例改进识别模型的有效方法。尽管如此，AdvProp 的训练速度极慢，主要是因为：a）需要额外的前向和后向传递来生成对抗性示例； b）原始样本及其对抗样本均用于训练（即 2$\times$ 数据）。在本文中，我们介绍了 Fast AdvProp，它积极改进了 AdvProp 昂贵的训练组件，使该方法几乎与普通训练一样便宜。具体来说，我们对 Fast AdvProp 的修改是以这样的假设为指导的：使用对抗性示例进行解缠学习是性能改进的关键，而其他训练方法（例如，配对的干净和对抗性训练样本、多步骤对抗性攻击者）可以大大简化。我们的实证结果表明，与普通训练基线相比，Fast AdvProp 能够在一系列视觉基准上进一步建模性能，而不会产生额外的训练成本。此外，我们的消融发现，如果使用更大的模型，Fast AdvProp 的尺度会更好，与现有的数据增强方法（即 Mixup 和 CutMix）兼容，并且可以轻松适应其他识别任务，例如对象检测。代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/meijieru/fast_advprop。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fast AdvProp方法，在保持对抗传播（AdvProp）性能优势的同时显著提升训练效率。
AI.motivation: 传统AdvProp方法因需生成对抗样本导致训练速度极慢，且需处理两倍数据量，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 通过解耦对抗样本的训练过程，简化生成步骤（如去除多步攻击器），仅保留核心对抗学习机制。
AI.result: 实验表明Fast AdvProp在多个视觉基准测试中优于普通训练，在更大模型和数据增强方法（如Mixup）上表现更优，且适用于目标检测等任务。
AI.conclusion: Fast AdvProp通过优化训练流程，在几乎不增加计算成本的前提下提升了模型鲁棒性，具有良好的扩展性和兼容性。

method: 通过解耦对抗样本的训练过程，简化生成步骤（如去除多步攻击器），仅保留核心对抗学习机制。
result: 实验表明Fast AdvProp在多个视觉基准测试中优于普通训练，在更大模型和数据增强方法（如Mixup）上表现更优，且适用于目标检测等任务。
conclusion: Fast AdvProp通过优化训练流程，在几乎不增加计算成本的前提下提升了模型鲁棒性，具有良好的扩展性和兼容性。
search_text: Fast AdvProp 快速高级道具 Adversarial Propagation (AdvProp) is an effective way to improve recognition models, leveraging adversarial examples. Nonetheless, AdvProp suffers from the extremely slow training speed, mainly because: a) extra forward and backward passes are required for generating adversarial examples; b) both original samples and their adversarial counterparts are used for training (i.e., 2$\times$ data). In this paper, we introduce Fast AdvProp, which aggressively revamps AdvProp's costly training components, rendering the method nearly as cheap as the vanilla training. Specifically, our modifications in Fast AdvProp are guided by the hypothesis that disentangled learning with adversarial examples is the key for performance improvements, while other training recipes (e.g., paired clean and adversarial training samples, multi-step adversarial attackers) could be largely simplified. Our empirical results show that, compared to the vanilla training baseline, Fast AdvProp is able to further model performance on a spectrum of visual benchmarks, without incurring extra training cost. Additionally, our ablations find Fast AdvProp scales better if larger models are used, is compatible with existing data augmentation methods (i.e., Mixup and CutMix), and can be easily adapted to other recognition tasks like object detection. The code is available here: https://github.com/meijieru/fast_advprop. 对抗性传播（AdvProp）是利用对抗性示例改进识别模型的有效方法。尽管如此，AdvProp 的训练速度极慢，主要是因为：a）需要额外的前向和后向传递来生成对抗性示例； b）原始样本及其对抗样本均用于训练（即 2$\times$ 数据）。在本文中，我们介绍了 Fast AdvProp，它积极改进了 AdvProp 昂贵的训练组件，使该方法几乎与普通训练一样便宜。具体来说，我们对 Fast AdvProp 的修改是以这样的假设为指导的：使用对抗性示例进行解缠学习是性能改进的关键，而其他训练方法（例如，配对的干净和对抗性训练样本、多步骤对抗性攻击者）可以大大简化。我们的实证结果表明，与普通训练基线相比，Fast AdvProp 能够在一系列视觉基准上进一步建模性能，而不会产生额外的训练成本。此外，我们的消融发现，如果使用更大的模型，Fast AdvProp 的尺度会更好，与现有的数据增强方法（即 Mixup 和 CutMix）兼容，并且可以轻松适应其他识别任务，例如对象检测。代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/meijieru/fast_advprop。 本文提出Fast AdvProp方法，在保持对抗传播（AdvProp）性能优势的同时显著提升训练效率。 Jieru Mei,Yucheng Han,Yutong Bai,Yixiao Zhang,Yingwei Li,Xianhang Li,Alan Yuille,Cihang Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Vaidehi Srinivas,David P. Woodruff,Ziyu Xu,Samson Zhou
title: Memory Bounds for the Experts Problem
title_zh: 专家问题的内存限制
comment: 32 pages, 1 figure, to appear in the 54th ACM Symposium on Theory of Computing (STOC 2022)
comments: 32 pages, 1 figure, to appear in the 54th ACM Symposium on Theory of Computing (STOC 2022)
abstract: Online learning with expert advice is a fundamental problem of sequential prediction. In this problem, the algorithm has access to a set of $n$ "experts" who make predictions on each day. The goal on each day is to process these predictions, and make a prediction with the minimum cost. After making a prediction, the algorithm sees the actual outcome on that day, updates its state, and then moves on to the next day. An algorithm is judged by how well it does compared to the best expert in the set. The classical algorithm for this problem is the multiplicative weights algorithm. However, every application, to our knowledge, relies on storing weights for every expert, and uses $Ω(n)$ memory. There is little work on understanding the memory required to solve the online learning with expert advice problem, or run standard sequential prediction algorithms, in natural streaming models, which is especially important when the number of experts, as well as the number of days on which the experts make predictions, is large. We initiate the study of the learning with expert advice problem in the streaming setting, and show lower and upper bounds. Our lower bound for i.i.d., random order, and adversarial order streams uses a reduction to a custom-built problem using a novel masking technique, to show a smooth trade-off for regret versus memory. Our upper bounds show novel ways to run standard sequential prediction algorithms in rounds on small "pools" of experts, thus reducing the necessary memory. For random-order streams, we show that our upper bound is tight up to low order terms. We hope that these results and techniques will have broad applications in online learning, and can inspire algorithms based on standard sequential prediction techniques, like multiplicative weights, for a wide range of other problems in the memory-constrained setting.

After making a prediction, the algorithm sees the actual outcome on that day, updates its state, and then moves on to the next day. However, every application, to our knowledge, relies on storing weights for every expert, and uses $Ω(n)$ memory. There is little work on understanding the memory required to solve the online learning with expert advice problem, or run standard sequential prediction algorithms, in natural streaming models, which is especially important when the number of experts, as well as the number of days on which the experts make predictions, is large. We initiate the study of the learning with expert advice problem in the streaming setting, and show lower and upper bounds. Our lower bound for i.i.d., random order, and adversarial order streams uses a reduction to a custom-built problem using a novel masking technique, to show a smooth trade-off for regret versus memory. Our upper bounds show novel ways to run standard sequential prediction algorithms in rounds on small "pools" of experts, thus reducing the necessary memory. For random-order streams, we show that our upper bound is tight up to low order terms. We hope that these results and techniques will have broad applications in online learning, and can inspire algorithms based on standard sequential prediction techniques, like multiplicative weights, for a wide range of other problems in the memory-constrained setting.
abstract_zh: 具有专家建议的在线学习是顺序预测的一个基本问题。在这个问题中，算法可以访问一组 $n$ 个“专家”，他们每天都会做出预测。每天的目标就是处理这些预测，并以最小的成本做出预测。做出预测后，算法会看到当天的实际结果，更新其状态，然后继续到第二天。判断一个算法的标准是它与该组中最好的专家相比的表现如何。该问题的经典算法是乘法权重算法。然而，据我们所知，每个应用程序都依赖于存储每个专家的权重，并使用 $Ω(n)$ 内存。在自然流模型中，了解解决在线学习专家建议问题或运行标准顺序预测算法所需的内存几乎没有什么工作，当专家数量以及专家做出预测的天数很大时，这一点尤其重要。我们在流媒体设置中启动了专家建议学习问题的研究，并显示了下限和上限。我们的独立同分布、随机顺序和对抗顺序流的下限使用一种新颖的掩码技术来减少定制问题，以显示后悔与记忆的平滑权衡。我们的上限展示了在小型专家“池”上轮次运行标准顺序预测算法的新颖方法，从而减少了必要的内存。对于随机顺序流，我们表明我们的上限对于低阶项是严格的。我们希望这些结果和技术能够在在线学习中得到广泛的应用，并且能够启发基于标准顺序预测技术（例如乘法权重）的算法，以解决内存受限环境中的各种其他问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究在线学习中专家建议问题的内存需求，分析了在流式模型下解决该问题的内存上下界。
AI.motivation: 传统专家问题算法（如乘法权重算法）需要Ω(n)内存，无法适应大规模专家和长时间序列预测场景，需探索流式模型下的内存效率方法。
AI.method: 通过构造自定义问题并结合掩码技术证明下界，同时设计分轮次处理小规模专家池的算法以降低内存需求，分析了独立同分布、随机顺序和对抗顺序流的差异。
AI.result: 证明了流式模型下内存与遗憾的平滑权衡关系，提出基于小池分轮次处理的上界算法，且随机顺序流的上界紧致性达到低阶项精度。
AI.conclusion: 研究为在线学习的内存约束场景提供了理论基础与算法框架，未来可扩展至其他内存受限问题的乘法权重类算法设计。

Our upper bounds show novel ways to run standard sequential prediction algorithms in rounds on small "pools" of experts, thus reducing the necessary memory. authors_text: Prithvi Akella,Anushri Dixit,Mohamadreza Ahmadi,Joel W. Burdick,Aaron D. Ames
title: Sample-Based Bounds for Coherent Risk Measures: Applications to Policy Synthesis and Verification
title_zh: 一致风险度量的基于样本的界限：在政策综合和验证中的应用
abstract: The dramatic increase of autonomous systems subject to variable environments has given rise to the pressing need to consider risk in both the synthesis and verification of policies for these systems. This paper aims to address a few problems regarding risk-aware verification and policy synthesis, by first developing a sample-based method to bound the risk measure evaluation of a random variable whose distribution is unknown. These bounds permit us to generate high-confidence verification statements for a large class of robotic systems. Second, we develop a sample-based method to determine solutions to non-convex optimization problems that outperform a large fraction of the decision space of possible solutions. Both sample-based approaches then permit us to rapidly synthesize risk-aware policies that are guaranteed to achieve a minimum level of system performance. To showcase our approach in simulation, we verify a cooperative multi-agent system and develop a risk-aware controller that outperforms the system's baseline controller. We also mention how our approach can be extended to account for any $g$-entropic risk measure - the subset of coherent risk measures on which we focus.
summary: The dramatic increase of autonomous systems subject to variable environments has given rise to the pressing need to consider risk in both the synthesis and verification of policies for these systems. This paper aims to address a few problems regarding risk-aware verification and policy synthesis, by first developing a sample-based method to bound the risk measure evaluation of a random variable whose distribution is unknown. These bounds permit us to generate high-confidence verification statements for a large class of robotic systems. Second, we develop a sample-based method to determine solutions to non-convex optimization problems that outperform a large fraction of the decision space of possible solutions. Both sample-based approaches then permit us to rapidly synthesize risk-aware policies that are guaranteed to achieve a minimum level of system performance. To showcase our approach in simulation, we verify a cooperative multi-agent system and develop a risk-aware controller that outperforms the system's baseline controller. We also mention how our approach can be extended to account for any $g$-entropic risk measure - the subset of coherent risk measures on which we focus.
abstract_zh: 受可变环境影响的自主系统的急剧增加，迫切需要在这些系统的策略的综合和验证中考虑风险。本文旨在解决有关风险意识验证和政策综合的一些问题，首先开发一种基于样本的方法来限制分布未知的随机变量的风险度量评估。这些界限使我们能够为一大类机器人系统生成高可信度的验证语句。其次，我们开发了一种基于样本的方法来确定非凸优化问题的解决方案，其性能优于大部分可能解决方案的决策空间。两种基于样本的方法都允许我们快速综合风险意识策略，以保证实现最低水平的系统性能。为了展示我们的模拟方法，我们验证了一个协作多智能体系统，并开发了一个优于系统基线控制器的风险感知控制器。我们还提到如何扩展我们的方法以解释任何 $g$-熵风险度量 - 我们关注的连贯风险度量的子集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于样本的相干风险度量界限方法，并应用于策略合成与验证，以应对自主系统在复杂环境中的风险问题。
AI.motivation: 随着自主系统在多变环境中的广泛应用，传统策略合成与验证方法难以满足风险可控的需求，亟需开发兼顾性能与风险的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发两种基于样本的方法：1) 通过有限样本估计未知分布的风险度量界限；2) 利用样本解决非凸优化问题，快速生成满足最低性能保障的风险感知策略。
AI.result: 在多智能体系统仿真中验证了方法有效性，所设计的风险感知控制器性能优于基线方案，并可扩展至g-熵风险度量框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自主系统的风险感知策略合成提供了高效可靠的理论工具，未来可进一步拓展至更复杂的动态环境与风险模型。

result: 在多智能体系统仿真中验证了方法有效性，所设计的风险感知控制器性能优于基线方案，并可扩展至g-熵风险度量框架。
conclusion: 该方法为自主系统的风险感知策略合成提供了高效可靠的理论工具，未来可进一步拓展至更复杂的动态环境与风险模型。
search_text: Sample-Based Bounds for Coherent Risk Measures: Applications to Policy Synthesis and Verification 一致风险度量的基于样本的界限：在政策综合和验证中的应用 The dramatic increase of autonomous systems subject to variable environments has given rise to the pressing need to consider risk in both the synthesis and verification of policies for these systems. This paper aims to address a few problems regarding risk-aware verification and policy synthesis, by first developing a sample-based method to bound the risk measure evaluation of a random variable whose distribution is unknown. These bounds permit us to generate high-confidence verification statements for a large class of robotic systems. Second, we develop a sample-based method to determine solutions to non-convex optimization problems that outperform a large fraction of the decision space of possible solutions. Both sample-based approaches then permit us to rapidly synthesize risk-aware policies that are guaranteed to achieve a minimum level of system performance. To showcase our approach in simulation, we verify a cooperative multi-agent system and develop a risk-aware controller that outperforms the system's baseline controller. We also mention how our approach can be extended to account for any $g$-entropic risk measure - the subset of coherent risk measures on which we focus. 受可变环境影响的自主系统的急剧增加，迫切需要在这些系统的策略的综合和验证中考虑风险。本文旨在解决有关风险意识验证和政策综合的一些问题，首先开发一种基于样本的方法来限制分布未知的随机变量的风险度量评估。这些界限使我们能够为一大类机器人系统生成高可信度的验证语句。其次，我们开发了一种基于样本的方法来确定非凸优化问题的解决方案，其性能优于大部分可能解决方案的决策空间。两种基于样本的方法都允许我们快速综合风险意识策略，以保证实现最低水平的系统性能。为了展示我们的模拟方法，我们验证了一个协作多智能体系统，并开发了一个优于系统基线控制器的风险感知控制器。我们还提到如何扩展我们的方法以解释任何 $g$-熵风险度量 - 我们关注的连贯风险度量的子集。 本文提出基于样本的相干风险度量界限方法，并应用于策略合成与验证，以应对自主系统在复杂环境中的风险问题。 Prithvi Akella,Anushri Dixit,Mohamadreza Ahmadi,Joel W. Burdick,Aaron D. Ames cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Luca Grillotti,Antoine Cully
title: Relevance-guided Unsupervised Discovery of Abilities with Quality-Diversity Algorithms
title_zh: 通过质量多样性算法进行相关性引导的无监督能力发现
comment: Accepted at GECCO 2022
comments: Accepted at GECCO 2022
abstract: Quality-Diversity algorithms provide efficient mechanisms to generate large collections of diverse and high-performing solutions, which have shown to be instrumental for solving downstream tasks. However, most of those algorithms rely on a behavioural descriptor to characterise the diversity that is hand-coded, hence requiring prior knowledge about the considered tasks. In this work, we introduce Relevance-guided Unsupervised Discovery of Abilities; a Quality-Diversity algorithm that autonomously finds a behavioural characterisation tailored to the task at hand. In particular, our method introduces a custom diversity metric that leads to higher densities of solutions near the areas of interest in the learnt behavioural descriptor space. We evaluate our approach on a simulated robotic environment, where the robot has to autonomously discover its abilities based on its full sensory data. We evaluated the algorithms on three tasks: navigation to random targets, moving forward with a high velocity, and performing half-rolls. The experimental results show that our method manages to discover collections of solutions that are not only diverse, but also well-adapted to the considered downstream task.
summary: Quality-Diversity algorithms provide efficient mechanisms to generate large collections of diverse and high-performing solutions, which have shown to be instrumental for solving downstream tasks. However, most of those algorithms rely on a behavioural descriptor to characterise the diversity that is hand-coded, hence requiring prior knowledge about the considered tasks. In this work, we introduce Relevance-guided Unsupervised Discovery of Abilities; a Quality-Diversity algorithm that autonomously finds a behavioural characterisation tailored to the task at hand. In particular, our method introduces a custom diversity metric that leads to higher densities of solutions near the areas of interest in the learnt behavioural descriptor space. We evaluate our approach on a simulated robotic environment, where the robot has to autonomously discover its abilities based on its full sensory data. We evaluated the algorithms on three tasks: navigation to random targets, moving forward with a high velocity, and performing half-rolls. The experimental results show that our method manages to discover collections of solutions that are not only diverse, but also well-adapted to the considered downstream task.
abstract_zh: 质量多样性算法提供了有效的机制来生成大量多样化且高性能的解决方案，这已被证明有助于解决下游任务。然而，大多数这些算法依赖行为描述符来表征手动编码的多样性，因此需要有关所考虑任务的先验知识。在这项工作中，我们介绍了相关性引导的无监督能力发现；质量多样性算法，可自动找到适合手头任务的行为特征。特别是，我们的方法引入了自定义多样性度量，该度量导致在学习的行为描述符空间中感兴趣的区域附近产生更高密度的解决方案。我们在模拟机器人环境中评估我们的方法，其中机器人必须根据其完整的感官数据自主发现其能力。我们在三个任务上评估了算法：导航到随机目标、高速前进和执行半滚。实验结果表明，我们的方法设法发现解决方案的集合，这些解决方案不仅多样化，而且非常适合所考虑的下游任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于质量多样性算法的无监督能力发现方法，能够自主学习任务相关的行为空间特征，无需人工设计行为描述符。
AI.motivation: 现有质量多样性算法依赖人工编码的行为描述符，需要先验任务知识，限制了算法的通用性和自动化程度。
AI.method: 设计自定义多样性度量函数，通过调整解的分布密度，在学习到的行为描述符空间中聚焦关键区域，结合模拟机器人环境验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在导航、高速移动和翻滚三个任务中，方法生成的解决方案兼具多样性与任务适应性，优于传统依赖人工特征的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无监督环境下机器人能力的自主发现，为复杂任务的自动化解决方案生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haocong Rao,Chunyan Miao
title: SimMC: Simple Masked Contrastive Learning of Skeleton Representations for Unsupervised Person Re-Identification
title_zh: SimMC：用于无监督人员重新识别的骨骼表示的简单屏蔽对比学习
comment: Accepted at IJCAI 2022 Main Track. The Appendix A for Proof (4 pages) and Appendix B for Experiments (9 pages) are included in the version [v3] at arXiv:2204.09826
comments: Accepted at IJCAI 2022 Main Track. The Appendix A for Proof (4 pages) and Appendix B for Experiments (9 pages) are included in the version [v3] at arXiv:2204.09826
abstract: Recent advances in skeleton-based person re-identification (re-ID) obtain impressive performance via either hand-crafted skeleton descriptors or skeleton representation learning with deep learning paradigms. However, they typically require skeletal pre-modeling and label information for training, which leads to limited applicability of these methods. In this paper, we focus on unsupervised skeleton-based person re-ID, and present a generic Simple Masked Contrastive learning (SimMC) framework to learn effective representations from unlabeled 3D skeletons for person re-ID. Specifically, to fully exploit skeleton features within each skeleton sequence, we first devise a masked prototype contrastive learning (MPC) scheme to cluster the most typical skeleton features (skeleton prototypes) from different subsequences randomly masked from raw sequences, and contrast the inherent similarity between skeleton features and different prototypes to learn discriminative skeleton representations without using any label. Then, considering that different subsequences within the same sequence usually enjoy strong correlations due to the nature of motion continuity, we propose the masked intra-sequence contrastive learning (MIC) to capture intra-sequence pattern consistency between subsequences, so as to encourage learning more effective skeleton representations for person re-ID. Extensive experiments validate that the proposed SimMC outperforms most state-of-the-art skeleton-based methods. We further show its scalability and efficiency in enhancing the performance of existing models. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/SimMC.
summary: Recent advances in skeleton-based person re-identification (re-ID) obtain impressive performance via either hand-crafted skeleton descriptors or skeleton representation learning with deep learning paradigms. However, they typically require skeletal pre-modeling and label information for training, which leads to limited applicability of these methods. In this paper, we focus on unsupervised skeleton-based person re-ID, and present a generic Simple Masked Contrastive learning (SimMC) framework to learn effective representations from unlabeled 3D skeletons for person re-ID. Specifically, to fully exploit skeleton features within each skeleton sequence, we first devise a masked prototype contrastive learning (MPC) scheme to cluster the most typical skeleton features (skeleton prototypes) from different subsequences randomly masked from raw sequences, and contrast the inherent similarity between skeleton features and different prototypes to learn discriminative skeleton representations without using any label. Then, considering that different subsequences within the same sequence usually enjoy strong correlations due to the nature of motion continuity, we propose the masked intra-sequence contrastive learning (MIC) to capture intra-sequence pattern consistency between subsequences, so as to encourage learning more effective skeleton representations for person re-ID. Extensive experiments validate that the proposed SimMC outperforms most state-of-the-art skeleton-based methods. We further show its scalability and efficiency in enhancing the performance of existing models. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/SimMC.
abstract_zh: 基于骨架的人员重新识别（re-ID）的最新进展通过手工制作的骨架描述符或使用深度学习范例的骨架表示学习获得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，它们通常需要骨骼预建模和标签信息进行训练，这导致这些方法的适用性有限。在本文中，我们专注于无监督的基于骨架的行人重新识别，并提出了一种通用的简单掩蔽对比学习（SimMC）框架，以从未标记的 3D 骨骼中学习行人重新识别的有效表示。具体来说，为了充分利用每个骨架序列中的骨架特征，我们首先设计了一种掩蔽原型对比学习（MPC）方案，从原始序列中随机掩蔽的不同子序列中聚类最典型的骨架特征（骨架原型），并对比骨架特征和不同原型之间的固有相似性，以在不使用任何标签的情况下学习有区别的骨架表示。然后，考虑到由于运动连续性的性质，同一序列内的不同子序列通常具有很强的相关性，我们提出了掩蔽序列内对比学习（MIC）来捕获子序列之间的序列内模式一致性，从而鼓励学习更有效的行人重识别骨架表示。大量实验验证了所提出的 SimMC 优于大多数最先进的基于骨架的方法。我们进一步展示了其在增强现有模型性能方面的可扩展性和效率。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Kali-Hac/SimMC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SimMC的简单掩码对比学习框架，用于无监督的基于骨骼的人再识别。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于骨骼的人再识别方法通常需要骨骼预建模和标签信息进行训练，这限制了这些方法的适用性。因此，本文旨在开发一种无需标签信息的无监督方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了两种对比学习方案：掩码原型对比学习（MPC）和掩码序列内对比学习（MIC）。MPC通过从随机掩码的子序列中聚类典型骨骼特征来学习区分性表示，而MIC则通过捕捉子序列之间的序列内模式一致性来增强表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，SimMC优于大多数最先进的基于骨骼的方法，并且在提升现有模型性能方面表现出良好的可扩展性和效率。
AI.conclusion: SimMC是一种有效的无监督学习框架，能够从未标记的3D骨骼数据中学习到具有判别力的表示，适用于基于骨骼的人再识别任务。

search_text: SimMC: Simple Masked Contrastive Learning of Skeleton Representations for Unsupervised Person Re-Identification SimMC：用于无监督人员重新识别的骨骼表示的简单屏蔽对比学习 Recent advances in skeleton-based person re-identification (re-ID) obtain impressive performance via either hand-crafted skeleton descriptors or skeleton representation learning with deep learning paradigms. However, they typically require skeletal pre-modeling and label information for training, which leads to limited applicability of these methods. In this paper, we focus on unsupervised skeleton-based person re-ID, and present a generic Simple Masked Contrastive learning (SimMC) framework to learn effective representations from unlabeled 3D skeletons for person re-ID. Then, considering that different subsequences within the same sequence usually enjoy strong correlations due to the nature of motion continuity, we propose the masked intra-sequence contrastive learning (MIC) to capture intra-sequence pattern consistency between subsequences, so as to encourage learning more effective skeleton representations for person re-ID. Extensive experiments validate that the proposed SimMC outperforms most state-of-the-art skeleton-based methods. We further show its scalability and efficiency in enhancing the performance of existing models. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Kali-Hac/SimMC. 基于骨架的人员重新识别（re-ID）的最新进展通过手工制作的骨架描述符或使用深度学习范例的骨架表示学习获得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，它们通常需要骨骼预建模和标签信息进行训练，这导致这些方法的适用性有限。在本文中，我们专注于无监督的基于骨架的行人重新识别，并提出了一种通用的简单掩蔽对比学习（SimMC）框架，以从未标记的 3D 骨骼中学习行人重新识别的有效表示。具体来说，为了充分利用每个骨架序列中的骨架特征，我们首先设计了一种掩蔽原型对比学习（MPC）方案，从原始序列中随机掩蔽的不同子序列中聚类最典型的骨架特征（骨架原型），并对比骨架特征和不同原型之间的固有相似性，以在不使用任何标签的情况下学习有区别的骨架表示。然后，考虑到由于运动连续性的性质，同一序列内的不同子序列通常具有很强的相关性，我们提出了掩蔽序列内对比学习（MIC）来捕获子序列之间的序列内模式一致性，从而鼓励学习更有效的行人重识别骨架表示。大量实验验证了所提出的 SimMC 优于大多数最先进的基于骨架的方法。我们进一步展示了其在增强现有模型性能方面的可扩展性和效率。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Kali-Hac/SimMC 获取。 本文提出了一种名为SimMC的简单掩码对比学习框架，用于无监督的基于骨骼的人再识别。 Haocong Rao,Chunyan Miao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Maxime Alvarez,Jean-Charles Verdier,D'Jeff K. Nkashama,Marc Frappier,Pierre-Martin Tardif,Froduald Kabanza
title: A Revealing Large-Scale Evaluation of Unsupervised Anomaly Detection Algorithms
title_zh: 无监督异常检测算法的大规模评估
abstract: Anomaly detection has many applications ranging from bank-fraud detection and cyber-threat detection to equipment maintenance and health monitoring. However, choosing a suitable algorithm for a given application remains a challenging design decision, often informed by the literature on anomaly detection algorithms. We extensively reviewed twelve of the most popular unsupervised anomaly detection methods. We observed that, so far, they have been compared using inconsistent protocols - the choice of the class of interest or the positive class, the split of training and test data, and the choice of hyperparameters - leading to ambiguous evaluations. This observation led us to define a coherent evaluation protocol which we then used to produce an updated and more precise picture of the relative performance of the twelve methods on five widely used tabular datasets. While our evaluation cannot pinpoint a method that outperforms all the others on all datasets, it identifies those that stand out and revise misconceived knowledge about their relative performances.
summary: Anomaly detection has many applications ranging from bank-fraud detection and cyber-threat detection to equipment maintenance and health monitoring. However, choosing a suitable algorithm for a given application remains a challenging design decision, often informed by the literature on anomaly detection algorithms. We extensively reviewed twelve of the most popular unsupervised anomaly detection methods. We observed that, so far, they have been compared using inconsistent protocols - the choice of the class of interest or the positive class, the split of training and test data, and the choice of hyperparameters - leading to ambiguous evaluations. This observation led us to define a coherent evaluation protocol which we then used to produce an updated and more precise picture of the relative performance of the twelve methods on five widely used tabular datasets. While our evaluation cannot pinpoint a method that outperforms all the others on all datasets, it identifies those that stand out and revise misconceived knowledge about their relative performances.
abstract_zh: 异常检测有许多应用，从银行欺诈检测和网络威胁检测到设备维护和健康监控。然而，为给定应用选择合适的算法仍然是一个具有挑战性的设计决策，通常由有关异常检测算法的文献提供信息。我们广泛回顾了十二种最流行的无监督异常检测方法。我们观察到，到目前为止，它们使用不一致的协议进行比较——感兴趣类别或正类的选择、训练和测试数据的分割以及超参数的选择——导致评估不明确。这一观察结果使我们定义了一个连贯的评估协议，然后我们用它来生成十二种方法在五个广泛使用的表格数据集上的相对性能的更新且更精确的图片。虽然我们的评估无法确定一种在所有数据集上都优于所有其他方法的方法，但它确定了那些脱颖而出的方法，并修正了对其相对性能的误解。

AI.tldr: 该论文对十二种流行的无监督异常检测算法进行了大规模评估，旨在通过统一的评估协议明确其相对性能。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测算法的比较缺乏一致的评估标准，导致结果模糊，需建立统一协议以准确评估算法性能。
AI.method: 系统回顾十二种算法，定义统一的评估协议（包括正类选择、数据划分和超参数设置），并在五个常用数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: 未发现单一算法在所有数据集上均最优，但识别出表现突出的算法，并修正了关于其性能的错误认知。
AI.conclusion: 统一评估框架揭示了算法性能的差异，为实际应用中的算法选择提供了更可靠的依据。
