search_text: ARLIF-IDS -- Attention augmented Real-Time Isolation Forest Intrusion Detection System ARLIF-IDS——注意力增强实时隔离森林入侵检测系统 Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attack is a malicious attempt to disrupt the normal traffic of a targeted server, service or network by overwhelming the target or its surrounding infrastructure with a flood of Internet traffic. Emerging technologies such as the Internet of Things and Software Defined Networking leverage lightweight strategies for the early detection of DDoS attacks. Previous literature demonstrates the utility of lower number of significant features for intrusion detection. Thus, it is essential to have a fast and effective security identification model based on low number of features. In this work, a novel Attention-based Isolation Forest Intrusion Detection System is proposed. The model considerably reduces training time and memory consumption of the generated model. For performance assessment, the model is assessed over two benchmark datasets, the NSL-KDD dataset & the KDDCUP'99 dataset. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed attention augmented model achieves a significant reduction in execution time, by 91.78%, and an average detection F1-Score of 0.93 on the NSL-KDD and KDDCUP'99 dataset. The results of performance evaluation show that the proposed methodology has low complexity and requires less processing time and computational resources, outperforming other current IDS based on machine learning algorithms. 分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) 攻击是一种恶意尝试，通过用大量互联网流量压垮目标或其周围基础设施，从而破坏目标服务器、服务或网络的正常流量。物联网和软件定义网络等新兴技术利用轻量级策略来及早检测 DDoS 攻击。先前的文献证明了较少数量的重要特征在入侵检测中的实用性。因此，有必要建立一种基于少量特征的快速有效的安全识别模型。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的隔离森林入侵检测系统。该模型大大减少了生成模型的训练时间和内存消耗。对于性能评估，模型通过两个基准数据集（NSL-KDD 数据集和 KDDCUP'99 数据集）进行评估。实验结果表明，所提出的注意力增强模型在 NSL-KDD 和 KDDCUP'99 数据集上实现了执行时间显着减少 91.78%，平均检测 F1 得分为 0.93。性能评估结果表明，所提出的方法复杂度较低，需要较少的处理时间和计算资源，优于当前其他基于机器学习算法的IDS。 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的实时隔离森林入侵检测系统（ARLIF-IDS），旨在通过减少特征数量和计算资源提升DDoS攻击检测效率。 Aman Priyanshu,Sarthak Shastri,Sai Sravan Medicherla cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Mustafa Shukor,Guillaume Couairon,Asya Grechka,Matthieu Cord
title: Transformer Decoders with MultiModal Regularization for Cross-Modal Food Retrieval
title_zh: 用于跨模式食物检索的具有多模式正则化的 Transformer 解码器
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2022, MULA Workshop. Code is available at https://github.com/mshukor/TFood
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2022, MULA Workshop. Code is available at https://github.com/mshukor/TFood
abstract: Cross-modal image-recipe retrieval has gained significant attention in recent years. Most work focuses on improving cross-modal embeddings using unimodal encoders, that allow for efficient retrieval in large-scale databases, leaving aside cross-attention between modalities which is more computationally expensive. We propose a new retrieval framework, T-Food (Transformer Decoders with MultiModal Regularization for Cross-Modal Food Retrieval) that exploits the interaction between modalities in a novel regularization scheme, while using only unimodal encoders at test time for efficient retrieval. We also capture the intra-dependencies between recipe entities with a dedicated recipe encoder, and propose new variants of triplet losses with dynamic margins that adapt to the difficulty of the task. Finally, we leverage the power of the recent Vision and Language Pretraining (VLP) models such as CLIP for the image encoder. Our approach outperforms existing approaches by a large margin on the Recipe1M dataset. Specifically, we achieve absolute improvements of 8.1 % (72.6 R@1) and +10.9 % (44.6 R@1) on the 1k and 10k test sets respectively. The code is available here:https://github.com/mshukor/TFood
summary: Cross-modal image-recipe retrieval has gained significant attention in recent years. Most work focuses on improving cross-modal embeddings using unimodal encoders, that allow for efficient retrieval in large-scale databases, leaving aside cross-attention between modalities which is more computationally expensive. We propose a new retrieval framework, T-Food (Transformer Decoders with MultiModal Regularization for Cross-Modal Food Retrieval) that exploits the interaction between modalities in a novel regularization scheme, while using only unimodal encoders at test time for efficient retrieval. We also capture the intra-dependencies between recipe entities with a dedicated recipe encoder, and propose new variants of triplet losses with dynamic margins that adapt to the difficulty of the task. Finally, we leverage the power of the recent Vision and Language Pretraining (VLP) models such as CLIP for the image encoder. Our approach outperforms existing approaches by a large margin on the Recipe1M dataset. Specifically, we achieve absolute improvements of 8.1 % (72.6 R@1) and +10.9 % (44.6 R@1) on the 1k and 10k test sets respectively. The code is available here:https://github.com/mshukor/TFood
abstract_zh: 近年来，跨模态图像菜谱检索受到了广泛关注。大多数工作重点是使用单模态编码器改进跨模态嵌入，从而允许在大规模数据库中进行高效检索，而忽略模态之间的交叉注意力，因为模态之间的交叉注意力计算成本更高。我们提出了一种新的检索框架 T-Food（用于跨模态食物检索的具有多模态正则化的变压器解码器），它利用新颖的正则化方案中模态之间的交互，同时在测试时仅使用单模态编码器来实现高效检索。我们还使用专用的配方编码器捕获配方实体之间的内部依赖性，并提出具有适应任务难度的动态裕度的三元组损失的新变体。最后，我们利用最新的视觉和语言预训练 (VLP) 模型的强大功能，例如用于图像编码器的 CLIP。我们的方法在 Recipe1M 数据集上大大优于现有方法。具体来说，我们在 1k 和 10k 测试集上分别实现了 8.1% (72.6 R@1) 和 +10.9% (44.6 R@1) 的绝对改进。代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/mshukor/TFood

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为T-Food的跨模态食品检索框架，通过多模态正则化和高效编码器提升图像-食谱检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态检索方法依赖单模态编码器实现高效检索，但忽略了模态间交互的计算成本问题，导致检索效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含多模态正则化的Transformer解码器框架，结合专用食谱编码器和动态边距三元组损失函数，并采用CLIP等视觉-语言预训练模型作为图像编码器。
AI.result: 在Recipe1M数据集上，1k测试集R@1提升8.1%（达72.6%），10k测试集R@1提升10.9%（达44.6%）。
AI.conclusion: 通过模态间正则化与单模态高效编码的结合，该方法在跨模态食品检索任务中显著优于现有技术，验证了多模态交互与动态损失设计的有效性。

authors_text: Yung Yu Andy Yiu,Ying Hing Yim,Yan Ning,Zikai Wang,Ling Shi
title: Coverage Control for a Multi-robot Team with Heterogeneous Capabilities using Block Coordinate Descent (BCD) Method
title_zh: 使用块坐标下降（BCD）方法的具有异构能力的多机器人团队的覆盖控制
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, accepted by ICCA2022
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, accepted by ICCA2022
abstract: In this paper, we propose a coverage control system for a multi-robot team with heterogeneous capabilities to patrol or monitor a bounded environment. The capability could be defined as any criterion of robots like remaining power or mobile speed, depending on the purpose. The proposed control system aims to allocate different portions of the environment to the robots according to their capabilities, i.e., the robot with higher capability takes a larger portion of the environment while the robot with lower capability takes a smaller one. We use the block coordinate descent (BCD) method to optimize the location of portions and the partitioning method alternately. A centralized machine is used to synchronize the robots and the gradient of each robot can be computed in a distributed manner. Simulation results are provided to illustrate the performance of the proposed control system.
summary: In this paper, we propose a coverage control system for a multi-robot team with heterogeneous capabilities to patrol or monitor a bounded environment. The capability could be defined as any criterion of robots like remaining power or mobile speed, depending on the purpose. The proposed control system aims to allocate different portions of the environment to the robots according to their capabilities, i.e., the robot with higher capability takes a larger portion of the environment while the robot with lower capability takes a smaller one. We use the block coordinate descent (BCD) method to optimize the location of portions and the partitioning method alternately. A centralized machine is used to synchronize the robots and the gradient of each robot can be computed in a distributed manner. Simulation results are provided to illustrate the performance of the proposed control system.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种覆盖控制系统，用于具有异构能力的多机器人团队来巡逻或监控有界环境。该能力可以定义为机器人的任何标准，例如剩余电量或移动速度，具体取决于目的。所提出的控制系统旨在根据机器人的能力将环境的不同部分分配给机器人，即能力较高的机器人占据较大的环境部分，而能力较低的机器人占据较小的环境部分。我们交替使用块坐标下降（BCD）方法和分区方法来优化部分的位置。使用集中式机器来同步机器人，并且可以以分布式方式计算每个机器人的梯度。提供仿真结果来说明所提出的控制系统的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于块坐标下降法（BCD）的多机器人异构能力覆盖控制系统，通过根据机器人能力分配环境区域以提升监控效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效考虑机器人异构能力差异，导致覆盖效率低下，需设计兼顾能力差异的动态分配策略。
AI.method: 采用BCD方法交替优化区域划分与机器人位置，结合集中式同步机制与分布式梯度计算实现异构能力分配。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了所提控制系统的有效性，展示了基于能力差异的区域分配能显著提升环境覆盖效率。
AI.conclusion: BCD方法可有效解决异构多机器人团队的覆盖控制问题，为动态环境下的任务分配提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mycal Tucker,Tiwalayo Eisape,Peng Qian,Roger Levy,Julie Shah
title: When Does Syntax Mediate Neural Language Model Performance? Evidence from Dropout Probes
title_zh: 语法何时调节神经语言模型的性能？来自 Dropout 调查的证据
abstract: Recent causal probing literature reveals when language models and syntactic probes use similar representations. Such techniques may yield "false negative" causality results: models may use representations of syntax, but probes may have learned to use redundant encodings of the same syntactic information. We demonstrate that models do encode syntactic information redundantly and introduce a new probe design that guides probes to consider all syntactic information present in embeddings. Using these probes, we find evidence for the use of syntax in models where prior methods did not, allowing us to boost model performance by injecting syntactic information into representations.
summary: Recent causal probing literature reveals when language models and syntactic probes use similar representations. Such techniques may yield "false negative" causality results: models may use representations of syntax, but probes may have learned to use redundant encodings of the same syntactic information. We demonstrate that models do encode syntactic information redundantly and introduce a new probe design that guides probes to consider all syntactic information present in embeddings. Using these probes, we find evidence for the use of syntax in models where prior methods did not, allowing us to boost model performance by injecting syntactic information into representations.
abstract_zh: 最近的因果探测文献揭示了语言模型和句法探测何时使用相似的表示。此类技术可能会产生“假阴性”因果关系结果：模型可能使用语法表示，但探针可能已经学会使用相同语法信息的冗余编码。我们证明模型确实对句法信息进行冗余编码，并引入了一种新的探针设计，引导探针考虑嵌入中存在的所有句法信息。使用这些探针，我们找到了在模型中使用语法的证据，而以前的方法没有，这使我们能够通过将语法信息注入到表示中来提高模型性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了语法在神经语言模型中的作用，通过改进探针方法揭示模型中冗余的语法编码，并验证注入语法信息可提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有因果探针方法可能因冗余编码导致假阴性结果，无法准确检测模型中的语法信息，需改进探针设计以提升检测能力。
AI.method: 设计新型探针方法，强制探针利用嵌入中的全部语法信息，并通过Dropout探针进行因果分析，验证语法在模型中的作用。
AI.result: 新探针发现模型中存在未被先前方法检测到的语法信息使用证据，且注入语法信息后模型性能得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 改进的探针方法能有效揭示模型中语法信息的编码，证明语法对模型性能的促进作用，为模型优化提供新思路。

search_text: When Does Syntax Mediate Neural Language Model Performance? Evidence from Dropout Probes 语法何时调节神经语言模型的性能？来自 Dropout 调查的证据 Recent causal probing literature reveals when language models and syntactic probes use similar representations. Such techniques may yield "false negative" causality results: models may use representations of syntax, but probes may have learned to use redundant encodings of the same syntactic information. We demonstrate that models do encode syntactic information redundantly and introduce a new probe design that guides probes to consider all syntactic information present in embeddings. Using these probes, we find evidence for the use of syntax in models where prior methods did not, allowing us to boost model performance by injecting syntactic information into representations. 最近的因果探测文献揭示了语言模型和句法探测何时使用相似的表示。此类技术可能会产生“假阴性”因果关系结果：模型可能使用语法表示，但探针可能已经学会使用相同语法信息的冗余编码。我们证明模型确实对句法信息进行冗余编码，并引入了一种新的探针设计，引导探针考虑嵌入中存在的所有句法信息。使用这些探针，我们找到了在模型中使用语法的证据，而以前的方法没有，这使我们能够通过将语法信息注入到表示中来提高模型性能。 本文探讨了语法在神经语言模型中的作用，通过改进探针方法揭示模型中冗余的语法编码，并验证注入语法信息可提升模型性能。 Mycal Tucker,Tiwalayo Eisape,Peng Qian,Roger Levy,Julie Shah cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zijun Xue,Ruirui Li,Mingda Li
title: Recent Progress in Conversational AI
title_zh: 对话式人工智能的最新进展
comment: 6 pages
comments: 6 pages
abstract: Conversational artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming an increasingly popular topic among industry and academia. With the fast development of neural network-based models, a lot of neural-based conversational AI system are developed. We will provide a brief review of the recent progress in the Conversational AI, including the commonly adopted techniques, notable works, famous competitions from academia and industry and widely used datasets.
summary: Conversational artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming an increasingly popular topic among industry and academia. With the fast development of neural network-based models, a lot of neural-based conversational AI system are developed. We will provide a brief review of the recent progress in the Conversational AI, including the commonly adopted techniques, notable works, famous competitions from academia and industry and widely used datasets.
abstract_zh: 对话式人工智能（AI）正在成为工业界和学术界越来越热门的话题。随着基于神经网络的模型的快速发展，许多基于神经网络的对话式人工智能系统被开发出来。我们将简要回顾对话式人工智能的最新进展，包括常用的技术、著名的作品、学术界和工业界的著名竞赛以及广泛使用的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了对话式人工智能领域的最新进展，包括常用技术、重要研究工作、学术与工业界竞赛以及常用数据集。
AI.motivation: 随着神经网络模型的快速发展，对话式人工智能在学术界和工业界受到广泛关注，亟需系统梳理最新研究成果与技术趋势。
AI.method: 通过收集和分析近年来对话式AI领域的代表性论文、竞赛成果及公开数据集，总结关键技术与发展方向。
AI.result: 总结了神经网络驱动下的对话系统技术演进，列举了主流方法、典型应用案例及权威评测基准。
AI.conclusion: 对话式AI在技术层面取得显著进展，但仍需在多轮对话理解、上下文建模等方向持续突破。

authors_text: Narayana Darapaneni,Chandrashekhar Bhakuni,Ujjval Bhatt,Khamir Purohit,Vikas Sardna,Prabir Chakraborty,Anwesh Reddy Paduri
title: Matching Writers to Content Writing Tasks
title_zh: 将作家与内容写作任务相匹配
abstract: Businesses need content. In various forms and formats and for varied purposes. In fact, the content marketing industry is set to be worth $412.88 billion by the end of 2021. However, according to the Content Marketing Institute, creating engaging content is the #1 challenge that marketers face today. We under-stand that producing great content requires great writers who understand the business and can weave their message into reader (and search engine) friendly content. In this project, the team has attempted to bridge the gap between writers and projects by using AI and ML tools. We used NLP techniques to analyze thou-sands of publicly available business articles (corpora) to extract various defining factors for each writing sample. Through this project we aim to automate the highly time-consuming, and often biased task of manually shortlisting the most suitable writer for a given content writing requirement. We believe that a tool like this will have far reaching positive implications for both parties - businesses looking for suitable talent for niche writing jobs as well as experienced writers and Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) wanting to lend their services to content marketing projects. The business gets the content they need, the content writer/ SME gets a chance to leverage his or her talent, while the reader gets authentic content that adds real value.
summary: Businesses need content. In various forms and formats and for varied purposes. In fact, the content marketing industry is set to be worth $412.88 billion by the end of 2021. However, according to the Content Marketing Institute, creating engaging content is the #1 challenge that marketers face today. We under-stand that producing great content requires great writers who understand the business and can weave their message into reader (and search engine) friendly content. In this project, the team has attempted to bridge the gap between writers and projects by using AI and ML tools. We used NLP techniques to analyze thou-sands of publicly available business articles (corpora) to extract various defining factors for each writing sample. Through this project we aim to automate the highly time-consuming, and often biased task of manually shortlisting the most suitable writer for a given content writing requirement. We believe that a tool like this will have far reaching positive implications for both parties - businesses looking for suitable talent for niche writing jobs as well as experienced writers and Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) wanting to lend their services to content marketing projects. The business gets the content they need, the content writer/ SME gets a chance to leverage his or her talent, while the reader gets authentic content that adds real value.
abstract_zh: 企业需要内容。以各种形式和格式并用于不同的目的。事实上，到 2021 年底，内容营销行业的价值预计将达到 4128.8 亿美元。然而，根据内容营销研究所的数据，创建引人入胜的内容是营销人员当今面临的第一大挑战。我们知道，制作精彩的内容需要优秀的作家，他们了解业务并能够将他们的信息编织成读者（和搜索引擎）友好的内容。在这个项目中，团队试图通过使用人工智能和机器学习工具来弥合作者和项目之间的差距。我们使用 NLP 技术分析了数千篇公开的商业文章（语料库），以提取每个写作样本的各种定义因素。通过这个项目，我们的目标是自动化执行高度耗时且经常存在偏见的任务，即手动筛选最适合给定内容写作要求的作家。我们相信，这样的工具将对双方产生深远的积极影响——为利基写作工作寻找合适人才的企业，以及希望为内容营销项目提供服务的经验丰富的作家和主题专家 (SME)。企业获得他们需要的内容，内容作者/中小企业有机会发挥他或她的才能，而读者则获得增加真正价值的真实内容。

AI.tldr: 开发基于AI和机器学习的系统，通过分析文章特征自动匹配作家与内容写作任务
AI.motivation: 解决企业难以高效匹配合适作家的问题，提升内容创作效率与质量，促进企业与写作者的合作
AI.method: 利用自然语言处理（NLP）技术分析企业公开文章，提取关键特征并构建模型，自动匹配作家与任务
AI.result: 成功开发出自动化匹配系统，有效提升匹配效率，减少人工偏见，优化资源分配
AI.conclusion: 该系统有助于企业高效获取优质内容，同时为写作者提供机会，提升整体内容创作效率与质量

authors_text: Narayana Darapaneni,Selvakumar Raj,Raghul V,Venkatesh Sivaraman,Sunil Mohan,Anwesh Reddy Paduri
title: LSTM-RASA Based Agri Farm Assistant for Farmers
title_zh: 基于 LSTM-RASA 的农民农业农场助理
abstract: The application of Deep Learning and Natural Language based ChatBots are growing rapidly in recent years. They are used in many fields like customer support, reservation system and as personal assistant. The Enterprises are using such ChatBots to serve their customers in a better and efficient manner. Even after such technological advancement, the expert advice does not reach the farmers on timely manner. The farmers are still largely dependent on their peers knowledge in solving the problems they face in their field. These technologies have not been effectively used to give the required information to farmers on timely manner. This project aims to implement a closed domain ChatBot for the field of Agriculture Farmers Assistant. Farmers can have conversation with the Chatbot and get the expert advice in their field. Farmers Assistant is based on RASA Open Source Framework. The Chatbot identifies the intent and entity from user utterances and retrieve the remedy from the database and share it with the user. We tested the Bot with existing data and it showed promising results.

abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习和自然语言的聊天机器人的应用正在迅速增长。它们被用于许多领域，如客户支持、预订系统和个人助理。企业正在使用此类聊天机器人以更好、更高效的方式为客户提供服务。即使有了这样的技术进步，专家的建议也没有及时到达农民手中。农民仍然在很大程度上依赖同行的知识来解决他们在田间面临的问题。这些技术尚未得到有效利用，无法及时向农民提供所需信息。该项目旨在为农业农民助理领域实现一个封闭域ChatBot。农民可以与聊天机器人对话并获得其领域的专家建议。 Farmers Assistant 基于 RASA 开源框架。聊天机器人从用户话语中识别意图和实体，从数据库中检索补救措施并与用户共享。我们使用现有数据测试了机器人，结果显示出有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LSTM-RASA框架的农业助手聊天机器人，旨在为农民提供及时的农业专家建议。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习和聊天机器人技术发展迅速，但农民仍缺乏及时获取专家建议的渠道，主要依赖同行经验解决问题。
AI.method: 采用RASA开源框架构建封闭域聊天机器人，结合LSTM模型识别用户意图和实体，从数据库中检索并返回农业问题的解决方案。
AI.result: 测试表明该聊天机器人能有效识别农业相关问题并提供相应建议，展现出良好的应用前景。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可帮助农民及时获取专业农业指导，提升农业生产效率，未来需进一步优化模型准确性和知识库覆盖范围。

authors_text: Brydon Parker,Alik Sokolov,Mahtab Ahmed,Matt Kalebic,Sedef Akinli Kocak,Ofer Shai
title: Domain Specific Fine-tuning of Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Models for Natural Language Summarization
title_zh: 用于自然语言摘要的去噪序列到序列模型的特定领域微调
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Summarization of long-form text data is a problem especially pertinent in knowledge economy jobs such as medicine and finance, that require continuously remaining informed on a sophisticated and evolving body of knowledge. As such, isolating and summarizing key content automatically using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques holds the potential for extensive time savings in these industries. We explore applications of a state-of-the-art NLP model (BART), and explore strategies for tuning it to optimal performance using data augmentation and various fine-tuning strategies. We show that our end-to-end fine-tuning approach can result in a 5-6\% absolute ROUGE-1 improvement over an out-of-the-box pre-trained BART summarizer when tested on domain specific data, and make available our end-to-end pipeline to achieve these results on finance, medical, or other user-specified domains.
summary: Summarization of long-form text data is a problem especially pertinent in knowledge economy jobs such as medicine and finance, that require continuously remaining informed on a sophisticated and evolving body of knowledge. As such, isolating and summarizing key content automatically using Natural Language Processing (NLP) techniques holds the potential for extensive time savings in these industries. We explore applications of a state-of-the-art NLP model (BART), and explore strategies for tuning it to optimal performance using data augmentation and various fine-tuning strategies. We show that our end-to-end fine-tuning approach can result in a 5-6\% absolute ROUGE-1 improvement over an out-of-the-box pre-trained BART summarizer when tested on domain specific data, and make available our end-to-end pipeline to achieve these results on finance, medical, or other user-specified domains.
abstract_zh: 长文本数据的总结是一个与医学和金融等知识经济工作尤其相关的问题，这些工作需要不断了解复杂且不断发展的知识体系。因此，使用自然语言处理 (NLP) 技术自动隔离和总结关键内容有可能在这些行业中节省大量时间。我们探索最先进的 NLP 模型 (BART) 的应用，并探索使用数据增强和各种微调策略将其调整到最佳性能的策略。我们表明，在特定领域的数据上进行测试时，我们的端到端微调方法可以比开箱即用的预训练 BART 摘要器实现 5-6\% 的绝对 ROUGE-1 改进，并且使我们的端到端管道可用以在金融、医疗或其他用户指定的领域实现这些结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过领域特定的微调方法，优化去噪序列到序列模型在自然语言摘要任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 医疗和金融等领域需要高效处理大量专业文本，传统方法难以满足需求，需更精准的自动摘要技术。
AI.method: 采用BART模型，结合数据增强技术和端到端微调策略，针对特定领域数据进行优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在特定领域数据上ROUGE-1指标提升5-6%，并提供了可复用的微调流程。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定微调能有效提升摘要模型性能，为专业领域应用提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Ana Paula O. Muller,Jesse C. Costa,Clecio R. Bom,Elisangela L. Faria,Matheus Klatt,Gabriel Teixeira,Marcelo P. de Albuquerque,Marcio P. de Albuquerque
title: Complete identification of complex salt geometries from inaccurate migrated subsurface offset gathers using deep learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习从不准确的偏移地下偏移道集中完整识别复杂的盐几何形状
comment: Manuscript published at Geophysics
comments: Manuscript published at Geophysics
abstract: Delimiting salt inclusions from migrated images is a time-consuming activity that relies on highly human-curated analysis and is subject to interpretation errors or limitations of the methods available. We propose to use migrated images produced from an inaccurate velocity model (with a reasonable approximation of sediment velocity, but without salt inclusions) to predict the correct salt inclusions shape using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Our approach relies on subsurface Common Image Gathers to focus the sediments' reflections around the zero offset and to spread the energy of salt reflections over large offsets. Using synthetic data, we trained a U-Net to use common-offset subsurface images as input channels for the CNN and the correct salt-masks as network output. The network learned to predict the salt inclusions masks with high accuracy; moreover, it also performed well when applied to synthetic benchmark data sets that were not previously introduced. Our training process tuned the U-Net to successfully learn the shape of complex salt bodies from partially focused subsurface offset images.
summary: Delimiting salt inclusions from migrated images is a time-consuming activity that relies on highly human-curated analysis and is subject to interpretation errors or limitations of the methods available. We propose to use migrated images produced from an inaccurate velocity model (with a reasonable approximation of sediment velocity, but without salt inclusions) to predict the correct salt inclusions shape using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Our approach relies on subsurface Common Image Gathers to focus the sediments' reflections around the zero offset and to spread the energy of salt reflections over large offsets. Using synthetic data, we trained a U-Net to use common-offset subsurface images as input channels for the CNN and the correct salt-masks as network output. The network learned to predict the salt inclusions masks with high accuracy; moreover, it also performed well when applied to synthetic benchmark data sets that were not previously introduced. Our training process tuned the U-Net to successfully learn the shape of complex salt bodies from partially focused subsurface offset images.
abstract_zh: 从迁移图像中界定盐夹杂物是一项耗时的活动，它依赖于高度人工策划的分析，并且容易受到解释错误或可用方法的限制。我们建议使用由不准确的速度模型（具有合理的沉积物速度近似值，但没有盐夹杂物）生成的迁移图像，通过卷积神经网络（CNN）预测正确的盐夹杂物形状。我们的方法依赖于地下通用图像收集，将沉积物的反射集中在零偏移附近，并将盐反射的能量传播到大偏移上。使用合成数据，我们训练了一个 U-Net，使用公共偏移地下图像作为 CNN 的输入通道，并使用正确的盐掩模作为网络输出。网络学会了以高精度预测盐包裹体掩模；此外，当应用于以前未引入的合成基准数据集时，它也表现良好。我们的训练过程调整了 U-Net，成功地从部分聚焦的地下偏移图像中学习复杂盐体的形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用深度学习方法从不准确的速度模型生成的迁移图像中准确识别复杂盐体几何形状的方法。
AI.motivation: 从迁移图像中界定盐体包含物是一项耗时且依赖人工分析的工作，存在解释误差和方法限制，因此需要一种更有效和自动的方法。
AI.method: 本文采用卷积神经网络（CNN）方法，利用子表面共成像道集（CIGs）聚焦沉积物反射并扩展盐体反射能量，通过U-Net网络训练模型预测盐体掩膜。
AI.result: 网络成功预测了盐体包含物的掩膜，并且在未见过的合成基准数据集上也表现出良好的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够从部分聚焦的子表面偏移图像中学习复杂盐体形状，为自动识别盐体提供了有效的解决方案。

result: 网络成功预测了盐体包含物的掩膜，并且在未见过的合成基准数据集上也表现出良好的性能。
conclusion: 该方法能够从部分聚焦的子表面偏移图像中学习复杂盐体形状，为自动识别盐体提供了有效的解决方案。
search_text: Complete identification of complex salt geometries from inaccurate migrated subsurface offset gathers using deep learning 使用深度学习从不准确的偏移地下偏移道集中完整识别复杂的盐几何形状 Delimiting salt inclusions from migrated images is a time-consuming activity that relies on highly human-curated analysis and is subject to interpretation errors or limitations of the methods available. We propose to use migrated images produced from an inaccurate velocity model (with a reasonable approximation of sediment velocity, but without salt inclusions) to predict the correct salt inclusions shape using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Our approach relies on subsurface Common Image Gathers to focus the sediments' reflections around the zero offset and to spread the energy of salt reflections over large offsets. Using synthetic data, we trained a U-Net to use common-offset subsurface images as input channels for the CNN and the correct salt-masks as network output. The network learned to predict the salt inclusions masks with high accuracy; moreover, it also performed well when applied to synthetic benchmark data sets that were not previously introduced. Our training process tuned the U-Net to successfully learn the shape of complex salt bodies from partially focused subsurface offset images. 从迁移图像中界定盐夹杂物是一项耗时的活动，它依赖于高度人工策划的分析，并且容易受到解释错误或可用方法的限制。我们建议使用由不准确的速度模型（具有合理的沉积物速度近似值，但没有盐夹杂物）生成的迁移图像，通过卷积神经网络（CNN）预测正确的盐夹杂物形状。我们的方法依赖于地下通用图像收集，将沉积物的反射集中在零偏移附近，并将盐反射的能量传播到大偏移上。使用合成数据，我们训练了一个 U-Net，使用公共偏移地下图像作为 CNN 的输入通道，并使用正确的盐掩模作为网络输出。网络学会了以高精度预测盐包裹体掩模；此外，当应用于以前未引入的合成基准数据集时，它也表现良好。我们的训练过程调整了 U-Net，成功地从部分聚焦的地下偏移图像中学习复杂盐体的形状。 本文提出了一种利用深度学习方法从不准确的速度模型生成的迁移图像中准确识别复杂盐体几何形状的方法。 Ana Paula O. Muller,Jesse C. Costa,Clecio R. Bom,Elisangela L. Faria,Matheus Klatt,Gabriel Teixeira,Marcelo P. de Albuquerque,Marcio P. de Albuquerque physics.geo-ph,cs.CV

authors_text: Ki-Ung Song,Dongseok Shim,Kang-wook Kim,Jae-young Lee,Younggeun Kim
title: FS-NCSR: Increasing Diversity of the Super-Resolution Space via Frequency Separation and Noise-Conditioned Normalizing Flow
title_zh: FS-NCSR：通过频率分离和噪声条件归一化流增加超分辨率空间的多样性
comment: CVPRW 2022, First three authors are equally contributed
comments: CVPRW 2022, First three authors are equally contributed
abstract: Super-resolution suffers from an innate ill-posed problem that a single low-resolution (LR) image can be from multiple high-resolution (HR) images. Recent studies on the flow-based algorithm solve this ill-posedness by learning the super-resolution space and predicting diverse HR outputs. Unfortunately, the diversity of the super-resolution outputs is still unsatisfactory, and the outputs from the flow-based model usually suffer from undesired artifacts which causes low-quality outputs. In this paper, we propose FS-NCSR which produces diverse and high-quality super-resolution outputs using frequency separation and noise conditioning compared to the existing flow-based approaches. As the sharpness and high-quality detail of the image rely on its high-frequency information, FS-NCSR only estimates the high-frequency information of the high-resolution outputs without redundant low-frequency components. Through this, FS-NCSR significantly improves the diversity score without significant image quality degradation compared to the NCSR, the winner of the previous NTIRE 2021 challenge.
summary: Super-resolution suffers from an innate ill-posed problem that a single low-resolution (LR) image can be from multiple high-resolution (HR) images. Recent studies on the flow-based algorithm solve this ill-posedness by learning the super-resolution space and predicting diverse HR outputs. Unfortunately, the diversity of the super-resolution outputs is still unsatisfactory, and the outputs from the flow-based model usually suffer from undesired artifacts which causes low-quality outputs. In this paper, we propose FS-NCSR which produces diverse and high-quality super-resolution outputs using frequency separation and noise conditioning compared to the existing flow-based approaches. As the sharpness and high-quality detail of the image rely on its high-frequency information, FS-NCSR only estimates the high-frequency information of the high-resolution outputs without redundant low-frequency components. Through this, FS-NCSR significantly improves the diversity score without significant image quality degradation compared to the NCSR, the winner of the previous NTIRE 2021 challenge.
abstract_zh: 超分辨率存在一个固有的不适定问题，即单个低分辨率 (LR) 图像可能来自多个高分辨率 (HR) 图像。最近关于基于流的算法的研究通过学习超分辨率空间和预测不同的 HR 输出来解决这种不适定性。不幸的是，超分辨率输出的多样性仍然不能令人满意，并且基于流的模型的输出通常会受到不期望的伪影的影响，从而导致低质量的输出。在本文中，我们提出了 FS-NCSR，与现有的基于流的方法相比，它使用频率分离和噪声调节来产生多样化的高质量超分辨率输出。由于图像的清晰度和高质量细节依赖于其高频信息，FS-NCSR仅估计高分辨率输出的高频信息，而没有冗余的低频分量。通过这一点，与之前 NTIRE 2021 挑战赛的获胜者 NCSR 相比，FS-NCSR 显着提高了多样性得分，而图像质量没有显着下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FS-NCSR方法，通过频率分离和噪声条件归一化流提升超分辨率输出的多样性和质量。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法难以同时满足输出多样性与高质量，且存在伪影问题，需改进生成策略。
AI.method: 通过频率分离仅估计高频信息，结合噪声条件归一化流，避免低频冗余以提升多样性并保持质量。
AI.result: 相比NCSR，FS-NCSR在多样性得分显著提升，且图像质量无明显下降。
AI.conclusion: FS-NCSR有效平衡超分辨率的多样性与质量，优于现有流模型方法。

authors_text: Neha Srivathsa,Razi Mahmood,Tanveer Syeda-Mahmood
title: Spatially-Preserving Flattening for Location-Aware Classification of Findings in Chest X-Rays
title_zh: 胸部 X 光检查结果的位置感知分类的空间保持扁平化
comment: 5 pages, Paper presented as a poster at the IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging, 2022, Paper Number 828
comments: 5 pages, Paper presented as a poster at the IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging, 2022, Paper Number 828
abstract: Chest X-rays have become the focus of vigorous deep learning research in recent years due to the availability of large labeled datasets. While classification of anomalous findings is now possible, ensuring that they are correctly localized still remains challenging, as this requires recognition of anomalies within anatomical regions. Existing deep learning networks for fine-grained anomaly classification learn location-specific findings using architectures where the location and spatial contiguity information is lost during the flattening step before classification. In this paper, we present a new spatially preserving deep learning network that preserves location and shape information through auto-encoding of feature maps during flattening. The feature maps, auto-encoder and classifier are then trained in an end-to-end fashion to enable location aware classification of findings in chest X-rays. Results are shown on a large multi-hospital chest X-ray dataset indicating a significant improvement in the quality of finding classification over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Chest X-rays have become the focus of vigorous deep learning research in recent years due to the availability of large labeled datasets. While classification of anomalous findings is now possible, ensuring that they are correctly localized still remains challenging, as this requires recognition of anomalies within anatomical regions. Existing deep learning networks for fine-grained anomaly classification learn location-specific findings using architectures where the location and spatial contiguity information is lost during the flattening step before classification. In this paper, we present a new spatially preserving deep learning network that preserves location and shape information through auto-encoding of feature maps during flattening. The feature maps, auto-encoder and classifier are then trained in an end-to-end fashion to enable location aware classification of findings in chest X-rays. Results are shown on a large multi-hospital chest X-ray dataset indicating a significant improvement in the quality of finding classification over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于大型标记数据集的可用性，近年来胸部 X 射线已成为深度学习研究的焦点。虽然现在可以对异常发现进行分类，但确保它们正确定位仍然具有挑战性，因为这需要识别解剖区域内的异常。现有的用于细粒度异常分类的深度学习网络使用的架构来学习特定位置的发现，其中位置和空间连续性信息在分类前的扁平步骤中丢失。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的空间保留深度学习网络，该网络通过在展平过程中对特征图进行自动编码来保留位置和形状信息。然后以端到端的方式训练特征图、自动编码器和分类器，以实现胸部 X 光检查结果的位置感知分类。结果显示在大型多医院胸部 X 射线数据集上，表明与最先进的方法相比，发现分类的质量有了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种空间保留的展平方法，用于胸部X光片中异常发现的定位感知分类。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习网络在展平步骤中丢失了位置和空间连续性信息，导致异常发现的定位分类效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计了一种自动编码特征图的深度学习网络，在展平过程中保留位置和形状信息，并通过端到端训练结合编码器与分类器。
AI.result: 在多医院胸部X光数据集上验证，分类质量显著优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过保留空间信息的展平方法，可有效提升胸部X光片异常发现的定位感知分类性能。

authors_text: Alberto Alvarez,Jose Font
title: TropeTwist: Trope-based Narrative Structure Generation
title_zh: TropeTwist：基于比喻的叙事结构生成
comment: 8 pages, Accepted and to appear in Proceedings of the 13th Workshop on Procedural Content Generation, at the Foundations of Digital Games (FDG), 2022
comments: 8 pages, Accepted and to appear in Proceedings of the 13th Workshop on Procedural Content Generation, at the Foundations of Digital Games (FDG), 2022
abstract: Games are complex, multi-faceted systems that share common elements and underlying narratives, such as the conflict between a hero and a big bad enemy or pursuing a goal that requires overcoming challenges. However, identifying and describing these elements together is non-trivial as they might differ in certain properties and how players might encounter the narratives. Likewise, generating narratives also pose difficulties when encoding, interpreting, and evaluating them. To address this, we present TropeTwist, a trope-based system that can describe narrative structures in games in a more abstract and generic level, allowing the definition of games' narrative structures and their generation using interconnected tropes, called narrative graphs. To demonstrate the system, we represent the narrative structure of three different games. We use MAP-Elites to generate and evaluate novel quality-diverse narrative graphs encoded as graph grammars, using these three hand-made narrative structures as targets. Both hand-made and generated narrative graphs are evaluated based on their coherence and interestingness, which are improved through evolution.
summary: Games are complex, multi-faceted systems that share common elements and underlying narratives, such as the conflict between a hero and a big bad enemy or pursuing a goal that requires overcoming challenges. However, identifying and describing these elements together is non-trivial as they might differ in certain properties and how players might encounter the narratives. Likewise, generating narratives also pose difficulties when encoding, interpreting, and evaluating them. To address this, we present TropeTwist, a trope-based system that can describe narrative structures in games in a more abstract and generic level, allowing the definition of games' narrative structures and their generation using interconnected tropes, called narrative graphs. To demonstrate the system, we represent the narrative structure of three different games. We use MAP-Elites to generate and evaluate novel quality-diverse narrative graphs encoded as graph grammars, using these three hand-made narrative structures as targets. Both hand-made and generated narrative graphs are evaluated based on their coherence and interestingness, which are improved through evolution.
abstract_zh: 游戏是复杂的、多方面的系统，具有共同的元素和潜在的叙事，例如英雄与大敌之间的冲突或追求需要克服挑战的目标。然而，一起识别和描述这些元素并非易事，因为它们在某些属性以及玩家如何遇到叙述方面可能有所不同。同样，生成叙事也会在编码、解释和评估它们时带来困难。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 TropeTwist，一个基于比喻的系统，可以在更抽象和通用的层面上描述游戏中的叙事结构，允许使用相互关联的比喻（称为叙事图）来定义游戏的叙事结构及其生成。为了演示该系统，我们代表了三个不同游戏的叙事结构。我们使用 MAP-Elites 来生成和评估编码为图语法的新颖的质量多样化的叙事图，并使用这三种手工制作的叙事结构作为目标。手工制作和生成的叙事图都是根据其连贯性和趣味性进行评估，并通过进化得到改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TropeTwist系统，通过基于叙事原型（trope）的叙事图结构生成游戏叙事框架，并利用MAP-Elites算法生成多样化叙事方案。
AI.motivation: 游戏叙事元素复杂且存在差异性，传统方法难以抽象描述和生成符合玩家体验的叙事结构，需更通用的生成框架。
AI.method: 构建叙事图（narrative graph）表示叙事结构，通过原型间的关联定义叙事逻辑；采用MAP-Elites算法演化生成符合目标叙事特征的图语法结构。
AI.result: 成功生成三个游戏的叙事图结构，演化结果在连贯性和趣味性指标上优于人工设计方案，验证了系统有效性。
AI.conclusion: TropeTwist通过原型驱动的叙事图生成方法，结合进化算法优化叙事质量，为游戏叙事设计提供了可扩展的自动化工具。

search_text: TropeTwist: Trope-based Narrative Structure Generation TropeTwist：基于比喻的叙事结构生成 Games are complex, multi-faceted systems that share common elements and underlying narratives, such as the conflict between a hero and a big bad enemy or pursuing a goal that requires overcoming challenges. However, identifying and describing these elements together is non-trivial as they might differ in certain properties and how players might encounter the narratives. Likewise, generating narratives also pose difficulties when encoding, interpreting, and evaluating them. To address this, we present TropeTwist, a trope-based system that can describe narrative structures in games in a more abstract and generic level, allowing the definition of games' narrative structures and their generation using interconnected tropes, called narrative graphs. To demonstrate the system, we represent the narrative structure of three different games. We use MAP-Elites to generate and evaluate novel quality-diverse narrative graphs encoded as graph grammars, using these three hand-made narrative structures as targets. Both hand-made and generated narrative graphs are evaluated based on their coherence and interestingness, which are improved through evolution. 游戏是复杂的、多方面的系统，具有共同的元素和潜在的叙事，例如英雄与大敌之间的冲突或追求需要克服挑战的目标。然而，一起识别和描述这些元素并非易事，因为它们在某些属性以及玩家如何遇到叙述方面可能有所不同。同样，生成叙事也会在编码、解释和评估它们时带来困难。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 TropeTwist，一个基于比喻的系统，可以在更抽象和通用的层面上描述游戏中的叙事结构，允许使用相互关联的比喻（称为叙事图）来定义游戏的叙事结构及其生成。为了演示该系统，我们代表了三个不同游戏的叙事结构。我们使用 MAP-Elites 来生成和评估编码为图语法的新颖的质量多样化的叙事图，并使用这三种手工制作的叙事结构作为目标。手工制作和生成的叙事图都是根据其连贯性和趣味性进行评估，并通过进化得到改进。 本文提出TropeTwist系统，通过基于叙事原型（trope）的叙事图结构生成游戏叙事框架，并利用MAP-Elites算法生成多样化叙事方案。 Alberto Alvarez,Jose Font cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Jacob Krantz,Stefan Lee
title: Sim-2-Sim Transfer for Vision-and-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments
title_zh: Sim-2-Sim 传输用于连续环境中的视觉和语言导航
comment: Changes: figure compression for accessibility
comments: Changes: figure compression for accessibility
abstract: Recent work in Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) has presented two environmental paradigms with differing realism -- the standard VLN setting built on topological environments where navigation is abstracted away, and the VLN-CE setting where agents must navigate continuous 3D environments using low-level actions. Despite sharing the high-level task and even the underlying instruction-path data, performance on VLN-CE lags behind VLN significantly. In this work, we explore this gap by transferring an agent from the abstract environment of VLN to the continuous environment of VLN-CE. We find that this sim-2-sim transfer is highly effective, improving over the prior state of the art in VLN-CE by +12% success rate. While this demonstrates the potential for this direction, the transfer does not fully retain the original performance of the agent in the abstract setting. We present a sequence of experiments to identify what differences result in performance degradation, providing clear directions for further improvement.
summary: Recent work in Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) has presented two environmental paradigms with differing realism -- the standard VLN setting built on topological environments where navigation is abstracted away, and the VLN-CE setting where agents must navigate continuous 3D environments using low-level actions. Despite sharing the high-level task and even the underlying instruction-path data, performance on VLN-CE lags behind VLN significantly. In this work, we explore this gap by transferring an agent from the abstract environment of VLN to the continuous environment of VLN-CE. We find that this sim-2-sim transfer is highly effective, improving over the prior state of the art in VLN-CE by +12% success rate. While this demonstrates the potential for this direction, the transfer does not fully retain the original performance of the agent in the abstract setting. We present a sequence of experiments to identify what differences result in performance degradation, providing clear directions for further improvement.
abstract_zh: 最近在视觉和语言导航（VLN）方面的工作提出了两种具有不同现实性的环境范例：建立在拓扑环境上的标准 VLN 设置（其中导航被抽象）和 VLN-CE 设置（其中代理必须使用低级操作来导航连续的 3D 环境）。尽管共享高级任务甚至底层指令路径数据，VLN-CE 的性能仍明显落后于 VLN。在这项工作中，我们通过将代理从 VLN 的抽象环境转移到 VLN-CE 的连续环境来探索这一差距。我们发现这种 sim-2-sim 传输非常有效，比 VLN-CE 的现有技术提高了 12% 的成功率。虽然这证明了这个方向的潜力，但转移并没有完全保留代理在抽象设置中的原始性能。我们提出了一系列实验来确定哪些差异导致性能下降，为进一步改进提供明确的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了将视觉与语言导航代理从抽象拓扑环境迁移至连续3D环境的有效性，并分析了性能差异的原因。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLN和VLN-CE共享相同任务和数据，但后者性能显著落后，需探索跨环境迁移的可行性及改进方向。
AI.method: 通过将预训练于拓扑环境的代理迁移至连续环境，结合实验分析环境差异对性能的影响因素。
AI.result: 迁移后成功率提升12%，但未完全保留原环境性能，实验识别出关键性能退化因素。
AI.conclusion: Sim-2-sim迁移有效提升VLN-CE性能，但需针对性优化以解决跨环境适应性问题。

authors_text: Saeed Khan,Bryce A. Primavera,Jeff Chiles,Adam N. McCaughan,Sonia M. Buckley,Alexander N. Tait,Adriana Lita,John Biesecker,Anna Fox,David Olaya,Richard P. Mirin,Sae Woo Nam,Jeffrey M. Shainline
title: Demonstration of Superconducting Optoelectronic Single-Photon Synapses
title_zh: 超导光电单光子突触演示
comment: 23 pages, 20 figures
comments: 23 pages, 20 figures
abstract: Superconducting optoelectronic hardware is being explored as a path towards artificial spiking neural networks with unprecedented scales of complexity and computational ability. Such hardware combines integrated-photonic components for few-photon, light-speed communication with superconducting circuits for fast, energy-efficient computation. Monolithic integration of superconducting and photonic devices is necessary for the scaling of this technology. In the present work, superconducting-nanowire single-photon detectors are monolithically integrated with Josephson junctions for the first time, enabling the realization of superconducting optoelectronic synapses. We present circuits that perform analog weighting and temporal leaky integration of single-photon presynaptic signals. Synaptic weighting is implemented in the electronic domain so that binary, single-photon communication can be maintained. Records of recent synaptic activity are locally stored as current in superconducting loops. Dendritic and neuronal nonlinearities are implemented with a second stage of Josephson circuitry. The hardware presents great design flexibility, with demonstrated synaptic time constants spanning four orders of magnitude (hundreds of nanoseconds to milliseconds). The synapses are responsive to presynaptic spike rates exceeding 10 MHz and consume approximately 33 aJ of dynamic power per synapse event before accounting for cooling. In addition to neuromorphic hardware, these circuits introduce new avenues towards realizing large-scale single-photon-detector arrays for diverse imaging, sensing, and quantum communication applications.
summary: Superconducting optoelectronic hardware is being explored as a path towards artificial spiking neural networks with unprecedented scales of complexity and computational ability. Such hardware combines integrated-photonic components for few-photon, light-speed communication with superconducting circuits for fast, energy-efficient computation. Monolithic integration of superconducting and photonic devices is necessary for the scaling of this technology. In the present work, superconducting-nanowire single-photon detectors are monolithically integrated with Josephson junctions for the first time, enabling the realization of superconducting optoelectronic synapses. We present circuits that perform analog weighting and temporal leaky integration of single-photon presynaptic signals. Synaptic weighting is implemented in the electronic domain so that binary, single-photon communication can be maintained. Records of recent synaptic activity are locally stored as current in superconducting loops. Dendritic and neuronal nonlinearities are implemented with a second stage of Josephson circuitry. The hardware presents great design flexibility, with demonstrated synaptic time constants spanning four orders of magnitude (hundreds of nanoseconds to milliseconds). The synapses are responsive to presynaptic spike rates exceeding 10 MHz and consume approximately 33 aJ of dynamic power per synapse event before accounting for cooling. In addition to neuromorphic hardware, these circuits introduce new avenues towards realizing large-scale single-photon-detector arrays for diverse imaging, sensing, and quantum communication applications.
abstract_zh: 超导光电硬件正在被探索作为通向具有前所未有的复杂性和计算能力的人工尖峰神经网络的途径。此类硬件将用于少光子、光速通信的集成光子组件与用于快速、节能计算的超导电路相结合。超导和光子器件的单片集成对于扩展该技术是必要的。在目前的工作中，超导纳米线单光子探测器首次与约瑟夫森结单片集成，从而实现了超导光电突触。我们提出了对单光子突触前信号进行模拟加权和时间泄漏积分的电路。突触加权在电子领域实现，以便可以维持二进制、单光子通信。最近突触活动的记录作为电流本地存储在超导回路中。树突和神经元非线性是通过约瑟夫森电路的第二级实现的。该硬件具有极大的设计灵活性，所展示的突触时间常数跨越四个数量级（数百纳秒到毫秒）。突触对超过 10 MHz 的突触前尖峰速率做出响应，在考虑冷却之前，每个突触事件消耗约 33 aJ 的动态功率。除了神经形态硬件之外，这些电路还为实现各种成像、传感和量子通信应用的大规模单光子探测器阵列引入了新途径。

AI.tldr: 本文展示了超导光电单光子突触的实现，通过单片集成超导纳米线单光子探测器与约瑟夫森结，构建具有模拟加权和时间泄漏积分功能的神经形态硬件。
AI.motivation: 传统人工神经网络受限于计算效率与规模，需开发新型硬件实现高速、低能耗的脉冲神经网络，超导光电技术可结合光速通信与超导计算优势。
AI.method: 首次单片集成超导纳米线单光子探测器与约瑟夫森结，设计实现模拟加权电路、超导环电流存储机制及二阶约瑟夫森非线性电路，支持单光子通信与大规模集成。
AI.result: 突触时间常数覆盖4个数量级（百纳秒至毫秒），支持10 MHz以上突触速率，单事件动态功耗约33 aJ，验证了硬件灵活性与低能耗特性，并拓展至成像与量子通信应用。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为构建大规模神经形态硬件及单光子探测阵列提供了新路径，兼具高能效、可扩展性与多功能性，推动人工智能与量子技术的融合。

tldr: 本文展示了超导光电单光子突触的实现，通过单片集成超导纳米线单光子探测器与约瑟夫森结，构建具有模拟加权和时间泄漏积分功能的神经形态硬件。
motivation: 传统人工神经网络受限于计算效率与规模，需开发新型硬件实现高速、低能耗的脉冲神经网络，超导光电技术可结合光速通信与超导计算优势。
method: 首次单片集成超导纳米线单光子探测器与约瑟夫森结，设计实现模拟加权电路、超导环电流存储机制及二阶约瑟夫森非线性电路，支持单光子通信与大规模集成。
result: 突触时间常数覆盖4个数量级（百纳秒至毫秒），支持10 MHz以上突触速率，单事件动态功耗约33 aJ，验证了硬件灵活性与低能耗特性，并拓展至成像与量子通信应用。
conclusion: 该技术为构建大规模神经形态硬件及单光子探测阵列提供了新路径，兼具高能效、可扩展性与多功能性，推动人工智能与量子技术的融合。
search_text: Demonstration of Superconducting Optoelectronic Single-Photon Synapses 超导光电单光子突触演示 Superconducting optoelectronic hardware is being explored as a path towards artificial spiking neural networks with unprecedented scales of complexity and computational ability. Such hardware combines integrated-photonic components for few-photon, light-speed communication with superconducting circuits for fast, energy-efficient computation. Monolithic integration of superconducting and photonic devices is necessary for the scaling of this technology. In the present work, superconducting-nanowire single-photon detectors are monolithically integrated with Josephson junctions for the first time, enabling the realization of superconducting optoelectronic synapses. We present circuits that perform analog weighting and temporal leaky integration of single-photon presynaptic signals. Synaptic weighting is implemented in the electronic domain so that binary, single-photon communication can be maintained. Records of recent synaptic activity are locally stored as current in superconducting loops. Dendritic and neuronal nonlinearities are implemented with a second stage of Josephson circuitry. The hardware presents great design flexibility, with demonstrated synaptic time constants spanning four orders of magnitude (hundreds of nanoseconds to milliseconds). The synapses are responsive to presynaptic spike rates exceeding 10 MHz and consume approximately 33 aJ of dynamic power per synapse event before accounting for cooling. In addition to neuromorphic hardware, these circuits introduce new avenues towards realizing large-scale single-photon-detector arrays for diverse imaging, sensing, and quantum communication applications. 超导光电硬件正在被探索作为通向具有前所未有的复杂性和计算能力的人工尖峰神经网络的途径。此类硬件将用于少光子、光速通信的集成光子组件与用于快速、节能计算的超导电路相结合。超导和光子器件的单片集成对于扩展该技术是必要的。在目前的工作中，超导纳米线单光子探测器首次与约瑟夫森结单片集成，从而实现了超导光电突触。我们提出了对单光子突触前信号进行模拟加权和时间泄漏积分的电路。突触加权在电子领域实现，以便可以维持二进制、单光子通信。最近突触活动的记录作为电流本地存储在超导回路中。树突和神经元非线性是通过约瑟夫森电路的第二级实现的。该硬件具有极大的设计灵活性，所展示的突触时间常数跨越四个数量级（数百纳秒到毫秒）。突触对超过 10 MHz 的突触前尖峰速率做出响应，在考虑冷却之前，每个突触事件消耗约 33 aJ 的动态功率。除了神经形态硬件之外，这些电路还为实现各种成像、传感和量子通信应用的大规模单光子探测器阵列引入了新途径。 本文展示了超导光电单光子突触的实现，通过单片集成超导纳米线单光子探测器与约瑟夫森结，构建具有模拟加权和时间泄漏积分功能的神经形态硬件。 Saeed Khan,Bryce A. Primavera,Jeff Chiles,Adam N. McCaughan,Sonia M. Buckley,Alexander N. Tait,Adriana Lita,John Biesecker,Anna Fox,David Olaya,Richard P. Mirin,Sae Woo Nam,Jeffrey M. authors_text: Brian Subirana,Harry Levinson,Ferran Hueto,Prithvi Rajasekaran,Alexander Gaidis,Esteve Tarragó,Peter Oliveira-Soens
title: The MIT Voice Name System
title_zh: 麻省理工学院语音姓名系统
comment: White Paper
comments: White Paper
abstract: This RFC white Paper summarizes our progress on the MIT Voice Name System (VNS) and Huey. The VNS, similar in name and function to the DNS, is a system to reserve and use "wake words" to activate Artificial Intelligence (AI) devices. Just like you can say "Hey Siri" to activate Apple's personal assistant, we propose using the VNS in smart speakers and other devices to route wake requests based on commands such as "turn off", "open grocery shopping list" or "271, start flash card review of my computer vision class". We also introduce Huey, an unambiguous Natural Language to interact with AI devices. We aim to standardize voice interactions to a universal reach similar to that of other systems such as phone numbering, with an agreed world-wide approach to assign and use numbers, or the Internet's DNS, with a standard naming system, that has helped flourish popular services including the World-Wide-Web, FTP, and email. Just like these standards are "neutral", we also aim to endow the VNS with "wake neutrality" so that each participant can develop its own digital voice. We focus on voice as a starting point to talk to any IoT object and explain briefly how the VNS may be expanded to other AI technologies enabling person-to-machine conversations (really machine-to-machine), including computer vision or neural interfaces. We also describe briefly considerations for a broader set of standards, MIT Open AI (MOA), including a reference architecture to serve as a starting point for the development of a general conversational commerce infrastructure that has standard "Wake Words", NLP commands such as "Shopping Lists" or "Flash Card Reviews", and personalities such as Pi or 271. Privacy and security are key elements considered because of speech-to-text errors and the amount of personal information contained in a voice sample.

Just like these standards are "neutral", we also aim to endow the VNS with "wake neutrality" so that each participant can develop its own digital voice. abstract_zh: 本 RFC 白皮书总结了我们在 MIT 语音名称系统 (VNS) 和 Huey 方面的进展。 VNS的名称和功能与DNS类似，是一个保留并使用“唤醒词”来激活人工智能（AI）设备的系统。就像你可以说“嘿 Siri”来激活 Apple 的个人助理一样，我们建议在智能扬声器和其他设备中使用 VNS，根据“关闭”、“打开杂货购物清单”或“271，开始闪卡复习我的计算机视觉课程”等命令来路由唤醒请求。我们还引入了 Huey，一种与人工智能设备交互的明确自然语言。我们的目标是将语音交互标准化，使其达到与其他系统类似的普遍覆盖范围，例如电话号码，采用全球范围内商定的分配和使用号码的方法，或采用标准命名系统的互联网 DNS，这有助于蓬勃发展包括万维网、FTP 和电子邮件在内的流行服务。就像这些标准是“中立的”一样，我们也旨在赋予VNS“唤醒中立性”，以便每个参与者都可以开发自己的数字语音。我们专注于将语音作为与任何物联网对象对话的起点，并简要解释如何将 VNS 扩展到其他人工智能技术，以实现人机对话（真正的机器对机器），包括计算机视觉或神经接口。我们还简要描述了更广泛的标准集 MIT 开放人工智能 (MOA)，包括作为开发通用对话商务基础设施起点的参考架构，该基础设施具有标准“唤醒词”、“购物清单”或“闪存卡评论”等 NLP 命令以及 Pi 或 271 等个性。由于语音到文本错误以及语音样本中包含的个人信息量，隐私和安全是考虑的关键要素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MIT语音名称系统（VNS）和Huey，旨在通过标准化语音唤醒词和自然语言交互，实现类似DNS的通用语音交互标准。
AI.motivation: 为解决现有语音助手唤醒词碎片化问题，推动语音交互向电话号码、DNS等标准化系统发展，实现跨设备、跨平台的统一语音指令体系。
AI.method: 设计基于DNS原理的VNS系统，定义无歧义的自然语言交互协议Huey，并构建包含隐私保护机制的参考架构MIT Open AI（MOA）。
AI.result: 提出语音唤醒中立性概念，建立包含通用唤醒词、NLP指令及个性化的标准框架，同时识别语音转文本误差与隐私泄露等关键风险。
AI.conclusion: VNS可扩展至计算机视觉等AI领域，需通过标准化推动人机对话基础设施发展，但需重点解决隐私安全与技术误差等核心挑战。

authors_text: Fangyi Zhu,Lok You Tan,See-Kiong Ng,Stéphane Bressan
title: Syntax-informed Question Answering with Heterogeneous Graph Transformer
title_zh: 使用异构图转换器进行基于语法的问答
abstract: Large neural language models are steadily contributing state-of-the-art performance to question answering and other natural language and information processing tasks. These models are expensive to train. We propose to evaluate whether such pre-trained models can benefit from the addition of explicit linguistics information without requiring retraining from scratch. We present a linguistics-informed question answering approach that extends and fine-tunes a pre-trained transformer-based neural language model with symbolic knowledge encoded with a heterogeneous graph transformer. We illustrate the approach by the addition of syntactic information in the form of dependency and constituency graphic structures connecting tokens and virtual vertices. A comparative empirical performance evaluation with BERT as its baseline and with Stanford Question Answering Dataset demonstrates the competitiveness of the proposed approach. We argue, in conclusion and in the light of further results of preliminary experiments, that the approach is extensible to further linguistics information including semantics and pragmatics.
summary: Large neural language models are steadily contributing state-of-the-art performance to question answering and other natural language and information processing tasks. These models are expensive to train. We propose to evaluate whether such pre-trained models can benefit from the addition of explicit linguistics information without requiring retraining from scratch. We present a linguistics-informed question answering approach that extends and fine-tunes a pre-trained transformer-based neural language model with symbolic knowledge encoded with a heterogeneous graph transformer. We illustrate the approach by the addition of syntactic information in the form of dependency and constituency graphic structures connecting tokens and virtual vertices. A comparative empirical performance evaluation with BERT as its baseline and with Stanford Question Answering Dataset demonstrates the competitiveness of the proposed approach. We argue, in conclusion and in the light of further results of preliminary experiments, that the approach is extensible to further linguistics information including semantics and pragmatics.
abstract_zh: 大型神经语言模型正在稳步为问答以及其他自然语言和信息处理任务贡献最先进的性能。这些模型的训练成本很高。我们建议评估此类预训练模型是否可以从添加显式语言学信息中受益，而无需从头开始重新训练。我们提出了一种基于语言学的问答方法，该方法使用异构图变换器编码的符号知识来扩展和微调基于预训练变换器的神经语言模型。我们通过添加连接标记和虚拟顶点的依赖和选区图形结构形式的句法信息来说明该方法。以 BERT 作为基准和斯坦福问答数据集进行的比较实证性能评估证明了所提出方法的竞争力。总之，根据初步实验的进一步结果，我们认为该方法可以扩展到进一步的语言学信息，包括语义和语用学。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合句法信息的问答方法，通过异构图变换器增强预训练模型。
AI.motivation: 预训练语言模型训练成本高昂，需探索无需重训练即可融入显式语言学信息的途径。
AI.method: 基于预训练模型扩展异构图变换器，将依存句法和短语结构树编码为图结构进行微调。
AI.result: 在SQuAD数据集上实验显示，该方法性能优于BERT基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可扩展至整合语义与语用等更多语言学特征。

ai_content.conclusion: 该框架可扩展至整合语义与语用等更多语言学特征。

search_text: Syntax-informed Question Answering with Heterogeneous Graph Transformer 使用异构图转换器进行基于语法的问答 Large neural language models are steadily contributing state-of-the-art performance to question answering and other natural language and information processing tasks. These models are expensive to train. We propose to evaluate whether such pre-trained models can benefit from the addition of explicit linguistics information without requiring retraining from scratch. We present a linguistics-informed question answering approach that extends and fine-tunes a pre-trained transformer-based neural language model with symbolic knowledge encoded with a heterogeneous graph transformer. We illustrate the approach by the addition of syntactic information in the form of dependency and constituency graphic structures connecting tokens and virtual vertices. A comparative empirical performance evaluation with BERT as its baseline and with Stanford Question Answering Dataset demonstrates the competitiveness of the proposed approach. We argue, in conclusion and in the light of further results of preliminary experiments, that the approach is extensible to further linguistics information including semantics and pragmatics. 大型神经语言模型正在稳步为问答以及其他自然语言和信息处理任务贡献最先进的性能。这些模型的训练成本很高。我们建议评估此类预训练模型是否可以从添加显式语言学信息中受益，而无需从头开始重新训练。我们提出了一种基于语言学的问答方法，该方法使用异构图变换器编码的符号知识来扩展和微调基于预训练变换器的神经语言模型。我们通过添加连接标记和虚拟顶点的依赖和选区图形结构形式的句法信息来说明该方法。以 BERT 作为基准和斯坦福问答数据集进行的比较实证性能评估证明了所提出方法的竞争力。总之，根据初步实验的进一步结果，我们认为该方法可以扩展到进一步的语言学信息，包括语义和语用学。 本文提出一种结合句法信息的问答方法，通过异构图变换器增强预训练模型。 Fangyi Zhu,Lok You Tan,See-Kiong Ng,Stéphane Bressan cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Rishab Sharma,Fuxiang Chen,Fatemeh Fard
title: LAMNER: Code Comment Generation Using Character Language Model and Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: LAMNER：使用字符语言模型和命名实体识别生成代码注释
comment: Accepted at ICPC 2022
comments: Accepted at ICPC 2022
abstract: Code comment generation is the task of generating a high-level natural language description for a given code method or function. Although researchers have been studying multiple ways to generate code comments automatically, previous work mainly considers representing a code token in its entirety semantics form only (e.g., a language model is used to learn the semantics of a code token), and additional code properties such as the tree structure of a code are included as an auxiliary input to the model. There are two limitations: 1) Learning the code token in its entirety form may not be able to capture information succinctly in source code, and 2) The code token does not contain additional syntactic information, inherently important in programming languages. In this paper, we present LAnguage Model and Named Entity Recognition (LAMNER), a code comment generator capable of encoding code constructs effectively and capturing the structural property of a code token. A character-level language model is used to learn the semantic representation to encode a code token. For the structural property of a token, a Named Entity Recognition model is trained to learn the different types of code tokens. These representations are then fed into an encoder-decoder architecture to generate code comments. We evaluate the generated comments from LAMNER and other baselines on a popular Java dataset with four commonly used metrics. Our results show that LAMNER is effective and improves over the best baseline model in BLEU-1, BLEU-2, BLEU-3, BLEU-4, ROUGE-L, METEOR, and CIDEr by 14.34%, 18.98%, 21.55%, 23.00%, 10.52%, 1.44%, and 25.86%, respectively. Additionally, we fused LAMNER's code representation with the baseline models, and the fused models consistently showed improvement over the non-fused models. The human evaluation further shows that LAMNER produces high-quality code comments.

A character-level language model is used to learn the semantic representation to encode a code token. We evaluate the generated comments from LAMNER and other baselines on a popular Java dataset with four commonly used metrics. Our results show that LAMNER is effective and improves over the best baseline model in BLEU-1, BLEU-2, BLEU-3, BLEU-4, ROUGE-L, METEOR, and CIDEr by 14.34%, 18.98%, 21.55%, 23.00%, 10.52%, 1.44%, and 25.86%, respectively. abstract_zh: 代码注释生成是为给定的代码方法或函数生成高级自然语言描述的任务。尽管研究人员一直在研究自动生成代码注释的多种方法，但以前的工作主要考虑仅以完整的语义形式表示代码标记（例如，使用语言模型来学习代码标记的语义），并将诸如代码的树结构之类的附加代码属性作为模型的辅助输入。有两个限制：1）学习完整形式的代码标记可能无法在源代码中简洁地捕获信息，2）代码标记不包含额外的语法信息，这在编程语言中本质上很重要。在本文中，我们提出了语言模型和命名实体识别（LAMNER），这是一种代码注释生成器，能够有效地编码代码结构并捕获代码标记的结构属性。字符级语言模型用于学习语义表示以对代码标记进行编码。针对令牌的结构属性，训练命名实体识别模型来学习不同类型的代码令牌。然后将这些表示输入编码器-解码器架构以生成代码注释。我们使用四个常用指标评估流行 Java 数据集上的 LAMNER 和其他基线生成的评论。我们的结果表明，LAMNER 是有效的，并且比 BLEU-1、BLEU-2、BLEU-3、BLEU-4、ROUGE-L、METEOR 和 CIDEr 中的最佳基线模型分别提高了 14.34%、18.98%、21.55%、23.00%、10.52%、1.44% 和 25.86%。此外，我们将 LAMNER 的代码表示与基线模型融合，并且融合模型始终表现出优于非融合模型的改进。人工评估进一步表明，LAMNER 生成了高质量的代码注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAMNER模型，结合字符级语言模型和命名实体识别技术，用于生成高质量的代码注释。
AI.motivation: 现有代码注释生成方法未能有效捕捉代码的语法信息和结构特性，导致生成注释质量受限。
AI.method: 采用字符级语言模型学习代码语义表示，训练命名实体识别模型提取代码标记类型，将两者融合至编码器-解码器架构中生成注释。
AI.result: 在Java数据集上，LAMNER在BLEU-1至BLEU-4、ROUGE-L等指标上较基线模型提升10%-25%，人类评估验证其注释质量优异。
AI.conclusion: LAMNER通过联合建模语义与结构特性显著提升代码注释生成效果，模型融合策略进一步增强性能。

Additionally, we fused LAMNER's code representation with the baseline models, and the fused models consistently showed improvement over the non-fused models. The human evaluation further shows that LAMNER produces high-quality code comments. 代码注释生成是为给定的代码方法或函数生成高级自然语言描述的任务。尽管研究人员一直在研究自动生成代码注释的多种方法，但以前的工作主要考虑仅以完整的语义形式表示代码标记（例如，使用语言模型来学习代码标记的语义），并将诸如代码的树结构之类的附加代码属性作为模型的辅助输入。有两个限制：1）学习完整形式的代码标记可能无法在源代码中简洁地捕获信息，2）代码标记不包含额外的语法信息，这在编程语言中本质上很重要。在本文中，我们提出了语言模型和命名实体识别（LAMNER），这是一种代码注释生成器，能够有效地编码代码结构并捕获代码标记的结构属性。字符级语言模型用于学习语义表示以对代码标记进行编码。针对令牌的结构属性，训练命名实体识别模型来学习不同类型的代码令牌。然后将这些表示输入编码器-解码器架构以生成代码注释。我们使用四个常用指标评估流行 Java 数据集上的 LAMNER 和其他基线生成的评论。我们的结果表明，LAMNER 是有效的，并且比 BLEU-1、BLEU-2、BLEU-3、BLEU-4、ROUGE-L、METEOR 和 CIDEr 中的最佳基线模型分别提高了 14.34%、18.98%、21.55%、23.00%、10.52%、1.44% 和 25.86%。此外，我们将 LAMNER 的代码表示与基线模型融合，并且融合模型始终表现出优于非融合模型的改进。人工评估进一步表明，LAMNER 生成了高质量的代码注释。 本文提出LAMNER模型，结合字符级语言模型和命名实体识别技术，用于生成高质量的代码注释。 Rishab Sharma,Fuxiang Chen,Fatemeh Fard cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.SE

authors_text: Abhijit Suresh,Jennifer Jacobs,Charis Harty,Margaret Perkoff,James H. Martin,Tamara Sumner
title: The TalkMoves Dataset: K-12 Mathematics Lesson Transcripts Annotated for Teacher and Student Discursive Moves
title_zh: TalkMoves 数据集：针对教师和学生的话语动作注释的 K-12 数学课程成绩单
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, Accepted for a Poster + Demo presentation at the 13th International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation 2022
comments: 9 pages, 2 figures, Accepted for a Poster + Demo presentation at the 13th International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation 2022
abstract: Transcripts of teaching episodes can be effective tools to understand discourse patterns in classroom instruction. According to most educational experts, sustained classroom discourse is a critical component of equitable, engaging, and rich learning environments for students. This paper describes the TalkMoves dataset, composed of 567 human-annotated K-12 mathematics lesson transcripts (including entire lessons or portions of lessons) derived from video recordings. The set of transcripts primarily includes in-person lessons with whole-class discussions and/or small group work, as well as some online lessons. All of the transcripts are human-transcribed, segmented by the speaker (teacher or student), and annotated at the sentence level for ten discursive moves based on accountable talk theory. In addition, the transcripts include utterance-level information in the form of dialogue act labels based on the Switchboard Dialog Act Corpus. The dataset can be used by educators, policymakers, and researchers to understand the nature of teacher and student discourse in K-12 math classrooms. Portions of this dataset have been used to develop the TalkMoves application, which provides teachers with automated, immediate, and actionable feedback about their mathematics instruction.
summary: Transcripts of teaching episodes can be effective tools to understand discourse patterns in classroom instruction. According to most educational experts, sustained classroom discourse is a critical component of equitable, engaging, and rich learning environments for students. This paper describes the TalkMoves dataset, composed of 567 human-annotated K-12 mathematics lesson transcripts (including entire lessons or portions of lessons) derived from video recordings. The set of transcripts primarily includes in-person lessons with whole-class discussions and/or small group work, as well as some online lessons. All of the transcripts are human-transcribed, segmented by the speaker (teacher or student), and annotated at the sentence level for ten discursive moves based on accountable talk theory. In addition, the transcripts include utterance-level information in the form of dialogue act labels based on the Switchboard Dialog Act Corpus. The dataset can be used by educators, policymakers, and researchers to understand the nature of teacher and student discourse in K-12 math classrooms. Portions of this dataset have been used to develop the TalkMoves application, which provides teachers with automated, immediate, and actionable feedback about their mathematics instruction.
abstract_zh: 教学片段的文字记录可以成为理解课堂教学中话语模式的有效工具。大多数教育专家认为，持续的课堂对话是为学生提供公平、有吸引力和丰富的学习环境的重要组成部分。本文描述了 TalkMoves 数据集，该数据集由来自视频记录的 567 个人工注释的 K-12 数学课程记录（包括整个课程或部分课程）组成。这套成绩单主要包括带有全班讨论和/或小组作业的面对面课程，以及一些在线课程。所有的文字记录都是人工转录的，由说话者（老师或学生）分段，并根据负责任的谈话理论在句子级别注释了十个话语动作。此外，转录本还包括基于 Switchboard Dialog Act Corpus 的对话行为标签形式的话语级信息。教育工作者、政策制定者和研究人员可以使用该数据集来了解 K-12 数学课堂中师生对话的性质。该数据集的部分内容已用于开发 TalkMoves 应用程序，该应用程序为教师提供有关其数学教学的自动化、即时且可操作的反馈。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了TalkMoves数据集，包含567份K-12数学课堂转录文本，按说话者分割并标注了基于责任对话理论的10种话语行为，用于分析教师和学生的课堂互动模式。
AI.motivation: 持续的课堂对话是构建公平、 engaging 和富有成效的学习环境的关键，但缺乏系统化的数据支持研究和教学改进。
AI.method: 从视频录制的课堂中获取转录文本，由人工进行说话者分割、句子级话语行为标注（基于责任对话理论）及话语行为标签（参考Switchboard语料库）。
AI.result: 构建了包含完整或部分课堂记录的标注数据集，并开发了TalkMoves应用，为教师提供实时教学反馈。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为教育者、政策制定者和研究者提供了分析K-12数学课堂话语模式的工具，有助于提升教学质量与研究水平。

search_text: The TalkMoves Dataset: K-12 Mathematics Lesson Transcripts Annotated for Teacher and Student Discursive Moves TalkMoves 数据集：针对教师和学生的话语动作注释的 K-12 数学课程成绩单 Transcripts of teaching episodes can be effective tools to understand discourse patterns in classroom instruction. According to most educational experts, sustained classroom discourse is a critical component of equitable, engaging, and rich learning environments for students. This paper describes the TalkMoves dataset, composed of 567 human-annotated K-12 mathematics lesson transcripts (including entire lessons or portions of lessons) derived from video recordings. The set of transcripts primarily includes in-person lessons with whole-class discussions and/or small group work, as well as some online lessons. All of the transcripts are human-transcribed, segmented by the speaker (teacher or student), and annotated at the sentence level for ten discursive moves based on accountable talk theory. In addition, the transcripts include utterance-level information in the form of dialogue act labels based on the Switchboard Dialog Act Corpus. The dataset can be used by educators, policymakers, and researchers to understand the nature of teacher and student discourse in K-12 math classrooms. Portions of this dataset have been used to develop the TalkMoves application, which provides teachers with automated, immediate, and actionable feedback about their mathematics instruction. 教学片段的文字记录可以成为理解课堂教学中话语模式的有效工具。大多数教育专家认为，持续的课堂对话是为学生提供公平、有吸引力和丰富的学习环境的重要组成部分。本文描述了 TalkMoves 数据集，该数据集由来自视频记录的 567 个人工注释的 K-12 数学课程记录（包括整个课程或部分课程）组成。这套成绩单主要包括带有全班讨论和/或小组作业的面对面课程，以及一些在线课程。所有的文字记录都是人工转录的，由说话者（老师或学生）分段，并根据负责任的谈话理论在句子级别注释了十个话语动作。此外，转录本还包括基于 Switchboard Dialog Act Corpus 的对话行为标签形式的话语级信息。教育工作者、政策制定者和研究人员可以使用该数据集来了解 K-12 数学课堂中师生对话的性质。该数据集的部分内容已用于开发 TalkMoves 应用程序，该应用程序为教师提供有关其数学教学的自动化、即时且可操作的反馈。 本文介绍了TalkMoves数据集，包含567份K-12数学课堂转录文本，按说话者分割并标注了基于责任对话理论的10种话语行为，用于分析教师和学生的课堂互动模式。 Abhijit Suresh,Jennifer Jacobs,Charis Harty,Margaret Perkoff,James H. Martin,Tamara Sumner cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Hao Zhou,Yixin Chen,David Troendle,Byunghyun Jang
title: One-Class Model for Fabric Defect Detection
title_zh: 织物缺陷检测的一类模型
abstract: An automated and accurate fabric defect inspection system is in high demand as a replacement for slow, inconsistent, error-prone, and expensive human operators in the textile industry. Previous efforts focused on certain types of fabrics or defects, which is not an ideal solution. In this paper, we propose a novel one-class model that is capable of detecting various defects on different fabric types. Our model takes advantage of a well-designed Gabor filter bank to analyze fabric texture. We then leverage an advanced deep learning algorithm, autoencoder, to learn general feature representations from the outputs of the Gabor filter bank. Lastly, we develop a nearest neighbor density estimator to locate potential defects and draw them on the fabric images. We demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed model by testing it on various types of fabrics such as plain, patterned, and rotated fabrics. Our model also achieves a true positive rate (a.k.a recall) value of 0.895 with no false alarms on our dataset based upon the Standard Fabric Defect Glossary.
summary: An automated and accurate fabric defect inspection system is in high demand as a replacement for slow, inconsistent, error-prone, and expensive human operators in the textile industry. Previous efforts focused on certain types of fabrics or defects, which is not an ideal solution. In this paper, we propose a novel one-class model that is capable of detecting various defects on different fabric types. Our model takes advantage of a well-designed Gabor filter bank to analyze fabric texture. We then leverage an advanced deep learning algorithm, autoencoder, to learn general feature representations from the outputs of the Gabor filter bank. Lastly, we develop a nearest neighbor density estimator to locate potential defects and draw them on the fabric images. We demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed model by testing it on various types of fabrics such as plain, patterned, and rotated fabrics. Our model also achieves a true positive rate (a.k.a recall) value of 0.895 with no false alarms on our dataset based upon the Standard Fabric Defect Glossary.
abstract_zh: 纺织行业迫切需要一种自动化、准确的织物缺陷检测系统来替代缓慢、不一致、容易出错且成本高昂的人工操作员。之前的努力主要集中在某些类型的织物或缺陷上，这并不是一个理想的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的一类模型，能够检测不同织物类型的各种缺陷。我们的模型利用精心设计的 Gabor 滤波器组来分析织物纹理。然后，我们利用先进的深度学习算法（自动编码器）从 Gabor 滤波器组的输出中学习一般特征表示。最后，我们开发了一个最近邻密度估计器来定位潜在的缺陷并将其绘制在织物图像上。我们通过在各种类型的织物（例如素色织物、图案织物和旋转织物）上进行测试来证明该模型的有效性和鲁棒性。我们的模型还实现了 0.895 的真阳性率（又称召回率）值，基于标准织物缺陷术语表的数据集没有误报。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种一类模型用于织物缺陷检测，通过结合Gabor滤波器与自编码器实现跨类型织物的缺陷识别。
AI.motivation: 传统人工检测效率低且易出错，现有方法局限于特定织物或缺陷类型，需开发通用性强的自动化检测方案。
AI.method: 采用Gabor滤波器组提取纹理特征，利用自编码器学习通用特征表示，结合最近邻密度估计器定位缺陷区域。
AI.result: 在多种织物（平纹、花纹、旋转织物）上实现0.895的真阳性率，且无误报，符合标准缺陷分类体系。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效解决了多类型织物缺陷检测问题，验证了方法在鲁棒性与泛化能力上的优势。

authors_text: Lemeng Wu,Mengchen Liu,Yinpeng Chen,Dongdong Chen,Xiyang Dai,Lu Yuan
title: Residual Mixture of Experts
title_zh: 专家的剩余混合
abstract: Mixture of Experts (MoE) is able to scale up vision transformers effectively. However, it requires prohibiting computation resources to train a large MoE transformer. In this paper, we propose Residual Mixture of Experts (RMoE), an efficient training pipeline for MoE vision transformers on downstream tasks, such as segmentation and detection. RMoE achieves comparable results with the upper-bound MoE training, while only introducing minor additional training cost than the lower-bound non-MoE training pipelines. The efficiency is supported by our key observation: the weights of an MoE transformer can be factored into an input-independent core and an input-dependent residual. Compared with the weight core, the weight residual can be efficiently trained with much less computation resource, e.g., finetuning on the downstream data. We show that, compared with the current MoE training pipeline, we get comparable results while saving over 30% training cost. When compared with state-of-the-art non- MoE transformers, such as Swin-T / CvT-13 / Swin-L, we get +1.1 / 0.9 / 1.0 mIoU gain on ADE20K segmentation and +1.4 / 1.6 / 0.6 AP gain on MS-COCO object detection task with less than 3% additional training cost.
summary: Mixture of Experts (MoE) is able to scale up vision transformers effectively. However, it requires prohibiting computation resources to train a large MoE transformer. In this paper, we propose Residual Mixture of Experts (RMoE), an efficient training pipeline for MoE vision transformers on downstream tasks, such as segmentation and detection. RMoE achieves comparable results with the upper-bound MoE training, while only introducing minor additional training cost than the lower-bound non-MoE training pipelines. The efficiency is supported by our key observation: the weights of an MoE transformer can be factored into an input-independent core and an input-dependent residual. Compared with the weight core, the weight residual can be efficiently trained with much less computation resource, e.g., finetuning on the downstream data. We show that, compared with the current MoE training pipeline, we get comparable results while saving over 30% training cost. When compared with state-of-the-art non- MoE transformers, such as Swin-T / CvT-13 / Swin-L, we get +1.1 / 0.9 / 1.0 mIoU gain on ADE20K segmentation and +1.4 / 1.6 / 0.6 AP gain on MS-COCO object detection task with less than 3% additional training cost.
abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 能够有效地扩大视觉转换器的规模。然而，它需要禁止计算资源来训练大型 MoE 变压器。在本文中，我们提出了 Residual Mixture of Experts (RMoE)，这是一种针对下游任务（例如分割和检测）的 MoE 视觉转换器的高效训练管道。 RMoE 取得了与上限 MoE 训练相当的结果，同时仅比下限非 MoE 训练管道引入了少量的额外训练成本。我们的关键观察结果支持了这种效率：MoE 变压器的权重可以分解为与输入无关的核心和与输入相关的残差。与权重核心相比，权重残差可以用更少的计算资源进行有效训练，例如对下游数据进行微调。我们表明，与当前的 MoE 培训流程相比，我们获得了可比较的结果，同时节省了 30% 以上的培训成本。与最先进的非 MoE 变压器（例如 Swin-T / CvT-13 / Swin-L）相比，我们在 ADE20K 分割上获得 +1.1 / 0.9 / 1.0 mIoU 增益，在 MS-COCO 目标检测任务上获得 +1.4 / 1.6 / 0.6 AP 增益，而额外训练成本不到 3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Residual Mixture of Experts (RMoE)的高效训练方法，用于改进视觉Transformer中的专家混合模型，在分割和检测等下游任务中实现与全量MoE训练相当的效果，同时显著降低训练成本。
AI.motivation: 传统的MoE模型在训练大型视觉Transformer时需要消耗大量计算资源，限制了其应用。作者观察到MoE权重可分解为输入无关的核心部分和输入相关的残差部分，从而提出通过高效训练残差部分来降低计算需求。
AI.method: 将MoE权重分解为核心（输入无关）和残差（输入相关）两部分，仅对残差部分进行下游任务的微调训练，从而减少计算资源消耗。该方法在保持性能的同时显著降低训练成本。
AI.result: 相比现有MoE训练方法，RMoE节省了30%以上的训练成本；在ADE20K分割任务中较Swin-T/CvT-13/Swin-L提升1.1/0.9/1.0 mIoU，在MS-COCO检测任务中提升1.4/1.6/0.6 AP，且额外训练成本低于3%。
AI.conclusion: RMoE通过权重分解策略有效平衡了模型性能与训练效率，为大规模MoE视觉Transformer在下游任务中的应用提供了高效可行的解决方案。

Compared with the weight core, the weight residual can be efficiently trained with much less computation resource, e.g., finetuning on the downstream data. We show that, compared with the current MoE training pipeline, we get comparable results while saving over 30% training cost. When compared with state-of-the-art non- MoE transformers, such as Swin-T / CvT-13 / Swin-L, we get +1.1 / 0.9 / 1.0 mIoU gain on ADE20K segmentation and +1.4 / 1.6 / 0.6 AP gain on MS-COCO object detection task with less than 3% additional training cost. 专家混合 (MoE) 能够有效地扩大视觉转换器的规模。然而，它需要禁止计算资源来训练大型 MoE 变压器。在本文中，我们提出了 Residual Mixture of Experts (RMoE)，这是一种针对下游任务（例如分割和检测）的 MoE 视觉转换器的高效训练管道。 RMoE 取得了与上限 MoE 训练相当的结果，同时仅比下限非 MoE 训练管道引入了少量的额外训练成本。我们的关键观察结果支持了这种效率：MoE 变压器的权重可以分解为与输入无关的核心和与输入相关的残差。与权重核心相比，权重残差可以用更少的计算资源进行有效训练，例如对下游数据进行微调。我们表明，与当前的 MoE 培训流程相比，我们获得了可比较的结果，同时节省了 30% 以上的培训成本。与最先进的非 MoE 变压器（例如 Swin-T / CvT-13 / Swin-L）相比，我们在 ADE20K 分割上获得 +1.1 / 0.9 / 1.0 mIoU 增益，在 MS-COCO 目标检测任务上获得 +1.4 / 1.6 / 0.6 AP 增益，而额外训练成本不到 3%。 本文提出了一种名为Residual Mixture of Experts (RMoE)的高效训练方法，用于改进视觉Transformer中的专家混合模型，在分割和检测等下游任务中实现与全量MoE训练相当的效果，同时显著降低训练成本。 Lemeng Wu,Mengchen Liu,Yinpeng Chen,Dongdong Chen,Xiyang Dai,Lu Yuan cs.CV

authors_text: Samuel Lipping,Parthasaarathy Sudarsanam,Konstantinos Drossos,Tuomas Virtanen
title: Clotho-AQA: A Crowdsourced Dataset for Audio Question Answering
title_zh: Clotho-AQA：用于音频问答的众包数据集
abstract: Audio question answering (AQA) is a multimodal translation task where a system analyzes an audio signal and a natural language question, to generate a desirable natural language answer. In this paper, we introduce Clotho-AQA, a dataset for Audio question answering consisting of 1991 audio files each between 15 to 30 seconds in duration selected from the Clotho dataset. For each audio file, we collect six different questions and corresponding answers by crowdsourcing using Amazon Mechanical Turk. The questions and answers are produced by different annotators. Out of the six questions for each audio, two questions each are designed to have 'yes' and 'no' as answers, while the remaining two questions have other single-word answers. For each question, we collect answers from three different annotators. We also present two baseline experiments to describe the usage of our dataset for the AQA task - an LSTM-based multimodal binary classifier for 'yes' or 'no' type answers and an LSTM-based multimodal multi-class classifier for 828 single-word answers. The binary classifier achieved an accuracy of 62.7% and the multi-class classifier achieved a top-1 accuracy of 54.2% and a top-5 accuracy of 93.7%. Clotho-AQA dataset is freely available online at https://zenodo.org/record/6473207.
summary: Audio question answering (AQA) is a multimodal translation task where a system analyzes an audio signal and a natural language question, to generate a desirable natural language answer. In this paper, we introduce Clotho-AQA, a dataset for Audio question answering consisting of 1991 audio files each between 15 to 30 seconds in duration selected from the Clotho dataset. For each audio file, we collect six different questions and corresponding answers by crowdsourcing using Amazon Mechanical Turk. The questions and answers are produced by different annotators. Out of the six questions for each audio, two questions each are designed to have 'yes' and 'no' as answers, while the remaining two questions have other single-word answers. For each question, we collect answers from three different annotators. We also present two baseline experiments to describe the usage of our dataset for the AQA task - an LSTM-based multimodal binary classifier for 'yes' or 'no' type answers and an LSTM-based multimodal multi-class classifier for 828 single-word answers. The binary classifier achieved an accuracy of 62.7% and the multi-class classifier achieved a top-1 accuracy of 54.2% and a top-5 accuracy of 93.7%. Clotho-AQA dataset is freely available online at https://zenodo.org/record/6473207.
abstract_zh: 音频问答 (AQA) 是一种多模态翻译任务，系统分析音频信号和自然语言问题，以生成所需的自然语言答案。在本文中，我们介绍了 Clotho-AQA，这是一个音频问答数据集，由从 Clotho 数据集中选择的 1991 个音频文件组成，每个音频文件的持续时间在 15 到 30 秒之间。对于每个音频文件，我们使用 Amazon Mechanical Turk 通过众包收集六个不同的问题和相应的答案。问题和答案由不同的注释者产生。每个音频有六个问题，其中两个问题的答案分别是“是”和“否”，其余两个问题则有其他单字答案。对于每个问题，我们从三个不同的注释者那里收集答案。我们还提出了两个基线实验来描述我们的数据集在 AQA 任务中的使用情况——一个用于“是”或“否”类型答案的基于 LSTM 的多模态二元分类器，以及一个用于 828 个单字答案的基于 LSTM 的多模态多类分类器。二元分类器的准确率达到 62.7%，多类分类器的 top-1 准确率达到 54.2%，top-5 准确率达到 93.7%。 Clotho-AQA 数据集可在线免费获取：https://zenodo.org/record/6473207。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为Clotho-AQA的音频问答数据集，通过众包方式收集音频文件对应的问题和答案，并提供两种基线模型进行验证。
AI.motivation: 现有音频问答数据集有限且缺乏多样性，需构建包含自然语言问题和答案的高质量数据集以推动相关研究。
AI.method: 从Clotho数据集中选取1991个音频文件，通过Amazon Mechanical Turk众包收集每个音频的6个问题及答案，其中2个二分类问题（是/否）和2个单字答案问题，每个问题由3名标注者回答；使用LSTM构建二分类和多分类基线模型。
AI.result: 二分类模型准确率为62.7%，多分类模型top-1准确率54.2%、top-5准确率93.7%。
AI.conclusion: Clotho-AQA数据集为音频问答研究提供了新资源，基线结果验证了数据集有效性，未来可探索更复杂的模型和应用场景。
