authors_text: Kory W. Mathewson,Patrick M. Pilarski
title: A Brief Guide to Designing and Evaluating Human-Centered Interactive Machine Learning
title_zh: 设计和评估以人为中心的交互式机器学习简要指南
comment: 7 pages, 1 figure, Published at ML Evaluation Standards Workshop at ICLR 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1905.06289
comments: 7 pages, 1 figure, Published at ML Evaluation Standards Workshop at ICLR 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1905.06289
abstract: Interactive machine learning (IML) is a field of research that explores how to leverage both human and computational abilities in decision making systems. IML represents a collaboration between multiple complementary human and machine intelligent systems working as a team, each with their own unique abilities and limitations. This teamwork might mean that both systems take actions at the same time, or in sequence. Two major open research questions in the field of IML are: "How should we design systems that can learn to make better decisions over time with human interaction?" and "How should we evaluate the design and deployment of such systems?" A lack of appropriate consideration for the humans involved can lead to problematic system behaviour, and issues of fairness, accountability, and transparency. Thus, our goal with this work is to present a human-centred guide to designing and evaluating IML systems while mitigating risks. This guide is intended to be used by machine learning practitioners who are responsible for the health, safety, and well-being of interacting humans. An obligation of responsibility for public interaction means acting with integrity, honesty, fairness, and abiding by applicable legal statutes. With these values and principles in mind, we as a machine learning research community can better achieve goals of augmenting human skills and abilities. This practical guide therefore aims to support many of the responsible decisions necessary throughout the iterative design, development, and dissemination of IML systems.

abstract_zh: 交互式机器学习 (IML) 是一个探索如何在决策系统中利用人类和计算能力的研究领域。 IML 代表了多个互补的人类和机器智能系统作为一个团队工作之间的协作，每个系统都有自己独特的能力和局限性。这种团队合作可能意味着两个系统同时或按顺序采取行动。 IML 领域的两个主要开放研究问题是：“我们应该如何设计能够随着时间的推移通过人类交互做出更好决策的系统？”以及“我们应该如何评估此类系统的设计和部署？”缺乏对相关人员的适当考虑可能会导致系统行为出现问题，以及公平、问责和透明度问题。因此，我们这项工作的目标是提供一个以人为本的指南，用于设计和评估 IML 系统，同时降低风险。本指南旨在供负责交互人类的健康、安全和福祉的机器学习从业者使用。公共互动责任义务意味着诚信、诚实、公平并遵守适用的法律法规。牢记这些价值观和原则，我们作为机器学习研究社区可以更好地实现增强人类技能和能力的目标。因此，本实用指南旨在支持 IML 系统的迭代设计、开发和传播过程中所需的许多负责任的决策。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为交互式机器学习系统的设计与评估提供以人类为中心的实践指南，确保系统在协作中兼顾人类福祉与伦理规范。
AI.motivation: 当前交互式机器学习系统设计中缺乏对人类因素的充分考虑，可能导致公平性、问责性和透明性等问题，需建立系统性框架以降低风险。
AI.method: 通过整合人机协作原则与伦理准则，提出包含设计、开发、评估全流程的实践框架，强调迭代测试与人类反馈的持续整合。
AI.result: 形成一套可操作的指南，帮助从业者在系统设计中优先保障人类健康与安全，同时满足法律与伦理要求。
AI.conclusion: 以人类为中心的设计方法能有效提升交互式机器学习系统的可靠性与社会接受度，推动负责任的AI发展。

An obligation of responsibility for public interaction means acting with integrity, honesty, fairness, and abiding by applicable legal statutes. With these values and principles in mind, we as a machine learning research community can better achieve goals of augmenting human skills and abilities. This practical guide therefore aims to support many of the responsible decisions necessary throughout the iterative design, development, and dissemination of IML systems. 交互式机器学习 (IML) 是一个探索如何在决策系统中利用人类和计算能力的研究领域。 IML 代表了多个互补的人类和机器智能系统作为一个团队工作之间的协作，每个系统都有自己独特的能力和局限性。这种团队合作可能意味着两个系统同时或按顺序采取行动。 IML 领域的两个主要开放研究问题是：“我们应该如何设计能够随着时间的推移通过人类交互做出更好决策的系统？”以及“我们应该如何评估此类系统的设计和部署？”缺乏对相关人员的适当考虑可能会导致系统行为出现问题，以及公平、问责和透明度问题。因此，我们这项工作的目标是提供一个以人为本的指南，用于设计和评估 IML 系统，同时降低风险。本指南旨在供负责交互人类的健康、安全和福祉的机器学习从业者使用。公共互动责任义务意味着诚信、诚实、公平并遵守适用的法律法规。牢记这些价值观和原则，我们作为机器学习研究社区可以更好地实现增强人类技能和能力的目标。因此，本实用指南旨在支持 IML 系统的迭代设计、开发和传播过程中所需的许多负责任的决策。 本文旨在为交互式机器学习系统的设计与评估提供以人类为中心的实践指南，确保系统在协作中兼顾人类福祉与伦理规范。 Kory W. Mathewson,Patrick M. Pilarski cs.HC,cs.GL,cs.LG

authors_text: Zheng Chen,Durgakant Pushp,Lantao Liu
title: CALI: Coarse-to-Fine ALIgnments Based Unsupervised Domain Adaptation of Traversability Prediction for Deployable Autonomous Navigation
title_zh: CALI：基于粗到精对准的可部署自主导航可通行性预测的无监督域适应
abstract: Traversability prediction is a fundamental perception capability for autonomous navigation. The diversity of data in different domains imposes significant gaps to the prediction performance of the perception model. In this work, we make efforts to reduce the gaps by proposing a novel coarse-to-fine unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) model - CALI. Our aim is to transfer the perception model with high data efficiency, eliminate the prohibitively expensive data labeling, and improve the generalization capability during the adaptation from easy-to-obtain source domains to various challenging target domains. We prove that a combination of a coarse alignment and a fine alignment can be beneficial to each other and further design a first-coarse-then-fine alignment process. This proposed work bridges theoretical analyses and algorithm designs, leading to an efficient UDA model with easy and stable training. We show the advantages of our proposed model over multiple baselines in several challenging domain adaptation setups. To further validate the effectiveness of our model, we then combine our perception model with a visual planner to build a navigation system and show the high reliability of our model in complex natural environments where no labeled data is available.
summary: Traversability prediction is a fundamental perception capability for autonomous navigation. The diversity of data in different domains imposes significant gaps to the prediction performance of the perception model. In this work, we make efforts to reduce the gaps by proposing a novel coarse-to-fine unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) model - CALI. Our aim is to transfer the perception model with high data efficiency, eliminate the prohibitively expensive data labeling, and improve the generalization capability during the adaptation from easy-to-obtain source domains to various challenging target domains. We prove that a combination of a coarse alignment and a fine alignment can be beneficial to each other and further design a first-coarse-then-fine alignment process. This proposed work bridges theoretical analyses and algorithm designs, leading to an efficient UDA model with easy and stable training. We show the advantages of our proposed model over multiple baselines in several challenging domain adaptation setups. To further validate the effectiveness of our model, we then combine our perception model with a visual planner to build a navigation system and show the high reliability of our model in complex natural environments where no labeled data is available.
abstract_zh: 可通性预测是自主导航的基本感知能力。不同领域数据的多样性给感知模型的预测性能带来了显着的差距。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种新颖的从粗到细的无监督域适应（UDA）模型 - CALI 来努力缩小差距。我们的目标是以高数据效率转移感知模型，消除昂贵的数据标签，并在从易于获取的源域到各种具有挑战性的目标域的适应过程中提高泛化能力。我们证明了粗对准和精对准的组合可以彼此有益，并进一步设计了先粗后细的对准过程。这项工作将理论分析和算法设计联系起来，从而形成一种高效的 UDA 模型，并且训练简单且稳定。我们在几个具有挑战性的领域适应设置中展示了我们提出的模型相对于多个基线的优势。为了进一步验证我们模型的有效性，我们将感知模型与视觉规划器相结合来构建导航系统，并在没有可用标记数据的复杂自然环境中展示我们的模型的高可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于粗到细对齐的无监督域适应方法CALI，用于提升自主导航中可穿越性预测模型在不同域间的迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 不同领域数据的多样性导致感知模型预测性能存在显著差距，而传统方法依赖昂贵的标注数据，难以适应复杂目标域。
AI.method: 设计粗对齐与细对齐的协同机制，通过先粗后细的渐进式对齐过程，结合理论分析与算法优化实现高效稳定的无监督域适应。
AI.result: 在多个挑战性域适应场景中优于现有基线模型，并成功集成至视觉规划系统，在无标注数据的复杂环境中验证了高可靠性。
AI.conclusion: CALI方法有效解决了域适应中的数据效率与泛化能力问题，为部署型自主导航系统提供了可靠的感知模型迁移方案。

authors_text: Thomas Chabal,Robin Strudel,Etienne Arlaud,Jean Ponce,Cordelia Schmid
title: Assembly Planning from Observations under Physical Constraints
title_zh: 根据物理约束下的观察进行装配规划
comment: IROS 2022. See the project webpage at https://www.di.ens.fr/willow/research/assembly-planning/
comments: IROS 2022. See the project webpage at https://www.di.ens.fr/willow/research/assembly-planning/
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of copying an unknown assembly of primitives with known shape and appearance using information extracted from a single photograph by an off-the-shelf procedure for object detection and pose estimation. The proposed algorithm uses a simple combination of physical stability constraints, convex optimization and Monte Carlo tree search to plan assemblies as sequences of pick-and-place operations represented by STRIPS operators. It is efficient and, most importantly, robust to the errors in object detection and pose estimation unavoidable in any real robotic system. The proposed approach is demonstrated with thorough experiments on a UR5 manipulator.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of copying an unknown assembly of primitives with known shape and appearance using information extracted from a single photograph by an off-the-shelf procedure for object detection and pose estimation. The proposed algorithm uses a simple combination of physical stability constraints, convex optimization and Monte Carlo tree search to plan assemblies as sequences of pick-and-place operations represented by STRIPS operators. It is efficient and, most importantly, robust to the errors in object detection and pose estimation unavoidable in any real robotic system. The proposed approach is demonstrated with thorough experiments on a UR5 manipulator.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了使用现成的对象检测和姿态估计程序从单张照片中提取的信息来复制具有已知形状和外观的未知图元集合的问题。所提出的算法使用物理稳定性约束、凸优化和蒙特卡罗树搜索的简单组合来将组件规划为由 STRIPS 算子表示的拾放操作序列。它非常高效，最重要的是，对于任何真实机器人系统中不可避免的对象检测和姿态估计错误都具有鲁棒性。所提出的方法通过 UR5 机械臂上的彻底实验得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单张照片信息和物理约束的装配规划方法，用于复制未知的原始装配体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在真实机器人系统中因物体检测和位姿估计误差导致装配规划不稳定，需提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 结合物理稳定性约束、凸优化和蒙特卡洛树搜索，利用STRIPS操作符规划拾取-放置序列。
AI.result: 在UR5机械臂上进行了充分实验，验证了方法的高效性和对检测误差的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过整合物理约束与优化算法，有效解决了真实场景下装配规划的可靠性问题。

authors_text: W. Ronny Huang,Steve Chien,Om Thakkar,Rajiv Mathews
title: Detecting Unintended Memorization in Language-Model-Fused ASR
title_zh: 检测语言模型融合 ASR 中的意外记忆
comment: Interspeech 2022
comments: Interspeech 2022
abstract: End-to-end (E2E) models are often being accompanied by language models (LMs) via shallow fusion for boosting their overall quality as well as recognition of rare words. At the same time, several prior works show that LMs are susceptible to unintentionally memorizing rare or unique sequences in the training data. In this work, we design a framework for detecting memorization of random textual sequences (which we call canaries) in the LM training data when one has only black-box (query) access to LM-fused speech recognizer, as opposed to direct access to the LM. On a production-grade Conformer RNN-T E2E model fused with a Transformer LM, we show that detecting memorization of singly-occurring canaries from the LM training data of 300M examples is possible. Motivated to protect privacy, we also show that such memorization gets significantly reduced by per-example gradient-clipped LM training without compromising overall quality.
summary: End-to-end (E2E) models are often being accompanied by language models (LMs) via shallow fusion for boosting their overall quality as well as recognition of rare words. At the same time, several prior works show that LMs are susceptible to unintentionally memorizing rare or unique sequences in the training data. In this work, we design a framework for detecting memorization of random textual sequences (which we call canaries) in the LM training data when one has only black-box (query) access to LM-fused speech recognizer, as opposed to direct access to the LM. On a production-grade Conformer RNN-T E2E model fused with a Transformer LM, we show that detecting memorization of singly-occurring canaries from the LM training data of 300M examples is possible. Motivated to protect privacy, we also show that such memorization gets significantly reduced by per-example gradient-clipped LM training without compromising overall quality.
abstract_zh: 端到端（E2E）模型通常通过浅层融合与语言模型（LM）一起使用，以提高其整体质量以及对稀有单词的识别。与此同时，之前的几项工作表明，语言模型很容易无意中记住训练数据中罕见或独特的序列。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个框架，用于检测 LM 训练数据中随机文本序列（我们称之为金丝雀）的记忆，当人们只能黑盒（查询）访问 LM 融合语音识别器时，而不是直接访问 LM。在与 Transformer LM 融合的生产级 Conformer RNN-T E2E 模型上，我们证明可以从 3 亿个示例的 LM 训练数据中检测单个出现的金丝雀的记忆。出于保护隐私的动机，我们还表明，通过每个示例的梯度裁剪 LM 训练，可以显着减少这种记忆，而不会影响整体质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种检测语言模型融合的语音识别系统中无意记忆随机文本序列（canaries）的框架，仅需黑盒访问权限。
AI.motivation: 语言模型可能无意中记忆训练数据中的罕见或唯一序列，导致隐私泄露风险，需在不牺牲系统性能的前提下检测并缓解此问题。
AI.method: 设计基于黑盒查询的检测框架，通过注入随机文本序列（canaries）并分析系统输出，结合梯度裁剪训练方法减少记忆现象。
AI.result: 在3亿样本的Transformer语言模型中成功检测到单次出现的canaries记忆，并证明梯度裁剪训练可显著降低记忆风险且不影响整体识别质量。
AI.conclusion: 提出的检测框架有效识别语言模型记忆漏洞，梯度裁剪方法为隐私保护提供了可行的优化方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种检测语言模型融合的语音识别系统中无意记忆随机文本序列（canaries）的框架，仅需黑盒访问权限。
ai_content.motivation: 语言模型可能无意中记忆训练数据中的罕见或唯一序列，导致隐私泄露风险，需在不牺牲系统性能的前提下检测并缓解此问题。
ai_content.method: 设计基于黑盒查询的检测框架，通过注入随机文本序列（canaries）并分析系统输出，结合梯度裁剪训练方法减少记忆现象。
ai_content.result: 在3亿样本的Transformer语言模型中成功检测到单次出现的canaries记忆，并证明梯度裁剪训练可显著降低记忆风险且不影响整体识别质量。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的检测框架有效识别语言模型记忆漏洞，梯度裁剪方法为隐私保护提供了可行的优化方案。

search_text: Detecting Unintended Memorization in Language-Model-Fused ASR 检测语言模型融合 ASR 中的意外记忆 End-to-end (E2E) models are often being accompanied by language models (LMs) via shallow fusion for boosting their overall quality as well as recognition of rare words. At the same time, several prior works show that LMs are susceptible to unintentionally memorizing rare or unique sequences in the training data. In this work, we design a framework for detecting memorization of random textual sequences (which we call canaries) in the LM training data when one has only black-box (query) access to LM-fused speech recognizer, as opposed to direct access to the LM. On a production-grade Conformer RNN-T E2E model fused with a Transformer LM, we show that detecting memorization of singly-occurring canaries from the LM training data of 300M examples is possible. Motivated to protect privacy, we also show that such memorization gets significantly reduced by per-example gradient-clipped LM training without compromising overall quality. 端到端（E2E）模型通常通过浅层融合与语言模型（LM）一起使用，以提高其整体质量以及对稀有单词的识别。与此同时，之前的几项工作表明，语言模型很容易无意中记住训练数据中罕见或独特的序列。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个框架，用于检测 LM 训练数据中随机文本序列（我们称之为金丝雀）的记忆，当人们只能黑盒（查询）访问 LM 融合语音识别器时，而不是直接访问 LM。在与 Transformer LM 融合的生产级 Conformer RNN-T E2E 模型上，我们证明可以从 3 亿个示例的 LM 训练数据中检测单个出现的金丝雀的记忆。出于保护隐私的动机，我们还表明，通过每个示例的梯度裁剪 LM 训练，可以显着减少这种记忆，而不会影响整体质量。 本文提出一种检测语言模型融合的语音识别系统中无意记忆随机文本序列（canaries）的框架，仅需黑盒访问权限。 W. Ronny Huang,Steve Chien,Om Thakkar,Rajiv Mathews cs.CL,cs.CR,cs.LG,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Francesco Stranieri,Fabio Stella
title: Comparing Deep Reinforcement Learning Algorithms in Two-Echelon Supply Chains
title_zh: 两级供应链中深度强化学习算法的比较
comment: The paper has been accepted for presentation and inclusion in the proceedings of the AI for Manufacturing workshop (AI4M), co-located with the ECML PKDD 2023 (European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases). For supplementary material and source code, please visit https://github.com/frenkowski/SCIMAI-Gym
comments: The paper has been accepted for presentation and inclusion in the proceedings of the AI for Manufacturing workshop (AI4M), co-located with the ECML PKDD 2023 (European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases). For supplementary material and source code, please visit https://github.com/frenkowski/SCIMAI-Gym
abstract: In this study, we analyze and compare the performance of state-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning algorithms for solving the supply chain inventory management problem. This complex sequential decision-making problem consists of determining the optimal quantity of products to be produced and shipped across different warehouses over a given time horizon. In particular, we present a mathematical formulation of a two-echelon supply chain environment with stochastic and seasonal demand, which allows managing an arbitrary number of warehouses and product types. Through a rich set of numerical experiments, we compare the performance of different deep reinforcement learning algorithms under various supply chain structures, topologies, demands, capacities, and costs. The results of the experimental plan indicate that deep reinforcement learning algorithms outperform traditional inventory management strategies, such as the static (s, Q)-policy. Furthermore, this study provides detailed insight into the design and development of an open-source software library that provides a customizable environment for solving the supply chain inventory management problem using a wide range of data-driven approaches.
summary: In this study, we analyze and compare the performance of state-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning algorithms for solving the supply chain inventory management problem. This complex sequential decision-making problem consists of determining the optimal quantity of products to be produced and shipped across different warehouses over a given time horizon. In particular, we present a mathematical formulation of a two-echelon supply chain environment with stochastic and seasonal demand, which allows managing an arbitrary number of warehouses and product types. Through a rich set of numerical experiments, we compare the performance of different deep reinforcement learning algorithms under various supply chain structures, topologies, demands, capacities, and costs. The results of the experimental plan indicate that deep reinforcement learning algorithms outperform traditional inventory management strategies, such as the static (s, Q)-policy. Furthermore, this study provides detailed insight into the design and development of an open-source software library that provides a customizable environment for solving the supply chain inventory management problem using a wide range of data-driven approaches.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们分析和比较了解决供应链库存管理问题的最先进的深度强化学习算法的性能。这个复杂的顺序决策问题包括确定在给定时间范围内不同仓库生产和运输的最佳产品数量。特别是，我们提出了具有随机和季节性需求的两级供应链环境的数学公式，它允许管理任意数量的仓库和产品类型。通过大量的数值实验，我们比较了不同深度强化学习算法在各种供应链结构、拓扑、需求、容量和成本下的性能。实验计划的结果表明深度强化学习算法优于传统的库存管理策略，例如静态（s，Q）策略。此外，这项研究还提供了对开源软件库的设计和开发的详细见解，该软件库提供了一个可定制的环境，用于使用各种数据驱动的方法解决供应链库存管理问题。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了深度强化学习算法在两级供应链库存管理中的性能，通过数学建模和数值实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统库存管理策略难以应对供应链中的复杂动态需求，需探索更高效的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 构建包含随机性和季节性需求的两级供应链数学模型，并通过多组数值实验对比不同深度强化学习算法的表现。
AI.result: 深度强化学习算法在库存成本和供应稳定性上优于传统(s, Q)策略，同时开发了开源软件库支持多种数据驱动方法。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习为复杂供应链管理提供了有效解决方案，开源工具可促进相关研究与应用发展。

authors_text: Sonish Sivarajkumar,Thomas Yu CHow Tam,Haneef Ahamed Mohammad,Samual Viggiano,David Oniani,Shyam Visweswaran,Yanshan Wang
title: Extraction of Sleep Information from Clinical Notes of Patients with Alzheimer's Disease Using Natural Language Processing
title_zh: 使用自然语言处理从阿尔茨海默病患者的临床记录中提取睡眠信息
abstract: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common form of dementia in the United States. Sleep is one of the lifestyle-related factors that has been shown critical for optimal cognitive function in old age. However, there is a lack of research studying the association between sleep and AD incidence. A major bottleneck for conducting such research is that the traditional way to acquire sleep information is time-consuming, inefficient, non-scalable, and limited to patients' subjective experience. A gold standard dataset is created from manual annotation of 570 randomly sampled clinical note documents from the adSLEEP, a corpus of 192,000 de-identified clinical notes of 7,266 AD patients retrieved from the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center (UPMC). We developed a rule-based Natural Language Processing (NLP) algorithm, machine learning models, and Large Language Model(LLM)-based NLP algorithms to automate the extraction of sleep-related concepts, including snoring, napping, sleep problem, bad sleep quality, daytime sleepiness, night wakings, and sleep duration, from the gold standard dataset. Rule-based NLP algorithm achieved the best performance of F1 across all sleep-related concepts. In terms of Positive Predictive Value (PPV), rule-based NLP algorithm achieved 1.00 for daytime sleepiness and sleep duration, machine learning models: 0.95 and for napping, 0.86 for bad sleep quality and 0.90 for snoring; and LLAMA2 with finetuning achieved PPV of 0.93 for Night Wakings, 0.89 for sleep problem, and 1.00 for sleep duration. The results show that the rule-based NLP algorithm consistently achieved the best performance for all sleep concepts. This study focused on the clinical notes of patients with AD, but could be extended to general sleep information extraction for other diseases.
summary: Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common form of dementia in the United States. Sleep is one of the lifestyle-related factors that has been shown critical for optimal cognitive function in old age. However, there is a lack of research studying the association between sleep and AD incidence. A major bottleneck for conducting such research is that the traditional way to acquire sleep information is time-consuming, inefficient, non-scalable, and limited to patients' subjective experience. A gold standard dataset is created from manual annotation of 570 randomly sampled clinical note documents from the adSLEEP, a corpus of 192,000 de-identified clinical notes of 7,266 AD patients retrieved from the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center (UPMC). We developed a rule-based Natural Language Processing (NLP) algorithm, machine learning models, and Large Language Model(LLM)-based NLP algorithms to automate the extraction of sleep-related concepts, including snoring, napping, sleep problem, bad sleep quality, daytime sleepiness, night wakings, and sleep duration, from the gold standard dataset. Rule-based NLP algorithm achieved the best performance of F1 across all sleep-related concepts. In terms of Positive Predictive Value (PPV), rule-based NLP algorithm achieved 1.00 for daytime sleepiness and sleep duration, machine learning models: 0.95 and for napping, 0.86 for bad sleep quality and 0.90 for snoring; and LLAMA2 with finetuning achieved PPV of 0.93 for Night Wakings, 0.89 for sleep problem, and 1.00 for sleep duration. The results show that the rule-based NLP algorithm consistently achieved the best performance for all sleep concepts. This study focused on the clinical notes of patients with AD, but could be extended to general sleep information extraction for other diseases.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是美国最常见的痴呆症。睡眠是与生活方式相关的因素之一，已被证明对于老年时的最佳认知功能至关重要。然而，目前缺乏研究睡眠与 AD 发病率之间关系的研究。进行此类研究的一个主要瓶颈是传统的睡眠信息获取方式耗时、低效、不可扩展且受限于患者的主观体验。黄金标准数据集是根据 adSLEEP 中 570 个随机抽样的临床记录文档的手动注释创建的，adSLEEP 是从匹兹堡大学医学中心 (UPMC) 检索的 7,266 名 AD 患者的 192,000 个去识别的临床记录的语料库。我们开发了基于规则的自然语言处理 (NLP) 算法、机器学习模型和基于大语言模型 (LLM) 的 NLP 算法，以从黄金标准数据集中自动提取与睡眠相关的概念，包括打鼾、午睡、睡眠问题、睡眠质量差、白天嗜睡、夜间醒来和睡眠持续时间。基于规则的 NLP 算法在所有与睡眠相关的概念中实现了 F1 的最佳性能。在阳性预测值（PPV）方面，基于规则的 NLP 算法在白天嗜睡和睡眠持续时间方面达到 1.00，机器学习模型：小睡为 0.95，睡眠质量差为 0.86，打鼾为 0.90；经过微调的 LLAMA2 在夜间醒来方面的 PPV 为 0.93，在睡眠问题方面的 PPV 为 0.89，在睡眠持续时间方面的 PPV 为 1.00。结果表明，基于规则的 NLP 算法始终为所有睡眠概念取得最佳性能。这项研究的重点是 AD 患者的临床记录，但可以扩展到其他疾病的一般睡眠信息提取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用自然语言处理技术从阿尔茨海默病患者的临床记录中自动提取睡眠相关信息。
AI.motivation: 传统睡眠信息收集方法耗时低效且依赖患者主观体验，阻碍了睡眠与阿尔茨海默病关联性的研究。
AI.method: 构建包含570份标注临床记录的黄金标准数据集，开发基于规则的NLP算法、机器学习模型及微调大语言模型（如LLAMA2）进行睡眠概念提取。
AI.result: 基于规则的NLP算法在所有睡眠概念中F1值最优，PPV达1.00（日间嗜睡、睡眠时长）；机器学习模型和LLAMA2在部分指标上表现接近但略低。
AI.conclusion: 基于规则的NLP方法在睡眠信息提取中效果最佳，该方法可扩展至其他疾病的睡眠信息分析。

method: 构建包含570份标注临床记录的黄金标准数据集，开发基于规则的NLP算法、机器学习模型及微调大语言模型（如LLAMA2）进行睡眠概念提取。
result: 基于规则的NLP算法在所有睡眠概念中F1值最优，PPV达1.00（日间嗜睡、睡眠时长）；机器学习模型和LLAMA2在部分指标上表现接近但略低。
conclusion: 基于规则的NLP方法在睡眠信息提取中效果最佳，该方法可扩展至其他疾病的睡眠信息分析。
search_text: Extraction of Sleep Information from Clinical Notes of Patients with Alzheimer's Disease Using Natural Language Processing 使用自然语言处理从阿尔茨海默病患者的临床记录中提取睡眠信息 Alzheimer's Disease (AD) is the most common form of dementia in the United States. Sleep is one of the lifestyle-related factors that has been shown critical for optimal cognitive function in old age. However, there is a lack of research studying the association between sleep and AD incidence. A major bottleneck for conducting such research is that the traditional way to acquire sleep information is time-consuming, inefficient, non-scalable, and limited to patients' subjective experience. A gold standard dataset is created from manual annotation of 570 randomly sampled clinical note documents from the adSLEEP, a corpus of 192,000 de-identified clinical notes of 7,266 AD patients retrieved from the University of Pittsburgh Medical Center (UPMC). We developed a rule-based Natural Language Processing (NLP) algorithm, machine learning models, and Large Language Model(LLM)-based NLP algorithms to automate the extraction of sleep-related concepts, including snoring, napping, sleep problem, bad sleep quality, daytime sleepiness, night wakings, and sleep duration, from the gold standard dataset. Rule-based NLP algorithm achieved the best performance of F1 across all sleep-related concepts. In terms of Positive Predictive Value (PPV), rule-based NLP algorithm achieved 1.00 for daytime sleepiness and sleep duration, machine learning models: 0.95 and for napping, 0.86 for bad sleep quality and 0.90 for snoring; and LLAMA2 with finetuning achieved PPV of 0.93 for Night Wakings, 0.89 for sleep problem, and 1.00 for sleep duration. The results show that the rule-based NLP algorithm consistently achieved the best performance for all sleep concepts. This study focused on the clinical notes of patients with AD, but could be extended to general sleep information extraction for other diseases. 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 是美国最常见的痴呆症。睡眠是与生活方式相关的因素之一，已被证明对于老年时的最佳认知功能至关重要。然而，目前缺乏研究睡眠与 AD 发病率之间关系的研究。进行此类研究的一个主要瓶颈是传统的睡眠信息获取方式耗时、低效、不可扩展且受限于患者的主观体验。黄金标准数据集是根据 adSLEEP 中 570 个随机抽样的临床记录文档的手动注释创建的，adSLEEP 是从匹兹堡大学医学中心 (UPMC) 检索的 7,266 名 AD 患者的 192,000 个去识别的临床记录的语料库。我们开发了基于规则的自然语言处理 (NLP) 算法、机器学习模型和基于大语言模型 (LLM) 的 NLP 算法，以从黄金标准数据集中自动提取与睡眠相关的概念，包括打鼾、午睡、睡眠问题、睡眠质量差、白天嗜睡、夜间醒来和睡眠持续时间。基于规则的 NLP 算法在所有与睡眠相关的概念中实现了 F1 的最佳性能。在阳性预测值（PPV）方面，基于规则的 NLP 算法在白天嗜睡和睡眠持续时间方面达到 1.00，机器学习模型：小睡为 0.95，睡眠质量差为 0.86，打鼾为 0.90；经过微调的 LLAMA2 在夜间醒来方面的 PPV 为 0.93，在睡眠问题方面的 PPV 为 0.89，在睡眠持续时间方面的 PPV 为 1.00。结果表明，基于规则的 NLP 算法始终为所有睡眠概念取得最佳性能。这项研究的重点是 AD 患者的临床记录，但可以扩展到其他疾病的一般睡眠信息提取。 本文旨在利用自然语言处理技术从阿尔茨海默病患者的临床记录中自动提取睡眠相关信息。 Sonish Sivarajkumar,Thomas Yu CHow Tam,Haneef Ahamed Mohammad,Samual Viggiano,David Oniani,Shyam Visweswaran,Yanshan Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ning Zhang,Maciej Jankowski
title: Hierarchical BERT for Medical Document Understanding
title_zh: 用于医疗文档理解的分层 BERT
abstract: Medical document understanding has gained much attention recently. One representative task is the International Classification of Disease (ICD) diagnosis code assignment. Existing work adopts either RNN or CNN as the backbone network because the vanilla BERT cannot handle well long documents (>2000 to kens). One issue shared across all these approaches is that they are over specific to the ICD code assignment task, losing generality to give the whole document-level and sentence-level embedding. As a result, it is not straight-forward to direct them to other downstream NLU tasks. Motivated by these observations, we propose Medical Document BERT (MDBERT) for long medical document understanding tasks. MDBERT is not only effective in learning representations at different levels of semantics but efficient in encoding long documents by leveraging a bottom-up hierarchical architecture. Compared to vanilla BERT solutions: 1, MDBERT boosts the performance up to relatively 20% on the MIMIC-III dataset, making it comparable to current SOTA solutions; 2, it cuts the computational complexity on self-attention modules to less than 1/100. Other than the ICD code assignment, we conduct a variety of other NLU tasks on a large commercial dataset named as TrialTrove, to showcase MDBERT's strength in delivering different levels of semantics.
summary: Medical document understanding has gained much attention recently. One representative task is the International Classification of Disease (ICD) diagnosis code assignment. Existing work adopts either RNN or CNN as the backbone network because the vanilla BERT cannot handle well long documents (>2000 to kens). One issue shared across all these approaches is that they are over specific to the ICD code assignment task, losing generality to give the whole document-level and sentence-level embedding. As a result, it is not straight-forward to direct them to other downstream NLU tasks. Motivated by these observations, we propose Medical Document BERT (MDBERT) for long medical document understanding tasks. MDBERT is not only effective in learning representations at different levels of semantics but efficient in encoding long documents by leveraging a bottom-up hierarchical architecture. Compared to vanilla BERT solutions: 1, MDBERT boosts the performance up to relatively 20% on the MIMIC-III dataset, making it comparable to current SOTA solutions; 2, it cuts the computational complexity on self-attention modules to less than 1/100. Other than the ICD code assignment, we conduct a variety of other NLU tasks on a large commercial dataset named as TrialTrove, to showcase MDBERT's strength in delivering different levels of semantics.
abstract_zh: 医疗文档理解最近引起了广泛关注。一项代表性任务是国际疾病分类（ICD）诊断代码分配。现有的工作采用 RNN 或 CNN 作为主干网络，因为普通 BERT 无法处理很长的文档（> 2000 to kens）。所有这些方法共有的一个问题是它们对于 ICD 代码分配任务过于具体，失去了提供整个文档级和句子级嵌入的通用性。因此，将它们引导到其他下游 NLU 任务并不简单。受这些观察的启发，我们提出了医疗文档 BERT (MDBERT)，用于长期医疗文档理解任务。 MDBERT 不仅可以有效地学习不同语义级别的表示，而且可以利用自下而上的分层架构有效地编码长文档。与普通的 BERT 解决方案相比： 1，MDBERT 在 MIMIC-III 数据集上的性能提升了 20%，与当前的 SOTA 解决方案相当； 2、它将自注意力模块的计算复杂度降低到1/100以下。除了 ICD 代码分配之外，我们还在名为 TrialTrove 的大型商业数据集上执行了各种其他 NLU 任务，以展示 MDBERT 在提供不同级别语义方面的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层BERT模型（MDBERT），用于解决医疗文档理解中的长文档处理和多任务适应性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如RNN/CNN）在ICD编码任务中表现受限，无法有效处理超长文档且缺乏对文档级和句子级嵌入的通用性，难以扩展到其他自然语言理解任务。
AI.method: 设计分层架构的MDBERT模型，通过自底向上的层次化编码机制，实现对长文档的高效处理，同时学习多粒度语义表示。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-III数据集上相较基础BERT性能提升20%，计算复杂度降低至1/100；在TrialTrove商业数据集上验证了模型在多任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MDBERT通过层次化结构实现了长医疗文档的高效理解，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本，并展现出跨任务的泛化能力。

search_text: Hierarchical BERT for Medical Document Understanding 用于医疗文档理解的分层 BERT Medical document understanding has gained much attention recently. One representative task is the International Classification of Disease (ICD) diagnosis code assignment. Existing work adopts either RNN or CNN as the backbone network because the vanilla BERT cannot handle well long documents (>2000 to kens). One issue shared across all these approaches is that they are over specific to the ICD code assignment task, losing generality to give the whole document-level and sentence-level embedding. As a result, it is not straight-forward to direct them to other downstream NLU tasks. Motivated by these observations, we propose Medical Document BERT (MDBERT) for long medical document understanding tasks. MDBERT is not only effective in learning representations at different levels of semantics but efficient in encoding long documents by leveraging a bottom-up hierarchical architecture. Compared to vanilla BERT solutions: 1, MDBERT boosts the performance up to relatively 20% on the MIMIC-III dataset, making it comparable to current SOTA solutions; 2, it cuts the computational complexity on self-attention modules to less than 1/100. Other than the ICD code assignment, we conduct a variety of other NLU tasks on a large commercial dataset named as TrialTrove, to showcase MDBERT's strength in delivering different levels of semantics. 医疗文档理解最近引起了广泛关注。一项代表性任务是国际疾病分类（ICD）诊断代码分配。现有的工作采用 RNN 或 CNN 作为主干网络，因为普通 BERT 无法处理很长的文档（> 2000 to kens）。所有这些方法共有的一个问题是它们对于 ICD 代码分配任务过于具体，失去了提供整个文档级和句子级嵌入的通用性。因此，将它们引导到其他下游 NLU 任务并不简单。受这些观察的启发，我们提出了医疗文档 BERT (MDBERT)，用于长期医疗文档理解任务。 MDBERT 不仅可以有效地学习不同语义级别的表示，而且可以利用自下而上的分层架构有效地编码长文档。与普通的 BERT 解决方案相比： 1，MDBERT 在 MIMIC-III 数据集上的性能提升了 20%，与当前的 SOTA 解决方案相当； 2、它将自注意力模块的计算复杂度降低到1/100以下。除了 ICD 代码分配之外，我们还在名为 TrialTrove 的大型商业数据集上执行了各种其他 NLU 任务，以展示 MDBERT 在提供不同级别语义方面的优势。 本文提出了一种分层BERT模型（MDBERT），用于解决医疗文档理解中的长文档处理和多任务适应性问题。 Ning Zhang,Maciej Jankowski cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Song Wang,Mingquan Lin,Ying Ding,George Shih,Zhiyong Lu,Yifan Peng
title: Radiology Text Analysis System (RadText): Architecture and Evaluation
title_zh: 放射学文本分析系统 (RadText)：架构和评估
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures, Accepted by 2022 IEEE 10th International Conference on Healthcare Informatics (ICHI)
comments: 9 pages, 2 figures, Accepted by 2022 IEEE 10th International Conference on Healthcare Informatics (ICHI)
abstract: Analyzing radiology reports is a time-consuming and error-prone task, which raises the need for an efficient automated radiology report analysis system to alleviate the workloads of radiologists and encourage precise diagnosis. In this work, we present RadText, an open-source radiology text analysis system developed by Python. RadText offers an easy-to-use text analysis pipeline, including de-identification, section segmentation, sentence split and word tokenization, named entity recognition, parsing, and negation detection. RadText features a flexible modular design, provides a hybrid text processing schema, and supports raw text processing and local processing, which enables better usability and improved data privacy. RadText adopts BioC as the unified interface, and also standardizes the input / output into a structured representation compatible with Observational Medical Outcomes Partnership (OMOP) Common Data Model (CDM). This allows for a more systematic approach to observational research across multiple, disparate data sources. We evaluated RadText on the MIMIC-CXR dataset, with five new disease labels we annotated for this work. RadText demonstrates highly accurate classification performances, with an average precision of, a recall of 0.94, and an F-1 score of 0.92. We have made our code, documentation, examples, and the test set available at https://github.com/bionlplab/radtext .
summary: Analyzing radiology reports is a time-consuming and error-prone task, which raises the need for an efficient automated radiology report analysis system to alleviate the workloads of radiologists and encourage precise diagnosis. In this work, we present RadText, an open-source radiology text analysis system developed by Python. RadText offers an easy-to-use text analysis pipeline, including de-identification, section segmentation, sentence split and word tokenization, named entity recognition, parsing, and negation detection. RadText features a flexible modular design, provides a hybrid text processing schema, and supports raw text processing and local processing, which enables better usability and improved data privacy. RadText adopts BioC as the unified interface, and also standardizes the input / output into a structured representation compatible with Observational Medical Outcomes Partnership (OMOP) Common Data Model (CDM). This allows for a more systematic approach to observational research across multiple, disparate data sources. We evaluated RadText on the MIMIC-CXR dataset, with five new disease labels we annotated for this work. RadText demonstrates highly accurate classification performances, with an average precision of, a recall of 0.94, and an F-1 score of 0.92. We have made our code, documentation, examples, and the test set available at https://github.com/bionlplab/radtext .
abstract_zh: 分析放射学报告是一项耗时且容易出错的任务，这就提出了对高效的自动化放射学报告分析系统的需求，以减轻放射科医生的工作量并鼓励精确诊断。在这项工作中，我们展示了 RadText，这是一个由 Python 开发的开源放射学文本分析系统。 RadText 提供了一个易于使用的文本分析管道，包括去标识、分段、句子分割和单词标记化、命名实体识别、解析和否定检测。 RadText采用灵活的模块化设计，提供混合文本处理模式，并支持原始文本处理和本地处理，从而实现更好的可用性和改进的数据隐私。 RadText采用BioC作为统一接口，还将输入/输出标准化为与观察医学结果合作伙伴关系（OMOP）通用数据模型（CDM）兼容的结构化表示。这允许采用更系统的方法来跨多个不同的数据源进行观察研究。我们在 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上评估了 RadText，并为这项工作注释了五个新的疾病标签。 RadText 展示了高度准确的分类性能，平均精度为 0.94，召回率为 0.94，F-1 分数为 0.92。我们已在 https://github.com/bionlplab/radtext 上提供了代码、文档、示例和测试集。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为RadText的开源放射科文本分析系统，旨在通过自动化处理放射科报告来减轻放射科医生的工作负担并提高诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 分析放射科报告耗时且容易出错，需要高效的自动化系统来减少工作量并促进精确诊断。
AI.method: RadText采用模块化设计，提供去标识化、分段、句子分割、词标记化、命名实体识别、解析和否定检测等流程，并使用BioC接口标准化输入/输出以兼容OMOP CDM。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上评估时，RadText实现了平均精确度0.94、召回率0.94和F-1分数0.92的高分类性能。
AI.conclusion: RadText系统有效且实用，为多源观测研究提供了系统化的数据处理方案，并通过开源代码和测试集促进进一步研究。

search_text: Radiology Text Analysis System (RadText): Architecture and Evaluation 放射学文本分析系统 (RadText)：架构和评估 Analyzing radiology reports is a time-consuming and error-prone task, which raises the need for an efficient automated radiology report analysis system to alleviate the workloads of radiologists and encourage precise diagnosis. In this work, we present RadText, an open-source radiology text analysis system developed by Python. RadText offers an easy-to-use text analysis pipeline, including de-identification, section segmentation, sentence split and word tokenization, named entity recognition, parsing, and negation detection. RadText features a flexible modular design, provides a hybrid text processing schema, and supports raw text processing and local processing, which enables better usability and improved data privacy. RadText adopts BioC as the unified interface, and also standardizes the input / output into a structured representation compatible with Observational Medical Outcomes Partnership (OMOP) Common Data Model (CDM). This allows for a more systematic approach to observational research across multiple, disparate data sources. We evaluated RadText on the MIMIC-CXR dataset, with five new disease labels we annotated for this work. RadText demonstrates highly accurate classification performances, with an average precision of, a recall of 0.94, and an F-1 score of 0.92. We have made our code, documentation, examples, and the test set available at https://github.com/bionlplab/radtext . 分析放射学报告是一项耗时且容易出错的任务，这就提出了对高效的自动化放射学报告分析系统的需求，以减轻放射科医生的工作量并鼓励精确诊断。在这项工作中，我们展示了 RadText，这是一个由 Python 开发的开源放射学文本分析系统。 RadText 提供了一个易于使用的文本分析管道，包括去标识、分段、句子分割和单词标记化、命名实体识别、解析和否定检测。 RadText采用灵活的模块化设计，提供混合文本处理模式，并支持原始文本处理和本地处理，从而实现更好的可用性和改进的数据隐私。 RadText采用BioC作为统一接口，还将输入/输出标准化为与观察医学结果合作伙伴关系（OMOP）通用数据模型（CDM）兼容的结构化表示。这允许采用更系统的方法来跨多个不同的数据源进行观察研究。我们在 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上评估了 RadText，并为这项工作注释了五个新的疾病标签。 RadText 展示了高度准确的分类性能，平均精度为 0.94，召回率为 0.94，F-1 分数为 0.92。我们已在 https://github.com/bionlplab/radtext 上提供了代码、文档、示例和测试集。 本文介绍了一种名为RadText的开源放射科文本分析系统，旨在通过自动化处理放射科报告来减轻放射科医生的工作负担并提高诊断准确性。 Song Wang,Mingquan Lin,Ying Ding,George Shih,Zhiyong Lu,Yifan Peng cs.CL,cs.AI,eess.SP,eess.SY

authors_text: Yu Qing Zhou,Xixuan Julie Liu,Yuanzhe Dong
title: Build a Robust QA System with Transformer-based Mixture of Experts
title_zh: 利用基于 Transformer 的专家组合构建强大的 QA 系统
abstract: In this paper, we aim to build a robust question answering system that can adapt to out-of-domain datasets. A single network may overfit to the superficial correlation in the training distribution, but with a meaningful number of expert sub-networks, a gating network that selects a sparse combination of experts for each input, and careful balance on the importance of expert sub-networks, the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model allows us to train a multi-task learner that can be generalized to out-of-domain datasets. We also explore the possibility of bringing the MoE layers up to the middle of the DistilBERT and replacing the dense feed-forward network with a sparsely-activated switch FFN layers, similar to the Switch Transformer architecture, which simplifies the MoE routing algorithm with reduced communication and computational costs. In addition to model architectures, we explore techniques of data augmentation including Easy Data Augmentation (EDA) and back translation, to create more meaningful variance among the small out-of-domain training data, therefore boosting the performance and robustness of our models. In this paper, we show that our combination of best architecture and data augmentation techniques achieves a 53.477 F1 score in the out-of-domain evaluation, which is a 9.52% performance gain over the baseline. On the final test set, we reported a higher 59.506 F1 and 41.651 EM. We successfully demonstrate the effectiveness of Mixture-of-Expert architecture in a Robust QA task.
summary: In this paper, we aim to build a robust question answering system that can adapt to out-of-domain datasets. A single network may overfit to the superficial correlation in the training distribution, but with a meaningful number of expert sub-networks, a gating network that selects a sparse combination of experts for each input, and careful balance on the importance of expert sub-networks, the Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model allows us to train a multi-task learner that can be generalized to out-of-domain datasets. We also explore the possibility of bringing the MoE layers up to the middle of the DistilBERT and replacing the dense feed-forward network with a sparsely-activated switch FFN layers, similar to the Switch Transformer architecture, which simplifies the MoE routing algorithm with reduced communication and computational costs. In addition to model architectures, we explore techniques of data augmentation including Easy Data Augmentation (EDA) and back translation, to create more meaningful variance among the small out-of-domain training data, therefore boosting the performance and robustness of our models. In this paper, we show that our combination of best architecture and data augmentation techniques achieves a 53.477 F1 score in the out-of-domain evaluation, which is a 9.52% performance gain over the baseline. On the final test set, we reported a higher 59.506 F1 and 41.651 EM. We successfully demonstrate the effectiveness of Mixture-of-Expert architecture in a Robust QA task.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们的目标是构建一个强大的问答系统，可以适应域外数据集。单个网络可能会过度拟合训练分布中的表面相关性，但通过有意义数量的专家子网络、为每个输入选择稀疏专家组合的门控网络，以及仔细平衡专家子网络的重要性，专家混合 (MoE) 模型使我们能够训练可以推广到域外数据集的多任务学习器。我们还探索了将 MoE 层带到 DistilBERT 中间的可能性，并用稀疏激活的开关 FFN 层替换密集的前馈网络，类似于 Switch Transformer 架构，这简化了 MoE 路由算法，降低了通信和计算成本。除了模型架构之外，我们还探索数据增强技术，包括简单数据增强（EDA）和反向翻译，以在小型域外训练数据之间创建更有意义的方差，从而提高模型的性能和鲁棒性。在本文中，我们展示了最佳架构和数据增强技术的结合，在域外评估中获得了 53.477 F1 分数，比基线提高了 9.52% 的性能增益。在最终测试集上，我们报告了更高的 59.506 F1 和 41.651 EM。我们成功证明了混合专家架构在鲁棒 QA 任务中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在构建一个基于Transformer的专家混合（MoE）模型，以提升问答系统在领域外数据集上的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 单一网络可能因训练数据分布的表面相关性而过拟合，而MoE通过多个专家子网络和门控机制可提升泛化能力，同时结合数据增强技术以应对小样本领域外数据的挑战。
AI.method: 在DistilBERT中引入MoE架构，用稀疏激活的开关FFN层替代密集层，并采用Easy Data Augmentation（EDA）和反向翻译等数据增强技术优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在领域外评估中，模型F1得分为53.477（较基线提升9.52%），测试集上F1达59.506，EM为41.651。
AI.conclusion: MoE架构结合数据增强技术能有效提升问答系统的鲁棒性，验证了专家混合模型在领域外场景中的有效性。

search_text: Build a Robust QA System with Transformer-based Mixture of Experts 利用基于 Transformer 的专家组合构建强大的 QA 系统 In this paper, we aim to build a robust question answering system that can adapt to out-of-domain datasets. In addition to model architectures, we explore techniques of data augmentation including Easy Data Augmentation (EDA) and back translation, to create more meaningful variance among the small out-of-domain training data, therefore boosting the performance and robustness of our models. In this paper, we show that our combination of best architecture and data augmentation techniques achieves a 53.477 F1 score in the out-of-domain evaluation, which is a 9.52% performance gain over the baseline. authors_text: Yunqiu Xu,Meng Fang,Ling Chen,Yali Du,Joey Tianyi Zhou,Chengqi Zhang
title: Perceiving the World: Question-guided Reinforcement Learning for Text-based Games
title_zh: 感知世界：基于文本游戏的问题引导强化学习
comment: ACL2022, fix some typos
comments: ACL2022, fix some typos
abstract: Text-based games provide an interactive way to study natural language processing. While deep reinforcement learning has shown effectiveness in developing the game playing agent, the low sample efficiency and the large action space remain to be the two major challenges that hinder the DRL from being applied in the real world. In this paper, we address the challenges by introducing world-perceiving modules, which automatically decompose tasks and prune actions by answering questions about the environment. We then propose a two-phase training framework to decouple language learning from reinforcement learning, which further improves the sample efficiency. The experimental results show that the proposed method significantly improves the performance and sample efficiency. Besides, it shows robustness against compound error and limited pre-training data.
summary: Text-based games provide an interactive way to study natural language processing. While deep reinforcement learning has shown effectiveness in developing the game playing agent, the low sample efficiency and the large action space remain to be the two major challenges that hinder the DRL from being applied in the real world. In this paper, we address the challenges by introducing world-perceiving modules, which automatically decompose tasks and prune actions by answering questions about the environment. We then propose a two-phase training framework to decouple language learning from reinforcement learning, which further improves the sample efficiency. The experimental results show that the proposed method significantly improves the performance and sample efficiency. Besides, it shows robustness against compound error and limited pre-training data.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的游戏提供了一种研究自然语言处理的交互式方式。虽然深度强化学习在开发游戏代理方面已显示出有效性，但低样本效率和大动作空间仍然是阻碍 DRL 在现实世界中应用的两大挑战。在本文中，我们通过引入世界感知模块来应对挑战，该模块通过回答有关环境的问题自动分解任务并修剪动作。然后，我们提出了一个两阶段训练框架，将语言学习与强化学习解耦，进一步提高了样本效率。实验结果表明，该方法显着提高了性能和样本效率。此外，它还表现出针对复合错误和有限预训练数据的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决文本游戏中深度强化学习的样本效率低和动作空间大的问题，通过引入世界感知模块和两阶段训练框架提升性能。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在文本游戏中的应用受限于低样本效率和大动作空间，亟需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出世界感知模块自动分解任务并剪枝动作，结合两阶段训练框架解耦语言学习与强化学习。
AI.result: 实验表明方法显著提升性能和样本效率，且在复合错误和有限预训练数据下表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效应对文本游戏中的挑战，为现实应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Anushri Dixit,Mohamadreza Ahmadi,Joel W. Burdick
title: Risk-Averse Receding Horizon Motion Planning for Obstacle Avoidance using Coherent Risk Measures
title_zh: 使用一致风险措施避障的风险规避后退地平线运动规划
comment: Accepted to Artificial Intelligence Journal, Special Issue on Risk-aware Autonomous Systems: Theory and Practice. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.11211
comments: Accepted to Artificial Intelligence Journal, Special Issue on Risk-aware Autonomous Systems: Theory and Practice. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.11211
abstract: This paper studies the problem of risk-averse receding horizon motion planning for agents with uncertain dynamics, in the presence of stochastic, dynamic obstacles. We propose a model predictive control (MPC) scheme that formulates the obstacle avoidance constraint using coherent risk measures. To handle disturbances, or process noise, in the state dynamics, the state constraints are tightened in a risk-aware manner to provide a disturbance feedback policy. We also propose a waypoint following algorithm that uses the proposed MPC scheme for discrete distributions and prove its risk-sensitive recursive feasibility while guaranteeing finite-time task completion. We further investigate some commonly used coherent risk metrics, namely, conditional value-at-risk (CVaR), entropic value-at-risk (EVaR), and g-entropic risk measures, and propose a tractable incorporation within MPC. We illustrate our framework via simulation studies.
summary: This paper studies the problem of risk-averse receding horizon motion planning for agents with uncertain dynamics, in the presence of stochastic, dynamic obstacles. We propose a model predictive control (MPC) scheme that formulates the obstacle avoidance constraint using coherent risk measures. To handle disturbances, or process noise, in the state dynamics, the state constraints are tightened in a risk-aware manner to provide a disturbance feedback policy. We also propose a waypoint following algorithm that uses the proposed MPC scheme for discrete distributions and prove its risk-sensitive recursive feasibility while guaranteeing finite-time task completion. We further investigate some commonly used coherent risk metrics, namely, conditional value-at-risk (CVaR), entropic value-at-risk (EVaR), and g-entropic risk measures, and propose a tractable incorporation within MPC. We illustrate our framework via simulation studies.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了在存在随机动态障碍的情况下，具有不确定动力学的代理的风险规避后退地平线运动规划问题。我们提出了一种模型预测控制（MPC）方案，该方案使用一致的风险度量来制定避障约束。为了处理状态动态中的干扰或过程噪声，以风险意识的方式收紧状态约束以提供干扰反馈策略。我们还提出了一种路点跟踪算法，该算法使用所提出的离散分布 MPC 方案，并证明其风险敏感的递归可行性，同时保证有限时间任务完成。我们进一步研究了一些常用的连贯风险度量，即条件风险价值（CVaR）、熵风险价值（EVaR）和g熵风险度量，并提出了在MPC中易于处理的合并。我们通过模拟研究来说明我们的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于一致风险度量的风险厌恶型滚动时域运动规划方法，用于处理具有不确定动态和随机动态障碍物的代理避障问题。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划方法在动态不确定性环境下难以保证安全性与任务完成性，需引入风险意识机制以应对随机障碍物和系统扰动带来的挑战。
AI.method: 设计结合一致风险度量（CVaR/EVaR等）的MPC框架，通过风险敏感约束收紧处理动态扰动，并提出离散分布下的航路点跟踪算法，证明其递归可行性与有限时间任务完成性。
AI.result: 仿真验证了所提框架在随机动态障碍场景下的有效性，展示了风险感知策略对避障安全性和任务完成率的提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文为不确定环境下的风险敏感运动规划提供了理论方法，通过将风险度量嵌入MPC实现了安全与效率的平衡，为实际应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Risk-Averse Receding Horizon Motion Planning for Obstacle Avoidance using Coherent Risk Measures 使用一致风险措施避障的风险规避后退地平线运动规划 This paper studies the problem of risk-averse receding horizon motion planning for agents with uncertain dynamics, in the presence of stochastic, dynamic obstacles. We propose a model predictive control (MPC) scheme that formulates the obstacle avoidance constraint using coherent risk measures. To handle disturbances, or process noise, in the state dynamics, the state constraints are tightened in a risk-aware manner to provide a disturbance feedback policy. We also propose a waypoint following algorithm that uses the proposed MPC scheme for discrete distributions and prove its risk-sensitive recursive feasibility while guaranteeing finite-time task completion. We further investigate some commonly used coherent risk metrics, namely, conditional value-at-risk (CVaR), entropic value-at-risk (EVaR), and g-entropic risk measures, and propose a tractable incorporation within MPC. We illustrate our framework via simulation studies. 本文研究了在存在随机动态障碍的情况下，具有不确定动力学的代理的风险规避后退地平线运动规划问题。我们提出了一种模型预测控制（MPC）方案，该方案使用一致的风险度量来制定避障约束。为了处理状态动态中的干扰或过程噪声，以风险意识的方式收紧状态约束以提供干扰反馈策略。我们还提出了一种路点跟踪算法，该算法使用所提出的离散分布 MPC 方案，并证明其风险敏感的递归可行性，同时保证有限时间任务完成。我们进一步研究了一些常用的连贯风险度量，即条件风险价值（CVaR）、熵风险价值（EVaR）和g熵风险度量，并提出了在MPC中易于处理的合并。我们通过模拟研究来说明我们的框架。 本文提出一种基于一致风险度量的风险厌恶型滚动时域运动规划方法，用于处理具有不确定动态和随机动态障碍物的代理避障问题。 Anushri Dixit,Mohamadreza Ahmadi,Joel W. Burdick eess.SY,cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Chih-Chiang Chang,Hung-yi Lee
title: Exploring Continuous Integrate-and-Fire for Adaptive Simultaneous Speech Translation
title_zh: 探索自适应同步语音翻译的连续集成和激发
comment: INTERSPEECH 2022 camera ready
comments: INTERSPEECH 2022 camera ready
abstract: Simultaneous speech translation (SimulST) is a challenging task aiming to translate streaming speech before the complete input is observed. A SimulST system generally includes two components: the pre-decision that aggregates the speech information and the policy that decides to read or write. While recent works had proposed various strategies to improve the pre-decision, they mainly adopt the fixed wait-k policy, leaving the adaptive policies rarely explored. This paper proposes to model the adaptive policy by adapting the Continuous Integrate-and-Fire (CIF). Compared with monotonic multihead attention (MMA), our method has the advantage of simpler computation, superior quality at low latency, and better generalization to long utterances. We conduct experiments on the MuST-C V2 dataset and show the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Simultaneous speech translation (SimulST) is a challenging task aiming to translate streaming speech before the complete input is observed. A SimulST system generally includes two components: the pre-decision that aggregates the speech information and the policy that decides to read or write. While recent works had proposed various strategies to improve the pre-decision, they mainly adopt the fixed wait-k policy, leaving the adaptive policies rarely explored. This paper proposes to model the adaptive policy by adapting the Continuous Integrate-and-Fire (CIF). Compared with monotonic multihead attention (MMA), our method has the advantage of simpler computation, superior quality at low latency, and better generalization to long utterances. We conduct experiments on the MuST-C V2 dataset and show the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 同时语音翻译（SimulST）是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在在观察到完整输入之前翻译流语音。 SimulST系统通常包括两个组件：聚合语音信息的预决策和决定读或写的策略。虽然最近的工作提出了各种策略来改进预决策，但它们主要采用固定的 wait-k 策略，而很少探索自适应策略。本文建议通过采用持续集成和启动（CIF）来对自适应策略进行建模。与单调多头注意力（MMA）相比，我们的方法具有计算更简单、低延迟的高质量以及对长话语更好的泛化的优点。我们在 MuST-C V2 数据集上进行了实验，并展示了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于连续积分-发放（CIF）模型的自适应策略，用于改进同时语音翻译（SimulST）系统中的决策机制。
AI.motivation: 现有SimulST方法主要依赖固定等待策略（如wait-k），难以适应不同延迟需求和长句翻译场景，亟需探索更灵活的自适应决策策略。
AI.method: 采用连续积分-发放（CIF）神经元模型模拟自适应决策机制，替代传统的单调多头注意力（MMA）方法，实现更简洁的计算和动态延迟控制。
AI.result: 在MuST-C V2数据集实验中，CIF方法在低延迟场景下翻译质量优于MMA，且对长句的泛化能力更优。
AI.conclusion: CIF模型为SimulST提供了计算效率高、延迟适应性强的自适应决策方案，是固定策略的有效替代方法。

authors_text: Fangyi Zhu,See-Kiong Ng,Stéphane Bressan
title: COOL, a Context Outlooker, and its Application to Question Answering and other Natural Language Processing Tasks
title_zh: COOL，一个上下文展望器，及其在问答和其他自然语言处理任务中的应用
abstract: Vision outlooker improves the performance of vision transformers, which implements a self-attention mechanism by adding an outlook attention, a form of local attention. In natural language processing, as has been the case in computer vision and other domains, transformer-based models constitute the state-of-the-art for most processing tasks. In this domain, too, many authors have argued and demonstrated the importance of local context. We present an outlook attention mechanism, COOL, for natural language processing. COOL, added on top of the self-attention layers of a transformer-based model, encodes local syntactic context considering word proximity and more pair-wise constraints than dynamic convolution used by existing approaches. A comparative empirical performance evaluation of an implementation of COOL with different transformer-based models confirms the opportunity for improvement over a baseline using the original models alone for various natural language processing tasks, including question answering. The proposed approach achieves competitive performance with existing state-of-the-art methods on some tasks.
summary: Vision outlooker improves the performance of vision transformers, which implements a self-attention mechanism by adding an outlook attention, a form of local attention. In natural language processing, as has been the case in computer vision and other domains, transformer-based models constitute the state-of-the-art for most processing tasks. In this domain, too, many authors have argued and demonstrated the importance of local context. We present an outlook attention mechanism, COOL, for natural language processing. COOL, added on top of the self-attention layers of a transformer-based model, encodes local syntactic context considering word proximity and more pair-wise constraints than dynamic convolution used by existing approaches. A comparative empirical performance evaluation of an implementation of COOL with different transformer-based models confirms the opportunity for improvement over a baseline using the original models alone for various natural language processing tasks, including question answering. The proposed approach achieves competitive performance with existing state-of-the-art methods on some tasks.
abstract_zh: Vision Outlooker 提高了 Vision Transformer 的性能，它通过添加 Outlook Attention（一种局部注意力的形式）来实现自注意力机制。在自然语言处理中，与计算机视觉和其他领域的情况一样，基于变压器的模型构成了大多数处理任务的最先进技术。在这个领域，许多作者也论证并证明了当地背景的重要性。我们提出了一种用于自然语言处理的 Outlook 注意力机制 COOL。 COOL 添加在基于 Transformer 的模型的自注意力层之上，考虑到单词邻近性和比现有方法使用的动态卷积更多的成对约束，对局部句法上下文进行编码。对使用不同的基于 Transformer 的模型实施 COOL 进行的比较经验性能评估证实，在单独使用原始模型执行各种自然语言处理任务（包括问答）的基础上，有改进的机会。所提出的方法在某些任务上实现了与现有最​​先进方法的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为COOL的上下文展望机制，并将其应用于问答等自然语言处理任务，以提升基于Transformer模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在NLP中表现优异，但局部上下文信息的建模仍存在不足，现有方法如动态卷积在捕捉词序和配对约束方面存在局限性。
AI.method: 在Transformer自注意力层基础上引入COOL机制，通过局部注意力计算增强词序关系和配对约束，替代传统动态卷积方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，COOL在多个NLP任务（如问答）中优于基线模型，达到与现有最先进方法相当的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: COOL机制有效提升了Transformer模型对局部上下文的建模能力，为NLP任务提供了新的改进方向。

result: 实验表明，COOL在多个NLP任务（如问答）中优于基线模型，达到与现有最先进方法相当的性能水平。
conclusion: COOL机制有效提升了Transformer模型对局部上下文的建模能力，为NLP任务提供了新的改进方向。
search_text: COOL, a Context Outlooker, and its Application to Question Answering and other Natural Language Processing Tasks COOL，一个上下文展望器，及其在问答和其他自然语言处理任务中的应用 Vision outlooker improves the performance of vision transformers, which implements a self-attention mechanism by adding an outlook attention, a form of local attention. In natural language processing, as has been the case in computer vision and other domains, transformer-based models constitute the state-of-the-art for most processing tasks. In this domain, too, many authors have argued and demonstrated the importance of local context. We present an outlook attention mechanism, COOL, for natural language processing. COOL, added on top of the self-attention layers of a transformer-based model, encodes local syntactic context considering word proximity and more pair-wise constraints than dynamic convolution used by existing approaches. A comparative empirical performance evaluation of an implementation of COOL with different transformer-based models confirms the opportunity for improvement over a baseline using the original models alone for various natural language processing tasks, including question answering. The proposed approach achieves competitive performance with existing state-of-the-art methods on some tasks. Vision Outlooker 提高了 Vision Transformer 的性能，它通过添加 Outlook Attention（一种局部注意力的形式）来实现自注意力机制。在自然语言处理中，与计算机视觉和其他领域的情况一样，基于变压器的模型构成了大多数处理任务的最先进技术。在这个领域，许多作者也论证并证明了当地背景的重要性。我们提出了一种用于自然语言处理的 Outlook 注意力机制 COOL。 COOL 添加在基于 Transformer 的模型的自注意力层之上，考虑到单词邻近性和比现有方法使用的动态卷积更多的成对约束，对局部句法上下文进行编码。对使用不同的基于 Transformer 的模型实施 COOL 进行的比较经验性能评估证实，在单独使用原始模型执行各种自然语言处理任务（包括问答）的基础上，有改进的机会。所提出的方法在某些任务上实现了与现有最​​先进方法的竞争性能。 本文提出一种名为COOL的上下文展望机制，并将其应用于问答等自然语言处理任务，以提升基于Transformer模型的性能。 Fangyi Zhu,See-Kiong Ng,Stéphane Bressan cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Rajas Bansal
title: A Survey on Bias and Fairness in Natural Language Processing
title_zh: 自然语言处理中的偏见和公平性调查
abstract: As NLP models become more integrated with the everyday lives of people, it becomes important to examine the social effect that the usage of these systems has. While these models understand language and have increased accuracy on difficult downstream tasks, there is evidence that these models amplify gender, racial and cultural stereotypes and lead to a vicious cycle in many settings. In this survey, we analyze the origins of biases, the definitions of fairness, and how different subfields of NLP mitigate bias. We finally discuss how future studies can work towards eradicating pernicious biases from NLP algorithms.
summary: As NLP models become more integrated with the everyday lives of people, it becomes important to examine the social effect that the usage of these systems has. While these models understand language and have increased accuracy on difficult downstream tasks, there is evidence that these models amplify gender, racial and cultural stereotypes and lead to a vicious cycle in many settings. In this survey, we analyze the origins of biases, the definitions of fairness, and how different subfields of NLP mitigate bias. We finally discuss how future studies can work towards eradicating pernicious biases from NLP algorithms.
abstract_zh: 随着 NLP 模型与人们的日常生活更加融合，检查这些系统的使用所产生的社会影响变得很重要。虽然这些模型能够理解语言，并且提高了完成困难的下游任务的准确性，但有证据表明，这些模型放大了性别、种族和文化刻板印象，并在许多情况下导致恶性循环。在这项调查中，我们分析了偏见的起源、公平的定义以及 NLP 的不同子领域如何减轻偏见。最后，我们讨论未来的研究如何致力于消除 NLP 算法中的有害偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自然语言处理领域中的偏见与公平性问题，分析了偏见的来源、公平性定义及不同子领域的缓解方法。
AI.motivation: 随着NLP模型深度融入社会应用，其可能放大的性别、种族等偏见引发社会风险，亟需系统性研究以确保技术公平性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，系统分析现有研究中偏见的成因、公平性理论框架及各NLP子领域（如机器翻译、情感分析等）的去偏技术。
AI.result: 总结了数据偏差、模型训练过程及社会文化因素三大偏见来源，梳理了群体公平、个体公平等核心定义，并归纳了当前主流的偏见缓解技术路线。
AI.conclusion: 未来需发展更普适的偏见检测与消除方法，结合跨学科视角推动NLP技术的公平性进步。

ai_content.tldr: 本文综述了自然语言处理领域中的偏见与公平性问题，分析了偏见的来源、公平性定义及不同子领域的缓解方法。

authors_text: Scott Pezanowski,Prasenjit Mitra,Alan M. MacEachren
title: Exploring Descriptions of Movement Through Geovisual Analytics
title_zh: 通过地理视觉分析探索运动描述
comment: KN - Journal of Cartography and Geographic Information (2022)
comments: KN - Journal of Cartography and Geographic Information (2022)
abstract: Sensemaking using automatically extracted information from text is a challenging problem. In this paper, we address a specific type of information extraction, namely extracting information related to descriptions of movement. Aggregating and understanding information related to descriptions of movement and lack of movement specified in text can lead to an improved understanding and sensemaking of movement phenomena of various types, e.g., migration of people and animals, impediments to travel due to COVID-19, etc. We present GeoMovement, a system that is based on combining machine learning and rule-based extraction of movement-related information with state-of-the-art visualization techniques. Along with the depiction of movement, our tool can extract and present a lack of movement. Very little prior work exists on automatically extracting descriptions of movement, especially negation and movement. Apart from addressing these, GeoMovement also provides a novel integrated framework for combining these extraction modules with visualization. We include two systematic case studies of GeoMovement that show how humans can derive meaningful geographic movement information. GeoMovement can complement precise movement data, e.g., obtained using sensors, or be used by itself when precise data is unavailable.
summary: Sensemaking using automatically extracted information from text is a challenging problem. In this paper, we address a specific type of information extraction, namely extracting information related to descriptions of movement. Aggregating and understanding information related to descriptions of movement and lack of movement specified in text can lead to an improved understanding and sensemaking of movement phenomena of various types, e.g., migration of people and animals, impediments to travel due to COVID-19, etc. We present GeoMovement, a system that is based on combining machine learning and rule-based extraction of movement-related information with state-of-the-art visualization techniques. Along with the depiction of movement, our tool can extract and present a lack of movement. Very little prior work exists on automatically extracting descriptions of movement, especially negation and movement. Apart from addressing these, GeoMovement also provides a novel integrated framework for combining these extraction modules with visualization. We include two systematic case studies of GeoMovement that show how humans can derive meaningful geographic movement information. GeoMovement can complement precise movement data, e.g., obtained using sensors, or be used by itself when precise data is unavailable.
abstract_zh: 使用从文本中自动提取的信息进行意义建构是一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们讨论一种特定类型的信息提取，即提取与运动描述相关的信息。聚合和理解与文本中指定的运动描述和缺乏运动相关的信息可以提高对各种类型运动现象的理解和意义，例如人和动物的迁徙、COVID-19导致的旅行障碍等。我们提出了 GeoMovement，这是一个基于机器学习和基于规则的运动相关信息提取与最先进的可视化技术相结合的系统。除了运动的描述之外，我们的工具还可以提取并呈现运动的缺乏。之前很少有关于自动提取运动描述的工作，尤其是否定和运动。除了解决这些问题之外，GeoMovement 还提供了一个新颖的集成框架，用于将这些提取模块与可视化相结合。我们包括两个关于 GeoMovement 的系统案例研究，展示了人类如何获取有意义的地理运动信息。 GeoMovement 可以补充精确的运动数据，例如使用传感器获得的数据，或者在精确数据不可用时单独使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoMovement系统，结合机器学习和可视化技术，从文本中提取与移动相关的描述信息，并可视化呈现移动及缺乏移动的现象。
AI.motivation: 自动从文本中提取移动信息（尤其是否定移动）存在挑战，且现有研究较少，需开发工具辅助理解如人口迁移、疫情出行限制等移动现象。
AI.method: 融合机器学习与基于规则的信息提取方法，结合先进可视化技术，构建GeoMovement系统，集成移动信息提取模块与可视化功能。
AI.result: 通过两个系统案例研究验证GeoMovement可有效辅助人类获取地理移动信息，并能在无精确数据时独立使用或补充传感器数据。
AI.conclusion: GeoMovement为移动现象分析提供了新颖的整合框架，填补了自动提取移动与否定移动信息的研究空白，提升了对复杂移动模式的理解能力。

authors_text: David Selasi Koblah,Rabin Yu Acharya,Daniel Capecci,Olivia P. Dizon-Paradis,Shahin Tajik,Fatemeh Ganji,Damon L. Woodard,Domenic Forte
title: A Survey and Perspective on Artificial Intelligence for Security-Aware Electronic Design Automation
title_zh: 安全感知电子设计自动化人工智能的调查与展望
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) techniques have been increasingly used in several fields to improve performance and the level of automation. In recent years, this use has exponentially increased due to the advancement of high-performance computing and the ever increasing size of data. One of such fields is that of hardware design; specifically the design of digital and analog integrated circuits~(ICs), where AI/ ML techniques have been extensively used to address ever-increasing design complexity, aggressive time-to-market, and the growing number of ubiquitous interconnected devices (IoT). However, the security concerns and issues related to IC design have been highly overlooked. In this paper, we summarize the state-of-the-art in AL/ML for circuit design/optimization, security and engineering challenges, research in security-aware CAD/EDA, and future research directions and needs for using AI/ML for security-aware circuit design.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) techniques have been increasingly used in several fields to improve performance and the level of automation. In recent years, this use has exponentially increased due to the advancement of high-performance computing and the ever increasing size of data. One of such fields is that of hardware design; specifically the design of digital and analog integrated circuits~(ICs), where AI/ ML techniques have been extensively used to address ever-increasing design complexity, aggressive time-to-market, and the growing number of ubiquitous interconnected devices (IoT). However, the security concerns and issues related to IC design have been highly overlooked. In this paper, we summarize the state-of-the-art in AL/ML for circuit design/optimization, security and engineering challenges, research in security-aware CAD/EDA, and future research directions and needs for using AI/ML for security-aware circuit design.
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）和机器学习（ML）技术已越来越多地应用于多个领域，以提高性能和自动化水平。近年来，由于高性能计算的进步和数据规模的不断增加，这种用途呈指数级增长。其中之一就是硬件设计领域。特别是数字和模拟集成电路 (IC) 的设计，其中 AI/ML 技术已被广泛用于解决不断增加的设计复杂性、紧迫的上市时间以及日益增多的无处不在的互连设备 (IoT)。然而，与 IC 设计相关的安全问题和问题却被高度忽视。在本文中，我们总结了电路设计/优化的 AL/ML 的最新技术、安全和工程挑战、安全感知 CAD/EDA 的研究，以及使用 AI/ML 进行安全感知电路设计的未来研究方向和需求。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能/机器学习在安全感知电子设计自动化中的应用现状、挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI/ML在硬件设计领域应用广泛，但集成电路设计中的安全问题长期被忽视，亟需系统性研究。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，总结AI/ML在电路设计优化中的最新技术、安全工程挑战及安全感知EDA研究进展。
AI.result: 梳理了当前AI/ML在电路设计中的应用范式，明确了安全漏洞风险点，并提出需加强安全验证、数据隐私保护等研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 未来需将安全意识深度融入AI驱动的设计流程，建立跨学科协作机制以应对新型安全威胁。

search_text: A Survey and Perspective on Artificial Intelligence for Security-Aware Electronic Design Automation 安全感知电子设计自动化人工智能的调查与展望 Artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) techniques have been increasingly used in several fields to improve performance and the level of automation. In recent years, this use has exponentially increased due to the advancement of high-performance computing and the ever increasing size of data. One of such fields is that of hardware design; specifically the design of digital and analog integrated circuits~(ICs), where AI/ ML techniques have been extensively used to address ever-increasing design complexity, aggressive time-to-market, and the growing number of ubiquitous interconnected devices (IoT). However, the security concerns and issues related to IC design have been highly overlooked. In this paper, we summarize the state-of-the-art in AL/ML for circuit design/optimization, security and engineering challenges, research in security-aware CAD/EDA, and future research directions and needs for using AI/ML for security-aware circuit design. 人工智能（AI）和机器学习（ML）技术已越来越多地应用于多个领域，以提高性能和自动化水平。近年来，由于高性能计算的进步和数据规模的不断增加，这种用途呈指数级增长。其中之一就是硬件设计领域。特别是数字和模拟集成电路 (IC) 的设计，其中 AI/ML 技术已被广泛用于解决不断增加的设计复杂性、紧迫的上市时间以及日益增多的无处不在的互连设备 (IoT)。然而，与 IC 设计相关的安全问题和问题却被高度忽视。在本文中，我们总结了电路设计/优化的 AL/ML 的最新技术、安全和工程挑战、安全感知 CAD/EDA 的研究，以及使用 AI/ML 进行安全感知电路设计的未来研究方向和需求。 本文综述了人工智能/机器学习在安全感知电子设计自动化中的应用现状、挑战及未来研究方向。 David Selasi Koblah,Rabin Yu Acharya,Daniel Capecci,Olivia P. Dizon-Paradis,Shahin Tajik,Fatemeh Ganji,Damon L. Woodard,Domenic Forte cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Pall Asgeir Bjornsson,Alexander Baker,Ingmar Fleps,Yves Pauchard,Halldor Palsson,Stephen J. Ferguson,Sigurdur Sigurdsson,Vilmundur Gudnason,Benedikt Helgason,Lotta Maria Ellingsen
title: Fast and Robust Femur Segmentation from Computed Tomography Images for Patient-Specific Hip Fracture Risk Screening
title_zh: 从计算机断层扫描图像中快速、稳健地分割股骨，用于患者特定的髋部骨折风险筛查
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in Computer Methods in Biomechanics and Biomedical Engineering: Imaging & Visualization, published by Taylor & Francis
comments: This article has been accepted for publication in Computer Methods in Biomechanics and Biomedical Engineering: Imaging & Visualization, published by Taylor & Francis
abstract: Osteoporosis is a common bone disease that increases the risk of bone fracture. Hip-fracture risk screening methods based on finite element analysis depend on segmented computed tomography (CT) images; however, current femur segmentation methods require manual delineations of large data sets. Here we propose a deep neural network for fully automated, accurate, and fast segmentation of the proximal femur from CT. Evaluation on a set of 1147 proximal femurs with ground truth segmentations demonstrates that our method is apt for hip-fracture risk screening, bringing us one step closer to a clinically viable option for screening at-risk patients for hip-fracture susceptibility.

abstract_zh: 骨质疏松症是一种常见的骨病，会增加骨折的风险。基于有限元分析的髋部骨折风险筛查方法依赖于分段计算机断层扫描（CT）图像；然而，当前的股骨分割方法需要手动描绘大数据集。在这里，我们提出了一种深度神经网络，用于从 CT 中全自动、准确、快速地分割股骨近端。对一组 1147 个近端股骨进行真实分割的评估表明，我们的方法适用于髋部骨折风险筛查，使我们更接近临床上可行的筛选高风险患者髋部骨折易感性的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度神经网络的全自动方法，用于从CT图像中快速分割股骨，以实现患者特异性的髋骨骨折风险筛查。
AI.motivation: 现有髋骨骨折风险筛查方法依赖手动分割CT图像，效率低且耗时，亟需自动化解决方案以提升临床可行性。
AI.method: 开发深度神经网络模型，实现CT图像中股骨近端的全自动、精确且快速分割。
AI.result: 在包含1147个带标注股骨的数据集上验证，证明该方法适用于髋骨骨折风险筛查，接近临床应用标准。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为患者特异性髋骨骨折风险筛查提供了可行的自动化工具，推动精准医疗发展。

authors_text: Kelly Payette,Hongwei Li,Priscille de Dumast,Roxane Licandro,Hui Ji,Md Mahfuzur Rahman Siddiquee,Daguang Xu,Andriy Myronenko,Hao Liu,Yuchen Pei,Lisheng Wang,Ying Peng,Juanying Xie,Huiquan Zhang,Guiming Dong,Hao Fu,Guotai Wang,ZunHyan Rieu,Donghyeon Kim,Hyun Gi Kim,Davood Karimi,Ali Gholipour,Helena R. title: Fetal Brain Tissue Annotation and Segmentation Challenge Results
title_zh: 胎儿脑组织注释和分割挑战结果
comment: Results from FeTA Challenge 2021, held at MICCAI; Manuscript submitted
comments: Results from FeTA Challenge 2021, held at MICCAI; Manuscript submitted
abstract: In-utero fetal MRI is emerging as an important tool in the diagnosis and analysis of the developing human brain. Automatic segmentation of the developing fetal brain is a vital step in the quantitative analysis of prenatal neurodevelopment both in the research and clinical context. However, manual segmentation of cerebral structures is time-consuming and prone to error and inter-observer variability. Therefore, we organized the Fetal Tissue Annotation (FeTA) Challenge in 2021 in order to encourage the development of automatic segmentation algorithms on an international level. The challenge utilized FeTA Dataset, an open dataset of fetal brain MRI reconstructions segmented into seven different tissues (external cerebrospinal fluid, grey matter, white matter, ventricles, cerebellum, brainstem, deep grey matter). 20 international teams participated in this challenge, submitting a total of 21 algorithms for evaluation. In this paper, we provide a detailed analysis of the results from both a technical and clinical perspective. All participants relied on deep learning methods, mainly U-Nets, with some variability present in the network architecture, optimization, and image pre- and post-processing. The majority of teams used existing medical imaging deep learning frameworks. The main differences between the submissions were the fine tuning done during training, and the specific pre- and post-processing steps performed. The challenge results showed that almost all submissions performed similarly. Four of the top five teams used ensemble learning methods. However, one team's algorithm performed significantly superior to the other submissions, and consisted of an asymmetrical U-Net network architecture. This paper provides a first of its kind benchmark for future automatic multi-tissue segmentation algorithms for the developing human brain in utero.
summary: In-utero fetal MRI is emerging as an important tool in the diagnosis and analysis of the developing human brain. Automatic segmentation of the developing fetal brain is a vital step in the quantitative analysis of prenatal neurodevelopment both in the research and clinical context. However, manual segmentation of cerebral structures is time-consuming and prone to error and inter-observer variability. Therefore, we organized the Fetal Tissue Annotation (FeTA) Challenge in 2021 in order to encourage the development of automatic segmentation algorithms on an international level. The challenge utilized FeTA Dataset, an open dataset of fetal brain MRI reconstructions segmented into seven different tissues (external cerebrospinal fluid, grey matter, white matter, ventricles, cerebellum, brainstem, deep grey matter). 20 international teams participated in this challenge, submitting a total of 21 algorithms for evaluation. In this paper, we provide a detailed analysis of the results from both a technical and clinical perspective. All participants relied on deep learning methods, mainly U-Nets, with some variability present in the network architecture, optimization, and image pre- and post-processing. The majority of teams used existing medical imaging deep learning frameworks. The main differences between the submissions were the fine tuning done during training, and the specific pre- and post-processing steps performed. The challenge results showed that almost all submissions performed similarly. Four of the top five teams used ensemble learning methods. However, one team's algorithm performed significantly superior to the other submissions, and consisted of an asymmetrical U-Net network architecture. This paper provides a first of its kind benchmark for future automatic multi-tissue segmentation algorithms for the developing human brain in utero.
abstract_zh: 子宫内胎儿 MRI 正在成为诊断和分析人类大脑发育的重要工具。发育中的胎儿大脑的自动分割是研究和临床背景下产前神经发育定量分析的重要一步。然而，手动分割大脑结构非常耗时，并且容易出现错误和观察者间的差异。因此，我们于2021年组织了胎儿组织注释（FeTA）挑战赛，以鼓励国际水平的自动分割算法的发展。该挑战赛使用了 FeTA 数据集，这是一个胎儿大脑 MRI 重建的开放数据集，分为七种不同的组织（外部脑脊液、灰质、白质、心室、小脑、脑干、深部灰质）。 20支国际团队参加了本次挑战赛，共提交了21种算法进行评估。在本文中，我们从技术和临床角度对结果进行了详细分析。所有参与者都依赖于深度学习方法，主要是 U-Net，但网络架构、优化以及图像预处理和后处理方面存在一些变化。大多数团队使用现有的医学成像深度学习框架。提交的内容之间的主要区别在于训练期间进行的微调以及执行的具体预处理和后处理步骤。挑战结果显示，几乎所有提交的作品都表现相似。前五名的团队中有四支使用了集成学习方法。然而，一个团队的算法性能明显优于其他提交的算法，并且由不对称的 U-Net 网络架构组成。本文为子宫内发育中的人类大脑的未来自动多组织分割算法提供了第一个同类基准。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了2021年胎儿脑组织标注与分割挑战赛的结果，评估了21种自动分割算法在胎儿脑MRI多组织分割中的表现。
AI.motivation: 胎儿MRI的自动分割对产前神经发育定量分析至关重要，但手动分割耗时且存在误差。挑战赛旨在推动国际范围内自动分割算法的发展。
AI.method: 基于FeTA数据集（含7类脑组织分割标签），20支国际团队提交21种算法，主要采用深度学习（如U-Net）并结合不同网络结构、优化策略及预后处理方法。
AI.result: 多数算法表现相近，四支冠军团队使用集成学习，其中一支采用非对称U-Net架构的算法显著优于其他方案。
AI.conclusion: 该研究首次建立了胎儿脑多组织自动分割的基准，证明了深度学习的有效性，非对称U-Net架构表现出突出性能。
