conclusion: 该研究首次建立了胎儿脑多组织自动分割的基准，证明了深度学习的有效性，非对称U-Net架构表现出突出性能。
search_text: Fetal Brain Tissue Annotation and Segmentation Challenge Results 胎儿脑组织注释和分割挑战结果 In-utero fetal MRI is emerging as an important tool in the diagnosis and analysis of the developing human brain. Automatic segmentation of the developing fetal brain is a vital step in the quantitative analysis of prenatal neurodevelopment both in the research and clinical context. However, manual segmentation of cerebral structures is time-consuming and prone to error and inter-observer variability. Therefore, we organized the Fetal Tissue Annotation (FeTA) Challenge in 2021 in order to encourage the development of automatic segmentation algorithms on an international level. The challenge utilized FeTA Dataset, an open dataset of fetal brain MRI reconstructions segmented into seven different tissues (external cerebrospinal fluid, grey matter, white matter, ventricles, cerebellum, brainstem, deep grey matter). 20 international teams participated in this challenge, submitting a total of 21 algorithms for evaluation. In this paper, we provide a detailed analysis of the results from both a technical and clinical perspective. All participants relied on deep learning methods, mainly U-Nets, with some variability present in the network architecture, optimization, and image pre- and post-processing. The majority of teams used existing medical imaging deep learning frameworks. The main differences between the submissions were the fine tuning done during training, and the specific pre- and post-processing steps performed. The challenge results showed that almost all submissions performed similarly. Four of the top five teams used ensemble learning methods. However, one team's algorithm performed significantly superior to the other submissions, and consisted of an asymmetrical U-Net network architecture. This paper provides a first of its kind benchmark for future automatic multi-tissue segmentation algorithms for the developing human brain in utero. 子宫内胎儿 MRI 正在成为诊断和分析人类大脑发育的重要工具。发育中的胎儿大脑的自动分割是研究和临床背景下产前神经发育定量分析的重要一步。然而，手动分割大脑结构非常耗时，并且容易出现错误和观察者间的差异。因此，我们于2021年组织了胎儿组织注释（FeTA）挑战赛，以鼓励国际水平的自动分割算法的发展。该挑战赛使用了 FeTA 数据集，这是一个胎儿大脑 MRI 重建的开放数据集，分为七种不同的组织（外部脑脊液、灰质、白质、心室、小脑、脑干、深部灰质）。 20支国际团队参加了本次挑战赛，共提交了21种算法进行评估。在本文中，我们从技术和临床角度对结果进行了详细分析。所有参与者都依赖于深度学习方法，主要是 U-Net，但网络架构、优化以及图像预处理和后处理方面存在一些变化。大多数团队使用现有的医学成像深度学习框架。提交的内容之间的主要区别在于训练期间进行的微调以及执行的具体预处理和后处理步骤。挑战结果显示，几乎所有提交的作品都表现相似。前五名的团队中有四支使用了集成学习方法。然而，一个团队的算法性能明显优于其他提交的算法，并且由不对称的 U-Net 网络架构组成。本文为子宫内发育中的人类大脑的未来自动多组织分割算法提供了第一个同类基准。 本文介绍了2021年胎儿脑组织标注与分割挑战赛的结果，评估了21种自动分割算法在胎儿脑MRI多组织分割中的表现。 Kelly Payette,Hongwei Li,Priscille de Dumast,Roxane Licandro,Hui Ji,Md Mahfuzur Rahman Siddiquee,Daguang Xu,Andriy Myronenko,Hao Liu,Yuchen Pei,Lisheng Wang,Ying Peng,Juanying Xie,Huiquan Zhang,Guiming Dong,Hao Fu,Guotai Wang,ZunHyan Rieu,Donghyeon Kim,Hyun Gi Kim,Davood Karimi,Ali Gholipour,Helena R. Torres,Bruno Oliveira,João L. Vilaça, et al. (33 additional authors not shown) eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Sian Gooding
title: On the Ethical Considerations of Text Simplification
title_zh: 论文本简化的伦理考量
abstract: This paper outlines the ethical implications of text simplification within the framework of assistive systems. We argue that a distinction should be made between the technologies that perform text simplification and the realisation of these in assistive technologies. When using the latter as a motivation for research, it is important that the subsequent ethical implications be carefully considered. We provide guidelines for the framing of text simplification independently of assistive systems, as well as suggesting directions for future research and discussion based on the concerns raised.
summary: This paper outlines the ethical implications of text simplification within the framework of assistive systems. We argue that a distinction should be made between the technologies that perform text simplification and the realisation of these in assistive technologies. When using the latter as a motivation for research, it is important that the subsequent ethical implications be carefully considered. We provide guidelines for the framing of text simplification independently of assistive systems, as well as suggesting directions for future research and discussion based on the concerns raised.
abstract_zh: 本文概述了辅助系统框架内文本简化的伦理影响。我们认为，应该区分执行文本简化的技术和在辅助技术中实现这些技术。当使用后者作为研究动机时，重要的是要仔细考虑随后的伦理影响。我们为独立于辅助系统的文本简化框架提供指南，并根据提出的问题提出未来研究和讨论的方向。

AI.tldr: 探讨文本简化技术在辅助系统中的伦理影响，区分技术本身与实际应用，并提出指导方针和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分关注文本简化技术在辅助系统中的伦理影响，需明确技术应用中的伦理责任。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和伦理框架分析，探讨文本简化技术在辅助系统中的应用及其伦理问题。
AI.result: 提出独立于辅助系统的文本简化伦理框架，并为未来研究提供方向。
AI.conclusion: 需重视文本简化技术的伦理考量，确保技术公平性和用户权益，推动负责任的研究与应用。

authors_text: Subba Reddy Oota,Jashn Arora,Manish Gupta,Raju S. Bapi
title: Cross-view Brain Decoding
title_zh: 跨视角大脑解码
comment: 11 pages, 10 figures
comments: 11 pages, 10 figures
abstract: How the brain captures the meaning of linguistic stimuli across multiple views is still a critical open question in neuroscience. Consider three different views of the concept apartment: (1) picture (WP) presented with the target word label, (2) sentence (S) using the target word, and (3) word cloud (WC) containing the target word along with other semantically related words. Unlike previous efforts, which focus only on single view analysis, in this paper, we study the effectiveness of brain decoding in a zero-shot cross-view learning setup. Further, we propose brain decoding in the novel context of cross-view-translation tasks like image captioning (IC), image tagging (IT), keyword extraction (KE), and sentence formation (SF). Using extensive experiments, we demonstrate that cross-view zero-shot brain decoding is practical leading to ~0.68 average pairwise accuracy across view pairs. Also, the decoded representations are sufficiently detailed to enable high accuracy for cross-view-translation tasks with following pairwise accuracy: IC (78.0), IT (83.0), KE (83.7) and SF (74.5). Analysis of the contribution of different brain networks reveals exciting cognitive insights: (1) A high percentage of visual voxels are involved in image captioning and image tagging tasks, and a high percentage of language voxels are involved in the sentence formation and keyword extraction tasks. (2) Zero-shot accuracy of the model trained on S view and tested on WC view is better than same-view accuracy of the model trained and tested on WC view.
summary: How the brain captures the meaning of linguistic stimuli across multiple views is still a critical open question in neuroscience. Consider three different views of the concept apartment: (1) picture (WP) presented with the target word label, (2) sentence (S) using the target word, and (3) word cloud (WC) containing the target word along with other semantically related words. Unlike previous efforts, which focus only on single view analysis, in this paper, we study the effectiveness of brain decoding in a zero-shot cross-view learning setup. Further, we propose brain decoding in the novel context of cross-view-translation tasks like image captioning (IC), image tagging (IT), keyword extraction (KE), and sentence formation (SF). Using extensive experiments, we demonstrate that cross-view zero-shot brain decoding is practical leading to ~0.68 average pairwise accuracy across view pairs. Also, the decoded representations are sufficiently detailed to enable high accuracy for cross-view-translation tasks with following pairwise accuracy: IC (78.0), IT (83.0), KE (83.7) and SF (74.5). Analysis of the contribution of different brain networks reveals exciting cognitive insights: (1) A high percentage of visual voxels are involved in image captioning and image tagging tasks, and a high percentage of language voxels are involved in the sentence formation and keyword extraction tasks. (2) Zero-shot accuracy of the model trained on S view and tested on WC view is better than same-view accuracy of the model trained and tested on WC view.
abstract_zh: 大脑如何跨多种视角捕捉语言刺激的含义仍然是神经科学中一个关键的悬而未决的问题。考虑概念公寓的三种不同视图：（1）带有目标词标签的图片（WP），（2）使用目标词的句子（S），以及（3）包含目标词以及其他语义相关词的词云（WC）。与之前仅关注单视图分析的工作不同，在本文中，我们研究了零样本交叉视图学习设置中大脑解码的有效性。此外，我们提出在图像字幕（IC）、图像标记（IT）、关键词提取（KE）和句子形成（SF）等跨视图翻译任务的新颖背景下进行脑解码。通过大量实验，我们证明了跨视图零样本大脑解码是实用的，可以在视图对之间实现约 0.68 的平均成对精度。此外，解码的表示足够详细，可以实现跨视图翻译任务的高精度，具有以下成对精度：IC (78.0)、IT (83.0)、KE (83.7) 和 SF (74.5)。对不同大脑网络贡献的分析揭示了令人兴奋的认知见解：（1）高比例的视觉体素参与图像字幕和图像标记任务，高比例的语言体素参与句子形成和关键词提取任务。 （2）在S视图上训练并在WC视图上测试的模型的零镜头精度优于在WC视图上训练和测试的模型的同视图精度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究跨视角脑解码任务，通过零样本学习框架实现不同视角（图像、句子、词云）间的脑活动解码，并探索其在跨视角翻译任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 神经科学中关于大脑如何跨多视角捕捉语言刺激意义的问题仍待解决，传统方法仅关注单一视角分析，缺乏跨视角零样本学习的探索。
AI.method: 提出跨视角翻译任务框架（如图像描述生成、关键词提取等），采用零样本学习策略训练模型，结合fMRI数据解码脑活动并分析不同脑区网络的贡献。
AI.result: 跨视角零样本脑解码平均准确率达0.68，跨视角翻译任务准确率分别为IC(78.0)、IT(83.0)、KE(83.7)、SF(74.5)，发现视觉皮层与语言皮层在不同任务中的特异性激活模式。
AI.conclusion: 跨视角脑解码具有可行性，揭示了视觉与语言脑区在不同任务中的分工，且零样本模型在跨视角任务中表现优于同视角模型。

authors_text: Will Solow,Matthew Barich,Brendan Mumey
title: Fast Circular Pattern Matching
title_zh: 快速圆形图案匹配
abstract: The Exact Circular Pattern Matching (ECPM) problem consists of reporting every occurrence of a rotation of a pattern $P$ in a text $T$. In many real-world applications, specifically in computational biology, circular rotations are of interest because of their prominence in virus DNA. Thus, given no restrictions on pre-processing time, how quickly all such circular rotation occurrences is of interest to many areas of study. We highlight, to the best of our knowledge, a novel approach to the ECPM problem and present four data structures that accompany this approach, each with their own time-space trade-offs, in addition to experimental results to determine the most computationally feasible data structure.
summary: The Exact Circular Pattern Matching (ECPM) problem consists of reporting every occurrence of a rotation of a pattern $P$ in a text $T$. In many real-world applications, specifically in computational biology, circular rotations are of interest because of their prominence in virus DNA. Thus, given no restrictions on pre-processing time, how quickly all such circular rotation occurrences is of interest to many areas of study. We highlight, to the best of our knowledge, a novel approach to the ECPM problem and present four data structures that accompany this approach, each with their own time-space trade-offs, in addition to experimental results to determine the most computationally feasible data structure.
abstract_zh: 精确循环模式匹配 (ECPM) 问题包括报告文本 $T$ 中模式 $P$ 的每次旋转。在许多现实世界的应用中，特别是在计算生物学中，圆形旋转因其在病毒 DNA 中的突出地位而备受关注。因此，在不限制预处理时间的情况下，所有此类圆形旋转发生的速度是许多研究领域感兴趣的。据我们所知，我们重点介绍了一种解决 ECPM 问题的新颖方法，并提出了伴随该方法的四种数据结构，每种数据结构都有自己的时空权衡，此外还提供了确定计算上最可行的数据结构的实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解决精确循环模式匹配（ECPM）问题的新方法，并介绍了四种不同的数据结构。
AI.motivation: 在计算生物学等领域中，循环旋转具有重要意义，因此快速找到文本中所有模式的循环旋转出现位置具有广泛的应用价值。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的ECPM问题解决方法，并设计了四种具有不同时间-空间权衡的数据结构。
AI.result: 通过实验结果评估了这些数据结构的计算可行性，确定了最有效的一种。
AI.conclusion: 本文为ECPM问题提供了一种新方法，并通过多种数据结构展示了其在实际应用中的有效性。

authors_text: Bart Gajderowicz,Daniela Rosu,Mark S Fox
title: Extracting Impact Model Narratives from Social Services' Text
title_zh: 从社会服务文本中提取影响模型叙述
comment: R. Campos, A. Jorge, A. Jatowt, S. Bhatia, M. Litvak (eds.): Proceedings of the Text2Story'22 Workshop, Stavanger (Norway), 10-April-2022
comments: R. Campos, A. Jorge, A. Jatowt, S. Bhatia, M. Litvak (eds.): Proceedings of the Text2Story'22 Workshop, Stavanger (Norway), 10-April-2022
abstract: Named entity recognition (NER) is an important task in narration extraction. Narration, as a system of stories, provides insights into how events and characters in the stories develop over time. This paper proposes an architecture for NER on a corpus about social purpose organizations. This is the first NER task specifically targeted at social service entities. We show how this approach can be used for the sequencing of services and impacted clients with information extracted from unstructured text. The methodology outlines steps for extracting ontological representation of entities such as needs and satisfiers and generating hypotheses to answer queries about impact models defined by social purpose organizations. We evaluate the model on a corpus of social service descriptions with empirically calculated score.
summary: Named entity recognition (NER) is an important task in narration extraction. Narration, as a system of stories, provides insights into how events and characters in the stories develop over time. This paper proposes an architecture for NER on a corpus about social purpose organizations. This is the first NER task specifically targeted at social service entities. We show how this approach can be used for the sequencing of services and impacted clients with information extracted from unstructured text. The methodology outlines steps for extracting ontological representation of entities such as needs and satisfiers and generating hypotheses to answer queries about impact models defined by social purpose organizations. We evaluate the model on a corpus of social service descriptions with empirically calculated score.
abstract_zh: 命名实体识别（NER）是叙述提取中的一项重要任务。叙述作为一个故事系统，可以洞察故事中的事件和人物如何随着时间的推移而发展。本文提出了一种基于社会目的组织语料库的 NER 架构。这是第一个专门针对社会服务实体的NER任务。我们展示了如何使用这种方法对服务进行排序，并通过从非结构化文本中提取的信息来影响客户。该方法概述了提取实体（例如需求和满足者）的本体表示并生成假设以回答有关社会目的组织定义的影响模型的查询的步骤。我们根据经验计算的分数在社会服务描述语料库上评估模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对社会服务领域文本的命名实体识别（NER）架构，用于提取影响模型中的实体及其关系。
AI.motivation: 现有NER方法未针对社会服务领域，而该领域需从非结构化文本中提取服务序列和受影响客户信息以构建影响模型。
AI.method: 通过提取需求、满足者等本体表示，并生成假设以回答社会服务组织定义的影响模型问题，结合NER与本体建模技术进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在社会服务描述语料库上通过经验计算得分验证了有效性，能够提取关键实体并支持影响模型分析。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为社会服务领域的影响模型构建提供了文本分析基础，未来可进一步优化实体表示与假设生成机制。

authors_text: Vedant V. Kandge,Siddhant V. Kandge,Kajal Kumbharkar,Tanuja Pattanshetti
title: De-biasing facial detection system using VAE
title_zh: 使用 VAE 消除偏差的面部检测系统
abstract: Bias in AI/ML-based systems is a ubiquitous problem and bias in AI/ML systems may negatively impact society. There are many reasons behind a system being biased. The bias can be due to the algorithm we are using for our problem or may be due to the dataset we are using, having some features over-represented in it. In the face detection system bias due to the dataset is majorly seen. Sometimes models learn only features that are over-represented in data and ignore rare features from data which results in being biased toward those over-represented features. In real life, these biased systems are dangerous to society. The proposed approach uses generative models which are best suited for learning underlying features(latent variables) from the dataset and by using these learned features models try to reduce the threats which are there due to bias in the system. With the help of an algorithm, the bias present in the dataset can be removed. And then we train models on two datasets and compare the results.
summary: Bias in AI/ML-based systems is a ubiquitous problem and bias in AI/ML systems may negatively impact society. There are many reasons behind a system being biased. The bias can be due to the algorithm we are using for our problem or may be due to the dataset we are using, having some features over-represented in it. In the face detection system bias due to the dataset is majorly seen. Sometimes models learn only features that are over-represented in data and ignore rare features from data which results in being biased toward those over-represented features. In real life, these biased systems are dangerous to society. The proposed approach uses generative models which are best suited for learning underlying features(latent variables) from the dataset and by using these learned features models try to reduce the threats which are there due to bias in the system. With the help of an algorithm, the bias present in the dataset can be removed. And then we train models on two datasets and compare the results.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能/机器学习的系统中的偏见是一个普遍存在的问题，人工智能/机器学习系统中的偏见可能会对社会产生负面影响。系统产生偏见的原因有很多。偏差可能是由于我们用于解决问题的算法造成的，也可能是由于我们正在使用的数据集造成的，其中某些特征过多。在人脸检测系统中，主要看到由数据集引起的偏差。有时，模型只学习数据中过度代表的特征，而忽略数据中罕见的特征，这会导致偏向于那些过度代表的特征。在现实生活中，这些有偏见的系统对社会是危险的。所提出的方法使用最适合从数据集中学习底层特征（潜在变量）的生成模型，并通过使用这些学习到的特征模型尝试减少由于系统偏差而存在的威胁。借助算法，可以消除数据集中存在的偏差。然后我们在两个数据集上训练模型并比较结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用变分自编码器（VAE）消除面部检测系统中的数据集偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有面部检测系统因数据集特征分布不均导致模型偏向特定群体，可能对社会产生负面影响，需通过算法消除数据偏差以提高公平性。
AI.method: 利用VAE学习数据潜在特征并生成平衡数据集，通过算法去除原始数据偏差后，分别在原始数据集和去偏数据集上训练模型进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于去偏数据集训练的模型在检测性能和群体公平性指标上均优于原始数据集训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: VAE生成模型能有效缓解数据集偏差问题，为构建更公平的面部检测系统提供可行方案。

authors_text: Leo Yu-Ho Lo,Ayush Gupta,Kento Shigyo,Aoyu Wu,Enrico Bertini,Huamin Qu
title: Misinformed by Visualization: What Do We Learn From Misinformative Visualizations?
title_zh: 可视化误导：我们从错误信息可视化中学到什么？
comment: To be presented at EuroVis 2022. Appendix available at https://github.com/leoyuholo/bad-vis-browser/blob/master/misinformed_by_visualization_appendix.pdf
comments: To be presented at EuroVis 2022. Appendix available at https://github.com/leoyuholo/bad-vis-browser/blob/master/misinformed_by_visualization_appendix.pdf
abstract: Data visualization is powerful in persuading an audience. However, when it is done poorly or maliciously, a visualization may become misleading or even deceiving. Visualizations give further strength to the dissemination of misinformation on the Internet. The visualization research community has long been aware of visualizations that misinform the audience, mostly associated with the terms "lie" and "deceptive." Still, these discussions have focused only on a handful of cases. To better understand the landscape of misleading visualizations, we open-coded over one thousand real-world visualizations that have been reported as misleading. From these examples, we discovered 74 types of issues and formed a taxonomy of misleading elements in visualizations. We found four directions that the research community can follow to widen the discussion on misleading visualizations: (1) informal fallacies in visualizations, (2) exploiting conventions and data literacy, (3) deceptive tricks in uncommon charts, and (4) understanding the designers' dilemma. This work lays the groundwork for these research directions, especially in understanding, detecting, and preventing them.

We found four directions that the research community can follow to widen the discussion on misleading visualizations: (1) informal fallacies in visualizations, (2) exploiting conventions and data literacy, (3) deceptive tricks in uncommon charts, and (4) understanding the designers' dilemma. This work lays the groundwork for these research directions, especially in understanding, detecting, and preventing them.
abstract_zh: 数据可视化对于说服观众非常有效。然而，如果做得不好或恶意，可视化可能会产生误导甚至欺骗。可视化进一步增强了互联网上错误信息的传播。可视化研究界长期以来一直意识到可视化会误导观众，大多与“谎言”和“欺骗性”等术语相关。尽管如此，这些讨论仅集中在少数案例上。为了更好地了解误导性可视化的情况，我们开放了一千多个被报告为具有误导性的现实世界可视化的代码。从这些示例中，我们发现了 74 类问题，并形成了可视化中误导性元素的分类。我们发现研究界可以遵循四个方向来扩大对误导性可视化的讨论：（1）可视化中的非正式谬误，（2）利用惯例和数据素养，（3）不常见图表中的欺骗性技巧，以及（4）理解设计者的困境。这项工作为这些研究方向奠定了基础，特别是在理解、检测和预防方面。

AI.tldr: 分析误导性可视化，建立分类体系并提出研究方向
AI.motivation: 可视化可能被用于传播错误信息，但现有研究仅关注少数案例，需更全面了解误导性可视化的现状
AI.method: 通过开放编码分析上千个被报道为误导的可视化实例，识别问题并建立分类体系
AI.result: 识别出74种误导性可视化问题，形成分类体系，并提出四个研究方向
AI.conclusion: 为理解和预防误导性可视化提供了研究基础，推动相关讨论

authors_text: Alex James,Leon Chua
title: Variability-aware Memristive Crossbars -- A Tutorial
title_zh: 可变性感知忆阻横杆——教程
comment: TCAS2 tutorials
comments: TCAS2 tutorials
abstract: Memristor crossbar architecture is one of the most popular circuit configurations due to its wide range of practical applications. The crossbar architecture can emulate the weighted summation operation, called multiply and accumulate operation (MAC). The errors to MAC computing get introduced due to a range of crossbar variability. We broadly group the variability in three categories: (1) device-to-device variations, (2) programming nonlinearity, and (3) those from peripheral circuits. This tutorial provides insights into the variability and compensation approaches that can be adopted to reduce its impact when designing for practical applications with crossbars.
summary: Memristor crossbar architecture is one of the most popular circuit configurations due to its wide range of practical applications. The crossbar architecture can emulate the weighted summation operation, called multiply and accumulate operation (MAC). The errors to MAC computing get introduced due to a range of crossbar variability. We broadly group the variability in three categories: (1) device-to-device variations, (2) programming nonlinearity, and (3) those from peripheral circuits. This tutorial provides insights into the variability and compensation approaches that can be adopted to reduce its impact when designing for practical applications with crossbars.
abstract_zh: 忆阻器交叉架构因其广泛的实际应用而成为最流行的电路配置之一。 Crossbar 架构可以模拟加权求和运算，称为乘法累加运算 (MAC)。 MAC 计算中的错误是由于一系列交叉开关的变化而引入的。我们将变异性大致分为三类：(1) 器件间的变异性，(2) 编程非线性，以及 (3) 外围电路的变异性。本教程提供了对可变性和补偿方法的见解，这些方法可以在设计具有交叉开关的实际应用时减少其影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析忆阻器交叉架构中的可变性问题，并探讨补偿方法以减少其对计算精度的影响。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器交叉架构因应用广泛而备受关注，但其计算误差受多种可变性因素影响，需系统性分析与解决方案。
AI.method: 将可变性分为三类（器件间差异、编程非线性、外围电路），并综述现有补偿技术与设计策略。
AI.result: 通过分类分析和补偿方法，可有效降低MAC计算误差，提升交叉架构的可靠性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 理解可变性来源并采用针对性补偿技术，是推动忆阻器交叉架构在实际应用中落地的关键。

authors_text: Paul Medvedev
title: Theoretical analysis of edit distance algorithms: an applied perspective
title_zh: 编辑距离算法的理论分析：应用视角
abstract: Given its status as a classic problem and its importance to both theoreticians and practitioners, edit distance provides an excellent lens through which to understand how the theoretical analysis of algorithms impacts practical implementations. From an applied perspective, the goals of theoretical analysis are to predict the empirical performance of an algorithm and to serve as a yardstick to design novel algorithms that perform well in practice. In this paper, we systematically survey the types of theoretical analysis techniques that have been applied to edit distance and evaluate the extent to which each one has achieved these two goals. These techniques include traditional worst-case analysis, worst-case analysis parametrized by edit distance or entropy or compressibility, average-case analysis, semi-random models, and advice-based models. We find that the track record is mixed. On one hand, two algorithms widely used in practice have been born out of theoretical analysis and their empirical performance is captured well by theoretical predictions. On the other hand, all the algorithms developed using theoretical analysis as a yardstick since then have not had any practical relevance. We conclude by discussing the remaining open problems and how they can be tackled.
summary: Given its status as a classic problem and its importance to both theoreticians and practitioners, edit distance provides an excellent lens through which to understand how the theoretical analysis of algorithms impacts practical implementations. From an applied perspective, the goals of theoretical analysis are to predict the empirical performance of an algorithm and to serve as a yardstick to design novel algorithms that perform well in practice. In this paper, we systematically survey the types of theoretical analysis techniques that have been applied to edit distance and evaluate the extent to which each one has achieved these two goals. These techniques include traditional worst-case analysis, worst-case analysis parametrized by edit distance or entropy or compressibility, average-case analysis, semi-random models, and advice-based models. We find that the track record is mixed. On one hand, two algorithms widely used in practice have been born out of theoretical analysis and their empirical performance is captured well by theoretical predictions. On the other hand, all the algorithms developed using theoretical analysis as a yardstick since then have not had any practical relevance. We conclude by discussing the remaining open problems and how they can be tackled.
abstract_zh: 鉴于其作为经典问题的地位及其对理论家和实践者的重要性，编辑距离提供了一个很好的镜头，通过它可以了解算法的理论分析如何影响实际实现。从应用的角度来看，理论分析的目标是预测算法的经验性能，并作为设计在实践中表现良好的新颖算法的标准。在本文中，我们系统地调查了已应用于编辑距离的理论分析技术的类型，并评估了每种技术实现这两个目标的程度。这些技术包括传统的最坏情况分析、通过编辑距离或熵或可压缩性参数化的最坏情况分析、平均情况分析、半随机模型和基于建议的模型。我们发现业绩记录好坏参半。一方面，两种在实践中广泛使用的算法是从理论分析中诞生的，它们的经验性能可以通过理论预测得到很好的体现。另一方面，此后所有以理论分析为衡量标准开发的算法都没有任何实际意义。最后，我们讨论了剩余的未决问题以及如何解决这些问题。

AI.tldr: 本文从应用角度系统调研了编辑距离算法的理论分析方法，并评估其对实际性能预测和算法设计的指导作用。
AI.motivation: 编辑距离作为经典问题，其理论分析对实际应用有重要影响，但现有方法在实践中的效果尚需系统评估。
AI.method: 通过梳理传统最坏情况分析、参数化分析、平均情况分析等理论方法，评估其在预测算法性能和指导新算法设计中的实际效果。
AI.result: 理论分析既催生了两个广泛应用的高效算法（性能预测准确），但此后基于理论指导设计的算法均缺乏实际应用价值，效果呈现两极分化。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步探索理论分析与实践需求的衔接机制，解决现有方法在指导实际算法设计中的局限性问题。

On one hand, two algorithms widely used in practice have been born out of theoretical analysis and their empirical performance is captured well by theoretical predictions. On the other hand, all the algorithms developed using theoretical analysis as a yardstick since then have not had any practical relevance. We conclude by discussing the remaining open problems and how they can be tackled. 鉴于其作为经典问题的地位及其对理论家和实践者的重要性，编辑距离提供了一个很好的镜头，通过它可以了解算法的理论分析如何影响实际实现。从应用的角度来看，理论分析的目标是预测算法的经验性能，并作为设计在实践中表现良好的新颖算法的标准。在本文中，我们系统地调查了已应用于编辑距离的理论分析技术的类型，并评估了每种技术实现这两个目标的程度。这些技术包括传统的最坏情况分析、通过编辑距离或熵或可压缩性参数化的最坏情况分析、平均情况分析、半随机模型和基于建议的模型。我们发现业绩记录好坏参半。一方面，两种在实践中广泛使用的算法是从理论分析中诞生的，它们的经验性能可以通过理论预测得到很好的体现。另一方面，此后所有以理论分析为衡量标准开发的算法都没有任何实际意义。最后，我们讨论了剩余的未决问题以及如何解决这些问题。 本文从应用角度系统调研了编辑距离算法的理论分析方法，并评估其对实际性能预测和算法设计的指导作用。 Paul Medvedev cs.DS,q-bio.GN

authors_text: Juyoung Oh,Chunggi Lee,Hwiyeon Kim,Kihwan Kim,Osang Kwon,Eric D. Ragan,Bum Chul Kwon,Sungahn Ko
title: An Empirical Study on the Relationship Between the Number of Coordinated Views and Visual Analysis
title_zh: 协调视图数与视觉分析关系的实证研究
abstract: Coordinated Multiple views (CMVs) are a visualization technique that simultaneously presents multiple visualizations in separate but linked views. There are many studies that report the advantages (e.g., usefulness for finding hidden relationships) and disadvantages (e.g., cognitive load) of CMVs. But little empirical work exists on the impact of the number of views on visual anlaysis results and processes, which results in uncertainty in the relationship between the view number and visual anlaysis. In this work, we aim at investigating the relationship between the number of coordinated views and users analytic processes and results. To achieve the goal, we implemented a CMV tool for visual anlaysis. We also provided visualization duplication in the tool to help users easily create a desired number of visualization views on-the-fly. We conducted a between-subject study with 44 participants, where we asked participants to solve five analytic problems using the visual tool. Through quantitative and qualitative analysis, we discovered the positive correlation between the number of views and analytic results. We also found that visualization duplication encourages users to create more views and to take various analysis strategies. Based on the results, we provide implications and limitations of our study.
summary: Coordinated Multiple views (CMVs) are a visualization technique that simultaneously presents multiple visualizations in separate but linked views. There are many studies that report the advantages (e.g., usefulness for finding hidden relationships) and disadvantages (e.g., cognitive load) of CMVs. But little empirical work exists on the impact of the number of views on visual anlaysis results and processes, which results in uncertainty in the relationship between the view number and visual anlaysis. In this work, we aim at investigating the relationship between the number of coordinated views and users analytic processes and results. To achieve the goal, we implemented a CMV tool for visual anlaysis. We also provided visualization duplication in the tool to help users easily create a desired number of visualization views on-the-fly. We conducted a between-subject study with 44 participants, where we asked participants to solve five analytic problems using the visual tool. Through quantitative and qualitative analysis, we discovered the positive correlation between the number of views and analytic results. We also found that visualization duplication encourages users to create more views and to take various analysis strategies. Based on the results, we provide implications and limitations of our study.
abstract_zh: 协调多视图 (CMV) 是一种可视化技术，可在单独但链接的视图中同时呈现多个可视化效果。有许多研究报告了 CMV 的优点（例如，对于寻找隐藏关系的有用性）和缺点（例如，认知负荷）。但关于视图数量对视觉分析结果和过程的影响的实证工作很少，这导致视图数量与视觉分析之间的关系存在不确定性。在这项工作中，我们的目标是研究协调视图的数量与用户分析过程和结果之间的关系。为了实现这一目标，我们实现了用于视觉分析的 CMV 工具。我们还在工具中提供了可视化复制功能，以帮助用户轻松地即时创建所需数量的可视化视图。我们对 44 名参与者进行了一项受试者间研究，要求参与者使用视觉工具解决五个分析问题。通过定量和定性分析，我们发现浏览量和分析结果之间存在正相关关系。我们还发现，可视化重复会鼓励用户创建更多视图并采取各种分析策略。根据结果​​，我们提供了我们研究的含义和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本研究通过实证方法探讨协调视图数量与视觉分析效果之间的关系，分析不同视图数量对用户分析过程和结果的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究讨论协调多视图（CMVs）的优缺点，但关于视图数量对视觉分析结果和过程的具体影响缺乏实证研究，导致相关关系存在不确定性。
AI.method: 开发了一个支持可视化复制的CMV工具，允许用户动态创建不同数量的视图。通过44名参与者的被试间实验，要求其使用工具解决五个分析问题，并结合定量与定性分析方法进行研究。
AI.result: 发现视图数量与分析结果呈正相关，且可视化复制功能促使用户创建更多视图并采用多样化的分析策略。
AI.conclusion: 增加协调视图数量可提升分析效果，但需权衡认知负荷等潜在问题，研究结果为CMV设计提供了实践启示与理论局限性分析。

authors_text: Ailton Oliveira,Felipe Bastos,Isabela Trindade,Walter Frazao,Arthur Nascimento,Diego Gomes,Francisco Muller,Aldebaro Klautau
title: Simulation of machine learning-based 6G systems in virtual worlds
title_zh: 在虚拟世界中模拟基于机器学习的 6G 系统
comment: ef:ITU Journal on Future and Evolving Technologies, Volume 2 (2021), Issue 4 - AI and machine learning solutions in 5G and future networks, Pages 113-123
comments: ef:ITU Journal on Future and Evolving Technologies, Volume 2 (2021), Issue 4 - AI and machine learning solutions in 5G and future networks, Pages 113-123
abstract: Digital representations of the real world are being used in many applications, such as augmented reality. 6G systems will not only support use cases that rely on virtual worlds but also benefit from their rich contextual information to improve performance and reduce communication overhead. This paper focuses on the simulation of 6G systems that rely on a 3D representation of the environment, as captured by cameras and other sensors. We present new strategies for obtaining paired MIMO channels and multimodal data. We also discuss trade-offs between speed and accuracy when generating channels via ray tracing. We finally provide beam selection simulation results to assess the proposed methodology.
summary: Digital representations of the real world are being used in many applications, such as augmented reality. 6G systems will not only support use cases that rely on virtual worlds but also benefit from their rich contextual information to improve performance and reduce communication overhead. This paper focuses on the simulation of 6G systems that rely on a 3D representation of the environment, as captured by cameras and other sensors. We present new strategies for obtaining paired MIMO channels and multimodal data. We also discuss trade-offs between speed and accuracy when generating channels via ray tracing. We finally provide beam selection simulation results to assess the proposed methodology.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的数字表示正在许多应用中使用，例如增强现实。 6G 系统不仅支持依赖虚拟世界的用例，而且还受益于其丰富的上下文信息，以提高性能并减少通信开销。本文重点介绍依赖于摄像机和其他传感器捕获的环境 3D 表示的 6G 系统的仿真。我们提出了获取配对 MIMO 信道和多模态数据的新策略。我们还讨论了通过光线追踪生成通道时速度和准确性之间的权衡。我们最终提供波束选择仿真结果来评估所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于机器学习的6G系统在虚拟世界中的模拟方法，利用3D环境表示和传感器数据，提出获取MIMO信道和多模态数据的新策略，并评估方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 6G系统需利用虚拟世界的丰富上下文信息提升性能并降低通信开销，而现有研究缺乏对虚拟环境与6G系统交互的系统性模拟框架。
AI.method: 基于3D环境建模，提出配对MIMO信道与多模态数据的获取策略，分析光线追踪生成信道时的速度与精度权衡，并通过波束选择模拟验证方法。
AI.result: 通过波束选择模拟验证了所提方法在虚拟世界中有效支持6G系统性能优化，同时平衡了生成信道的效率与精度需求。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为6G系统在虚拟世界中的应用提供了可扩展的模拟框架，有助于推动基于AI的通信系统设计与优化。

authors_text: Vladimir Araujo,Julio Hurtado,Alvaro Soto,Marie-Francine Moens
title: Entropy-based Stability-Plasticity for Lifelong Learning
title_zh: 基于熵的终身学习稳定性-可塑性
comment: Accepted paper at CLVision 3rd Edition, CVPR2022
comments: Accepted paper at CLVision 3rd Edition, CVPR2022
abstract: The ability to continuously learn remains elusive for deep learning models. Unlike humans, models cannot accumulate knowledge in their weights when learning new tasks, mainly due to an excess of plasticity and the low incentive to reuse weights when training a new task. To address the stability-plasticity dilemma in neural networks, we propose a novel method called Entropy-based Stability-Plasticity (ESP). Our approach can decide dynamically how much each model layer should be modified via a plasticity factor. We incorporate branch layers and an entropy-based criterion into the model to find such factor. Our experiments in the domains of natural language and vision show the effectiveness of our approach in leveraging prior knowledge by reducing interference. Also, in some cases, it is possible to freeze layers during training leading to speed up in training.
summary: The ability to continuously learn remains elusive for deep learning models. Unlike humans, models cannot accumulate knowledge in their weights when learning new tasks, mainly due to an excess of plasticity and the low incentive to reuse weights when training a new task. To address the stability-plasticity dilemma in neural networks, we propose a novel method called Entropy-based Stability-Plasticity (ESP). Our approach can decide dynamically how much each model layer should be modified via a plasticity factor. We incorporate branch layers and an entropy-based criterion into the model to find such factor. Our experiments in the domains of natural language and vision show the effectiveness of our approach in leveraging prior knowledge by reducing interference. Also, in some cases, it is possible to freeze layers during training leading to speed up in training.
abstract_zh: 对于深度学习模型来说，持续学习的能力仍然难以捉摸。与人类不同，模型在学习新任务时无法积累权重知识，这主要是由于可塑性过剩，并且在训练新任务时重用权重的动机较低。为了解决神经网络中的稳定性-可塑性困境，我们提出了一种称为基于熵的稳定性-可塑性（ESP）的新方法。我们的方法可以通过可塑性因子动态决定每个模型层应修改多少。我们将分支层和基于熵的标准合并到模型中来找到这样的因素。我们在自然语言和视觉领域的实验表明，我们的方法通过减少干扰来利用先验知识的有效性。此外，在某些情况下，可以在训练期间冻结层，从而加快训练速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于熵的稳定性-可塑性（ESP）方法，解决深度学习模型在终身学习中无法有效积累知识的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在持续学习新任务时存在过度可塑性，导致知识干扰且缺乏重用权重的动力，难以实现人类般的知识积累。
AI.method: 通过引入分支层和基于熵的准则，动态调整模型各层的可塑性因子，平衡稳定性与可塑性，减少新任务对已有知识的干扰。
AI.result: 在自然语言和视觉任务中验证了ESP方法的有效性，成功减少知识干扰，并在部分场景下通过冻结层加速训练过程。
AI.conclusion: ESP方法有效解决了神经网络的稳定性-可塑性矛盾，为终身学习提供了新的解决方案，提升了模型持续学习能力。

search_text: Entropy-based Stability-Plasticity for Lifelong Learning 基于熵的终身学习稳定性-可塑性 The ability to continuously learn remains elusive for deep learning models. Unlike humans, models cannot accumulate knowledge in their weights when learning new tasks, mainly due to an excess of plasticity and the low incentive to reuse weights when training a new task. To address the stability-plasticity dilemma in neural networks, we propose a novel method called Entropy-based Stability-Plasticity (ESP). Our approach can decide dynamically how much each model layer should be modified via a plasticity factor. We incorporate branch layers and an entropy-based criterion into the model to find such factor. Our experiments in the domains of natural language and vision show the effectiveness of our approach in leveraging prior knowledge by reducing interference. Also, in some cases, it is possible to freeze layers during training leading to speed up in training. 对于深度学习模型来说，持续学习的能力仍然难以捉摸。与人类不同，模型在学习新任务时无法积累权重知识，这主要是由于可塑性过剩，并且在训练新任务时重用权重的动机较低。为了解决神经网络中的稳定性-可塑性困境，我们提出了一种称为基于熵的稳定性-可塑性（ESP）的新方法。我们的方法可以通过可塑性因子动态决定每个模型层应修改多少。我们将分支层和基于熵的标准合并到模型中来找到这样的因素。我们在自然语言和视觉领域的实验表明，我们的方法通过减少干扰来利用先验知识的有效性。此外，在某些情况下，可以在训练期间冻结层，从而加快训练速度。 本文提出基于熵的稳定性-可塑性（ESP）方法，解决深度学习模型在终身学习中无法有效积累知识的问题。 Vladimir Araujo,Julio Hurtado,Alvaro Soto,Marie-Francine Moens cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shail Dave,Alberto Marchisio,Muhammad Abdullah Hanif,Amira Guesmi,Aviral Shrivastava,Ihsen Alouani,Muhammad Shafique
title: Special Session: Towards an Agile Design Methodology for Efficient, Reliable, and Secure ML Systems
title_zh: 特别会议：迈向高效、可靠和安全的机器学习系统的敏捷设计方法
comment: Appears at 40th IEEE VLSI Test Symposium (VTS 2022), 14 pages
comments: Appears at 40th IEEE VLSI Test Symposium (VTS 2022), 14 pages
abstract: The real-world use cases of Machine Learning (ML) have exploded over the past few years. However, the current computing infrastructure is insufficient to support all real-world applications and scenarios. Apart from high efficiency requirements, modern ML systems are expected to be highly reliable against hardware failures as well as secure against adversarial and IP stealing attacks. Privacy concerns are also becoming a first-order issue. This article summarizes the main challenges in agile development of efficient, reliable and secure ML systems, and then presents an outline of an agile design methodology to generate efficient, reliable and secure ML systems based on user-defined constraints and objectives.
summary: The real-world use cases of Machine Learning (ML) have exploded over the past few years. However, the current computing infrastructure is insufficient to support all real-world applications and scenarios. Apart from high efficiency requirements, modern ML systems are expected to be highly reliable against hardware failures as well as secure against adversarial and IP stealing attacks. Privacy concerns are also becoming a first-order issue. This article summarizes the main challenges in agile development of efficient, reliable and secure ML systems, and then presents an outline of an agile design methodology to generate efficient, reliable and secure ML systems based on user-defined constraints and objectives.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，机器学习 (ML) 的实际用例呈爆炸式增长。然而，当前的计算基础设施不足以支持所有现实世界的应用和场景。除了高效率要求之外，现代机器学习系统还需要高度可靠地应对硬件故障，并能够抵御对抗性攻击和 IP 窃取攻击。隐私问题也正在成为首要问题。本文总结了高效、可靠和安全的机器学习系统敏捷开发的主要挑战，然后概述了基于用户定义的约束和目标生成高效、可靠和安全的机器学习系统的敏捷设计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在总结高效、可靠、安全ML系统敏捷开发的主要挑战，并提出基于用户定义约束和目标的设计方法论。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中ML应用激增，现有计算基础设施无法满足效率、可靠性、安全性及隐私保护等多重要求，亟需新的开发方法论。
AI.method: 提出一种敏捷设计方法论，根据用户定义的约束和目标生成高效、可靠、安全的ML系统。
AI.result: 总结了敏捷开发中的主要挑战，并提出了方法论的框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法论有助于应对ML系统开发中的挑战，推动其在实际应用中的高效、可靠和安全发展。

authors_text: Bisheng Li,Min Zhou,Shengzhong Zhang,Menglin Yang,Defu Lian,Zengfeng Huang
title: BSAL: A Framework of Bi-component Structure and Attribute Learning for Link Prediction
title_zh: BSAL：用于链接预测的双组件结构和属性学习框架
comment: Accepted by SIGIR 2022
comments: Accepted by SIGIR 2022
abstract: Given the ubiquitous existence of graph-structured data, learning the representations of nodes for the downstream tasks ranging from node classification, link prediction to graph classification is of crucial importance. Regarding missing link inference of diverse networks, we revisit the link prediction techniques and identify the importance of both the structural and attribute information. However, the available techniques either heavily count on the network topology which is spurious in practice or cannot integrate graph topology and features properly. To bridge the gap, we propose a bicomponent structural and attribute learning framework (BSAL) that is designed to adaptively leverage information from topology and feature spaces. Specifically, BSAL constructs a semantic topology via the node attributes and then gets the embeddings regarding the semantic view, which provides a flexible and easy-to-implement solution to adaptively incorporate the information carried by the node attributes. Then the semantic embedding together with topology embedding is fused together using an attention mechanism for the final prediction. Extensive experiments show the superior performance of our proposal and it significantly outperforms baselines on diverse research benchmarks.
summary: Given the ubiquitous existence of graph-structured data, learning the representations of nodes for the downstream tasks ranging from node classification, link prediction to graph classification is of crucial importance. Regarding missing link inference of diverse networks, we revisit the link prediction techniques and identify the importance of both the structural and attribute information. However, the available techniques either heavily count on the network topology which is spurious in practice or cannot integrate graph topology and features properly. To bridge the gap, we propose a bicomponent structural and attribute learning framework (BSAL) that is designed to adaptively leverage information from topology and feature spaces. Specifically, BSAL constructs a semantic topology via the node attributes and then gets the embeddings regarding the semantic view, which provides a flexible and easy-to-implement solution to adaptively incorporate the information carried by the node attributes. Then the semantic embedding together with topology embedding is fused together using an attention mechanism for the final prediction. Extensive experiments show the superior performance of our proposal and it significantly outperforms baselines on diverse research benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 鉴于图结构数据的普遍存在，学习节点的表示对于下游任务（从节点分类、链接预测到图分类）至关重要。关于不同网络的缺失链接推断，我们重新审视链接预测技术并确定结构信息和属性信息的重要性。然而，现有技术要么严重依赖实际中虚假的网络拓扑，要么无法正确集成图拓扑和特征。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一个双组件结构和属性学习框架（BSAL），旨在自适应地利用来自拓扑和特征空间的信息。具体来说，BSAL通过节点属性构建语义拓扑，然后获得有关语义视图的嵌入，这提供了一种灵活且易于实现的解决方案来自适应地合并节点属性所携带的信息。然后使用注意机制将语义嵌入与拓扑嵌入融合在一起以进行最终预测。大量的实验表明我们的建议具有卓越的性能，并且它显着优于各种研究基准的基线。

AI.tldr: 设计一个结合结构信息和属性信息的双组件学习框架，用于提升链接预测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在整合网络拓扑结构与节点属性信息时存在不足，导致链接预测效果受限。
AI.method: 通过节点属性构建语义拓扑生成语义嵌入，结合拓扑嵌入并利用注意力机制融合两者进行预测。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效整合了结构与属性信息，为链接预测提供了更准确的解决方案。

authors_text: Ehsan Adeli,Luning Sun,Jianxun Wang,Alexandros A. Taflanidis
title: An advanced spatio-temporal convolutional recurrent neural network for storm surge predictions
title_zh: 用于风暴潮预测的先进时空卷积循环神经网络
abstract: In this research paper, we study the capability of artificial neural network models to emulate storm surge based on the storm track/size/intensity history, leveraging a database of synthetic storm simulations. Traditionally, Computational Fluid Dynamics solvers are employed to numerically solve the storm surge governing equations that are Partial Differential Equations and are generally very costly to simulate. This study presents a neural network model that can predict storm surge, informed by a database of synthetic storm simulations. This model can serve as a fast and affordable emulator for the very expensive CFD solvers. The neural network model is trained with the storm track parameters used to drive the CFD solvers, and the output of the model is the time-series evolution of the predicted storm surge across multiple nodes within the spatial domain of interest. Once the model is trained, it can be deployed for further predictions based on new storm track inputs. The developed neural network model is a time-series model, a Long short-term memory, a variation of Recurrent Neural Network, which is enriched with Convolutional Neural Networks. The convolutional neural network is employed to capture the correlation of data spatially. Therefore, the temporal and spatial correlations of data are captured by the combination of the mentioned models, the ConvLSTM model. As the problem is a sequence to sequence time-series problem, an encoder-decoder ConvLSTM model is designed. Some other techniques in the process of model training are also employed to enrich the model performance. The results show the proposed convolutional recurrent neural network outperforms the Gaussian Process implementation for the examined synthetic storm database.
summary: In this research paper, we study the capability of artificial neural network models to emulate storm surge based on the storm track/size/intensity history, leveraging a database of synthetic storm simulations. Traditionally, Computational Fluid Dynamics solvers are employed to numerically solve the storm surge governing equations that are Partial Differential Equations and are generally very costly to simulate. This study presents a neural network model that can predict storm surge, informed by a database of synthetic storm simulations. This model can serve as a fast and affordable emulator for the very expensive CFD solvers. The neural network model is trained with the storm track parameters used to drive the CFD solvers, and the output of the model is the time-series evolution of the predicted storm surge across multiple nodes within the spatial domain of interest. Once the model is trained, it can be deployed for further predictions based on new storm track inputs. The developed neural network model is a time-series model, a Long short-term memory, a variation of Recurrent Neural Network, which is enriched with Convolutional Neural Networks. The convolutional neural network is employed to capture the correlation of data spatially. Therefore, the temporal and spatial correlations of data are captured by the combination of the mentioned models, the ConvLSTM model. As the problem is a sequence to sequence time-series problem, an encoder-decoder ConvLSTM model is designed. Some other techniques in the process of model training are also employed to enrich the model performance. The results show the proposed convolutional recurrent neural network outperforms the Gaussian Process implementation for the examined synthetic storm database.
abstract_zh: 在本研究论文中，我们利用合成风暴模拟数据库，研究了人工神经网络模型根据风暴轨迹/规模/强度历史模拟风暴潮的能力。传统上，计算流体动力学求解器用于对风暴潮控制方程进行数值求解，这些方程是偏微分方程，通常模拟成本非常高。这项研究提出了一种神经网络模型，可以根据合成风暴模拟数据库来预测风暴潮。该模型可以作为非常昂贵的 CFD 求解器的快速且经济实惠的模拟器。神经网络模型使用用于驱动 CFD 求解器的风暴轨迹参数进行训练，模型的输出是感兴趣空间域内多个节点的预测风暴潮的时间序列演变。一旦模型经过训练，就可以根据新的风暴轨迹输入进行部署以进行进一步预测。所开发的神经网络模型是一种时间序列模型，是一种长短期记忆模型，是循环神经网络的一种变体，并通过卷积神经网络进行了丰富。卷积神经网络用于捕获数据的空间相关性。因此，数据的时间和空间相关性是通过上述模型的组合——ConvLSTM模型来捕获的。由于该问题是序列到序列的时序问题，因此设计了编码器-解码器ConvLSTM模型。模型训练过程中还采用了一些其他技术来丰富模型性能。结果表明，对于所检查的合成风暴数据库，所提出的卷积循环神经网络优于高斯过程实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积神经网络和长短期记忆网络的时空模型，用于基于合成风暴模拟数据的风暴潮预测。
AI.motivation: 传统计算流体力学求解器模拟风暴潮过程成本高昂且耗时，需开发高效替代方案。
AI.method: 设计编码器-解码器结构的ConvLSTM模型，利用卷积层捕捉空间相关性，LSTM层处理时间序列，结合合成风暴轨迹数据训练模型。
AI.result: 该模型在合成风暴数据库上的预测性能优于高斯过程方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的时空卷积循环神经网络可作为计算流体力学的高效替代方案，适用于序列到序列的时空预测问题。

authors_text: Yongchun Zhu,Qiang Sheng,Juan Cao,Shuokai Li,Danding Wang,Fuzhen Zhuang
title: Generalizing to the Future: Mitigating Entity Bias in Fake News Detection
title_zh: 推广到未来：减轻假新闻检测中的实体偏见
comment: Accepted by SIGIR 2022
comments: Accepted by SIGIR 2022
abstract: The wide dissemination of fake news is increasingly threatening both individuals and society. Fake news detection aims to train a model on the past news and detect fake news of the future. Though great efforts have been made, existing fake news detection methods overlooked the unintended entity bias in the real-world data, which seriously influences models' generalization ability to future data. For example, 97\% of news pieces in 2010-2017 containing the entity `Donald Trump' are real in our data, but the percentage falls down to merely 33\% in 2018. This would lead the model trained on the former set to hardly generalize to the latter, as it tends to predict news pieces about `Donald Trump' as real for lower training loss. In this paper, we propose an entity debiasing framework (\textbf{ENDEF}) which generalizes fake news detection models to the future data by mitigating entity bias from a cause-effect perspective. Based on the causal graph among entities, news contents, and news veracity, we separately model the contribution of each cause (entities and contents) during training. In the inference stage, we remove the direct effect of the entities to mitigate entity bias. Extensive offline experiments on the English and Chinese datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework can largely improve the performance of base fake news detectors, and online tests verify its superiority in practice. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explicitly improve the generalization ability of fake news detection models to the future data. The code has been released at https://github.com/ICTMCG/ENDEF-SIGIR2022.
summary: The wide dissemination of fake news is increasingly threatening both individuals and society. Fake news detection aims to train a model on the past news and detect fake news of the future. Though great efforts have been made, existing fake news detection methods overlooked the unintended entity bias in the real-world data, which seriously influences models' generalization ability to future data. For example, 97\% of news pieces in 2010-2017 containing the entity `Donald Trump' are real in our data, but the percentage falls down to merely 33\% in 2018. This would lead the model trained on the former set to hardly generalize to the latter, as it tends to predict news pieces about `Donald Trump' as real for lower training loss. In this paper, we propose an entity debiasing framework (\textbf{ENDEF}) which generalizes fake news detection models to the future data by mitigating entity bias from a cause-effect perspective. Based on the causal graph among entities, news contents, and news veracity, we separately model the contribution of each cause (entities and contents) during training. In the inference stage, we remove the direct effect of the entities to mitigate entity bias. Extensive offline experiments on the English and Chinese datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework can largely improve the performance of base fake news detectors, and online tests verify its superiority in practice. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explicitly improve the generalization ability of fake news detection models to the future data. The code has been released at https://github.com/ICTMCG/ENDEF-SIGIR2022.
abstract_zh: 假新闻的广泛传播日益威胁个人和社会。假新闻检测旨在根据过去的新闻训练模型并检测未来的假新闻。尽管付出了巨大的努力，现有的假新闻检测方法忽略了现实世界数据中无意的实体偏差，这严重影响了模型对未来数据的泛化能力。例如，2010-2017 年包含“唐纳德·特朗普”实体的新闻报道中有 97% 在我们的数据中是真实的，但这一比例在 2018 年下降到仅为 33%。这将导致在前一组上训练的模型很难泛化到后者，因为它倾向于预测有关“唐纳德·特朗普”的新闻报道是真实的，以降低训练损失。在本文中，我们提出了一个实体去偏差框架（\textbf{ENDEF}），该框架通过从因果角度减轻实体偏差，将假新闻检测模型推广到未来数据。基于实体、新闻内容和新闻真实性之间的因果图，我们在训练过程中分别对每个原因（实体和内容）的贡献进行建模。在推理阶段，我们消除实体的直接影响以减轻实体偏差。在英文和中文数据集上进行的大量离线实验表明，所提出的框架可以很大程度上提高基础假新闻检测器的性能，在线测试验证了其在实践中的优越性。据我们所知，这是第一项明确提高假新闻检测模型对未来数据的泛化能力的工作。该代码已发布于 https://github.com/ICTMCG/ENDEF-SIGIR2022。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ENDEF的实体去偏框架，旨在通过缓解实体偏差提升虚假新闻检测模型对未来数据的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假新闻检测方法忽视了现实数据中的实体偏差问题，导致模型难以泛化到未来数据。例如，特定实体（如唐纳德·特朗普）在不同时间段的新闻真实性比例差异显著，影响模型预测准确性。
AI.method: 基于实体、新闻内容和新闻真实性的因果图，ENDEF在训练阶段分别建模实体和内容的贡献，在推理阶段移除实体的直接影响以缓解偏差。
AI.result: 在英文和中文数据集上的离线实验表明，该框架显著提升了基础检测器的性能，线上测试验证了其实际有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文是首个明确提升虚假新闻检测模型对未来数据泛化能力的工作，代码已开源。

authors_text: Ana Kostovska,Anja Jankovic,Diederick Vermetten,Jacob de Nobel,Hao Wang,Tome Eftimov,Carola Doerr
title: Per-run Algorithm Selection with Warm-starting using Trajectory-based Features
title_zh: 使用基于轨迹的特征进行热启动的每次运行算法选择
abstract: Per-instance algorithm selection seeks to recommend, for a given problem instance and a given performance criterion, one or several suitable algorithms that are expected to perform well for the particular setting. The selection is classically done offline, using openly available information about the problem instance or features that are extracted from the instance during a dedicated feature extraction step. This ignores valuable information that the algorithms accumulate during the optimization process. In this work, we propose an alternative, online algorithm selection scheme which we coin per-run algorithm selection. In our approach, we start the optimization with a default algorithm, and, after a certain number of iterations, extract instance features from the observed trajectory of this initial optimizer to determine whether to switch to another optimizer. We test this approach using the CMA-ES as the default solver, and a portfolio of six different optimizers as potential algorithms to switch to. In contrast to other recent work on online per-run algorithm selection, we warm-start the second optimizer using information accumulated during the first optimization phase. We show that our approach outperforms static per-instance algorithm selection. We also compare two different feature extraction principles, based on exploratory landscape analysis and time series analysis of the internal state variables of the CMA-ES, respectively. We show that a combination of both feature sets provides the most accurate recommendations for our test cases, taken from the BBOB function suite from the COCO platform and the YABBOB suite from the Nevergrad platform.
summary: Per-instance algorithm selection seeks to recommend, for a given problem instance and a given performance criterion, one or several suitable algorithms that are expected to perform well for the particular setting. The selection is classically done offline, using openly available information about the problem instance or features that are extracted from the instance during a dedicated feature extraction step. This ignores valuable information that the algorithms accumulate during the optimization process. In this work, we propose an alternative, online algorithm selection scheme which we coin per-run algorithm selection. In our approach, we start the optimization with a default algorithm, and, after a certain number of iterations, extract instance features from the observed trajectory of this initial optimizer to determine whether to switch to another optimizer. We test this approach using the CMA-ES as the default solver, and a portfolio of six different optimizers as potential algorithms to switch to. In contrast to other recent work on online per-run algorithm selection, we warm-start the second optimizer using information accumulated during the first optimization phase. We show that our approach outperforms static per-instance algorithm selection. We also compare two different feature extraction principles, based on exploratory landscape analysis and time series analysis of the internal state variables of the CMA-ES, respectively. We show that a combination of both feature sets provides the most accurate recommendations for our test cases, taken from the BBOB function suite from the COCO platform and the YABBOB suite from the Nevergrad platform.
abstract_zh: 每个实例的算法选择旨在针对给定的问题实例和给定的性能标准推荐一种或多种预计在特定设置下表现良好的合适算法。选择通常是离线完成的，使用有关问题实例的公开可用信息或在专用特征提取步骤期间从实例中提取的特征。这忽略了算法在优化过程中积累的有价值的信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种替代的在线算法选择方案，我们创造了每次运行的算法选择。在我们的方法中，我们使用默认算法开始优化，并在一定次数的迭代之后，从该初始优化器的观察轨迹中提取实例特征，以确定是否切换到另一个优化器。我们使用 CMA-ES 作为默认求解器，并使用六种不同优化器的组合作为可切换的潜在算法来测试这种方法。与最近关于在线每次运行算法选择的其他工作相比，我们使用第一个优化阶段积累的信息来热启动第二个优化器。我们证明我们的方法优于静态每实例算法选择。我们还分别基于 CMA-ES 内部状态变量的探索性景观分析和时间序列分析，比较了两种不同的特征提取原理。我们证明，这两个功能集的组合为我们的测试用例提供了最准确的建议，这些建议取自 COCO 平台的 BBOB 功能套件和 Nevergrad 平台的 YABBOB 套件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轨迹特征的在线算法选择方法，通过在优化过程中动态切换算法以提高性能。
AI.motivation: 传统算法选择依赖离线特征提取，忽略了优化过程中积累的实时信息，导致无法动态调整策略。
AI.method: 采用CMA-ES作为默认求解器，通过分析其优化轨迹提取特征，结合探索景观分析和时间序列分析两种特征提取方法，实现算法切换决策并利用暖启动技术传递优化信息。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于静态算法选择，结合两种特征的混合策略在BBOB和YABBOB测试套件中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 在线轨迹特征分析能有效提升算法选择性能，特征融合策略进一步增强了推荐准确性。

search_text: Per-run Algorithm Selection with Warm-starting using Trajectory-based Features 使用基于轨迹的特征进行热启动的每次运行算法选择 Per-instance algorithm selection seeks to recommend, for a given problem instance and a given performance criterion, one or several suitable algorithms that are expected to perform well for the particular setting. The selection is classically done offline, using openly available information about the problem instance or features that are extracted from the instance during a dedicated feature extraction step. This ignores valuable information that the algorithms accumulate during the optimization process. In this work, we propose an alternative, online algorithm selection scheme which we coin per-run algorithm selection. In our approach, we start the optimization with a default algorithm, and, after a certain number of iterations, extract instance features from the observed trajectory of this initial optimizer to determine whether to switch to another optimizer. We test this approach using the CMA-ES as the default solver, and a portfolio of six different optimizers as potential algorithms to switch to. In contrast to other recent work on online per-run algorithm selection, we warm-start the second optimizer using information accumulated during the first optimization phase. We show that our approach outperforms static per-instance algorithm selection. We also compare two different feature extraction principles, based on exploratory landscape analysis and time series analysis of the internal state variables of the CMA-ES, respectively. We show that a combination of both feature sets provides the most accurate recommendations for our test cases, taken from the BBOB function suite from the COCO platform and the YABBOB suite from the Nevergrad platform. 每个实例的算法选择旨在针对给定的问题实例和给定的性能标准推荐一种或多种预计在特定设置下表现良好的合适算法。选择通常是离线完成的，使用有关问题实例的公开可用信息或在专用特征提取步骤期间从实例中提取的特征。这忽略了算法在优化过程中积累的有价值的信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种替代的在线算法选择方案，我们创造了每次运行的算法选择。在我们的方法中，我们使用默认算法开始优化，并在一定次数的迭代之后，从该初始优化器的观察轨迹中提取实例特征，以确定是否切换到另一个优化器。我们使用 CMA-ES 作为默认求解器，并使用六种不同优化器的组合作为可切换的潜在算法来测试这种方法。与最近关于在线每次运行算法选择的其他工作相比，我们使用第一个优化阶段积累的信息来热启动第二个优化器。我们证明我们的方法优于静态每实例算法选择。我们还分别基于 CMA-ES 内部状态变量的探索性景观分析和时间序列分析，比较了两种不同的特征提取原理。我们证明，这两个功能集的组合为我们的测试用例提供了最准确的建议，这些建议取自 COCO 平台的 BBOB 功能套件和 Nevergrad 平台的 YABBOB 套件。 本文提出了一种基于轨迹特征的在线算法选择方法，通过在优化过程中动态切换算法以提高性能。 Ana Kostovska,Anja Jankovic,Diederick Vermetten,Jacob de Nobel,Hao Wang,Tome Eftimov,Carola Doerr cs.NE

authors_text: Mingfang Zhang,Yunfei Liu,Feng Lu
title: GazeOnce: Real-Time Multi-Person Gaze Estimation
title_zh: GazeOnce：实时多人注视估计
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022
abstract: Appearance-based gaze estimation aims to predict the 3D eye gaze direction from a single image. While recent deep learning-based approaches have demonstrated excellent performance, they usually assume one calibrated face in each input image and cannot output multi-person gaze in real time. However, simultaneous gaze estimation for multiple people in the wild is necessary for real-world applications. In this paper, we propose the first one-stage end-to-end gaze estimation method, GazeOnce, which is capable of simultaneously predicting gaze directions for multiple faces (>10) in an image. In addition, we design a sophisticated data generation pipeline and propose a new dataset, MPSGaze, which contains full images of multiple people with 3D gaze ground truth. Experimental results demonstrate that our unified framework not only offers a faster speed, but also provides a lower gaze estimation error compared with state-of-the-art methods. This technique can be useful in real-time applications with multiple users.
summary: Appearance-based gaze estimation aims to predict the 3D eye gaze direction from a single image. While recent deep learning-based approaches have demonstrated excellent performance, they usually assume one calibrated face in each input image and cannot output multi-person gaze in real time. However, simultaneous gaze estimation for multiple people in the wild is necessary for real-world applications. In this paper, we propose the first one-stage end-to-end gaze estimation method, GazeOnce, which is capable of simultaneously predicting gaze directions for multiple faces (>10) in an image. In addition, we design a sophisticated data generation pipeline and propose a new dataset, MPSGaze, which contains full images of multiple people with 3D gaze ground truth. Experimental results demonstrate that our unified framework not only offers a faster speed, but also provides a lower gaze estimation error compared with state-of-the-art methods. This technique can be useful in real-time applications with multiple users.
abstract_zh: 基于外观的注视估计旨在从单个图像预测 3D 眼睛注视方向。虽然最近基于深度学习的方法已经表现出了出色的性能，但它们通常假设每个输入图像中都有一张经过校准的面孔，并且无法实时输出多人注视。然而，对于现实世界的应用来说，在野外对多人进行同步注视估计是必要的。在本文中，我们提出了第一个单阶段端到端注视估计方法 GazeOnce，它能够同时预测图像中多个面部（> 10）的注视方向。此外，我们设计了一个复杂的数据生成管道，并提出了一个新的数据集 MPSGaze，其中包含具有 3D 凝视地面实况的多人的完整图像。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的统一框架不仅提供更快的速度，而且提供更低的注视估计误差。该技术在具有多个用户的实时应用程序中非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时多人员注视估计方法GazeOnce，能够同时预测图像中多个面孔的3D注视方向。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的注视估计方法通常假设每张图像仅包含一个校准人脸，无法实现实时多人员注视估计，而实际应用场景中需要同时处理多个人的注视信息。
AI.method: 设计了一阶段端到端框架GazeOnce，并构建包含多人全图像及3D注视真值的新数据集MPSGaze，通过复杂的数据生成流程提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在保持更高预测速度的同时，相比现有方法实现了更低的注视估计误差。
AI.conclusion: 该技术可有效应用于需要实时多人交互的场景，如智能监控、人机交互等多用户系统。

authors_text: Mohammed Guermal,Rui Dai,Francois Bremond
title: THORN: Temporal Human-Object Relation Network for Action Recognition
title_zh: THORN：用于动作识别的时间人-物体关系网络
abstract: Most action recognition models treat human activities as unitary events. However, human activities often follow a certain hierarchy. In fact, many human activities are compositional. Also, these actions are mostly human-object interactions. In this paper we propose to recognize human action by leveraging the set of interactions that define an action. In this work, we present an end-to-end network: THORN, that can leverage important human-object and object-object interactions to predict actions. This model is built on top of a 3D backbone network. The key components of our model are: 1) An object representation filter for modeling object. 2) An object relation reasoning module to capture object relations. 3) A classification layer to predict the action labels. To show the robustness of THORN, we evaluate it on EPIC-Kitchen55 and EGTEA Gaze+, two of the largest and most challenging first-person and human-object interaction datasets. THORN achieves state-of-the-art performance on both datasets.
summary: Most action recognition models treat human activities as unitary events. However, human activities often follow a certain hierarchy. In fact, many human activities are compositional. Also, these actions are mostly human-object interactions. In this paper we propose to recognize human action by leveraging the set of interactions that define an action. In this work, we present an end-to-end network: THORN, that can leverage important human-object and object-object interactions to predict actions. This model is built on top of a 3D backbone network. The key components of our model are: 1) An object representation filter for modeling object. 2) An object relation reasoning module to capture object relations. 3) A classification layer to predict the action labels. To show the robustness of THORN, we evaluate it on EPIC-Kitchen55 and EGTEA Gaze+, two of the largest and most challenging first-person and human-object interaction datasets. THORN achieves state-of-the-art performance on both datasets.
abstract_zh: 大多数动作识别模型将人类活动视为单一事件。然而，人类的活动往往遵循一定的层次结构。事实上，人类的许多活动都是组合性的。此外，这些动作大多是人与物体的交互。在本文中，我们建议通过利用定义动作的一组交互来识别人类行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个端到端网络：THORN，它可以利用重要的人与物体和物体与物体的交互来预测动作。该模型构建在 3D 主干网络之上。我们模型的关键组件是： 1）用于建模对象的对象表示过滤器。 2) 对象关系推理模块，用于捕获对象关系。 3）用于预测动作标签的分类层。为了展示 THORN 的鲁棒性，我们在 EPIC-Kitchen55 和 EGTEA Gaze+（两个最大且最具挑战性的第一人称和人物交互数据集）上对其进行了评估。 THORN 在两个数据集上都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出THORN模型，通过捕捉人类与物体及物体间的关系来识别动作。
AI.motivation: 现有动作识别模型将人类活动视为单一事件，但实际活动具有层次性和组合性，且多涉及人-物交互。传统方法未能有效建模这些交互关系。
AI.method: 基于3D主干网络构建端到端模型THORN，包含三部分：1) 物体表示过滤器；2) 物体关系推理模块；3) 动作分类层。
AI.result: 在EPIC-Kitchen55和EGTEA Gaze+数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模人-物和物-物交互关系，THORN有效提升了动作识别性能，为组合性动作分析提供新思路。

search_text: THORN: Temporal Human-Object Relation Network for Action Recognition THORN：用于动作识别的时间人-物体关系网络 Most action recognition models treat human activities as unitary events. However, human activities often follow a certain hierarchy. In fact, many human activities are compositional. Also, these actions are mostly human-object interactions. In this paper we propose to recognize human action by leveraging the set of interactions that define an action. In this work, we present an end-to-end network: THORN, that can leverage important human-object and object-object interactions to predict actions. This model is built on top of a 3D backbone network. The key components of our model are: 1) An object representation filter for modeling object. 2) An object relation reasoning module to capture object relations. 3) A classification layer to predict the action labels. To show the robustness of THORN, we evaluate it on EPIC-Kitchen55 and EGTEA Gaze+, two of the largest and most challenging first-person and human-object interaction datasets. THORN achieves state-of-the-art performance on both datasets. 大多数动作识别模型将人类活动视为单一事件。然而，人类的活动往往遵循一定的层次结构。事实上，人类的许多活动都是组合性的。此外，这些动作大多是人与物体的交互。在本文中，我们建议通过利用定义动作的一组交互来识别人类行为。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个端到端网络：THORN，它可以利用重要的人与物体和物体与物体的交互来预测动作。该模型构建在 3D 主干网络之上。我们模型的关键组件是： 1）用于建模对象的对象表示过滤器。 2) 对象关系推理模块，用于捕获对象关系。 3）用于预测动作标签的分类层。为了展示 THORN 的鲁棒性，我们在 EPIC-Kitchen55 和 EGTEA Gaze+（两个最大且最具挑战性的第一人称和人物交互数据集）上对其进行了评估。 THORN 在两个数据集上都实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出THORN模型，通过捕捉人类与物体及物体间的关系来识别动作。 Mohammed Guermal,Rui Dai,Francois Bremond cs.CV

authors_text: Tianyu Cui,Gaopeng Gou,Gang Xiong,Zhen Li,Mingxin Cui,Chang Liu
title: SiamHAN: IPv6 Address Correlation Attacks on TLS Encrypted Traffic via Siamese Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network
title_zh: SiamHAN：通过 Siamese 异构图注意力网络对 TLS 加密流量进行 IPv6 地址关联攻击
comment: The paper has been accepted at the 30th USENIX Security Symposium (USENIX Security 2021). The source code has been published at https://github.com/CuiTianyu961030/SiamHAN
comments: The paper has been accepted at the 30th USENIX Security Symposium (USENIX Security 2021). The source code has been published at https://github.com/CuiTianyu961030/SiamHAN
abstract: Unlike IPv4 addresses, which are typically masked by a NAT, IPv6 addresses could easily be correlated with user activity, endangering their privacy. Mitigations to address this privacy concern have been deployed, making existing approaches for address-to-user correlation unreliable. This work demonstrates that an adversary could still correlate IPv6 addresses with users accurately, even with these protection mechanisms. To do this, we propose an IPv6 address correlation model - SiamHAN. The model uses a Siamese Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network to measure whether two IPv6 client addresses belong to the same user even if the user's traffic is protected by TLS encryption. Using a large real-world dataset, we show that, for the tasks of tracking target users and discovering unique users, the state-of-the-art techniques could achieve only 85% and 60% accuracy, respectively. However, SiamHAN exhibits 99% and 88% accuracy.
summary: Unlike IPv4 addresses, which are typically masked by a NAT, IPv6 addresses could easily be correlated with user activity, endangering their privacy. Mitigations to address this privacy concern have been deployed, making existing approaches for address-to-user correlation unreliable. This work demonstrates that an adversary could still correlate IPv6 addresses with users accurately, even with these protection mechanisms. To do this, we propose an IPv6 address correlation model - SiamHAN. The model uses a Siamese Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network to measure whether two IPv6 client addresses belong to the same user even if the user's traffic is protected by TLS encryption. Using a large real-world dataset, we show that, for the tasks of tracking target users and discovering unique users, the state-of-the-art techniques could achieve only 85% and 60% accuracy, respectively. However, SiamHAN exhibits 99% and 88% accuracy.
abstract_zh: 与通常被 NAT 屏蔽的 IPv4 地址不同，IPv6 地址很容易与用户活动相关联，从而危及他们的隐私。已经部署了解决此隐私问题的缓解措施，使得现有的地址与用户关联方法变得不可靠。这项工作表明，即使有这些保护机制，攻击者仍然可以准确地将 IPv6 地址与用户关联起来。为此，我们提出了一种 IPv6 地址关联模型 - SiamHAN。该模型使用 Siamese 异构图注意力网络来衡量两个 IPv6 客户端地址是否属于同一用户，即使用户的流量受到 TLS 加密的保护。使用大型现实世界数据集，我们表明，对于跟踪目标用户和发现独特用户的任务，最先进的技术只能分别达到 85% 和 60% 的准确率。然而，SiamHAN 的准确率分别为 99% 和 88%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SiamHAN的模型，用于在TLS加密流量下通过IPv6地址关联攻击准确识别用户。
AI.motivation: IPv6地址因无需NAT掩码而容易暴露用户隐私，现有隐私保护措施使传统地址关联方法失效，需开发新型攻击手段验证其脆弱性。
AI.method: 基于Siamese异构图注意力网络（SiamHAN），通过分析加密流量中的IPv6地址特征，判断两个地址是否属于同一用户。
AI.result: 在真实数据集测试中，SiamHAN在目标用户追踪和唯一用户发现任务中分别达到99%和88%的准确率，远超现有技术的85%和60%。
AI.conclusion: SiamHAN证明了即使采用隐私保护措施，IPv6地址仍可通过加密流量被高效关联，凸显当前隐私防御机制的不足。

authors_text: Timo Bertram,Johannes Fürnkranz,Martin Müller
title: Quantity vs Quality: Investigating the Trade-Off between Sample Size and Label Reliability
title_zh: 数量与质量：研究样本量和标签可靠性之间的权衡
comment: Preliminary work under review for ICML 2022
comments: Preliminary work under review for ICML 2022
abstract: In this paper, we study learning in probabilistic domains where the learner may receive incorrect labels but can improve the reliability of labels by repeatedly sampling them. In such a setting, one faces the problem of whether the fixed budget for obtaining training examples should rather be used for obtaining all different examples or for improving the label quality of a smaller number of examples by re-sampling their labels. We motivate this problem in an application to compare the strength of poker hands where the training signal depends on the hidden community cards, and then study it in depth in an artificial setting where we insert controlled noise levels into the MNIST database. Our results show that with increasing levels of noise, resampling previous examples becomes increasingly more important than obtaining new examples, as classifier performance deteriorates when the number of incorrect labels is too high. In addition, we propose two different validation strategies; switching from lower to higher validations over the course of training and using chi-square statistics to approximate the confidence in obtained labels.
summary: In this paper, we study learning in probabilistic domains where the learner may receive incorrect labels but can improve the reliability of labels by repeatedly sampling them. In such a setting, one faces the problem of whether the fixed budget for obtaining training examples should rather be used for obtaining all different examples or for improving the label quality of a smaller number of examples by re-sampling their labels. We motivate this problem in an application to compare the strength of poker hands where the training signal depends on the hidden community cards, and then study it in depth in an artificial setting where we insert controlled noise levels into the MNIST database. Our results show that with increasing levels of noise, resampling previous examples becomes increasingly more important than obtaining new examples, as classifier performance deteriorates when the number of incorrect labels is too high. In addition, we propose two different validation strategies; switching from lower to higher validations over the course of training and using chi-square statistics to approximate the confidence in obtained labels.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究概率领域的学习，其中学习者可能会收到不正确的标签，但可以通过重复采样来提高标签的可靠性。在这种情况下，人们面临的问题是，获取训练样本的固定预算是否应该用于获取所有不同的样本，或者通过重新采样标签来提高较少数量样本的标签质量。我们在一个应用程序中激发这个问题，以比较扑克牌的强度，其中训练信号取决于隐藏的公共牌，然后在人工环境中深入研究它，将受控的噪声水平插入 MNIST 数据库。我们的结果表明，随着噪声水平的增加，对先前示例进行重新采样变得比获取新示例变得越来越重要，因为当不正确标签的数量过多时，分类器性能会下降。此外，我们提出了两种不同的验证策略；在训练过程中从较低的验证切换到较高的验证，并使用卡方统计来近似获得的标签的置信度。

AI.tldr: 研究样本数量与标签可靠性之间的权衡问题，探讨在固定预算下应优先增加样本量还是提升标签质量。
AI.motivation: 在存在噪声标签的情况下，确定如何分配有限的预算以优化分类性能。
AI.method: 通过在MNIST数据集引入可控噪声，结合扑克牌应用，分析重采样与新样本获取的影响，并提出两种验证策略。
AI.result: 高噪声环境下重采样比获取新样本更有效，错误标签过多会损害分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 噪声水平越高，重采样策略越重要，且提出的验证方法有助于提升标签可靠性。

ai_content.tldr: 研究样本数量与标签可靠性之间的权衡问题，探讨在固定预算下应优先增加样本量还是提升标签质量。

authors_text: Nadezhda Semenova,Daniel Brunner
title: Noise mitigation strategies in physical feedforward neural networks
title_zh: 物理前馈神经网络中的噪声抑制策略
abstract: Physical neural networks are promising candidates for next generation artificial intelligence hardware. In such architectures, neurons and connections are physically realized and do not leverage digital concepts with their practically infinite signal-to-noise ratio to encode, transduce and transform information. They therefore are prone to noise with a variety of statistical and architectural properties, and effective strategies leveraging network-inherent assets to mitigate noise in an hardware-efficient manner are important in the pursuit of next generation neural network hardware. Based on analytical derivations, we here introduce and analyse a variety of different noise-mitigation approaches. We analytically show that intra-layer connections in which the connection matrix's squared mean exceeds the mean of its square fully suppresses uncorrelated noise. We go beyond and develop two synergistic strategies for noise that is uncorrelated and correlated across populations of neurons. First, we introduce the concept of ghost neurons, where each group of neurons perturbed by correlated noise has a negative connection to a single neuron, yet without receiving any input information. Secondly, we show that pooling of neuron populations is an efficient approach to suppress uncorrelated noise. As such, we developed a general noise mitigation strategy leveraging the statistical properties of the different noise terms most relevant in analogue hardware. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this combined approach for trained neural network classifying the MNIST handwritten digits, for which we achieve a 4-fold improvement of the output signal-to-noise ratio and increase the classification accuracy almost to the level of the noise-free network.
summary: Physical neural networks are promising candidates for next generation artificial intelligence hardware. In such architectures, neurons and connections are physically realized and do not leverage digital concepts with their practically infinite signal-to-noise ratio to encode, transduce and transform information. They therefore are prone to noise with a variety of statistical and architectural properties, and effective strategies leveraging network-inherent assets to mitigate noise in an hardware-efficient manner are important in the pursuit of next generation neural network hardware. Based on analytical derivations, we here introduce and analyse a variety of different noise-mitigation approaches. We analytically show that intra-layer connections in which the connection matrix's squared mean exceeds the mean of its square fully suppresses uncorrelated noise. We go beyond and develop two synergistic strategies for noise that is uncorrelated and correlated across populations of neurons. First, we introduce the concept of ghost neurons, where each group of neurons perturbed by correlated noise has a negative connection to a single neuron, yet without receiving any input information. Secondly, we show that pooling of neuron populations is an efficient approach to suppress uncorrelated noise. As such, we developed a general noise mitigation strategy leveraging the statistical properties of the different noise terms most relevant in analogue hardware. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this combined approach for trained neural network classifying the MNIST handwritten digits, for which we achieve a 4-fold improvement of the output signal-to-noise ratio and increase the classification accuracy almost to the level of the noise-free network.
abstract_zh: 物理神经网络是下一代人工智能硬件的有希望的候选者。在此类架构中，神经元和连接是物理实现的，并且不利用数字概念及其几乎无限的信噪比来编码、转换和转换信息。因此，它们很容易受到具有各种统计和架构特性的噪声的影响，而利用网络固有资产以硬件高效的方式减轻噪声的有效策略对于追求下一代神经网络硬件非常重要。基于分析推导，我们在这里介绍并分析各种不同的噪声抑制方法。我们分析表明，连接矩阵的平方均值超过其平方均值的层内连接可以完全抑制不相关的噪声。我们超越并开发了两种针对神经元群之间不相关和相关的噪声的协同策略。首先，我们引入幽灵神经元的概念，其中受相关噪声扰动的每组神经元与单个神经元具有负连接，但不接收任何输入信息。其次，我们证明神经元群体的池化是抑制不相关噪声的有效方法。因此，我们开发了一种通用噪声缓解策略，利用模拟硬件中最相关的不同噪声项的统计特性。最后，我们证明了这种组合方法对训练有素的神经网络对 MNIST 手写数字进行分类的有效性，我们实现了输出信噪比的 4 倍改进，并将分类精度几乎提高到无噪声网络的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对物理前馈神经网络中噪声的抑制策略，通过分析网络内在特性来提高硬件效率。
AI.motivation: 物理神经网络因缺乏数字系统的无限信噪比而易受噪声影响，需开发硬件高效的噪声抑制方法以推动下一代AI硬件发展。
AI.method: 通过解析推导，提出两种协同策略：引入‘幽灵神经元’抵消相关噪声，以及通过神经元群体池化抑制非相关噪声。
AI.result: 在MNIST手写数字分类任务中，输出信噪比提升4倍，分类准确率接近无噪声网络水平。
AI.conclusion: 结合统计特性设计的噪声抑制方法有效提升了物理神经网络性能，为类脑硬件开发提供了理论支持。
