search_text: Noise mitigation strategies in physical feedforward neural networks 物理前馈神经网络中的噪声抑制策略 Physical neural networks are promising candidates for next generation artificial intelligence hardware. In such architectures, neurons and connections are physically realized and do not leverage digital concepts with their practically infinite signal-to-noise ratio to encode, transduce and transform information. They therefore are prone to noise with a variety of statistical and architectural properties, and effective strategies leveraging network-inherent assets to mitigate noise in an hardware-efficient manner are important in the pursuit of next generation neural network hardware. Based on analytical derivations, we here introduce and analyse a variety of different noise-mitigation approaches. We analytically show that intra-layer connections in which the connection matrix's squared mean exceeds the mean of its square fully suppresses uncorrelated noise. We go beyond and develop two synergistic strategies for noise that is uncorrelated and correlated across populations of neurons. First, we introduce the concept of ghost neurons, where each group of neurons perturbed by correlated noise has a negative connection to a single neuron, yet without receiving any input information. Secondly, we show that pooling of neuron populations is an efficient approach to suppress uncorrelated noise. As such, we developed a general noise mitigation strategy leveraging the statistical properties of the different noise terms most relevant in analogue hardware. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this combined approach for trained neural network classifying the MNIST handwritten digits, for which we achieve a 4-fold improvement of the output signal-to-noise ratio and increase the classification accuracy almost to the level of the noise-free network. 物理神经网络是下一代人工智能硬件的有希望的候选者。在此类架构中，神经元和连接是物理实现的，并且不利用数字概念及其几乎无限的信噪比来编码、转换和转换信息。因此，它们很容易受到具有各种统计和架构特性的噪声的影响，而利用网络固有资产以硬件高效的方式减轻噪声的有效策略对于追求下一代神经网络硬件非常重要。基于分析推导，我们在这里介绍并分析各种不同的噪声抑制方法。我们分析表明，连接矩阵的平方均值超过其平方均值的层内连接可以完全抑制不相关的噪声。我们超越并开发了两种针对神经元群之间不相关和相关的噪声的协同策略。首先，我们引入幽灵神经元的概念，其中受相关噪声扰动的每组神经元与单个神经元具有负连接，但不接收任何输入信息。其次，我们证明神经元群体的池化是抑制不相关噪声的有效方法。因此，我们开发了一种通用噪声缓解策略，利用模拟硬件中最相关的不同噪声项的统计特性。最后，我们证明了这种组合方法对训练有素的神经网络对 MNIST 手写数字进行分类的有效性，我们实现了输出信噪比的 4 倍改进，并将分类精度几乎提高到无噪声网络的水平。 本文提出了一种针对物理前馈神经网络中噪声的抑制策略，通过分析网络内在特性来提高硬件效率。 Nadezhda Semenova,Daniel Brunner cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Zheng Chang,Xinfeng Zhang,Shanshe Wang,Siwei Ma,Wen Gao
title: STAU: A SpatioTemporal-Aware Unit for Video Prediction and Beyond
title_zh: STAU：用于视频预测等的时空感知单元
comment: This work has been submitted to TPAMI
comments: This work has been submitted to TPAMI
abstract: Video prediction aims to predict future frames by modeling the complex spatiotemporal dynamics in videos. However, most of the existing methods only model the temporal information and the spatial information for videos in an independent manner but haven't fully explored the correlations between both terms. In this paper, we propose a SpatioTemporal-Aware Unit (STAU) for video prediction and beyond by exploring the significant spatiotemporal correlations in videos. On the one hand, the motion-aware attention weights are learned from the spatial states to help aggregate the temporal states in the temporal domain. On the other hand, the appearance-aware attention weights are learned from the temporal states to help aggregate the spatial states in the spatial domain. In this way, the temporal information and the spatial information can be greatly aware of each other in both domains, during which, the spatiotemporal receptive field can also be greatly broadened for more reliable spatiotemporal modeling. Experiments are not only conducted on traditional video prediction tasks but also other tasks beyond video prediction, including the early action recognition and object detection tasks. Experimental results show that our STAU can outperform other methods on all tasks in terms of performance and computation efficiency.
summary: Video prediction aims to predict future frames by modeling the complex spatiotemporal dynamics in videos. However, most of the existing methods only model the temporal information and the spatial information for videos in an independent manner but haven't fully explored the correlations between both terms. In this paper, we propose a SpatioTemporal-Aware Unit (STAU) for video prediction and beyond by exploring the significant spatiotemporal correlations in videos. On the one hand, the motion-aware attention weights are learned from the spatial states to help aggregate the temporal states in the temporal domain. On the other hand, the appearance-aware attention weights are learned from the temporal states to help aggregate the spatial states in the spatial domain. In this way, the temporal information and the spatial information can be greatly aware of each other in both domains, during which, the spatiotemporal receptive field can also be greatly broadened for more reliable spatiotemporal modeling. Experiments are not only conducted on traditional video prediction tasks but also other tasks beyond video prediction, including the early action recognition and object detection tasks. Experimental results show that our STAU can outperform other methods on all tasks in terms of performance and computation efficiency.
abstract_zh: 视频预测旨在通过对视频中复杂的时空动态进行建模来预测未来的帧。然而，大多数现有方法仅以独立的方式对视频的时间信息和空间信息进行建模，而没有充分探索这两个术语之间的相关性。在本文中，我们通过探索视频中重要的时空相关性，提出了一种用于视频预测等的时空感知单元（STAU）。一方面，从空间状态学习运动感知注意力权重，以帮助聚合时域中的时间状态。另一方面，外观感知注意力权重是从时间状态中学习的，以帮助聚合空间域中的空间状态。这样，时间信息和空间信息可以在两个域中相互了解，同时时空感受野也可以大大拓宽，从而实现更可靠的时空建模。实验不仅针对传统的视频预测任务进行，还针对视频预测之外的其他任务进行，包括早期动作识别和目标检测任务。实验结果表明，我们的 STAU 在所有任务上在性能和计算效率方面都优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为STAU的时空感知单元，用于视频预测及其他相关任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理视频时空信息时独立建模，未能充分探索时空关联性，导致建模效果受限。
AI.method: 通过运动感知注意力权重聚合时序状态，同时利用外观感知注意力权重聚合空间状态，实现时空信息的双向交互与感知场扩展。
AI.result: 在视频预测、早期动作识别和目标检测任务中均优于现有方法，兼具性能与计算效率优势。
AI.conclusion: STAU通过深度挖掘时空关联性，显著提升了视频任务的建模能力与泛化性能。

authors_text: Yang Zheng,Yanchao Yang,Kaichun Mo,Jiaman Li,Tao Yu,Yebin Liu,C. Karen Liu,Leonidas J. Guibas
title: GIMO: Gaze-Informed Human Motion Prediction in Context
title_zh: GIMO：上下文中基于注视的人体运动预测
abstract: Predicting human motion is critical for assistive robots and AR/VR applications, where the interaction with humans needs to be safe and comfortable. Meanwhile, an accurate prediction depends on understanding both the scene context and human intentions. Even though many works study scene-aware human motion prediction, the latter is largely underexplored due to the lack of ego-centric views that disclose human intent and the limited diversity in motion and scenes. To reduce the gap, we propose a large-scale human motion dataset that delivers high-quality body pose sequences, scene scans, as well as ego-centric views with the eye gaze that serves as a surrogate for inferring human intent. By employing inertial sensors for motion capture, our data collection is not tied to specific scenes, which further boosts the motion dynamics observed from our subjects. We perform an extensive study of the benefits of leveraging the eye gaze for ego-centric human motion prediction with various state-of-the-art architectures. Moreover, to realize the full potential of the gaze, we propose a novel network architecture that enables bidirectional communication between the gaze and motion branches. Our network achieves the top performance in human motion prediction on the proposed dataset, thanks to the intent information from eye gaze and the denoised gaze feature modulated by the motion. Code and data can be found at https://github.com/y-zheng18/GIMO.
summary: Predicting human motion is critical for assistive robots and AR/VR applications, where the interaction with humans needs to be safe and comfortable. Meanwhile, an accurate prediction depends on understanding both the scene context and human intentions. Even though many works study scene-aware human motion prediction, the latter is largely underexplored due to the lack of ego-centric views that disclose human intent and the limited diversity in motion and scenes. To reduce the gap, we propose a large-scale human motion dataset that delivers high-quality body pose sequences, scene scans, as well as ego-centric views with the eye gaze that serves as a surrogate for inferring human intent. By employing inertial sensors for motion capture, our data collection is not tied to specific scenes, which further boosts the motion dynamics observed from our subjects. We perform an extensive study of the benefits of leveraging the eye gaze for ego-centric human motion prediction with various state-of-the-art architectures. Moreover, to realize the full potential of the gaze, we propose a novel network architecture that enables bidirectional communication between the gaze and motion branches. Our network achieves the top performance in human motion prediction on the proposed dataset, thanks to the intent information from eye gaze and the denoised gaze feature modulated by the motion. Code and data can be found at https://github.com/y-zheng18/GIMO.
abstract_zh: 预测人体运动对于辅助机器人和 AR/VR 应用至关重要，这些应用中与人类的交互需要安全舒适。同时，准确的预测取决于对场景上下文和人类意图的理解。尽管许多工作研究场景感知的人体运动预测，但由于缺乏揭示人类意图的以自我为中心的观点以及运动和场景的多样性有限，后者在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。为了缩小差距，我们提出了一个大规模的人体运动数据集，它提供高质量的身体姿势序列、场景扫描以及以自我为中心的眼睛注视视图，作为推断人类意图的替代品。通过采用惯性传感器进行运动捕捉，我们的数据收集不依赖于特定场景，这进一步增强了从我们的受试者观察到的运动动态。我们对利用眼睛注视通过各种最先进的架构进行以自我为中心的人体运动预测的好处进行了广泛的研究。此外，为了充分发挥凝视的潜力，我们提出了一种新颖的网络架构，可以实现凝视和运动分支之间的双向通信。得益于来自眼睛注视的意图信息和运动调制的去噪注视特征，我们的网络在所提出的数据集上实现了人体运动预测的最佳性能。代码和数据可以在https://github.com/y-zheng18/GIMO找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GIMO方法，通过结合眼动数据和场景上下文信息，提升人类运动预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有运动预测方法因缺乏以自我为中心的视角和多样化的场景数据，难以准确捕捉人类意图，导致预测效果受限。
AI.method: 构建包含高质量身体姿态序列、场景扫描及眼动数据的大规模数据集，并设计具有双向信息交互机制的神经网络架构，实现眼动与运动分支的协同优化。
AI.result: 在所提出的数据集上，该方法在人类运动预测任务中取得最优性能，验证了眼动信息对意图推断的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合眼动数据与场景上下文，结合双向网络架构，能够显著提升复杂场景下人类运动预测的准确性与鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出GIMO方法，通过结合眼动数据和场景上下文信息，提升人类运动预测的准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有运动预测方法因缺乏以自我为中心的视角和多样化的场景数据，难以准确捕捉人类意图，导致预测效果受限。
ai_content.method: 构建包含高质量身体姿态序列、场景扫描及眼动数据的大规模数据集，并设计具有双向信息交互机制的神经网络架构，实现眼动与运动分支的协同优化。
ai_content.result: 在所提出的数据集上，该方法在人类运动预测任务中取得最优性能，验证了眼动信息对意图推断的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过整合眼动数据与场景上下文，结合双向网络架构，能够显著提升复杂场景下人类运动预测的准确性与鲁棒性。

search_text: GIMO: Gaze-Informed Human Motion Prediction in Context GIMO：上下文中基于注视的人体运动预测 Predicting human motion is critical for assistive robots and AR/VR applications, where the interaction with humans needs to be safe and comfortable. Meanwhile, an accurate prediction depends on understanding both the scene context and human intentions. Even though many works study scene-aware human motion prediction, the latter is largely underexplored due to the lack of ego-centric views that disclose human intent and the limited diversity in motion and scenes. To reduce the gap, we propose a large-scale human motion dataset that delivers high-quality body pose sequences, scene scans, as well as ego-centric views with the eye gaze that serves as a surrogate for inferring human intent. By employing inertial sensors for motion capture, our data collection is not tied to specific scenes, which further boosts the motion dynamics observed from our subjects. We perform an extensive study of the benefits of leveraging the eye gaze for ego-centric human motion prediction with various state-of-the-art architectures. Moreover, to realize the full potential of the gaze, we propose a novel network architecture that enables bidirectional communication between the gaze and motion branches. Our network achieves the top performance in human motion prediction on the proposed dataset, thanks to the intent information from eye gaze and the denoised gaze feature modulated by the motion. Code and data can be found at https://github.com/y-zheng18/GIMO. 预测人体运动对于辅助机器人和 AR/VR 应用至关重要，这些应用中与人类的交互需要安全舒适。同时，准确的预测取决于对场景上下文和人类意图的理解。尽管许多工作研究场景感知的人体运动预测，但由于缺乏揭示人类意图的以自我为中心的观点以及运动和场景的多样性有限，后者在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。为了缩小差距，我们提出了一个大规模的人体运动数据集，它提供高质量的身体姿势序列、场景扫描以及以自我为中心的眼睛注视视图，作为推断人类意图的替代品。通过采用惯性传感器进行运动捕捉，我们的数据收集不依赖于特定场景，这进一步增强了从我们的受试者观察到的运动动态。我们对利用眼睛注视通过各种最先进的架构进行以自我为中心的人体运动预测的好处进行了广泛的研究。此外，为了充分发挥凝视的潜力，我们提出了一种新颖的网络架构，可以实现凝视和运动分支之间的双向通信。得益于来自眼睛注视的意图信息和运动调制的去噪注视特征，我们的网络在所提出的数据集上实现了人体运动预测的最佳性能。代码和数据可以在https://github.com/y-zheng18/GIMO找到。 本文提出GIMO方法，通过结合眼动数据和场景上下文信息，提升人类运动预测的准确性。 Yang Zheng,Yanchao Yang,Kaichun Mo,Jiaman Li,Tao Yu,Yebin Liu,C. Karen Liu,Leonidas J. Guibas cs.CV

authors_text: Dongmin Cha,Daijin Kim
title: DAM-GAN : Image Inpainting using Dynamic Attention Map based on Fake Texture Detection
title_zh: DAM-GAN：使用基于假纹理检测的动态注意力图进行图像修复
abstract: Deep neural advancements have recently brought remarkable image synthesis performance to the field of image inpainting. The adaptation of generative adversarial networks (GAN) in particular has accelerated significant progress in high-quality image reconstruction. However, although many notable GAN-based networks have been proposed for image inpainting, still pixel artifacts or color inconsistency occur in synthesized images during the generation process, which are usually called fake textures. To reduce pixel inconsistency disorder resulted from fake textures, we introduce a GAN-based model using dynamic attention map (DAM-GAN). Our proposed DAM-GAN concentrates on detecting fake texture and products dynamic attention maps to diminish pixel inconsistency from the feature maps in the generator. Evaluation results on CelebA-HQ and Places2 datasets with other image inpainting approaches show the superiority of our network.
summary: Deep neural advancements have recently brought remarkable image synthesis performance to the field of image inpainting. The adaptation of generative adversarial networks (GAN) in particular has accelerated significant progress in high-quality image reconstruction. However, although many notable GAN-based networks have been proposed for image inpainting, still pixel artifacts or color inconsistency occur in synthesized images during the generation process, which are usually called fake textures. To reduce pixel inconsistency disorder resulted from fake textures, we introduce a GAN-based model using dynamic attention map (DAM-GAN). Our proposed DAM-GAN concentrates on detecting fake texture and products dynamic attention maps to diminish pixel inconsistency from the feature maps in the generator. Evaluation results on CelebA-HQ and Places2 datasets with other image inpainting approaches show the superiority of our network.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的进步最近为图像修复领域带来了卓越的图像合成性能。特别是生成对抗网络（GAN）的适应加速了高质量图像重建的重大进展。然而，尽管许多著名的基于 GAN 的网络已被提出用于图像修复，但在生成过程中合成图像中仍会出现像素伪影或颜色不一致，这通常称为假纹理。为了减少假纹理导致的像素不一致混乱，我们引入了一种使用动态注意力图的基于 GAN 的模型（DAM-GAN）。我们提出的 DAM-GAN 专注于检测假纹理和产品动态注意力图，以减少生成器中特征图的像素不一致。使用其他图像修复方法对 CelebA-HQ 和 Places2 数据集的评估结果显示了我们网络的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAM-GAN模型，通过动态注意力图检测并减少图像修复中的假纹理问题，提升生成图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN-based图像修复方法仍存在像素伪影和颜色不一致的假纹理问题，需改进生成器以消除此类缺陷。
AI.method: 设计动态注意力图机制，在生成器中检测假纹理并生成注意力图，通过特征图调整降低像素不一致性。
AI.result: 在CelebA-HQ和Places2数据集上优于其他图像修复方法，验证了DAM-GAN的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态注意力图有效抑制假纹理，显著提升图像修复质量，为GAN-based修复提供新思路。

ai_content.conclusion: 动态注意力图有效抑制假纹理，显著提升图像修复质量，为GAN-based修复提供新思路。

authors_text: Nikolaos Ioannis Bountos,Ioannis Papoutsis,Dimitrios Michail,Andreas Karavias,Panagiotis Elias,Isaak Parcharidis
title: Hephaestus: A large scale multitask dataset towards InSAR understanding
title_zh: Hephaestus：用于理解 InSAR 的大规模多任务数据集
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in EARTHVISION 2022, in conjuction with the Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022 Conference
comments: This work has been accepted for publication in EARTHVISION 2022, in conjuction with the Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2022 Conference
abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data and Interferometric SAR (InSAR) products in particular, are one of the largest sources of Earth Observation data. InSAR provides unique information on diverse geophysical processes and geology, and on the geotechnical properties of man-made structures. However, there are only a limited number of applications that exploit the abundance of InSAR data and deep learning methods to extract such knowledge. The main barrier has been the lack of a large curated and annotated InSAR dataset, which would be costly to create and would require an interdisciplinary team of experts experienced on InSAR data interpretation. In this work, we put the effort to create and make available the first of its kind, manually annotated dataset that consists of 19,919 individual Sentinel-1 interferograms acquired over 44 different volcanoes globally, which are split into 216,106 InSAR patches. The annotated dataset is designed to address different computer vision problems, including volcano state classification, semantic segmentation of ground deformation, detection and classification of atmospheric signals in InSAR imagery, interferogram captioning, text to InSAR generation, and InSAR image quality assessment.
summary: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) data and Interferometric SAR (InSAR) products in particular, are one of the largest sources of Earth Observation data. InSAR provides unique information on diverse geophysical processes and geology, and on the geotechnical properties of man-made structures. However, there are only a limited number of applications that exploit the abundance of InSAR data and deep learning methods to extract such knowledge. The main barrier has been the lack of a large curated and annotated InSAR dataset, which would be costly to create and would require an interdisciplinary team of experts experienced on InSAR data interpretation. In this work, we put the effort to create and make available the first of its kind, manually annotated dataset that consists of 19,919 individual Sentinel-1 interferograms acquired over 44 different volcanoes globally, which are split into 216,106 InSAR patches. The annotated dataset is designed to address different computer vision problems, including volcano state classification, semantic segmentation of ground deformation, detection and classification of atmospheric signals in InSAR imagery, interferogram captioning, text to InSAR generation, and InSAR image quality assessment.
abstract_zh: 合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 数据，特别是干涉 SAR (InSAR) 产品，是地球观测数据的最大来源之一。 InSAR 提供有关各种地球物理过程和地质以及人造结构岩土工程特性的独特信息。然而，利用丰富的 InSAR 数据和深度学习方法来提取此类知识的应用程序数量有限。主要障碍是缺乏大型的经过整理和注释的 InSAR 数据集，该数据集的创建成本高昂，并且需要一支在 InSAR 数据解释方面经验丰富的跨学科专家团队。在这项工作中，我们努力创建并提供第一个此类手动注释数据集，该数据集由在全球 44 座不同火山上采集的 19,919 个单独的 Sentinel-1 干涉图组成，这些干涉图被分为 216,106 个 InSAR 块。带注释的数据集旨在解决不同的计算机视觉问题，包括火山状态分类、地面变形的语义分割、InSAR 图像中大气信号的检测和分类、干涉图字幕、文本到 InSAR 生成以及 InSAR 图像质量评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hephaestus数据集，包含19,919个手动标注的Sentinel-1干涉图，用于解决多种InSAR计算机视觉任务。
AI.motivation: InSAR数据蕴含丰富的地学信息，但缺乏大规模标注数据集限制了深度学习的应用，本文旨在构建首个针对火山监测的多任务InSAR数据集。
AI.method: 收集全球44座火山的Sentinel-1干涉图，分割为216,106个图像块，并进行火山状态分类、形变分割、大气信号检测等6类任务的标注。
AI.result: 创建了包含多任务标注的InSAR数据集，覆盖火山形变、大气干扰等多种场景，为InSAR领域计算机视觉研究提供基准数据。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集突破了InSAR数据应用瓶颈，为多任务学习和地质灾害监测提供了重要资源，推动InSAR与AI技术的深度融合。

The main barrier has been the lack of a large curated and annotated InSAR dataset, which would be costly to create and would require an interdisciplinary team of experts experienced on InSAR data interpretation. In this work, we put the effort to create and make available the first of its kind, manually annotated dataset that consists of 19,919 individual Sentinel-1 interferograms acquired over 44 different volcanoes globally, which are split into 216,106 InSAR patches. The annotated dataset is designed to address different computer vision problems, including volcano state classification, semantic segmentation of ground deformation, detection and classification of atmospheric signals in InSAR imagery, interferogram captioning, text to InSAR generation, and InSAR image quality assessment. 合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 数据，特别是干涉 SAR (InSAR) 产品，是地球观测数据的最大来源之一。 InSAR 提供有关各种地球物理过程和地质以及人造结构岩土工程特性的独特信息。然而，利用丰富的 InSAR 数据和深度学习方法来提取此类知识的应用程序数量有限。主要障碍是缺乏大型的经过整理和注释的 InSAR 数据集，该数据集的创建成本高昂，并且需要一支在 InSAR 数据解释方面经验丰富的跨学科专家团队。在这项工作中，我们努力创建并提供第一个此类手动注释数据集，该数据集由在全球 44 座不同火山上采集的 19,919 个单独的 Sentinel-1 干涉图组成，这些干涉图被分为 216,106 个 InSAR 块。带注释的数据集旨在解决不同的计算机视觉问题，包括火山状态分类、地面变形的语义分割、InSAR 图像中大气信号的检测和分类、干涉图字幕、文本到 InSAR 生成以及 InSAR 图像质量评估。 本文提出Hephaestus数据集，包含19,919个手动标注的Sentinel-1干涉图，用于解决多种InSAR计算机视觉任务。 Nikolaos Ioannis Bountos,Ioannis Papoutsis,Dimitrios Michail,Andreas Karavias,Panagiotis Elias,Isaak Parcharidis cs.CV,astro-ph.IM,cs.LG

authors_text: Kevin Zhu,Alexander Wong,John McPhee
title: FenceNet: Fine-grained Footwork Recognition in Fencing
title_zh: FenceNet：击剑中的细粒度步法识别
abstract: Current data analysis for the Canadian Olympic fencing team is primarily done manually by coaches and analysts. Due to the highly repetitive, yet dynamic and subtle movements in fencing, manual data analysis can be inefficient and inaccurate. We propose FenceNet as a novel architecture to automate the classification of fine-grained footwork techniques in fencing. FenceNet takes 2D pose data as input and classifies actions using a skeleton-based action recognition approach that incorporates temporal convolutional networks to capture temporal information. We train and evaluate FenceNet on the Fencing Footwork Dataset (FFD), which contains 10 fencers performing 6 different footwork actions for 10-11 repetitions each (652 total videos). FenceNet achieves 85.4% accuracy under 10-fold cross-validation, where each fencer is left out as the test set. This accuracy is within 1% of the current state-of-the-art method, JLJA (86.3%), which selects and fuses features engineered from skeleton data, depth videos, and inertial measurement units. BiFenceNet, a variant of FenceNet that captures the "bidirectionality" of human movement through two separate networks, achieves 87.6% accuracy, outperforming JLJA. Since neither FenceNet nor BiFenceNet requires data from wearable sensors, unlike JLJA, they could be directly applied to most fencing videos, using 2D pose data as input extracted from off-the-shelf 2D human pose estimators. In comparison to JLJA, our methods are also simpler as they do not require manual feature engineering, selection, or fusion.
summary: Current data analysis for the Canadian Olympic fencing team is primarily done manually by coaches and analysts. Due to the highly repetitive, yet dynamic and subtle movements in fencing, manual data analysis can be inefficient and inaccurate. We propose FenceNet as a novel architecture to automate the classification of fine-grained footwork techniques in fencing. FenceNet takes 2D pose data as input and classifies actions using a skeleton-based action recognition approach that incorporates temporal convolutional networks to capture temporal information. We train and evaluate FenceNet on the Fencing Footwork Dataset (FFD), which contains 10 fencers performing 6 different footwork actions for 10-11 repetitions each (652 total videos). FenceNet achieves 85.4% accuracy under 10-fold cross-validation, where each fencer is left out as the test set. This accuracy is within 1% of the current state-of-the-art method, JLJA (86.3%), which selects and fuses features engineered from skeleton data, depth videos, and inertial measurement units. BiFenceNet, a variant of FenceNet that captures the "bidirectionality" of human movement through two separate networks, achieves 87.6% accuracy, outperforming JLJA. Since neither FenceNet nor BiFenceNet requires data from wearable sensors, unlike JLJA, they could be directly applied to most fencing videos, using 2D pose data as input extracted from off-the-shelf 2D human pose estimators. In comparison to JLJA, our methods are also simpler as they do not require manual feature engineering, selection, or fusion.
abstract_zh: 目前加拿大奥运击剑队的数据分析主要由教练和分析师手动完成。由于击剑运动的高度重复性、动态性和微妙性，手动数据分析可能效率低下且不准确。我们提出 FenceNet 作为一种新颖的架构，用于自动分类击剑中的细粒度步法技术。 FenceNet 将 2D 姿势数据作为输入，并使用基于骨架的动作识别方法对动作进行分类，该方法结合了时间卷积网络来捕获时间信息。我们在击剑步法数据集 (FFD) 上训练和评估 FenceNet，该数据集包含 10 名击剑运动员，每个击剑运动员执行 6 种不同的步法动作，每个动作重复 10-11 次（总共 652 个视频）。 FenceNet 在 10 倍交叉验证下达到了 85.4% 的准确率，其中每个击剑手都被排除作为测试集。该精度与当前最先进的方法 JLJA (86.3%) 相差不到 1%，该方法选择并融合根据骨架数据、深度视频和惯性测量单元设计的特征。 BiFenceNet 是 FenceNet 的一种变体，通过两个独立的网络捕获人体运动的“双向性”，准确率达到 87.6%，优于 JLJA。由于 FenceNet 和 BiFenceNet 都不需要来自可穿戴传感器的数据，与 JLJA 不同，它们可以直接应用于大多数击剑视频，使用从现成的 2D 人体姿势估计器中提取的 2D 姿势数据作为输入。与 JLJA 相比，我们的方法也更简单，因为它们不需要手动特征工程、选择或融合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FenceNet，一种基于2D姿态数据的细粒度击剑步法识别架构，用于自动化分类击剑动作。
AI.motivation: 当前加拿大奥运击剑队的数据分析依赖人工，存在效率低、准确性差的问题，需开发无需可穿戴传感器的自动化方法。
AI.method: 采用骨架动作识别方法，结合时间卷积网络处理2D姿态数据，通过双向网络结构（BiFenceNet）捕捉运动双向性。
AI.result: FenceNet在10折交叉验证中达到85.4%准确率，BiFenceNet达87.6%，优于需传感器的JLJA方法（86.3%）且无需手动特征工程。
AI.conclusion: FenceNet系列方法通过2D姿态数据实现高效步法识别，在准确率和实用性上优于现有技术，适用于多数击剑视频分析。

authors_text: Guowei Chen,Yi Liu,Jian Wang,Juncai Peng,Yuying Hao,Lutao Chu,Shiyu Tang,Zewu Wu,Zeyu Chen,Zhiliang Yu,Yuning Du,Qingqing Dang,Xiaoguang Hu,Dianhai Yu
title: PP-Matting: High-Accuracy Natural Image Matting
title_zh: PP-Matting：高精度自然图像抠图
abstract: Natural image matting is a fundamental and challenging computer vision task. It has many applications in image editing and composition. Recently, deep learning-based approaches have achieved great improvements in image matting. However, most of them require a user-supplied trimap as an auxiliary input, which limits the matting applications in the real world. Although some trimap-free approaches have been proposed, the matting quality is still unsatisfactory compared to trimap-based ones. Without the trimap guidance, the matting models suffer from foreground-background ambiguity easily, and also generate blurry details in the transition area. In this work, we propose PP-Matting, a trimap-free architecture that can achieve high-accuracy natural image matting. Our method applies a high-resolution detail branch (HRDB) that extracts fine-grained details of the foreground with keeping feature resolution unchanged. Also, we propose a semantic context branch (SCB) that adopts a semantic segmentation subtask. It prevents the detail prediction from local ambiguity caused by semantic context missing. In addition, we conduct extensive experiments on two well-known benchmarks: Composition-1k and Distinctions-646. The results demonstrate the superiority of PP-Matting over previous methods. Furthermore, we provide a qualitative evaluation of our method on human matting which shows its outstanding performance in the practical application. The code and pre-trained models will be available at PaddleSeg: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSeg.
summary: Natural image matting is a fundamental and challenging computer vision task. It has many applications in image editing and composition. Recently, deep learning-based approaches have achieved great improvements in image matting. However, most of them require a user-supplied trimap as an auxiliary input, which limits the matting applications in the real world. Although some trimap-free approaches have been proposed, the matting quality is still unsatisfactory compared to trimap-based ones. Without the trimap guidance, the matting models suffer from foreground-background ambiguity easily, and also generate blurry details in the transition area. In this work, we propose PP-Matting, a trimap-free architecture that can achieve high-accuracy natural image matting. Our method applies a high-resolution detail branch (HRDB) that extracts fine-grained details of the foreground with keeping feature resolution unchanged. Also, we propose a semantic context branch (SCB) that adopts a semantic segmentation subtask. It prevents the detail prediction from local ambiguity caused by semantic context missing. In addition, we conduct extensive experiments on two well-known benchmarks: Composition-1k and Distinctions-646. The results demonstrate the superiority of PP-Matting over previous methods. Furthermore, we provide a qualitative evaluation of our method on human matting which shows its outstanding performance in the practical application. The code and pre-trained models will be available at PaddleSeg: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSeg.
abstract_zh: 自然图像抠图是一项基本且具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务。它在图像编辑和合成方面有许多应用。最近，基于深度学习的方法在图像抠图方面取得了巨大的进步。然而，它们中的大多数需要用户提供的三维贴图作为辅助输入，这限制了现实世界中的抠图应用。尽管已经提出了一些无 trimap 的方法，但与基于 trimap 的方法相比，抠图质量仍然不能令人满意。如果没有三维地图指导，抠图模型很容易遭受前景-背景模糊的影响，并且还会在过渡区域产生模糊的细节。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PP-Matting，这是一种无 trimap 的架构，可以实现高精度的自然图像抠图。我们的方法应用高分辨率细节分支（HRDB），在保持特征分辨率不变的情况下提取前景的细粒度细节。此外，我们提出了一个采用语义分割子任务的语义上下文分支（SCB）。它可以防止由于语义上下文缺失而导致的局部模糊性的细节预测。此外，我们还在两个著名的基准测试上进行了广泛的实验：Composition-1k 和 Distinctions-646。结果证明了 PP-Matting 相对于以前的方法的优越性。此外，我们对我们的人体抠图方法进行了定性评估，表明其在实际应用中表现出色。代码和预训练模型将在 PaddleSeg 上提供：https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSeg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需三图（trimap）的高精度自然图像抠图方法PP-Matting，解决了现有方法依赖三图输入的限制。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习抠图方法依赖用户提供的三图作为辅助输入，限制了实际应用；无三图方法存在前景-背景模糊和过渡区域模糊的问题，亟需提升精度。
AI.method: 设计了高分辨率细节分支（HRDB）保持特征分辨率以提取精细前景细节，并引入语义上下文分支（SCB）通过语义分割任务解决语义缺失导致的局部模糊问题。
AI.result: 在Composition-1k和Distinctions-646基准测试中优于现有方法，且在人工抠图任务中表现出色，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: PP-Matting通过双分支结构有效解决了无三图抠图的模糊问题，在精度和实用性上达到新水平，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

In addition, we conduct extensive experiments on two well-known benchmarks: Composition-1k and Distinctions-646. The results demonstrate the superiority of PP-Matting over previous methods. Furthermore, we provide a qualitative evaluation of our method on human matting which shows its outstanding performance in the practical application. The code and pre-trained models will be available at PaddleSeg: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSeg. 自然图像抠图是一项基本且具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务。它在图像编辑和合成方面有许多应用。最近，基于深度学习的方法在图像抠图方面取得了巨大的进步。然而，它们中的大多数需要用户提供的三维贴图作为辅助输入，这限制了现实世界中的抠图应用。尽管已经提出了一些无 trimap 的方法，但与基于 trimap 的方法相比，抠图质量仍然不能令人满意。如果没有三维地图指导，抠图模型很容易遭受前景-背景模糊的影响，并且还会在过渡区域产生模糊的细节。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PP-Matting，这是一种无 trimap 的架构，可以实现高精度的自然图像抠图。我们的方法应用高分辨率细节分支（HRDB），在保持特征分辨率不变的情况下提取前景的细粒度细节。此外，我们提出了一个采用语义分割子任务的语义上下文分支（SCB）。它可以防止由于语义上下文缺失而导致的局部模糊性的细节预测。此外，我们还在两个著名的基准测试上进行了广泛的实验：Composition-1k 和 Distinctions-646。结果证明了 PP-Matting 相对于以前的方法的优越性。此外，我们对我们的人体抠图方法进行了定性评估，表明其在实际应用中表现出色。代码和预训练模型将在 PaddleSeg 上提供：https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleSeg。 本文提出了一种无需三图（trimap）的高精度自然图像抠图方法PP-Matting，解决了现有方法依赖三图输入的限制。 Guowei Chen,Yi Liu,Jian Wang,Juncai Peng,Yuying Hao,Lutao Chu,Shiyu Tang,Zewu Wu,Zeyu Chen,Zhiliang Yu,Yuning Du,Qingqing Dang,Xiaoguang Hu,Dianhai Yu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Şeymanur Aktı,Marwa Qaraqe,Hazım Kemal Ekenel
title: A Mobile Food Recognition System for Dietary Assessment
title_zh: 用于膳食评估的移动食品识别系统
comment: Accepted at GoodBrotherVI4IAAL Workshop @ICIAP2021
comments: Accepted at GoodBrotherVI4IAAL Workshop @ICIAP2021
abstract: Food recognition is an important task for a variety of applications, including managing health conditions and assisting visually impaired people. Several food recognition studies have focused on generic types of food or specific cuisines, however, food recognition with respect to Middle Eastern cuisines has remained unexplored. Therefore, in this paper we focus on developing a mobile friendly, Middle Eastern cuisine focused food recognition application for assisted living purposes. In order to enable a low-latency, high-accuracy food classification system, we opted to utilize the Mobilenet-v2 deep learning model. As some of the foods are more popular than the others, the number of samples per class in the used Middle Eastern food dataset is relatively imbalanced. To compensate for this problem, data augmentation methods are applied on the underrepresented classes. Experimental results show that using Mobilenet-v2 architecture for this task is beneficial in terms of both accuracy and the memory usage. With the model achieving 94% accuracy on 23 food classes, the developed mobile application has potential to serve the visually impaired in automatic food recognition via images.
summary: Food recognition is an important task for a variety of applications, including managing health conditions and assisting visually impaired people. Several food recognition studies have focused on generic types of food or specific cuisines, however, food recognition with respect to Middle Eastern cuisines has remained unexplored. Therefore, in this paper we focus on developing a mobile friendly, Middle Eastern cuisine focused food recognition application for assisted living purposes. In order to enable a low-latency, high-accuracy food classification system, we opted to utilize the Mobilenet-v2 deep learning model. As some of the foods are more popular than the others, the number of samples per class in the used Middle Eastern food dataset is relatively imbalanced. To compensate for this problem, data augmentation methods are applied on the underrepresented classes. Experimental results show that using Mobilenet-v2 architecture for this task is beneficial in terms of both accuracy and the memory usage. With the model achieving 94% accuracy on 23 food classes, the developed mobile application has potential to serve the visually impaired in automatic food recognition via images.
abstract_zh: 食品识别对于各种应用来说都是一项重要任务，包括管理健康状况和帮助视障人士。一些食物识别研究主要集中在一般类型的食物或特定菜肴上，然而，有关中东菜肴的食物识别尚未得到探索。因此，在本文中，我们专注于开发一种移动友好、以中东美食为重点的食品识别应用程序，用于辅助生活目的。为了实现低延迟、高精度的食品分类系统，我们选择利用 Mobilenet-v2 深度学习模型。由于某些食物比其他食物更受欢迎，因此所使用的中东食物数据集中每类的样本数量相对不平衡。为了弥补这个问题，数据增强方法被应用于代表性不足的类。实验结果表明，使用 Mobilenet-v2 架构来完成此任务在准确性和内存使用方面都有好处。该模型对 23 种食品类别的准确率达到 94%，所开发的移动应用程序有潜力通过图像自动识别食品来为视障人士提供服务。

AI.tldr: 开发一款针对中东菜肴的移动食品识别系统，用于饮食评估和辅助生活。
AI.motivation: 现有食品识别研究多集中于通用食品或特定菜系，而中东菜系的食品识别尚未被探索，需为健康管理和视障人士提供支持。
AI.method: 采用轻量级Mobilenet-v2深度学习模型，并通过数据增强技术解决数据集类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 模型在23类中东食品上达到94%的识别准确率，验证了系统在精度和内存效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可有效辅助视障人士通过图像自动识别食品，为中东菜系饮食评估提供可行方案。

authors_text: Qi Guan,Zihao Sheng,Shibei Xue
title: HRPose: Real-Time High-Resolution 6D Pose Estimation Network Using Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: HRPose：使用知识蒸馏的实时高分辨率 6D 姿态估计网络
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, and 5 tables, accepted by Chinese Journal of Electronics
comments: 8 pages, 4 figures, and 5 tables, accepted by Chinese Journal of Electronics
abstract: Real-time 6D object pose estimation is essential for many real-world applications, such as robotic grasping and augmented reality. To achieve an accurate object pose estimation from RGB images in real-time, we propose an effective and lightweight model, namely High-Resolution 6D Pose Estimation Network (HRPose). We adopt the efficient and small HRNetV2-W18 as a feature extractor to reduce computational burdens while generating accurate 6D poses. With only 33\% of the model size and lower computational costs, our HRPose achieves comparable performance compared with state-of-the-art models. Moreover, by transferring knowledge from a large model to our proposed HRPose through output and feature-similarity distillations, the performance of our HRPose is improved in effectiveness and efficiency. Numerical experiments on the widely-used benchmark LINEMOD demonstrate the superiority of our proposed HRPose against state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Real-time 6D object pose estimation is essential for many real-world applications, such as robotic grasping and augmented reality. To achieve an accurate object pose estimation from RGB images in real-time, we propose an effective and lightweight model, namely High-Resolution 6D Pose Estimation Network (HRPose). We adopt the efficient and small HRNetV2-W18 as a feature extractor to reduce computational burdens while generating accurate 6D poses. With only 33\% of the model size and lower computational costs, our HRPose achieves comparable performance compared with state-of-the-art models. Moreover, by transferring knowledge from a large model to our proposed HRPose through output and feature-similarity distillations, the performance of our HRPose is improved in effectiveness and efficiency. Numerical experiments on the widely-used benchmark LINEMOD demonstrate the superiority of our proposed HRPose against state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 实时 6D 物体姿态估计对于许多现实世界的应用至关重要，例如机器人抓取和增强现实。为了实时从 RGB 图像中实现准确的物体姿态估计，我们提出了一种有效且轻量级的模型，即高分辨率 6D 姿态估计网络（HRPose）。我们采用高效且小型的 HRNetV2-W18 作为特征提取器，以减少计算负担，同时生成准确的 6D 位姿。与最先进的模型相比，我们的 HRPose 的性能仅为模型大小的 33% 和更低的计算成本。此外，通过输出和特征相似性蒸馏将知识从大型模型转移到我们提出的 HRPose，我们的 HRPose 的性能在有效性和效率上得到了提高。在广泛使用的基准 LINEMOD 上进行的数值实验证明了我们提出的 HRPose 相对于最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量级的实时高分辨率6D姿态估计网络HRPose，通过知识蒸馏提升性能。
AI.motivation: 实时6D物体姿态估计在机器人抓取和增强现实等应用中至关重要，但现有模型存在计算量大或精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用高效的小型HRNetV2-W18作为特征提取器，并通过输出和特征相似性蒸馏从大模型迁移知识。
AI.result: HRPose模型体积仅为现有方法的33%，计算成本更低，在LINEMOD基准测试中表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HRPose通过知识蒸馏在保持精度的同时显著降低计算负担，验证了其在实时6D姿态估计中的有效性。

authors_text: Tianyu Cui,Gaopeng Gou,Gang Xiong
title: 6GCVAE: Gated Convolutional Variational Autoencoder for IPv6 Target Generation
title_zh: 6GCVAE：用于 IPv6 目标生成的门控卷积变分自动编码器
comment: The paper has been accepted at the Pacific-Asia Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (PAKDD 2020)
comments: The paper has been accepted at the Pacific-Asia Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (PAKDD 2020)
abstract: IPv6 scanning has always been a challenge for researchers in the field of network measurement. Due to the considerable IPv6 address space, while recent network speed and computational power have been improved, using a brute-force approach to probe the entire network space of IPv6 is almost impossible. Systems are required an algorithmic approach to generate more possible active target candidate sets to probe. In this paper, we first try to use deep learning to design such IPv6 target generation algorithms. The model effectively learns the address structure by stacking the gated convolutional layer to construct Variational Autoencoder (VAE). We also introduce two address classification methods to improve the model effect of the target generation. Experiments indicate that our approach 6GCVAE outperformed the conventional VAE models and the state-of-the-art target generation algorithm in two active address datasets.
summary: IPv6 scanning has always been a challenge for researchers in the field of network measurement. Due to the considerable IPv6 address space, while recent network speed and computational power have been improved, using a brute-force approach to probe the entire network space of IPv6 is almost impossible. Systems are required an algorithmic approach to generate more possible active target candidate sets to probe. In this paper, we first try to use deep learning to design such IPv6 target generation algorithms. The model effectively learns the address structure by stacking the gated convolutional layer to construct Variational Autoencoder (VAE). We also introduce two address classification methods to improve the model effect of the target generation. Experiments indicate that our approach 6GCVAE outperformed the conventional VAE models and the state-of-the-art target generation algorithm in two active address datasets.
abstract_zh: IPv6扫描一直是网络测量领域研究人员面临的挑战。由于IPv6地址空间相当大，虽然最近网络速度和计算能力都得到了提高，但使用暴力方法来探测IPv6的整个网络空间几乎是不可能的。系统需要一种算法方法来生成更多可能的活动目标候选集以进行探测。在本文中，我们首先尝试使用深度学习来设计此类IPv6目标生成算法。该模型通过堆叠门控卷积层构建变分自动编码器（VAE）来有效学习地址结构。我们还引入了两种地址分类方法来提高目标生成的模型效果。实验表明，我们的方法 6GCVAE 在两个活动地址数据集中优于传统的 VAE 模型和最先进的目标生成算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于门控卷积变分自编码器（6GCVAE）的算法，用于生成IPv6目标地址以解决网络扫描难题。
AI.motivation: IPv6地址空间巨大，传统暴力扫描方法不可行，需通过算法生成潜在活跃目标集以提高网络测量效率。
AI.method: 设计包含门控卷积层的变分自编码器（VAE），结合两种地址分类方法优化模型，学习IPv6地址结构并生成目标候选集。
AI.result: 实验表明，6GCVAE在两个活跃地址数据集上优于传统VAE模型和现有最先进目标生成算法。
AI.conclusion: 6GCVAE通过深度学习有效解决了IPv6大规模地址空间下的目标生成问题，为网络测量提供了新方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于门控卷积变分自编码器（6GCVAE）的算法，用于生成IPv6目标地址以解决网络扫描难题。
ai_content.motivation: IPv6地址空间巨大，传统暴力扫描方法不可行，需通过算法生成潜在活跃目标集以提高网络测量效率。
ai_content.method: 设计包含门控卷积层的变分自编码器（VAE），结合两种地址分类方法优化模型，学习IPv6地址结构并生成目标候选集。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，6GCVAE在两个活跃地址数据集上优于传统VAE模型和现有最先进目标生成算法。
ai_content.conclusion: 6GCVAE通过深度学习有效解决了IPv6大规模地址空间下的目标生成问题，为网络测量提供了新方法。

search_text: 6GCVAE: Gated Convolutional Variational Autoencoder for IPv6 Target Generation 6GCVAE：用于 IPv6 目标生成的门控卷积变分自动编码器 IPv6 scanning has always been a challenge for researchers in the field of network measurement. Due to the considerable IPv6 address space, while recent network speed and computational power have been improved, using a brute-force approach to probe the entire network space of IPv6 is almost impossible. Systems are required an algorithmic approach to generate more possible active target candidate sets to probe. In this paper, we first try to use deep learning to design such IPv6 target generation algorithms. The model effectively learns the address structure by stacking the gated convolutional layer to construct Variational Autoencoder (VAE). We also introduce two address classification methods to improve the model effect of the target generation. Experiments indicate that our approach 6GCVAE outperformed the conventional VAE models and the state-of-the-art target generation algorithm in two active address datasets. IPv6扫描一直是网络测量领域研究人员面临的挑战。由于IPv6地址空间相当大，虽然最近网络速度和计算能力都得到了提高，但使用暴力方法来探测IPv6的整个网络空间几乎是不可能的。系统需要一种算法方法来生成更多可能的活动目标候选集以进行探测。在本文中，我们首先尝试使用深度学习来设计此类IPv6目标生成算法。该模型通过堆叠门控卷积层构建变分自动编码器（VAE）来有效学习地址结构。我们还引入了两种地址分类方法来提高目标生成的模型效果。实验表明，我们的方法 6GCVAE 在两个活动地址数据集中优于传统的 VAE 模型和最先进的目标生成算法。 本文提出一种基于门控卷积变分自编码器（6GCVAE）的算法，用于生成IPv6目标地址以解决网络扫描难题。 Tianyu Cui,Gaopeng Gou,Gang Xiong cs.NI,cs.AI

authors_text: Yannis Flet-Berliac,Debabrota Basu
title: SAAC: Safe Reinforcement Learning as an Adversarial Game of Actor-Critics
title_zh: SAAC：安全强化学习作为演员批评家的对抗游戏
comment: Accepted at the 5th Multi-disciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 5th Multi-disciplinary Conference on Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making (RLDM 2022)
abstract: Although Reinforcement Learning (RL) is effective for sequential decision-making problems under uncertainty, it still fails to thrive in real-world systems where risk or safety is a binding constraint. In this paper, we formulate the RL problem with safety constraints as a non-zero-sum game. While deployed with maximum entropy RL, this formulation leads to a safe adversarially guided soft actor-critic framework, called SAAC. In SAAC, the adversary aims to break the safety constraint while the RL agent aims to maximize the constrained value function given the adversary's policy. The safety constraint on the agent's value function manifests only as a repulsion term between the agent's and the adversary's policies. Unlike previous approaches, SAAC can address different safety criteria such as safe exploration, mean-variance risk sensitivity, and CVaR-like coherent risk sensitivity. We illustrate the design of the adversary for these constraints. Then, in each of these variations, we show the agent differentiates itself from the adversary's unsafe actions in addition to learning to solve the task. Finally, for challenging continuous control tasks, we demonstrate that SAAC achieves faster convergence, better efficiency, and fewer failures to satisfy the safety constraints than risk-averse distributional RL and risk-neutral soft actor-critic algorithms.
summary: Although Reinforcement Learning (RL) is effective for sequential decision-making problems under uncertainty, it still fails to thrive in real-world systems where risk or safety is a binding constraint. In this paper, we formulate the RL problem with safety constraints as a non-zero-sum game. While deployed with maximum entropy RL, this formulation leads to a safe adversarially guided soft actor-critic framework, called SAAC. In SAAC, the adversary aims to break the safety constraint while the RL agent aims to maximize the constrained value function given the adversary's policy. The safety constraint on the agent's value function manifests only as a repulsion term between the agent's and the adversary's policies. Unlike previous approaches, SAAC can address different safety criteria such as safe exploration, mean-variance risk sensitivity, and CVaR-like coherent risk sensitivity. We illustrate the design of the adversary for these constraints. Then, in each of these variations, we show the agent differentiates itself from the adversary's unsafe actions in addition to learning to solve the task. Finally, for challenging continuous control tasks, we demonstrate that SAAC achieves faster convergence, better efficiency, and fewer failures to satisfy the safety constraints than risk-averse distributional RL and risk-neutral soft actor-critic algorithms.
abstract_zh: 尽管强化学习（RL）对于不确定性下的顺序决策问题是有效的，但它仍然无法在风险或安全是约束性约束的现实系统中蓬勃发展。在本文中，我们将具有安全约束的强化学习问题表述为非零和博弈。当部署最大熵强化学习时，这种公式会产生一个安全的对抗性引导的软演员批评框架，称为 SAAC。在 SAAC 中，对手的目标是打破安全约束，而 RL 代理的目标是在给定对手策略的情况下最大化约束价值函数。智能体价值函数的安全约束仅表现为智能体和对手策略之间的排斥项。与以前的方法不同，SAAC 可以解决不同的安全标准，例如安全探索、均值方差风险敏感性和类似 CVaR 的相干风险敏感性。我们说明了对手针对这些约束的设计。然后，在每个变体中，我们展示了代理除了学习解决任务之外，还可以将自己与对手的不安全行为区分开来。最后，对于具有挑战性的连续控制任务，我们证明 SAAC 比风险规避的分布式 RL 和风险中性的软执行者批评算法实现了更快的收敛、更高的效率和更少的失败来满足安全约束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAAC框架，将安全强化学习建模为对抗博弈，通过演员-评论家间的对抗实现安全约束。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在现实安全约束场景下表现不足，现有方法难以处理多种安全准则如安全探索、风险敏感性等。
AI.method: 将安全约束转化为非零和博弈，设计对抗者破坏约束而智能体最大化约束价值函数，通过策略间的排斥项实现安全控制。
AI.result: 在连续控制任务中，SAAC相比风险规避分布RL和风险中性SAC算法收敛更快、效率更高且安全约束违规更少。
AI.conclusion: SAAC通过对抗博弈机制有效解决多类安全问题，在安全性和性能间取得平衡，为安全强化学习提供新思路。

In this paper, we formulate the RL problem with safety constraints as a non-zero-sum game. While deployed with maximum entropy RL, this formulation leads to a safe adversarially guided soft actor-critic framework, called SAAC. In SAAC, the adversary aims to break the safety constraint while the RL agent aims to maximize the constrained value function given the adversary's policy. The safety constraint on the agent's value function manifests only as a repulsion term between the agent's and the adversary's policies. Unlike previous approaches, SAAC can address different safety criteria such as safe exploration, mean-variance risk sensitivity, and CVaR-like coherent risk sensitivity. We illustrate the design of the adversary for these constraints. Then, in each of these variations, we show the agent differentiates itself from the adversary's unsafe actions in addition to learning to solve the task. Finally, for challenging continuous control tasks, we demonstrate that SAAC achieves faster convergence, better efficiency, and fewer failures to satisfy the safety constraints than risk-averse distributional RL and risk-neutral soft actor-critic algorithms. 尽管强化学习（RL）对于不确定性下的顺序决策问题是有效的，但它仍然无法在风险或安全是约束性约束的现实系统中蓬勃发展。在本文中，我们将具有安全约束的强化学习问题表述为非零和博弈。当部署最大熵强化学习时，这种公式会产生一个安全的对抗性引导的软演员批评框架，称为 SAAC。在 SAAC 中，对手的目标是打破安全约束，而 RL 代理的目标是在给定对手策略的情况下最大化约束价值函数。智能体价值函数的安全约束仅表现为智能体和对手策略之间的排斥项。与以前的方法不同，SAAC 可以解决不同的安全标准，例如安全探索、均值方差风险敏感性和类似 CVaR 的相干风险敏感性。我们说明了对手针对这些约束的设计。然后，在每个变体中，我们展示了代理除了学习解决任务之外，还可以将自己与对手的不安全行为区分开来。最后，对于具有挑战性的连续控制任务，我们证明 SAAC 比风险规避的分布式 RL 和风险中性的软执行者批评算法实现了更快的收敛、更高的效率和更少的失败来满足安全约束。 本文提出SAAC框架，将安全强化学习建模为对抗博弈，通过演员-评论家间的对抗实现安全约束。 Yannis Flet-Berliac,Debabrota Basu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.GT

authors_text: Zhiwei Xu,Dapeng Li,Bin Zhang,Yuan Zhan,Yunpeng Bai,Guoliang Fan
title: Mingling Foresight with Imagination: Model-Based Cooperative Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 将远见与想象力融为一体：基于模型的协作多智能体强化学习
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures, 2 tables
comments: 16 pages, 9 figures, 2 tables
abstract: Recently, model-based agents have achieved better performance than model-free ones using the same computational budget and training time in single-agent environments. However, due to the complexity of multi-agent systems, it is tough to learn the model of the environment. The significant compounding error may hinder the learning process when model-based methods are applied to multi-agent tasks. This paper proposes an implicit model-based multi-agent reinforcement learning method based on value decomposition methods. Under this method, agents can interact with the learned virtual environment and evaluate the current state value according to imagined future states in the latent space, making agents have the foresight. Our approach can be applied to any multi-agent value decomposition method. The experimental results show that our method improves the sample efficiency in different partially observable Markov decision process domains.
summary: Recently, model-based agents have achieved better performance than model-free ones using the same computational budget and training time in single-agent environments. However, due to the complexity of multi-agent systems, it is tough to learn the model of the environment. The significant compounding error may hinder the learning process when model-based methods are applied to multi-agent tasks. This paper proposes an implicit model-based multi-agent reinforcement learning method based on value decomposition methods. Under this method, agents can interact with the learned virtual environment and evaluate the current state value according to imagined future states in the latent space, making agents have the foresight. Our approach can be applied to any multi-agent value decomposition method. The experimental results show that our method improves the sample efficiency in different partially observable Markov decision process domains.
abstract_zh: 最近，在单代理环境中使用相同的计算预算和训练时间，基于模型的代理比无模型的代理取得了更好的性能。然而，由于多智能体系统的复杂性，学习环境模型很困难。当基于模型的方法应用于多智能体任务时，显着的复合误差可能会阻碍学习过程。本文提出了一种基于价值分解方法的隐式模型多智能体强化学习方法。在这种方法下，智能体可以与学习的虚拟环境进行交互，并根据潜在空间中想象的未来状态来评估当前状态值，使智能体具有先见之明。我们的方法可以应用于任何多智能体价值分解方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法提高了不同部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程域中的样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于价值分解的隐式模型驱动多智能体强化学习方法，通过结合前瞻与想象提升多智能体任务的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 模型驱动方法在单智能体环境中表现优于无模型方法，但多智能体系统的复杂性导致环境建模困难，且模型误差会显著影响学习效果。
AI.method: 基于价值分解框架，智能体通过交互虚拟环境并在潜在空间中想象未来状态，评估当前状态价值，实现前瞻性决策。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在不同部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程领域中显著提升了样本效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合前瞻与想象机制，本文方法有效解决了多智能体环境中的模型误差问题，为模型驱动多智能体强化学习提供了新思路。

Under this method, agents can interact with the learned virtual environment and evaluate the current state value according to imagined future states in the latent space, making agents have the foresight. Our approach can be applied to any multi-agent value decomposition method. The experimental results show that our method improves the sample efficiency in different partially observable Markov decision process domains. 最近，在单代理环境中使用相同的计算预算和训练时间，基于模型的代理比无模型的代理取得了更好的性能。然而，由于多智能体系统的复杂性，学习环境模型很困难。当基于模型的方法应用于多智能体任务时，显着的复合误差可能会阻碍学习过程。本文提出了一种基于价值分解方法的隐式模型多智能体强化学习方法。在这种方法下，智能体可以与学习的虚拟环境进行交互，并根据潜在空间中想象的未来状态来评估当前状态值，使智能体具有先见之明。我们的方法可以应用于任何多智能体价值分解方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法提高了不同部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程域中的样本效率。 本文提出了一种基于价值分解的隐式模型驱动多智能体强化学习方法，通过结合前瞻与想象提升多智能体任务的样本效率。 Zhiwei Xu,Dapeng Li,Bin Zhang,Yuan Zhan,Yunpeng Bai,Guoliang Fan cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Meng Liu,Youzhi Luo,Kanji Uchino,Koji Maruhashi,Shuiwang Ji
title: Generating 3D Molecules for Target Protein Binding
title_zh: 生成用于目标蛋白结合的 3D 分子
comment: Accepted by ICML 2022 as a Long Presentation
comments: Accepted by ICML 2022 as a Long Presentation
abstract: A fundamental problem in drug discovery is to design molecules that bind to specific proteins. To tackle this problem using machine learning methods, here we propose a novel and effective framework, known as GraphBP, to generate 3D molecules that bind to given proteins by placing atoms of specific types and locations to the given binding site one by one. In particular, at each step, we first employ a 3D graph neural network to obtain geometry-aware and chemically informative representations from the intermediate contextual information. Such context includes the given binding site and atoms placed in the previous steps. Second, to preserve the desirable equivariance property, we select a local reference atom according to the designed auxiliary classifiers and then construct a local spherical coordinate system. Finally, to place a new atom, we generate its atom type and relative location w.r.t. the constructed local coordinate system via a flow model. We also consider generating the variables of interest sequentially to capture the underlying dependencies among them. Experiments demonstrate that our GraphBP is effective to generate 3D molecules with binding ability to target protein binding sites. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/divelab/GraphBP.
summary: A fundamental problem in drug discovery is to design molecules that bind to specific proteins. To tackle this problem using machine learning methods, here we propose a novel and effective framework, known as GraphBP, to generate 3D molecules that bind to given proteins by placing atoms of specific types and locations to the given binding site one by one. In particular, at each step, we first employ a 3D graph neural network to obtain geometry-aware and chemically informative representations from the intermediate contextual information. Such context includes the given binding site and atoms placed in the previous steps. Second, to preserve the desirable equivariance property, we select a local reference atom according to the designed auxiliary classifiers and then construct a local spherical coordinate system. Finally, to place a new atom, we generate its atom type and relative location w.r.t. the constructed local coordinate system via a flow model. We also consider generating the variables of interest sequentially to capture the underlying dependencies among them. Experiments demonstrate that our GraphBP is effective to generate 3D molecules with binding ability to target protein binding sites. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/divelab/GraphBP.
abstract_zh: 药物发现的一个基本问题是设计与特定蛋白质结合的分子。为了使用机器学习方法解决这个问题，我们在这里提出了一种新颖有效的框架，称为 GraphBP，通过将特定类型和位置的原子逐个放置到给定的结合位点来生成与给定蛋白质结合的 3D 分子。特别是，在每个步骤中，我们首先采用 3D 图神经网络从中间上下文信息中获取几何感知和化学信息表示。这样的上下文包括给定的结合位点和前面步骤中放置的原子。其次，为了保持所需的等方差性质，我们根据设计的辅助分类器选择局部参考原子，然后构造局部球坐标系。最后，为了放置一个新原子，我们生成它的原子类型和相对位置。通过流模型构建的局部坐标系。我们还考虑顺序生成感兴趣的变量以捕获它们之间的潜在依赖关系。实验证明，我们的 GraphBP 可以有效生成具有与目标蛋白结合位点结合能力的 3D 分子。我们的实现可以在 https://github.com/divelab/GraphBP 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GraphBP的框架，用于生成能够与目标蛋白结合的3D分子。
AI.motivation: 药物研发中设计能特异性结合蛋白质的分子是一个核心难题，传统方法效率低且成本高。
AI.method: 通过3D图神经网络获取几何感知表示，结合局部参考原子构建球坐标系，并利用流模型依次生成原子类型与位置。
AI.result: 实验表明GraphBP能有效生成具有靶标蛋白结合能力的3D分子，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: GraphBP为基于深度学习的分子生成提供了新方法，可加速药物研发进程。

authors_text: Ran Cui,Tianwen Qian,Pai Peng,Elena Daskalaki,Jingjing Chen,Xiaowei Guo,Huyang Sun,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: Video Moment Retrieval from Text Queries via Single Frame Annotation
title_zh: 通过单帧注释从文本查询中检索视频时刻
comment: Accepted as full paper in SIGIR 2022
comments: Accepted as full paper in SIGIR 2022
abstract: Video moment retrieval aims at finding the start and end timestamps of a moment (part of a video) described by a given natural language query. Fully supervised methods need complete temporal boundary annotations to achieve promising results, which is costly since the annotator needs to watch the whole moment. Weakly supervised methods only rely on the paired video and query, but the performance is relatively poor. In this paper, we look closer into the annotation process and propose a new paradigm called "glance annotation". This paradigm requires the timestamp of only one single random frame, which we refer to as a "glance", within the temporal boundary of the fully supervised counterpart. We argue this is beneficial because comparing to weak supervision, trivial cost is added yet more potential in performance is provided. Under the glance annotation setting, we propose a method named as Video moment retrieval via Glance Annotation (ViGA) based on contrastive learning. ViGA cuts the input video into clips and contrasts between clips and queries, in which glance guided Gaussian distributed weights are assigned to all clips. Our extensive experiments indicate that ViGA achieves better results than the state-of-the-art weakly supervised methods by a large margin, even comparable to fully supervised methods in some cases.
summary: Video moment retrieval aims at finding the start and end timestamps of a moment (part of a video) described by a given natural language query. Fully supervised methods need complete temporal boundary annotations to achieve promising results, which is costly since the annotator needs to watch the whole moment. Weakly supervised methods only rely on the paired video and query, but the performance is relatively poor. In this paper, we look closer into the annotation process and propose a new paradigm called "glance annotation". This paradigm requires the timestamp of only one single random frame, which we refer to as a "glance", within the temporal boundary of the fully supervised counterpart. We argue this is beneficial because comparing to weak supervision, trivial cost is added yet more potential in performance is provided. Under the glance annotation setting, we propose a method named as Video moment retrieval via Glance Annotation (ViGA) based on contrastive learning. ViGA cuts the input video into clips and contrasts between clips and queries, in which glance guided Gaussian distributed weights are assigned to all clips. Our extensive experiments indicate that ViGA achieves better results than the state-of-the-art weakly supervised methods by a large margin, even comparable to fully supervised methods in some cases.
abstract_zh: 视频时刻检索旨在查找给定自然语言查询描述的时刻（视频的一部分）的开始和结束时间戳。完全监督的方法需要完整的时间边界注释才能获得有希望的结果，这是昂贵的，因为注释者需要观察整个时刻。弱监督方法仅依赖于配对视频和查询，但性能相对较差。在本文中，我们更深入地研究了注释过程，并提出了一种称为“概览注释”的新范式。这种范例只需要一个随机帧的时间戳，我们将其称为“概览”，在完全监督的对应部分的时间边界内。我们认为这是有益的，因为与弱监督相比，增加了微不足道的成本，但提供了更大的绩效潜力。在扫视注释设置下，我们提出了一种基于对比学习的基于扫视注释的视频时刻检索（ViGA）方法。 ViGA 将输入视频切割成剪辑，并在剪辑和查询之间进行对比，其中将扫视引导的高斯分布权重分配给所有剪辑。我们的大量实验表明，ViGA 比最先进的弱监督方法取得了很大的进步，在某些情况下甚至可以与完全监督方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过单帧标注进行视频片段检索的方法，旨在解决传统全监督和弱监督方法在成本与性能上的不足。
AI.motivation: 全监督方法需完整标注时间边界成本高，弱监督方法性能较差。本文通过引入单帧标注（glance annotation）在低成本与高性能间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出ViGA方法，基于对比学习将视频切分为片段，利用单帧标注引导的高斯分布权重进行片段与查询的对比学习。
AI.result: 实验表明ViGA在弱监督方法中表现显著优于现有方法，部分场景性能可与全监督方法媲美。
AI.conclusion: 单帧标注范式有效降低了标注成本，同时通过对比学习框架提升了视频片段检索的性能，为半监督方法提供了新思路。

authors_text: Daniel Martin,Diego Gutierrez,Belen Masia
title: A Probabilistic Time-Evolving Approach to Scanpath Prediction
title_zh: 扫描路径预测的概率时间演化方法
comment: Under submission
comments: Under submission
abstract: Human visual attention is a complex phenomenon that has been studied for decades. Within it, the particular problem of scanpath prediction poses a challenge, particularly due to the inter- and intra-observer variability, among other reasons. Besides, most existing approaches to scanpath prediction have focused on optimizing the prediction of a gaze point given the previous ones. In this work, we present a probabilistic time-evolving approach to scanpath prediction, based on Bayesian deep learning. We optimize our model using a novel spatio-temporal loss function based on a combination of Kullback-Leibler divergence and dynamic time warping, jointly considering the spatial and temporal dimensions of scanpaths. Our scanpath prediction framework yields results that outperform those of current state-of-the-art approaches, and are almost on par with the human baseline, suggesting that our model is able to generate scanpaths whose behavior closely resembles those of the real ones.
summary: Human visual attention is a complex phenomenon that has been studied for decades. Within it, the particular problem of scanpath prediction poses a challenge, particularly due to the inter- and intra-observer variability, among other reasons. Besides, most existing approaches to scanpath prediction have focused on optimizing the prediction of a gaze point given the previous ones. In this work, we present a probabilistic time-evolving approach to scanpath prediction, based on Bayesian deep learning. We optimize our model using a novel spatio-temporal loss function based on a combination of Kullback-Leibler divergence and dynamic time warping, jointly considering the spatial and temporal dimensions of scanpaths. Our scanpath prediction framework yields results that outperform those of current state-of-the-art approaches, and are almost on par with the human baseline, suggesting that our model is able to generate scanpaths whose behavior closely resembles those of the real ones.
abstract_zh: 人类视觉注意力是一个复杂的现象，人们已经研究了几十年。其中，扫描路径预测的特定问题提出了挑战，特别是由于观察者之间和观察者内部的可变性等原因。此外，大多数现有的扫描路径预测方法都集中于在给定先前的情况下优化注视点的预测。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于贝叶斯深度学习的概率时间演化扫描路径预测方法。我们使用基于 Kullback-Leibler 散度和动态时间扭曲相结合的新型时空损失函数来优化我们的模型，同时考虑扫描路径的空间和时间维度。我们的扫描路径预测框架产生的结果优于当前最先进的方法，并且几乎与人类基线相当，这表明我们的模型能够生成其行为与真实路径非常相似的扫描路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯深度学习的概率时变方法，用于预测人类视觉扫描路径。
AI.motivation: 现有扫描路径预测方法难以处理观察者间和观察者内的变异性，且主要优化单个注视点预测，未能全面考虑时空特性。
AI.method: 构建贝叶斯深度学习框架，结合Kullback-Leibler散度与动态时间规整的时空损失函数，联合建模扫描路径的时空维度。
AI.result: 模型性能超越现有最先进方法，接近人类基线水平，生成的扫描路径行为与真实数据高度相似。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过概率时变建模有效捕捉扫描路径的时空特性，为视觉注意预测提供了新思路。

search_text: A Probabilistic Time-Evolving Approach to Scanpath Prediction 扫描路径预测的概率时间演化方法 Human visual attention is a complex phenomenon that has been studied for decades. Within it, the particular problem of scanpath prediction poses a challenge, particularly due to the inter- and intra-observer variability, among other reasons. Besides, most existing approaches to scanpath prediction have focused on optimizing the prediction of a gaze point given the previous ones. In this work, we present a probabilistic time-evolving approach to scanpath prediction, based on Bayesian deep learning. We optimize our model using a novel spatio-temporal loss function based on a combination of Kullback-Leibler divergence and dynamic time warping, jointly considering the spatial and temporal dimensions of scanpaths. Our scanpath prediction framework yields results that outperform those of current state-of-the-art approaches, and are almost on par with the human baseline, suggesting that our model is able to generate scanpaths whose behavior closely resembles those of the real ones. 人类视觉注意力是一个复杂的现象，人们已经研究了几十年。其中，扫描路径预测的特定问题提出了挑战，特别是由于观察者之间和观察者内部的可变性等原因。此外，大多数现有的扫描路径预测方法都集中于在给定先前的情况下优化注视点的预测。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于贝叶斯深度学习的概率时间演化扫描路径预测方法。我们使用基于 Kullback-Leibler 散度和动态时间扭曲相结合的新型时空损失函数来优化我们的模型，同时考虑扫描路径的空间和时间维度。我们的扫描路径预测框架产生的结果优于当前最先进的方法，并且几乎与人类基线相当，这表明我们的模型能够生成其行为与真实路径非常相似的扫描路径。 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯深度学习的概率时变方法，用于预测人类视觉扫描路径。 Daniel Martin,Diego Gutierrez,Belen Masia cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Mingyuan Fan,Yang Liu,Cen Chen
title: Case-Aware Adversarial Training
title_zh: 案例感知对抗训练
abstract: The neural network (NN) becomes one of the most heated type of models in various signal processing applications. However, NNs are extremely vulnerable to adversarial examples (AEs). To defend AEs, adversarial training (AT) is believed to be the most effective method while due to the intensive computation, AT is limited to be applied in most applications. In this paper, to resolve the problem, we design a generic and efficient AT improvement scheme, namely case-aware adversarial training (CAT). Specifically, the intuition stems from the fact that a very limited part of informative samples can contribute to most of model performance. Alternatively, if only the most informative AEs are used in AT, we can lower the computation complexity of AT significantly as maintaining the defense effect. To achieve this, CAT achieves two breakthroughs. First, a method to estimate the information degree of adversarial examples is proposed for AE filtering. Second, to further enrich the information that the NN can obtain from AEs, CAT involves a weight estimation and class-level balancing based sampling strategy to increase the diversity of AT at each iteration. Extensive experiments show that CAT is faster than vanilla AT by up to 3x while achieving competitive defense effect.
summary: The neural network (NN) becomes one of the most heated type of models in various signal processing applications. However, NNs are extremely vulnerable to adversarial examples (AEs). To defend AEs, adversarial training (AT) is believed to be the most effective method while due to the intensive computation, AT is limited to be applied in most applications. In this paper, to resolve the problem, we design a generic and efficient AT improvement scheme, namely case-aware adversarial training (CAT). Specifically, the intuition stems from the fact that a very limited part of informative samples can contribute to most of model performance. Alternatively, if only the most informative AEs are used in AT, we can lower the computation complexity of AT significantly as maintaining the defense effect. To achieve this, CAT achieves two breakthroughs. First, a method to estimate the information degree of adversarial examples is proposed for AE filtering. Second, to further enrich the information that the NN can obtain from AEs, CAT involves a weight estimation and class-level balancing based sampling strategy to increase the diversity of AT at each iteration. Extensive experiments show that CAT is faster than vanilla AT by up to 3x while achieving competitive defense effect.
abstract_zh: 神经网络（NN）成为各种信号处理应用中最热门的模型类型之一。然而，神经网络极易受到对抗性例子（AE）的影响。为了防御AE，对抗性训练（AT）被认为是最有效的方法，但由于计算量大，AT仅限于在大多数应用中使用。在本文中，为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种通用且高效的AT改进方案，即案例感知对抗训练（CAT）。具体来说，这种直觉源于这样一个事实：信息样本中非常有限的一部分可以对大部分模型性能做出贡献。或者，如果在 AT 中仅使用信息量最大的 AE，我们可以在保持防御效果的同时显着降低 AT 的计算复杂度。为了实现这一目标，CAT 实现了两项突破。首先，提出了一种用于AE过滤的估计对抗样本信息度的方法。其次，为了进一步丰富神经网络可以从AE获得的信息，CAT涉及基于权重估计和类级平衡的采样策略，以增加每次迭代时AT的多样性。大量实验表明，CAT 的速度比普通 AT 快达 3 倍，同时实现竞争性防御效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Case-Aware Adversarial Training (CAT)的高效对抗训练方法，通过筛选关键对抗样本和优化采样策略，在保持防御效果的同时显著降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗训练（AT）虽有效但计算成本过高，限制了其在实际应用中的使用。作者观察到仅有少量信息量大的样本对模型性能提升贡献最大，因此提出通过聚焦关键对抗样本来提升训练效率。
AI.method: CAT通过两个创新点实现优化：1) 提出对抗样本信息度评估方法进行过滤；2) 设计基于权重估计和类别平衡的采样策略，增强对抗训练的多样性与信息丰富性。
AI.result: 实验表明，CAT相比传统AT训练速度提升最高达3倍，同时保持了具有竞争力的防御效果。
AI.conclusion: CAT通过聚焦关键对抗样本和优化采样策略，成功实现了高效且有效的对抗训练，在计算效率与防御性能之间取得了良好平衡。

authors_text: Loris Giulivi,Malhar Jere,Loris Rossi,Farinaz Koushanfar,Gabriela Ciocarlie,Briland Hitaj,Giacomo Boracchi
title: Adversarial Scratches: Deployable Attacks to CNN Classifiers
title_zh: 对抗性划痕：对 CNN 分类器的可部署攻击
comment: This work is published at Pattern Recognition (Elsevier). This paper stems from 'Scratch that! An Evolution-based Adversarial Attack against Neural Networks' for which an arXiv preprint is available at arXiv:1912.02316. Further studies led to a complete overhaul of the work, resulting in this paper
comments: This work is published at Pattern Recognition (Elsevier). This paper stems from 'Scratch that! An Evolution-based Adversarial Attack against Neural Networks' for which an arXiv preprint is available at arXiv:1912.02316. Further studies led to a complete overhaul of the work, resulting in this paper
abstract: A growing body of work has shown that deep neural networks are susceptible to adversarial examples. These take the form of small perturbations applied to the model's input which lead to incorrect predictions. Unfortunately, most literature focuses on visually imperceivable perturbations to be applied to digital images that often are, by design, impossible to be deployed to physical targets. We present Adversarial Scratches: a novel L0 black-box attack, which takes the form of scratches in images, and which possesses much greater deployability than other state-of-the-art attacks. Adversarial Scratches leverage Bézier Curves to reduce the dimension of the search space and possibly constrain the attack to a specific location. We test Adversarial Scratches in several scenarios, including a publicly available API and images of traffic signs. Results show that, often, our attack achieves higher fooling rate than other deployable state-of-the-art methods, while requiring significantly fewer queries and modifying very few pixels.
summary: A growing body of work has shown that deep neural networks are susceptible to adversarial examples. These take the form of small perturbations applied to the model's input which lead to incorrect predictions. Unfortunately, most literature focuses on visually imperceivable perturbations to be applied to digital images that often are, by design, impossible to be deployed to physical targets. We present Adversarial Scratches: a novel L0 black-box attack, which takes the form of scratches in images, and which possesses much greater deployability than other state-of-the-art attacks. Adversarial Scratches leverage Bézier Curves to reduce the dimension of the search space and possibly constrain the attack to a specific location. We test Adversarial Scratches in several scenarios, including a publicly available API and images of traffic signs. Results show that, often, our attack achieves higher fooling rate than other deployable state-of-the-art methods, while requiring significantly fewer queries and modifying very few pixels.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的工作表明，深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。这些以小扰动的形式应用于模型的输入，从而导致错误的预测。不幸的是，大多数文献关注的是应用于数字图像的视觉上不可感知的扰动，而这些扰动通常在设计上不可能部署到物理目标。我们提出了对抗性划痕：一种新颖的 L0 黑盒攻击，它采用图像划痕的形式，并且比其他最先进的攻击具有更大的可部署性。对抗性划痕利用贝塞尔曲线来减少搜索空间的维度，并可能将攻击限制在特定位置。我们在多种场景中测试对抗性划痕，包括公开可用的 API 和交通标志图像。结果表明，我们的攻击通常比其他可部署的最先进方法实现了更高的欺骗率，同时需要的查询数量显着减少，并且修改的像素也很少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Adversarial Scratches的新型L0黑盒攻击方法，通过在图像上添加划痕实现对CNN分类器的可部署攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗样本研究多针对数字图像的不可见扰动，难以实际部署到物理目标。本文旨在开发一种更易在现实场景中应用的对抗攻击方法。
AI.method: 利用贝塞尔曲线降低搜索空间维度并限制攻击区域，通过少量像素修改生成可部署的划痕攻击样本。
AI.result: 在公开API和交通标志图像测试中，该方法在欺骗成功率上优于现有可部署攻击方法，且所需查询次数和修改像素数显著减少。
AI.conclusion: Adversarial Scratches通过物理可实现的划痕扰动，提供了比现有方法更高效且更具实用性的对抗攻击方案。

search_text: Adversarial Scratches: Deployable Attacks to CNN Classifiers 对抗性划痕：对 CNN 分类器的可部署攻击 A growing body of work has shown that deep neural networks are susceptible to adversarial examples. These take the form of small perturbations applied to the model's input which lead to incorrect predictions. Unfortunately, most literature focuses on visually imperceivable perturbations to be applied to digital images that often are, by design, impossible to be deployed to physical targets. We present Adversarial Scratches: a novel L0 black-box attack, which takes the form of scratches in images, and which possesses much greater deployability than other state-of-the-art attacks. Adversarial Scratches leverage Bézier Curves to reduce the dimension of the search space and possibly constrain the attack to a specific location. We test Adversarial Scratches in several scenarios, including a publicly available API and images of traffic signs. Results show that, often, our attack achieves higher fooling rate than other deployable state-of-the-art methods, while requiring significantly fewer queries and modifying very few pixels. 越来越多的工作表明，深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性例子的影响。这些以小扰动的形式应用于模型的输入，从而导致错误的预测。不幸的是，大多数文献关注的是应用于数字图像的视觉上不可感知的扰动，而这些扰动通常在设计上不可能部署到物理目标。我们提出了对抗性划痕：一种新颖的 L0 黑盒攻击，它采用图像划痕的形式，并且比其他最先进的攻击具有更大的可部署性。对抗性划痕利用贝塞尔曲线来减少搜索空间的维度，并可能将攻击限制在特定位置。我们在多种场景中测试对抗性划痕，包括公开可用的 API 和交通标志图像。结果表明，我们的攻击通常比其他可部署的最先进方法实现了更高的欺骗率，同时需要的查询数量显着减少，并且修改的像素也很少。 本文提出了一种名为Adversarial Scratches的新型L0黑盒攻击方法，通过在图像上添加划痕实现对CNN分类器的可部署攻击。 Loris Giulivi,Malhar Jere,Loris Rossi,Farinaz Koushanfar,Gabriela Ciocarlie,Briland Hitaj,Giacomo Boracchi cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Esteban Garzón,Raffaele De Rose,Felice Crupi,Lionel Trojman,Adam Teman,Marco Lanuzza
title: Adjusting Thermal Stability in Double-Barrier MTJ for Energy Improvement in Cryogenic STT-MRAMs
title_zh: 调整双势垒 MTJ 的热稳定性以提高低温 STT-MRAM 的能量
comment: ef:Solid-State Electronics, 2022
comments: ef:Solid-State Electronics, 2022
abstract: This paper investigates the impact of thermal stability relaxation in double-barrier magnetic tunnel junctions (DMTJs) for energy-efficient spin-transfer torque magnetic random access memories (STT-MRAMs) operating at the liquid nitrogen boiling point (77K). Our study is carried out through a macrospin-based Verilog-A compact model of DMTJ, along with a 65nm commercial process design kit (PDK) calibrated down to 77K under silicon measurements. Comprehensive bitcell-level electrical characterization is used to estimate the energy/latency per operation and leakage power at the memory architecture-level. As a main result of our analysis, we show that energy-efficient small-to-large embedded memories can be obtained by significantly relaxing the non-volatility requirement of DMTJ devices at room temperature (i.e., by reducing the cross-section area), while maintaining the typical 10-years retention time at cryogenic temperatures. This makes DMTJ-based STT-MRAM operating at 77K more energy-efficient than six-transistors static random-access memory (6T-SRAM) under both read and write accesses (-56% and -37% on average, respectively). Obtained results thus prove that DMTJ-based STT-MRAM with relaxed retention time is a promising alternative for the realization of reliable and energy-efficient embedded memories operating at cryogenic temperatures.
summary: This paper investigates the impact of thermal stability relaxation in double-barrier magnetic tunnel junctions (DMTJs) for energy-efficient spin-transfer torque magnetic random access memories (STT-MRAMs) operating at the liquid nitrogen boiling point (77K). Our study is carried out through a macrospin-based Verilog-A compact model of DMTJ, along with a 65nm commercial process design kit (PDK) calibrated down to 77K under silicon measurements. Comprehensive bitcell-level electrical characterization is used to estimate the energy/latency per operation and leakage power at the memory architecture-level. As a main result of our analysis, we show that energy-efficient small-to-large embedded memories can be obtained by significantly relaxing the non-volatility requirement of DMTJ devices at room temperature (i.e., by reducing the cross-section area), while maintaining the typical 10-years retention time at cryogenic temperatures. This makes DMTJ-based STT-MRAM operating at 77K more energy-efficient than six-transistors static random-access memory (6T-SRAM) under both read and write accesses (-56% and -37% on average, respectively). Obtained results thus prove that DMTJ-based STT-MRAM with relaxed retention time is a promising alternative for the realization of reliable and energy-efficient embedded memories operating at cryogenic temperatures.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了双势垒磁性隧道结 (DMTJ) 热稳定性弛豫对在液氮沸点 (77K) 下运行的节能自旋转移矩磁性随机存取存储器 (STT-MRAM) 的影响。我们的研究是通过基于 Macrospin 的 Verilog-A 紧凑型 DMTJ 模型以及在硅测量下校准至 77K 的 65nm 商业工艺设计套件 (PDK) 进行的。全面的位单元级电气特性用于估计每次操作的能量/延迟以及存储器架构级的泄漏功率。作为我们分析的主要结果，我们表明，通过显着放宽 DMTJ 器件在室温下的非易失性要求（即通过减小横截面积），同时在低温下保持典型的 10 年保留时间，可以获得节能的小型到大型嵌入式存储器。这使得以 77K 速度运行的基于 DMTJ 的 STT-MRAM 在读和写访问下都比六晶体管静态随机存取存储器 (6T-SRAM) 更节能（平均分别为 -56% 和 -37%）。因此，获得的结果证明，具有宽松保留时间的基于 DMTJ 的 STT-MRAM 是实现在低温下运行的可靠且节能的嵌入式存储器的有前途的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在液氮沸点（77K）下通过调整双势垒磁隧道结（DMTJ）的热稳定性，提升低温自旋转移力矩磁随机存取存储器（STT-MRAM）的能效。
AI.motivation: 传统静态随机存取存储器（SRAM）在低温下能效不足，而现有STT-MRAM的非易失性要求限制了其低温能效优化，需寻找兼顾可靠性和能效的低温嵌入式存储方案。
AI.method: 基于宏观自旋模型构建DMTJ的Verilog-A紧凑模型，并结合65nm工艺设计套件（PDK）进行77K校准，通过比特单元级电气特性分析评估操作能耗、延迟及架构级漏电功耗。
AI.result: 通过降低DMTJ的室温非易失性要求（减小横截面积），在保持77K下10年数据保留时间的前提下，DMTJ-STT-MRAM在读写操作中分别比6T-SRAM节能56%和37%。
AI.conclusion: 放宽非易失性要求的DMTJ-STT-MRAM在低温下具有更高的能效，是实现可靠低温嵌入式存储的可行方案。

authors_text: Rebecca S Stone,Nishant Ravikumar,Andrew J Bulpitt,David C Hogg
title: Epistemic Uncertainty-Weighted Loss for Visual Bias Mitigation
title_zh: 用于缓解视觉偏差的认知不确定性加权损失
comment: Published in 2022 IEEE CVPR Workshop on Fair, Data Efficient and Trusted Computer Vision
comments: Published in 2022 IEEE CVPR Workshop on Fair, Data Efficient and Trusted Computer Vision
abstract: Deep neural networks are highly susceptible to learning biases in visual data. While various methods have been proposed to mitigate such bias, the majority require explicit knowledge of the biases present in the training data in order to mitigate. We argue the relevance of exploring methods which are completely ignorant of the presence of any bias, but are capable of identifying and mitigating them. Furthermore, we propose using Bayesian neural networks with a predictive uncertainty-weighted loss function to dynamically identify potential bias in individual training samples and to weight them during training. We find a positive correlation between samples subject to bias and higher epistemic uncertainties. Finally, we show the method has potential to mitigate visual bias on a bias benchmark dataset and on a real-world face detection problem, and we consider the merits and weaknesses of our approach.
summary: Deep neural networks are highly susceptible to learning biases in visual data. While various methods have been proposed to mitigate such bias, the majority require explicit knowledge of the biases present in the training data in order to mitigate. We argue the relevance of exploring methods which are completely ignorant of the presence of any bias, but are capable of identifying and mitigating them. Furthermore, we propose using Bayesian neural networks with a predictive uncertainty-weighted loss function to dynamically identify potential bias in individual training samples and to weight them during training. We find a positive correlation between samples subject to bias and higher epistemic uncertainties. Finally, we show the method has potential to mitigate visual bias on a bias benchmark dataset and on a real-world face detection problem, and we consider the merits and weaknesses of our approach.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络非常容易受到视觉数据学习偏差的影响。虽然已经提出了各种方法来减轻这种偏差，但大多数方法都需要明确了解训练数据中存在的偏差才能减轻。我们认为探索完全不知道任何偏见的存在但能够识别和减轻偏见的方法的相关性。此外，我们建议使用具有预测不确定性加权损失函数的贝叶斯神经网络来动态识别单个训练样本中的潜在偏差并在训练期间对其进行加权。我们发现存在偏差的样本与较高的认知不确定性之间存在正相关。最后，我们展示了该方法有可能减轻偏差基准数据集和现实世界的人脸检测问题上的视觉偏差，并且我们考虑了我们方法的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于认识论不确定性的损失函数，用于缓解视觉数据中的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有偏差缓解方法依赖对训练数据中偏差的先验知识，而作者认为应探索无需预知偏差的存在即可识别和缓解的方法。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯神经网络，结合预测不确定性加权损失函数，动态识别训练样本中的潜在偏差并调整样本权重。
AI.result: 在视觉偏差基准数据集和实际人脸检测任务中验证了方法的有效性，并分析了其优缺点。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需先验偏差知识的前提下展现了缓解视觉偏差的潜力，但仍需进一步优化和验证。
