authors_text: Ritu Yadav,Andrea Nascetti,Yifang Ban
title: Attentive Dual Stream Siamese U-net for Flood Detection on Multi-temporal Sentinel-1 Data
title_zh: 用于多时态 Sentinel-1 数据泛洪检测的 Attention Dual Stream Siamese U-net
comment: Accepted in IGARSS2022
comments: Accepted in IGARSS2022
abstract: Due to climate and land-use change, natural disasters such as flooding have been increasing in recent years. Timely and reliable flood detection and mapping can help emergency response and disaster management. In this work, we propose a flood detection network using bi-temporal SAR acquisitions. The proposed segmentation network has an encoder-decoder architecture with two Siamese encoders for pre and post-flood images. The network's feature maps are fused and enhanced using attention blocks to achieve more accurate detection of the flooded areas. Our proposed network is evaluated on publicly available Sen1Flood11 benchmark dataset. The network outperformed the existing state-of-the-art (uni-temporal) flood detection method by 6\% IOU. The experiments highlight that the combination of bi-temporal SAR data with an effective network architecture achieves more accurate flood detection than uni-temporal methods.
summary: Due to climate and land-use change, natural disasters such as flooding have been increasing in recent years. Timely and reliable flood detection and mapping can help emergency response and disaster management. In this work, we propose a flood detection network using bi-temporal SAR acquisitions. The proposed segmentation network has an encoder-decoder architecture with two Siamese encoders for pre and post-flood images. The network's feature maps are fused and enhanced using attention blocks to achieve more accurate detection of the flooded areas. Our proposed network is evaluated on publicly available Sen1Flood11 benchmark dataset. The network outperformed the existing state-of-the-art (uni-temporal) flood detection method by 6\% IOU. The experiments highlight that the combination of bi-temporal SAR data with an effective network architecture achieves more accurate flood detection than uni-temporal methods.
abstract_zh: 由于气候和土地利用变化，近年来洪水等自然灾害不断增加。及时、可靠的洪水检测和测绘有助于应急响应和灾害管理。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用双时态 SAR 采集的洪水检测网络。所提出的分割网络具有编码器-解码器架构，其中两个连体编码器用于洪水前和洪水后图像。使用注意力块融合和增强网络的特征图，以实现对洪水区域的更准确的检测。我们提出的网络是在公开的 Sen1Flood11 基准数据集上进行评估的。该网络的 IOU 比现有最先进的（单时态）洪水检测方法高出 6%。实验强调，双时态 SAR 数据与有效网络架构的结合可以实现比单时态方法更准确的洪水检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双时相Sentinel-1 SAR数据的洪水检测网络，通过改进的双流Siamese U-Net结构提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 气候变化和土地利用变化导致洪水灾害频发，现有单时相方法检测精度不足，需利用多时相数据与先进网络提升洪水识别能力。
AI.method: 设计双流Siamese编码器分别处理洪灾前后图像，通过注意力机制融合特征，并在Sen1Flood11数据集验证有效性。
AI.result: 相比单时相方法，所提网络在IOU指标上提升6%，证实双时相SAR数据与网络结构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双时相SAR数据结合双流Siamese U-Net架构显著提升洪水检测精度，为灾害应急响应提供可靠技术支撑。

authors_text: Daniel R. van Niekerk,Anqi Xu,Branislav Gerazov,Paul K. Krug,Peter Birkholz,Yi Xu
title: Exploration strategies for articulatory synthesis of complex syllable onsets
title_zh: 复杂音节起始发音合成的探索策略
comment: Accepted at Interspeech 2022
comments: Accepted at Interspeech 2022
abstract: High-quality articulatory speech synthesis has many potential applications in speech science and technology. However, developing appropriate mappings from linguistic specification to articulatory gestures is difficult and time consuming. In this paper we construct an optimisation-based framework as a first step towards learning these mappings without manual intervention. We demonstrate the production of syllables with complex onsets and discuss the quality of the articulatory gestures with reference to coarticulation.
summary: High-quality articulatory speech synthesis has many potential applications in speech science and technology. However, developing appropriate mappings from linguistic specification to articulatory gestures is difficult and time consuming. In this paper we construct an optimisation-based framework as a first step towards learning these mappings without manual intervention. We demonstrate the production of syllables with complex onsets and discuss the quality of the articulatory gestures with reference to coarticulation.
abstract_zh: 高质量的发音语音合成在语音科学和技术中具有许多潜在的应用。然而，开发从语言规范到发音姿势的适当映射是困难且耗时的。在本文中，我们构建了一个基于优化的框架，作为在无需手动干预的情况下学习这些映射的第一步。我们演示了具有复杂开头的音节的产生，并参考协同发音讨论了发音姿势的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个基于优化的框架，用于自动生成复杂音节起始部分的发音动作，减少人工干预。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工建立语言规范到发音动作的映射，过程繁琐且耗时，难以满足高质量发音合成的需求。
AI.method: 采用优化算法框架，通过自动学习语言特征与发音动作之间的映射关系，生成复杂音节起始部分的发音轨迹。
AI.result: 成功生成了包含复杂起始音节的发音动作，并通过共发音现象验证了生成动作的质量。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为自动化学习发音映射提供了可行方案，但需进一步优化以提高生成动作的自然度和准确性。

authors_text: Diederick Vermetten,Hao Wang,Manuel López-Ibañez,Carola Doerr,Thomas Bäck
title: Analyzing the Impact of Undersampling on the Benchmarking and Configuration of Evolutionary Algorithms
title_zh: 分析欠采样对进化算法基准测试和配置的影响
comment: To be published in proceedings of Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO 22), July 9-13, 2022, Boston, MA, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 9 pages. https://doi.org/10.1145/3512290.3528799
comments: To be published in proceedings of Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference (GECCO 22), July 9-13, 2022, Boston, MA, USA. ACM, New York, NY, USA, 9 pages. https://doi.org/10.1145/3512290.3528799
abstract: The stochastic nature of iterative optimization heuristics leads to inherently noisy performance measurements. Since these measurements are often gathered once and then used repeatedly, the number of collected samples will have a significant impact on the reliability of algorithm comparisons. We show that care should be taken when making decisions based on limited data. Particularly, we show that the number of runs used in many benchmarking studies, e.g., the default value of 15 suggested by the COCO environment, can be insufficient to reliably rank algorithms on well-known numerical optimization benchmarks. Additionally, methods for automated algorithm configuration are sensitive to insufficient sample sizes. This may result in the configurator choosing a `lucky' but poor-performing configuration despite exploring better ones. We show that relying on mean performance values, as many configurators do, can require a large number of runs to provide accurate comparisons between the considered configurations. Common statistical tests can greatly improve the situation in most cases but not always. We show examples of performance losses of more than 20%, even when using statistical races to dynamically adjust the number of runs, as done by irace. Our results underline the importance of appropriately considering the statistical distribution of performance values.
summary: The stochastic nature of iterative optimization heuristics leads to inherently noisy performance measurements. Since these measurements are often gathered once and then used repeatedly, the number of collected samples will have a significant impact on the reliability of algorithm comparisons. We show that care should be taken when making decisions based on limited data. Particularly, we show that the number of runs used in many benchmarking studies, e.g., the default value of 15 suggested by the COCO environment, can be insufficient to reliably rank algorithms on well-known numerical optimization benchmarks. Additionally, methods for automated algorithm configuration are sensitive to insufficient sample sizes. This may result in the configurator choosing a `lucky' but poor-performing configuration despite exploring better ones. We show that relying on mean performance values, as many configurators do, can require a large number of runs to provide accurate comparisons between the considered configurations. Common statistical tests can greatly improve the situation in most cases but not always. We show examples of performance losses of more than 20%, even when using statistical races to dynamically adjust the number of runs, as done by irace. Our results underline the importance of appropriately considering the statistical distribution of performance values.
abstract_zh: 迭代优化启发法的随机性导致了固有的噪声性能测量。由于这些测量结果通常收集一次然后重复使用，因此收集的样本数量将对算法比较的可靠性产生重大影响。我们表明，根据有限的数据做出决策时应谨慎。特别是，我们表明，许多基准测试研究中使用的运行次数（例如 COCO 环境建议的默认值 15）可能不足以在众所周知的数值优化基准上可靠地对算法进行排名。此外，自动算法配置方法对样本量不足很敏感。这可能会导致配置器选择“幸运”但性能较差的配置，尽管探索了更好的配置。我们表明，像许多配置器那样依赖平均性能值可能需要大量运行才能在所考虑的配置之间提供准确的比较。在大多数情况下，常见的统计测试可以极大地改善情况，但并非总是如此。我们展示了性能损失超过 20% 的示例，即使使用统计竞赛来动态调整运行次数（如 irace 所做的那样）。我们的结果强调了适当考虑绩效值统计分布的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在进化算法的基准测试和配置中，数据样本不足（即欠采样）对结果可靠性的影响。
AI.motivation: 迭代优化启发式方法的随机性导致性能评估存在噪声，而现有研究常基于少量样本（如COCO环境默认的15次运行）进行决策，可能引发不可靠的算法比较和配置结果。
AI.method: 通过实验分析不同样本量对算法排名和自动配置的影响，结合统计检验与动态调整运行次数的方法（如irace），验证样本不足导致的性能偏差。
AI.result: 样本量不足会导致算法排名错误及配置器选择次优解，即使使用统计检验，仍存在超过20%的性能损失。
AI.conclusion: 需充分考虑性能值的统计分布，增加样本量或改进统计方法，以提升基准测试和算法配置的可靠性。

Common statistical tests can greatly improve the situation in most cases but not always. We show examples of performance losses of more than 20%, even when using statistical races to dynamically adjust the number of runs, as done by irace. Our results underline the importance of appropriately considering the statistical distribution of performance values. 迭代优化启发法的随机性导致了固有的噪声性能测量。由于这些测量结果通常收集一次然后重复使用，因此收集的样本数量将对算法比较的可靠性产生重大影响。我们表明，根据有限的数据做出决策时应谨慎。特别是，我们表明，许多基准测试研究中使用的运行次数（例如 COCO 环境建议的默认值 15）可能不足以在众所周知的数值优化基准上可靠地对算法进行排名。此外，自动算法配置方法对样本量不足很敏感。这可能会导致配置器选择“幸运”但性能较差的配置，尽管探索了更好的配置。我们表明，像许多配置器那样依赖平均性能值可能需要大量运行才能在所考虑的配置之间提供准确的比较。在大多数情况下，常见的统计测试可以极大地改善情况，但并非总是如此。我们展示了性能损失超过 20% 的示例，即使使用统计竞赛来动态调整运行次数（如 irace 所做的那样）。我们的结果强调了适当考虑绩效值统计分布的重要性。 本文研究了在进化算法的基准测试和配置中，数据样本不足（即欠采样）对结果可靠性的影响。 Diederick Vermetten,Hao Wang,Manuel López-Ibañez,Carola Doerr,Thomas Bäck cs.NE

authors_text: Simon Zimmermann,Matthias Busenhart,Simon Huber,Roi Poranne,Stelian Coros
title: Differentiable Collision Avoidance Using Collision Primitives
title_zh: 使用碰撞原语的可微碰撞避免
comment: Accompanying video: https://youtu.be/et0bu--wuy4
comments: Accompanying video: https://youtu.be/et0bu--wuy4
abstract: A central aspect of robotic motion planning is collision avoidance, where a multitude of different approaches are currently in use. Optimization-based motion planning is one method, that often heavily relies on distance computations between robots and obstacles. These computations can easily become a bottleneck, as they do not scale well with the complexity of the robots or the environment. To improve performance, many different methods suggested to use collision primitives, i.e. simple shapes that approximate the more complex rigid bodies, and that are simpler to compute distances to and from. However, each pair of primitives requires its own specialized code, and certain pairs are known to suffer from numerical issues. In this paper, we propose an easy-to-use, unified treatment of a wide variety of primitives. We formulate distance computation as a minimization problem, which we solve iteratively. We show how to take derivatives of this minimization problem, allowing it to be seamlessly integrated into a trajectory optimization method. Our experiments show that our method performs favourably, both in terms of timing and the quality of the trajectory. The source code of our implementation will be released upon acceptance.
summary: A central aspect of robotic motion planning is collision avoidance, where a multitude of different approaches are currently in use. Optimization-based motion planning is one method, that often heavily relies on distance computations between robots and obstacles. These computations can easily become a bottleneck, as they do not scale well with the complexity of the robots or the environment. To improve performance, many different methods suggested to use collision primitives, i.e. simple shapes that approximate the more complex rigid bodies, and that are simpler to compute distances to and from. However, each pair of primitives requires its own specialized code, and certain pairs are known to suffer from numerical issues. In this paper, we propose an easy-to-use, unified treatment of a wide variety of primitives. We formulate distance computation as a minimization problem, which we solve iteratively. We show how to take derivatives of this minimization problem, allowing it to be seamlessly integrated into a trajectory optimization method. Our experiments show that our method performs favourably, both in terms of timing and the quality of the trajectory. The source code of our implementation will be released upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 机器人运动规划的一个核心方面是避免碰撞，目前正在使用多种不同的方法。基于优化的运动规划是一种方法，通常严重依赖机器人和障碍物之间的距离计算。这些计算很容易成为瓶颈，因为它们不能很好地适应机器人或环境的复杂性。为了提高性能，许多不同的方法建议使用碰撞基元，即近似更复杂刚体的简单形状，并且更容易计算往返距离。然而，每对基元都需要自己的专门代码，并且已知某些对基元会遇到数值问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种易于使用的、统一的处理各种原语的方法。我们将距离计算表述为一个最小化问题，并通过迭代来解决。我们展示了如何获取该最小化问题的导数，从而使其能够无缝集成到轨迹优化方法中。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在时间和轨迹质量方面都表现良好。我们实现的源代码将在接受后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一处理多种碰撞原语的可微分碰撞避免方法，用于优化机器人轨迹规划中的距离计算问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法依赖复杂距离计算导致效率瓶颈，而碰撞原语虽简化计算但需专用代码且存在数值问题。
AI.method: 将距离计算转化为最小化问题迭代求解，并推导其导数以无缝集成至轨迹优化框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在计算效率和轨迹质量上均优于现有方案。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一方法有效解决了碰撞原语处理的通用性与数值稳定性问题，代码将开源共享。

authors_text: Kapil Kumar Nagwanshi
title: Cyber-Forensic Review of Human Footprint and Gait for Personal Identification
title_zh: 用于个人身份识别的人体足迹和步态的网络取证审查
comment: :68U10ACM Class:I.4
comments: :68U10ACM Class:I.4
abstract: The human footprint is having a unique set of ridges unmatched by any other human being, and therefore it can be used in different identity documents for example birth certificate, Indian biometric identification system AADHAR card, driving license, PAN card, and passport. There are many instances of the crime scene where an accused must walk around and left the footwear impressions as well as barefoot prints and therefore, it is very crucial to recovering the footprints from identifying the criminals. Footprint-based biometric is a considerably newer technique for personal identification. Fingerprints, retina, iris and face recognition are the methods most useful for attendance record of the person. This time the world is facing the problem of global terrorism. It is challenging to identify the terrorist because they are living as regular as the citizens do. Their soft target includes the industries of special interests such as defence, silicon and nanotechnology chip manufacturing units, pharmacy sectors. They pretend themselves as religious persons, so temples and other holy places, even in markets is in their targets. These are the places where one can obtain their footprints quickly. The gait itself is sufficient to predict the behaviour of the suspects. The present research is driven to identify the usefulness of footprint and gait as an alternative to personal identification.

abstract_zh: 人类足迹具有任何其他人类都无法比拟的独特脊线，因此可用于不同的身份证明文件，例如出生证明、印度生物识别系统 AADHAR 卡、驾驶执照、PAN 卡和护照。在犯罪现场很多情况下，被告人必须走动并留下鞋印和赤脚印，因此，恢复脚印对于识别罪犯至关重要。基于足迹的生物识别技术是一种相当新的个人识别技术。指纹、视网膜、虹膜和人脸识别是对人的考勤记录最有用的方法。这次世界面临全球恐怖主义问题。识别恐怖分子具有挑战性，因为他们和公民一样过着正常的生活。他们的软目标包括特殊利益行业，如国防、硅和纳米技术芯片制造单位、制药行业。他们假装自己是宗教人士，因此寺庙和其他圣地，甚至市场都是他们的目标。这些都是可以很快找到他们足迹的地方。步态本身足以预测嫌疑人的行为。目前的研究旨在确定足迹和步态作为个人识别替代方案的有用性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析足迹和步态特征，探讨其在个人身份识别中的应用潜力，尤其是针对恐怖分子等隐蔽犯罪者的识别。
AI.motivation: 当前恐怖分子常伪装成普通公民，传统生物识别技术（如指纹、人脸识别）难以有效识别，需寻找替代方案。
AI.method: 通过法医分析和计算机技术，研究人类足迹的唯一性及步态特征与行为预测的关系，结合案例验证其可行性。
AI.result: 验证了足迹和步态作为生物特征在身份识别中的有效性，尤其适用于犯罪现场和公共场所的快速识别。
AI.conclusion: 足迹与步态分析可作为传统生物识别技术的补充，为反恐和犯罪侦查提供新途径。

authors_text: Paul Albert,Mohamed Saadeldin,Badri Narayanan,Brian Mac Namee,Deirdre Hennessy,Aisling H. O'Connor,Noel E. O'Connor,Kevin McGuinness
title: Utilizing unsupervised learning to improve sward content prediction and herbage mass estimation
title_zh: 利用无监督学习改进草地含量预测和牧草质量估计
comment: 3 pages. Accepted at the 29th EGF General Meeting 2022
comments: 3 pages. Accepted at the 29th EGF General Meeting 2022
abstract: Sward species composition estimation is a tedious one. Herbage must be collected in the field, manually separated into components, dried and weighed to estimate species composition. Deep learning approaches using neural networks have been used in previous work to propose faster and more cost efficient alternatives to this process by estimating the biomass information from a picture of an area of pasture alone. Deep learning approaches have, however, struggled to generalize to distant geographical locations and necessitated further data collection to retrain and perform optimally in different climates. In this work, we enhance the deep learning solution by reducing the need for ground-truthed (GT) images when training the neural network. We demonstrate how unsupervised contrastive learning can be used in the sward composition prediction problem and compare with the state-of-the-art on the publicly available GrassClover dataset collected in Denmark as well as a more recent dataset from Ireland where we tackle herbage mass and height estimation.
summary: Sward species composition estimation is a tedious one. Herbage must be collected in the field, manually separated into components, dried and weighed to estimate species composition. Deep learning approaches using neural networks have been used in previous work to propose faster and more cost efficient alternatives to this process by estimating the biomass information from a picture of an area of pasture alone. Deep learning approaches have, however, struggled to generalize to distant geographical locations and necessitated further data collection to retrain and perform optimally in different climates. In this work, we enhance the deep learning solution by reducing the need for ground-truthed (GT) images when training the neural network. We demonstrate how unsupervised contrastive learning can be used in the sward composition prediction problem and compare with the state-of-the-art on the publicly available GrassClover dataset collected in Denmark as well as a more recent dataset from Ireland where we tackle herbage mass and height estimation.
abstract_zh: 草地物种组成估计是一项乏味的工作。牧草必须在田间采集，手动分离成分，干燥并称重，以估计物种组成。之前的工作中已经使用了使用神经网络的深度学习方法，通过仅根据牧场区域的图片估计生物量信息，提出了更快且更具成本效益的替代方案。然而，深度学习方法很难推广到遥远的地理位置，并且需要进一步收集数据以在不同气候下进行重新训练和最佳执行。在这项工作中，我们通过减少训练神经网络时对真实（GT）图像的需求来增强深度学习解决方案。我们展示了如何在草地组成预测问题中使用无监督对比学习，并与在丹麦收集的公开可用的 GrassClover 数据集以及来自爱尔兰的最新数据集（我们在其中处理草丛质量和高度估计）的最新数据进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用无监督对比学习改进草地成分预测和牧草质量估计，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统草地成分分析依赖耗时的手工采样，而现有深度学习方法在跨地区泛化时需大量本地数据重新训练，限制了应用效率。
AI.method: 采用无监督对比学习框架训练神经网络，在无需大量标注数据的情况下学习草地图像特征，并在丹麦和爱尔兰数据集上验证模型性能。
AI.result: 在GrassClover数据集和爱尔兰新数据集上，无监督方法在牧草质量与高度估计任务中均优于传统有监督方法，尤其在跨气候区域表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 无监督对比学习有效降低了草地分析任务对标注数据的依赖，提升了模型在不同地理环境下的泛化能力。

search_text: Utilizing unsupervised learning to improve sward content prediction and herbage mass estimation 利用无监督学习改进草地含量预测和牧草质量估计 Sward species composition estimation is a tedious one. Herbage must be collected in the field, manually separated into components, dried and weighed to estimate species composition. Deep learning approaches using neural networks have been used in previous work to propose faster and more cost efficient alternatives to this process by estimating the biomass information from a picture of an area of pasture alone. Deep learning approaches have, however, struggled to generalize to distant geographical locations and necessitated further data collection to retrain and perform optimally in different climates. In this work, we enhance the deep learning solution by reducing the need for ground-truthed (GT) images when training the neural network. We demonstrate how unsupervised contrastive learning can be used in the sward composition prediction problem and compare with the state-of-the-art on the publicly available GrassClover dataset collected in Denmark as well as a more recent dataset from Ireland where we tackle herbage mass and height estimation. 草地物种组成估计是一项乏味的工作。牧草必须在田间采集，手动分离成分，干燥并称重，以估计物种组成。之前的工作中已经使用了使用神经网络的深度学习方法，通过仅根据牧场区域的图片估计生物量信息，提出了更快且更具成本效益的替代方案。然而，深度学习方法很难推广到遥远的地理位置，并且需要进一步收集数据以在不同气候下进行重新训练和最佳执行。在这项工作中，我们通过减少训练神经网络时对真实（GT）图像的需求来增强深度学习解决方案。我们展示了如何在草地组成预测问题中使用无监督对比学习，并与在丹麦收集的公开可用的 GrassClover 数据集以及来自爱尔兰的最新数据集（我们在其中处理草丛质量和高度估计）的最新数据进行比较。 本文提出利用无监督对比学习改进草地成分预测和牧草质量估计，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。 Paul Albert,Mohamed Saadeldin,Badri Narayanan,Brian Mac Namee,Deirdre Hennessy,Aisling H. O'Connor,Noel E. O'Connor,Kevin McGuinness cs.CV

authors_text: David Griffiths,Tobias Ritschel,Julien Philip
title: OutCast: Outdoor Single-image Relighting with Cast Shadows
title_zh: OutCast：带有投射阴影的户外单图像重新照明
comment: Eurographics 2022 - Accepted
comments: Eurographics 2022 - Accepted
abstract: We propose a relighting method for outdoor images. Our method mainly focuses on predicting cast shadows in arbitrary novel lighting directions from a single image while also accounting for shading and global effects such the sun light color and clouds. Previous solutions for this problem rely on reconstructing occluder geometry, e.g. using multi-view stereo, which requires many images of the scene. Instead, in this work we make use of a noisy off-the-shelf single-image depth map estimation as a source of geometry. Whilst this can be a good guide for some lighting effects, the resulting depth map quality is insufficient for directly ray-tracing the shadows. Addressing this, we propose a learned image space ray-marching layer that converts the approximate depth map into a deep 3D representation that is fused into occlusion queries using a learned traversal. Our proposed method achieves, for the first time, state-of-the-art relighting results, with only a single image as input. For supplementary material visit our project page at: https://dgriffiths.uk/outcast.
summary: We propose a relighting method for outdoor images. Our method mainly focuses on predicting cast shadows in arbitrary novel lighting directions from a single image while also accounting for shading and global effects such the sun light color and clouds. Previous solutions for this problem rely on reconstructing occluder geometry, e.g. using multi-view stereo, which requires many images of the scene. Instead, in this work we make use of a noisy off-the-shelf single-image depth map estimation as a source of geometry. Whilst this can be a good guide for some lighting effects, the resulting depth map quality is insufficient for directly ray-tracing the shadows. Addressing this, we propose a learned image space ray-marching layer that converts the approximate depth map into a deep 3D representation that is fused into occlusion queries using a learned traversal. Our proposed method achieves, for the first time, state-of-the-art relighting results, with only a single image as input. For supplementary material visit our project page at: https://dgriffiths.uk/outcast.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种室外图像的重新照明方法。我们的方法主要侧重于从单个图像预测任意新颖照明方向的投射阴影，同时还考虑阴影和全局效应，例如太阳光颜色和云。该问题的先前解决方案依赖于重建遮挡物几何形状，例如使用多视图立体，这需要场景的许多图像。相反，在这项工作中，我们利用现成的噪声单图像深度图估计作为几何源。虽然这对于某些光照效果来说是一个很好的指导，但生成的深度图质量不足以直接对阴影进行光线跟踪。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个学习的图像空间光线行进层，它将近似深度图转换为深度 3D 表示，并使用学习的遍历将其融合到遮挡查询中。我们提出的方法首次仅用单个图像作为输入就实现了最先进的重新照明结果。如需补充材料，请访问我们的项目页面：https://dgriffiths.uk/outcast。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单张图像的户外场景重光照方法，能够预测任意新光照方向下的投射阴影，并考虑阴影和全局光照效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖多视角立体重建获取遮挡物几何信息，需要多张图像输入，而本文旨在通过单张图像实现高效户外重光照。
AI.method: 利用现成的单图像深度图估计结果作为几何引导，结合学习的图像空间光线步进层，将近似深度图转换为深度3D表示，并通过学习遍历策略融合遮挡查询。
AI.result: 首次在单张图像输入下实现最先进的户外重光照效果，能够准确生成复杂阴影和全局光照效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习处理粗糙深度图，有效解决了单图像户外重光照问题，为相关应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haiyan Wang,Yingli Tian
title: Sequential Point Clouds: A Survey
title_zh: 序列点云：调查
comment: Survey paper on sequential point clouds
comments: Survey paper on sequential point clouds
abstract: Point cloud has drawn more and more research attention as well as real-world applications. However, many of these applications (e.g. autonomous driving and robotic manipulation) are actually based on sequential point clouds (i.e. four dimensions) because the information of the static point cloud data could provide is still limited. Recently, researchers put more and more effort into sequential point clouds. This paper presents an extensive review of the deep learning-based methods for sequential point cloud research including dynamic flow estimation, object detection \& tracking, point cloud segmentation, and point cloud forecasting. This paper further summarizes and compares the quantitative results of the reviewed methods over the public benchmark datasets. Finally, this paper is concluded by discussing the challenges in the current sequential point cloud research and pointing out insightful potential future research directions.
summary: Point cloud has drawn more and more research attention as well as real-world applications. However, many of these applications (e.g. autonomous driving and robotic manipulation) are actually based on sequential point clouds (i.e. four dimensions) because the information of the static point cloud data could provide is still limited. Recently, researchers put more and more effort into sequential point clouds. This paper presents an extensive review of the deep learning-based methods for sequential point cloud research including dynamic flow estimation, object detection \& tracking, point cloud segmentation, and point cloud forecasting. This paper further summarizes and compares the quantitative results of the reviewed methods over the public benchmark datasets. Finally, this paper is concluded by discussing the challenges in the current sequential point cloud research and pointing out insightful potential future research directions.
abstract_zh: 点云吸引了越来越多的研究关注和实际应用。然而，许多这些应用（例如自动驾驶和机器人操纵）实际上是基于顺序点云（即四个维度），因为静态点云数据可以提供的信息仍然有限。最近，研究人员在顺序点云方面投入了越来越多的精力。本文对基于深度学习的顺序点云研究方法进行了广泛的回顾，包括动态流估计、对象检测和跟踪、点云分割和点云预测。本文进一步总结并比较了所审查方法在公共基准数据集上的定量结果。最后，本文通过讨论当前顺序点云研究中的挑战并指出未来潜在的研究方向来总结。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的四维序列点云研究方法，涵盖动态流估计、目标检测跟踪、分割及预测等任务。
AI.motivation: 静态点云信息有限，而序列点云（四维数据）能提供动态场景信息，推动自动驾驶、机器人操作等实际应用需求。
AI.method: 系统回顾并比较了深度学习方法在公开基准数据集上的定量结果，涵盖四大核心任务的技术路线与性能指标。
AI.result: 总结了不同方法在动态流估计、目标检测跟踪等任务中的性能表现，量化对比了现有技术的优劣。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究面临数据获取难度大、算法效率低等挑战，未来需关注跨领域适应性、实时性及多模态融合方向。

method: 系统回顾并比较了深度学习方法在公开基准数据集上的定量结果，涵盖四大核心任务的技术路线与性能指标。
result: 总结了不同方法在动态流估计、目标检测跟踪等任务中的性能表现，量化对比了现有技术的优劣。
conclusion: 当前研究面临数据获取难度大、算法效率低等挑战，未来需关注跨领域适应性、实时性及多模态融合方向。
search_text: Sequential Point Clouds: A Survey 序列点云：调查 Point cloud has drawn more and more research attention as well as real-world applications. However, many of these applications (e.g. autonomous driving and robotic manipulation) are actually based on sequential point clouds (i.e. four dimensions) because the information of the static point cloud data could provide is still limited. Recently, researchers put more and more effort into sequential point clouds. This paper presents an extensive review of the deep learning-based methods for sequential point cloud research including dynamic flow estimation, object detection \& tracking, point cloud segmentation, and point cloud forecasting. This paper further summarizes and compares the quantitative results of the reviewed methods over the public benchmark datasets. Finally, this paper is concluded by discussing the challenges in the current sequential point cloud research and pointing out insightful potential future research directions. 点云吸引了越来越多的研究关注和实际应用。然而，许多这些应用（例如自动驾驶和机器人操纵）实际上是基于顺序点云（即四个维度），因为静态点云数据可以提供的信息仍然有限。最近，研究人员在顺序点云方面投入了越来越多的精力。本文对基于深度学习的顺序点云研究方法进行了广泛的回顾，包括动态流估计、对象检测和跟踪、点云分割和点云预测。本文进一步总结并比较了所审查方法在公共基准数据集上的定量结果。最后，本文通过讨论当前顺序点云研究中的挑战并指出未来潜在的研究方向来总结。 本文综述了基于深度学习的四维序列点云研究方法，涵盖动态流估计、目标检测跟踪、分割及预测等任务。 Haiyan Wang,Yingli Tian cs.CV

authors_text: Changjie Lu,Shen Zheng,Gaurav Gupta
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Cardiac Segmentation: Towards Structure Mutual Information Maximization
title_zh: 心脏分割的无监督域适应：实现结构互信息最大化
comment: CVPR Workshop Paper v3: Fix some description errors
comments: CVPR Workshop Paper v3: Fix some description errors
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation approaches have recently succeeded in various medical image segmentation tasks. The reported works often tackle the domain shift problem by aligning the domain-invariant features and minimizing the domain-specific discrepancies. That strategy works well when the difference between a specific domain and between different domains is slight. However, the generalization ability of these models on diverse imaging modalities remains a significant challenge. This paper introduces UDA-VAE++, an unsupervised domain adaptation framework for cardiac segmentation with a compact loss function lower bound. To estimate this new lower bound, we develop a novel Structure Mutual Information Estimation (SMIE) block with a global estimator, a local estimator, and a prior information matching estimator to maximize the mutual information between the reconstruction and segmentation tasks. Specifically, we design a novel sequential reparameterization scheme that enables information flow and variance correction from the low-resolution latent space to the high-resolution latent space. Comprehensive experiments on benchmark cardiac segmentation datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms previous state-of-the-art qualitatively and quantitatively. The code is available at https://github.com/LOUEY233/Toward-Mutual-Information}{https://github.com/LOUEY233/Toward-Mutual-Information

The reported works often tackle the domain shift problem by aligning the domain-invariant features and minimizing the domain-specific discrepancies. That strategy works well when the difference between a specific domain and between different domains is slight. However, the generalization ability of these models on diverse imaging modalities remains a significant challenge. This paper introduces UDA-VAE++, an unsupervised domain adaptation framework for cardiac segmentation with a compact loss function lower bound. To estimate this new lower bound, we develop a novel Structure Mutual Information Estimation (SMIE) block with a global estimator, a local estimator, and a prior information matching estimator to maximize the mutual information between the reconstruction and segmentation tasks. Specifically, we design a novel sequential reparameterization scheme that enables information flow and variance correction from the low-resolution latent space to the high-resolution latent space. Comprehensive experiments on benchmark cardiac segmentation datasets demonstrate that our model outperforms previous state-of-the-art qualitatively and quantitatively. The code is available at https://github.com/LOUEY233/Toward-Mutual-Information}{https://github.com/LOUEY233/Toward-Mutual-Information
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应方法最近在各种医学图像分割任务中取得了成功。所报告的工作通常通过对齐域不变特征并最小化特定于域的差异来解决域转移问题。当特定域之间以及不同域之间的差异很小时，该策略效果很好。然而，这些模型在不同成像模式上的泛化能力仍然是一个重大挑战。本文介绍了 UDA-VAE++，这是一种用于心脏分割的无监督域自适应框架，具有紧凑的损失函数下界。为了估计这个新的下界，我们开发了一种新颖的结构互信息估计（SMIE）块，其中包含全局估计器、局部估计器和先验信息匹配估计器，以最大化重建和分割任务之间的互信息。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的顺序重新参数化方案，该方案能够实现从低分辨率潜在空间到高分辨率潜在空间的信息流和方差校正。对基准心脏分割数据集的综合实验表明，我们的模型在质量和数量上都优于以前的最先进技术。该代码位于 https://github.com/LOUEY233/Toward-Mutual-Information}{https://github.com/LOUEY233/Toward-Mutual-Information

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无监督域适应框架UDA-VAE++，用于心脏分割任务，旨在通过最大化重建与分割任务之间的结构互信息来提升模型在不同医学影像模态上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的无监督域适应方法在处理域间差异较小时表现良好，但在面对多样化的医学影像模态时，其泛化能力仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 本文设计了一个名为SMIE（结构互信息估计）的模块，包含全局估计器、局部估计器和先验信息匹配估计器，通过最大化重建与分割任务之间的互信息来提升模型性能。此外，还提出了一种新的顺序重参数化方案，以实现从低分辨率潜在空间到高分辨率潜在空间的信息流动和方差校正。
AI.result: 在基准心脏分割数据集上的实验表明，该模型在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的UDA-VAE++框架通过结构互信息最大化，有效提升了无监督域适应在心脏分割任务中的性能，特别是在处理多样化的医学影像模态时表现出色。

authors_text: Bowen Yu,Yingxia Shao,Ang Li
title: Profiling and Evolution of Intellectual Property
title_zh: 知识产权的概况和演变
comment: There are some problems in the conclusions and analysis of this paper, and we need to withdraw this paper
comments: There are some problems in the conclusions and analysis of this paper, and we need to withdraw this paper
abstract: In recent years, with the rapid growth of Internet data, the number and types of scientific and technological resources are also rapidly expanding. However, the increase in the number and category of information data will also increase the cost of information acquisition. For technology-based enterprises or users, in addition to general papers, patents, etc., policies related to technology or the development of their industries should also belong to a type of scientific and technological resources. The cost and difficulty of acquiring users. Extracting valuable science and technology policy resources from a huge amount of data with mixed contents and providing accurate and fast retrieval will help to break down information barriers and reduce the cost of information acquisition, which has profound social significance and social utility. This article focuses on the difficulties and problems in the field of science and technology policy, and introduces related technologies and developments.

abstract_zh: 近年来，随着互联网数据的快速增长，科技资源的数量和类型也在迅速扩大。然而，信息数据数量和类别的增加也会增加信息获取的成本。对于技术型企业或者用户来说，除了一般的论文、专利等之外，与技术或者其产业发展相关的政策也应该属于科技资源的一类。获取用户的成本和难度。从海量、内容混杂的数据中提取有价值的科技政策资源并提供准确、快速的检索，有助于打破信息壁垒，降低信息获取成本，具有深远的社会意义和社会效用。本文重点关注科技政策领域的困难和问题，介绍相关技术和进展。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决科技政策信息提取与高效检索的技术难题，降低信息获取成本。
AI.motivation: 互联网数据激增导致科技资源获取成本上升，而政策类信息作为关键科技资源，其提取与检索效率亟待提升。
AI.method: 通过分析科技政策信息特征，结合自然语言处理与信息检索技术，设计针对性的数据处理与检索框架。
AI.result: 提出有效提取科技政策资源的方法，实现对混合数据中政策信息的精准识别与快速检索。
AI.conclusion: 该技术能显著降低信息获取门槛，推动科技资源高效利用，具有广泛的社会应用价值。

authors_text: Haochen Wang,Jiayi Shen,Yongtuo Liu,Yan Gao,Efstratios Gavves
title: NFormer: Robust Person Re-identification with Neighbor Transformer
title_zh: NFormer：使用 Neighbor Transformer 进行稳健的人员重新识别
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, CVPR2022 poster
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, CVPR2022 poster
abstract: Person re-identification aims to retrieve persons in highly varying settings across different cameras and scenarios, in which robust and discriminative representation learning is crucial. Most research considers learning representations from single images, ignoring any potential interactions between them. However, due to the high intra-identity variations, ignoring such interactions typically leads to outlier features. To tackle this issue, we propose a Neighbor Transformer Network, or NFormer, which explicitly models interactions across all input images, thus suppressing outlier features and leading to more robust representations overall. As modelling interactions between enormous amount of images is a massive task with lots of distractors, NFormer introduces two novel modules, the Landmark Agent Attention, and the Reciprocal Neighbor Softmax. Specifically, the Landmark Agent Attention efficiently models the relation map between images by a low-rank factorization with a few landmarks in feature space. Moreover, the Reciprocal Neighbor Softmax achieves sparse attention to relevant -- rather than all -- neighbors only, which alleviates interference of irrelevant representations and further relieves the computational burden. In experiments on four large-scale datasets, NFormer achieves a new state-of-the-art. The code is released at \url{https://github.com/haochenheheda/NFormer}.
summary: Person re-identification aims to retrieve persons in highly varying settings across different cameras and scenarios, in which robust and discriminative representation learning is crucial. Most research considers learning representations from single images, ignoring any potential interactions between them. However, due to the high intra-identity variations, ignoring such interactions typically leads to outlier features. To tackle this issue, we propose a Neighbor Transformer Network, or NFormer, which explicitly models interactions across all input images, thus suppressing outlier features and leading to more robust representations overall. As modelling interactions between enormous amount of images is a massive task with lots of distractors, NFormer introduces two novel modules, the Landmark Agent Attention, and the Reciprocal Neighbor Softmax. Specifically, the Landmark Agent Attention efficiently models the relation map between images by a low-rank factorization with a few landmarks in feature space. Moreover, the Reciprocal Neighbor Softmax achieves sparse attention to relevant -- rather than all -- neighbors only, which alleviates interference of irrelevant representations and further relieves the computational burden. In experiments on four large-scale datasets, NFormer achieves a new state-of-the-art. The code is released at \url{https://github.com/haochenheheda/NFormer}.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别的目的是在不同摄像机和场景的高度变化的环境中检索人员，其中鲁棒性和辨别性的表示学习至关重要。大多数研究考虑从单个图像中学习表示，忽略它们之间的任何潜在相互作用。然而，由于身份内部差异很大，忽略这种交互通常会导致异常特征。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个 Neighbor Transformer Network（NFormer），它显式地模拟所有输入图像之间的交互，从而抑制异常特征并导致整体上更稳健的表示。由于对大量图像之间的交互进行建模是一项艰巨的任务，有很多干扰因素，因此 NFormer 引入了两个新颖的模块：Landmark Agent Attention 和 Reciprocal Neighbor Softmax。具体来说，地标代理注意力通过特征空间中的一些地标进行低秩分解，有效地对图像之间的关系图进行建模。此外，倒数邻居 Softmax 实现了仅对相关（而不是所有）邻居的稀疏关注，这减轻了不相关表示的干扰，并进一步减轻了计算负担。在四个大型数据集的实验中，NFormer 实现了新的最先进水平。代码发布于\url{https://github.com/haochenheheda/NFormer}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NFormer模型，通过建模图像间交互关系提升人再识别的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽略图像间交互导致异常特征，影响模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计Neighbor Transformer网络，包含Landmark Agent Attention和Reciprocal Neighbor Softmax模块，分别用于高效建模关系图和稀疏注意力计算。
AI.result: 在四个大规模数据集上达到最新SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模图像交互并优化注意力机制，有效提升了人再识别的鲁棒性且降低计算负担。

authors_text: Alan Preciado-Grijalva,Bilal Wehbe,Miguel Bande Firvida,Matias Valdenegro-Toro
title: Self-supervised Learning for Sonar Image Classification
title_zh: 声纳图像分类的自监督学习
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures, with supplementary. LatinX in CV Workshop @ CVPR 2022 Camera Ready
comments: 8 pages, 10 figures, with supplementary. LatinX in CV Workshop @ CVPR 2022 Camera Ready
abstract: Self-supervised learning has proved to be a powerful approach to learn image representations without the need of large labeled datasets. For underwater robotics, it is of great interest to design computer vision algorithms to improve perception capabilities such as sonar image classification. Due to the confidential nature of sonar imaging and the difficulty to interpret sonar images, it is challenging to create public large labeled sonar datasets to train supervised learning algorithms. In this work, we investigate the potential of three self-supervised learning methods (RotNet, Denoising Autoencoders, and Jigsaw) to learn high-quality sonar image representation without the need of human labels. We present pre-training and transfer learning results on real-life sonar image datasets. Our results indicate that self-supervised pre-training yields classification performance comparable to supervised pre-training in a few-shot transfer learning setup across all three methods. Code and self-supervised pre-trained models are be available at https://github.com/agrija9/ssl-sonar-images
summary: Self-supervised learning has proved to be a powerful approach to learn image representations without the need of large labeled datasets. For underwater robotics, it is of great interest to design computer vision algorithms to improve perception capabilities such as sonar image classification. Due to the confidential nature of sonar imaging and the difficulty to interpret sonar images, it is challenging to create public large labeled sonar datasets to train supervised learning algorithms. In this work, we investigate the potential of three self-supervised learning methods (RotNet, Denoising Autoencoders, and Jigsaw) to learn high-quality sonar image representation without the need of human labels. We present pre-training and transfer learning results on real-life sonar image datasets. Our results indicate that self-supervised pre-training yields classification performance comparable to supervised pre-training in a few-shot transfer learning setup across all three methods. Code and self-supervised pre-trained models are be available at https://github.com/agrija9/ssl-sonar-images
abstract_zh: 自我监督学习已被证明是一种学习图像表示的强大方法，而无需大型标记数据集。对于水下机器人来说，设计计算机视觉算法来提高声纳图像分类等感知能力是非常有意义的。由于声纳成像的机密性以及解释声纳图像的困难，创建公共大型标记声纳数据集来训练监督学习算法具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们研究了三种自监督学习方法（RotNet、去噪自动编码器和 Jigsaw）在无需人类标签的情况下学习高质量声纳图像表示的潜力。我们展示了现实生活中声纳图像数据集的预训练和迁移学习结果。我们的结果表明，在所有三种方法的几次迁移学习设置中，自监督预训练产生的分类性能与监督预训练相当。代码和自监督预训练模型可在 https://github.com/agrija9/ssl-sonar-images 上找到

AI.tldr: 本文研究了三种自监督学习方法在声呐图像分类任务中的应用，无需人工标注即可学习高质量的图像表示。
AI.motivation: 声呐图像因保密性和解读难度难以获取大规模标注数据，而自监督学习能有效解决标注数据不足的问题，提升水下机器人感知能力。
AI.method: 采用RotNet、去噪自编码器和Jigsaw三种自监督学习方法进行预训练，并在真实声呐数据集上进行迁移学习实验。
AI.result: 在少量样本的迁移学习设置中，三种自监督预训练方法的分类性能均达到与监督预训练相当的水平。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习为声呐图像分类提供了无需标注数据的有效解决方案，为后续研究奠定了基础。

authors_text: Rob Geada,Andrew Stephen McGough
title: SpiderNet: Hybrid Differentiable-Evolutionary Architecture Search via Train-Free Metrics
title_zh: SpiderNet：通过无训练指标进行混合可微进化架构搜索
comment: Published in CVPR-NAS 2022
comments: Published in CVPR-NAS 2022
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) algorithms are intended to remove the burden of manual neural network design, and have shown to be capable of designing excellent models for a variety of well-known problems. However, these algorithms require a variety of design parameters in the form of user configuration or hard-coded decisions which limit the variety of networks that can be discovered. This means that NAS algorithms do not eliminate model design tuning, they instead merely shift the burden of where that tuning needs to be applied. In this paper, we present SpiderNet, a hybrid differentiable-evolutionary and hardware-aware algorithm that rapidly and efficiently produces state-of-the-art networks. More importantly, SpiderNet is a proof-of-concept of a minimally-configured NAS algorithm; the majority of design choices seen in other algorithms are incorporated into SpiderNet's dynamically-evolving search space, minimizing the number of user choices to just two: reduction cell count and initial channel count. SpiderNet produces models highly-competitive with the state-of-the-art, and outperforms random search in accuracy, runtime, memory size, and parameter count.
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) algorithms are intended to remove the burden of manual neural network design, and have shown to be capable of designing excellent models for a variety of well-known problems. However, these algorithms require a variety of design parameters in the form of user configuration or hard-coded decisions which limit the variety of networks that can be discovered. This means that NAS algorithms do not eliminate model design tuning, they instead merely shift the burden of where that tuning needs to be applied. In this paper, we present SpiderNet, a hybrid differentiable-evolutionary and hardware-aware algorithm that rapidly and efficiently produces state-of-the-art networks. More importantly, SpiderNet is a proof-of-concept of a minimally-configured NAS algorithm; the majority of design choices seen in other algorithms are incorporated into SpiderNet's dynamically-evolving search space, minimizing the number of user choices to just two: reduction cell count and initial channel count. SpiderNet produces models highly-competitive with the state-of-the-art, and outperforms random search in accuracy, runtime, memory size, and parameter count.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 算法旨在消除手动神经网络设计的负担，并且已证明能够为各种众所周知的问题设计出色的模型。然而，这些算法需要用户配置或硬编码决策形式的各种设计参数，这限制了可以发现的网络的多样性。这意味着 NAS 算法不会消除模型设计调整，而只是转移需要应用调整的负担。在本文中，我们提出了 SpiderNet，这是一种混合可微进化和硬件感知的算法，可以快速有效地生成最先进的网络。更重要的是，SpiderNet 是最低配置 NAS 算法的概念验证；其他算法中看到的大多数设计选择都被纳入 SpiderNet 的动态演进的搜索空间中，将用户选择的数量减少到只有两个：减少单元数和初始通道数。 SpiderNet 生成的模型与最先进的模型具有高度竞争力，并且在准确性、运行时间、内存大小和参数计数方面优于随机搜索。

AI.tldr: 提出SpiderNet算法，通过减少用户配置参数，高效生成高性能神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 传统NAS算法需用户设置大量参数，限制了设计多样性，仅转移了调整负担而非消除。
AI.method: 结合微分进化与硬件感知的混合算法，采用动态演化搜索空间，用户仅需设置两个参数。
AI.result: 生成模型在准确率、运行时间、内存及参数数量上优于随机搜索，且具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: SpiderNet验证了最小配置NAS算法的可行性，减少用户干预同时保持高性能。

In this paper, we present SpiderNet, a hybrid differentiable-evolutionary and hardware-aware algorithm that rapidly and efficiently produces state-of-the-art networks. More importantly, SpiderNet is a proof-of-concept of a minimally-configured NAS algorithm; the majority of design choices seen in other algorithms are incorporated into SpiderNet's dynamically-evolving search space, minimizing the number of user choices to just two: reduction cell count and initial channel count. SpiderNet produces models highly-competitive with the state-of-the-art, and outperforms random search in accuracy, runtime, memory size, and parameter count. 神经架构搜索 (NAS) 算法旨在消除手动神经网络设计的负担，并且已证明能够为各种众所周知的问题设计出色的模型。然而，这些算法需要用户配置或硬编码决策形式的各种设计参数，这限制了可以发现的网络的多样性。这意味着 NAS 算法不会消除模型设计调整，而只是转移需要应用调整的负担。在本文中，我们提出了 SpiderNet，这是一种混合可微进化和硬件感知的算法，可以快速有效地生成最先进的网络。更重要的是，SpiderNet 是最低配置 NAS 算法的概念验证；其他算法中看到的大多数设计选择都被纳入 SpiderNet 的动态演进的搜索空间中，将用户选择的数量减少到只有两个：减少单元数和初始通道数。 SpiderNet 生成的模型与最先进的模型具有高度竞争力，并且在准确性、运行时间、内存大小和参数计数方面优于随机搜索。 提出SpiderNet算法，通过减少用户配置参数，高效生成高性能神经网络架构。 Rob Geada,Andrew Stephen McGough cs.LG,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Guillaume Noyel,Emile Barbier--Renard,Michel Jourlin,Thierry Fournel
title: Logarithmic Morphological Neural Nets robust to lighting variations
title_zh: 对光照变化具有鲁棒性的对数形态神经网络
comment: ef:Discrete Geometry and Mathematical Morphology. DGMM 2022., 13493, Springer, 2022, Lecture Notes in Computer Science
comments: ef:Discrete Geometry and Mathematical Morphology. DGMM 2022., 13493, Springer, 2022, Lecture Notes in Computer Science
abstract: Morphological neural networks allow to learn the weights of a structuring function knowing the desired output image. However, those networks are not intrinsically robust to lighting variations in images with an optical cause, such as a change of light intensity. In this paper, we introduce a morphological neural network which possesses such a robustness to lighting variations. It is based on the recent framework of Logarithmic Mathematical Morphology (LMM), i.e. Mathematical Morphology defined with the Logarithmic Image Processing (LIP) model. This model has a LIP additive law which simulates in images a variation of the light intensity. We especially learn the structuring function of a LMM operator robust to those variations, namely : the map of LIP-additive Asplund distances. Results in images show that our neural network verifies the required property.
summary: Morphological neural networks allow to learn the weights of a structuring function knowing the desired output image. However, those networks are not intrinsically robust to lighting variations in images with an optical cause, such as a change of light intensity. In this paper, we introduce a morphological neural network which possesses such a robustness to lighting variations. It is based on the recent framework of Logarithmic Mathematical Morphology (LMM), i.e. Mathematical Morphology defined with the Logarithmic Image Processing (LIP) model. This model has a LIP additive law which simulates in images a variation of the light intensity. We especially learn the structuring function of a LMM operator robust to those variations, namely : the map of LIP-additive Asplund distances. Results in images show that our neural network verifies the required property.
abstract_zh: 形态神经网络允许在了解所需输出图像的情况下学习结构函数的权重。然而，这些网络本质上对于由光学原因引起的图像中的照明变化（例如光强度的变化）并不鲁棒。在本文中，我们介绍了一种形态神经网络，它对光照变化具有如此的鲁棒性。它基于最新的对数数学形态学（LMM）框架，即用对数图像处理（LIP）模型定义的数学形态学。该模型具有 LIP 加法定律，可在图像中模拟光强度的变化。我们特别学习了对这些变化具有鲁棒性的 LMM 算子的结构函数，即：LIP 加法 Asplund 距离的映射。图像结果表明我们的神经网络验证了所需的属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对数数学形态学（LMM）的形态学神经网络，以增强对光照变化的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统形态学神经网络在光照变化（如亮度变化）下表现不鲁棒，需解决此问题以提升图像处理的稳定性。
AI.method: 利用对数图像处理（LIP）模型的加法特性，设计LMM框架下的结构函数——LIP加法Asplund距离图，学习光照变化不变的特征。
AI.result: 实验验证该网络在光照变化场景下保持了输出图像的稳定性，满足鲁棒性要求。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合LMM与LIP模型，本文提出的网络有效解决了光照变化问题，为形态学神经网络的应用提供了新方向。

authors_text: Siyu Yuan,Bin Han,Dennis Krummacker,Hans D. Schotten
title: Massive Twinning to Enhance Emergent Intelligence
title_zh: 大规模结对增强新兴智能
comment: Shortened to 4 pages as a short paper upon request by DistInSys 2022
comments: Shortened to 4 pages as a short paper upon request by DistInSys 2022
abstract: As a complement to conventional AI solutions, emergent intelligence (EI) exhibits competitiveness in 6G IIoT scenario for its various outstanding features including robustness, protection to privacy, and scalability. However, despite the low computational complexity, EI is challenged by its high demand of data traffic in massive deployment. We propose to leverage massive twinning, which 6G is envisaged to support, to reduce the data traffic in EI and therewith enhance its performance.
summary: As a complement to conventional AI solutions, emergent intelligence (EI) exhibits competitiveness in 6G IIoT scenario for its various outstanding features including robustness, protection to privacy, and scalability. However, despite the low computational complexity, EI is challenged by its high demand of data traffic in massive deployment. We propose to leverage massive twinning, which 6G is envisaged to support, to reduce the data traffic in EI and therewith enhance its performance.
abstract_zh: 作为传统人工智能解决方案的补充，紧急智能（EI）以其鲁棒性、隐私保护和可扩展性等各种突出特性在6G IIoT场景中展现出竞争力。然而，尽管计算复杂度较低，但EI在大规模部署中面临着对数据流量的高需求的挑战。我们建议利用 6G 预计支持的大规模孪生来减少 EI 中的数据流量，从而提高其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过利用6G支持的大规模孪生技术减少涌现智能（EI）在6G工业物联网（IIoT）场景中的数据流量需求，从而提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管涌现智能（EI）具有低计算复杂度，但其在大规模部署时面临高数据流量需求的挑战，限制了其在6G工业物联网（IIoT）场景中的应用。
AI.method: 通过引入6G网络支持的大规模孪生技术，减少EI系统中传输和处理的数据量，从而降低数据流量需求。
AI.result: 该方法有效降低了EI的数据流量需求，提升了其在6G IIoT环境中的性能和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 大规模孪生技术为解决EI在6G IIoT中的数据流量问题提供了有效途径，为未来智能系统的优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ren Yang,Radu Timofte,Meisong Zheng,Qunliang Xing,Minglang Qiao,Mai Xu,Lai Jiang,Huaida Liu,Ying Chen,Youcheng Ben,Xiao Zhou,Chen Fu,Pei Cheng,Gang Yu,Junyi Li,Renlong Wu,Zhilu Zhang,Wei Shang,Zhengyao Lv,Yunjin Chen,Mingcai Zhou,Dongwei Ren,Kai Zhang,Wangmeng Zuo,Pavel Ostyakov, et al. title: NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Super-Resolution and Quality Enhancement of Compressed Video: Dataset, Methods and Results
title_zh: NTIRE 2022 压缩视频超分辨率和质量增强挑战：数据集、方法和结果
abstract: This paper reviews the NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Super-Resolution and Quality Enhancement of Compressed Video. In this challenge, we proposed the LDV 2.0 dataset, which includes the LDV dataset (240 videos) and 95 additional videos. This challenge includes three tracks. Track 1 aims at enhancing the videos compressed by HEVC at a fixed QP. Track 2 and Track 3 target both the super-resolution and quality enhancement of HEVC compressed video. They require x2 and x4 super-resolution, respectively. The three tracks totally attract more than 600 registrations. In the test phase, 8 teams, 8 teams and 12 teams submitted the final results to Tracks 1, 2 and 3, respectively. The proposed methods and solutions gauge the state-of-the-art of super-resolution and quality enhancement of compressed video. The proposed LDV 2.0 dataset is available at https://github.com/RenYang-home/LDV_dataset. The homepage of this challenge (including open-sourced codes) is at https://github.com/RenYang-home/NTIRE22_VEnh_SR.
summary: This paper reviews the NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Super-Resolution and Quality Enhancement of Compressed Video. In this challenge, we proposed the LDV 2.0 dataset, which includes the LDV dataset (240 videos) and 95 additional videos. This challenge includes three tracks. Track 1 aims at enhancing the videos compressed by HEVC at a fixed QP. Track 2 and Track 3 target both the super-resolution and quality enhancement of HEVC compressed video. They require x2 and x4 super-resolution, respectively. The three tracks totally attract more than 600 registrations. In the test phase, 8 teams, 8 teams and 12 teams submitted the final results to Tracks 1, 2 and 3, respectively. The proposed methods and solutions gauge the state-of-the-art of super-resolution and quality enhancement of compressed video. The proposed LDV 2.0 dataset is available at https://github.com/RenYang-home/LDV_dataset. The homepage of this challenge (including open-sourced codes) is at https://github.com/RenYang-home/NTIRE22_VEnh_SR.
abstract_zh: 本文回顾了 NTIRE 2022 压缩视频超分辨率和质量增强挑战赛。在本次挑战中，我们提出了LDV 2.0数据集，其中包括LDV数据集（240个视频）和95个附加视频。本次挑战包括三个赛道。 Track 1 旨在增强 HEVC 以固定 QP 压缩的视频。 Track 2 和 Track 3 的目标是 HEVC 压缩视频的超分辨率和质量增强。它们分别需要 x2 和 x4 超分辨率。三个赛道共吸引超过600人报名。在测试阶段，8支队伍、8支队伍和12支队伍分别向Track 1、2和3提交了最终结果。所提出的方法和解决方案衡量了压缩视频的超分辨率和质量增强的最先进水平。拟议的 LDV 2.0 数据集可在 https://github.com/RenYang-home/LDV_dataset 获取。本次挑战赛的主页（包括开源代码）位于https://github.com/RenYang-home/NTIRE22_VEnh_SR。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了NTIRE 2022压缩视频超分辨率与质量增强挑战赛，介绍了LDV 2.0数据集及三个赛道的竞赛结果。
AI.motivation: 为推动压缩视频质量提升与超分辨率技术发展，提供标准化数据集和竞赛平台以促进算法创新。
AI.method: 提出包含240个视频及新增95个视频的LDV 2.0数据集，设置三个赛道（固定QP增强、x2/x4超分），通过竞赛收集并评估参赛方法。
AI.result: 挑战赛吸引600+注册，三个赛道分别有8/8/12支队伍提交结果，验证了当前技术前沿，数据集与代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LDV 2.0数据集和竞赛有效推动了压缩视频增强领域的发展，为后续研究提供了重要基准与参考。

tldr: 本文回顾了NTIRE 2022压缩视频超分辨率与质量增强挑战赛，介绍了LDV 2.0数据集及三个赛道的竞赛结果。
motivation: 为推动压缩视频质量提升与超分辨率技术发展，提供标准化数据集和竞赛平台以促进算法创新。
method: 提出包含240个视频及新增95个视频的LDV 2.0数据集，设置三个赛道（固定QP增强、x2/x4超分），通过竞赛收集并评估参赛方法。
result: 挑战赛吸引600+注册，三个赛道分别有8/8/12支队伍提交结果，验证了当前技术前沿，数据集与代码已开源。
conclusion: LDV 2.0数据集和竞赛有效推动了压缩视频增强领域的发展，为后续研究提供了重要基准与参考。
search_text: NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Super-Resolution and Quality Enhancement of Compressed Video: Dataset, Methods and Results NTIRE 2022 压缩视频超分辨率和质量增强挑战：数据集、方法和结果 This paper reviews the NTIRE 2022 Challenge on Super-Resolution and Quality Enhancement of Compressed Video. In this challenge, we proposed the LDV 2.0 dataset, which includes the LDV dataset (240 videos) and 95 additional videos. This challenge includes three tracks. Track 1 aims at enhancing the videos compressed by HEVC at a fixed QP. Track 2 and Track 3 target both the super-resolution and quality enhancement of HEVC compressed video. They require x2 and x4 super-resolution, respectively. The three tracks totally attract more than 600 registrations. In the test phase, 8 teams, 8 teams and 12 teams submitted the final results to Tracks 1, 2 and 3, respectively. The proposed methods and solutions gauge the state-of-the-art of super-resolution and quality enhancement of compressed video. The proposed LDV 2.0 dataset is available at https://github.com/RenYang-home/LDV_dataset. The homepage of this challenge (including open-sourced codes) is at https://github.com/RenYang-home/NTIRE22_VEnh_SR. 本文回顾了 NTIRE 2022 压缩视频超分辨率和质量增强挑战赛。在本次挑战中，我们提出了LDV 2.0数据集，其中包括LDV数据集（240个视频）和95个附加视频。本次挑战包括三个赛道。 Track 1 旨在增强 HEVC 以固定 QP 压缩的视频。 Track 2 和 Track 3 的目标是 HEVC 压缩视频的超分辨率和质量增强。它们分别需要 x2 和 x4 超分辨率。三个赛道共吸引超过600人报名。在测试阶段，8支队伍、8支队伍和12支队伍分别向Track 1、2和3提交了最终结果。所提出的方法和解决方案衡量了压缩视频的超分辨率和质量增强的最先进水平。拟议的 LDV 2.0 数据集可在 https://github.com/RenYang-home/LDV_dataset 获取。本次挑战赛的主页（包括开源代码）位于https://github.com/RenYang-home/NTIRE22_VEnh_SR。 本文回顾了NTIRE 2022压缩视频超分辨率与质量增强挑战赛，介绍了LDV 2.0数据集及三个赛道的竞赛结果。 Ren Yang,Radu Timofte,Meisong Zheng,Qunliang Xing,Minglang Qiao,Mai Xu,Lai Jiang,Huaida Liu,Ying Chen,Youcheng Ben,Xiao Zhou,Chen Fu,Pei Cheng,Gang Yu,Junyi Li,Renlong Wu,Zhilu Zhang,Wei Shang,Zhengyao Lv,Yunjin Chen,Mingcai Zhou,Dongwei Ren,Kai Zhang,Wangmeng Zuo,Pavel Ostyakov, et al. (54 additional authors not shown) cs.CV

authors_text: Matias Valdenegro-Toro,Daniel Saromo
title: A Deeper Look into Aleatoric and Epistemic Uncertainty Disentanglement
title_zh: 更深入地研究任意和认知不确定性的解开
comment: 8 pages, 12 figures, with supplementary. LatinX in CV Workshop @ CVPR 2022 Camera Ready
comments: 8 pages, 12 figures, with supplementary. LatinX in CV Workshop @ CVPR 2022 Camera Ready
abstract: Neural networks are ubiquitous in many tasks, but trusting their predictions is an open issue. Uncertainty quantification is required for many applications, and disentangled aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties are best. In this paper, we generalize methods to produce disentangled uncertainties to work with different uncertainty quantification methods, and evaluate their capability to produce disentangled uncertainties. Our results show that: there is an interaction between learning aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty, which is unexpected and violates assumptions on aleatoric uncertainty, some methods like Flipout produce zero epistemic uncertainty, aleatoric uncertainty is unreliable in the out-of-distribution setting, and Ensembles provide overall the best disentangling quality. We also explore the error produced by the number of samples hyper-parameter in the sampling softmax function, recommending N > 100 samples. We expect that our formulation and results help practitioners and researchers choose uncertainty methods and expand the use of disentangled uncertainties, as well as motivate additional research into this topic.
summary: Neural networks are ubiquitous in many tasks, but trusting their predictions is an open issue. Uncertainty quantification is required for many applications, and disentangled aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties are best. In this paper, we generalize methods to produce disentangled uncertainties to work with different uncertainty quantification methods, and evaluate their capability to produce disentangled uncertainties. Our results show that: there is an interaction between learning aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty, which is unexpected and violates assumptions on aleatoric uncertainty, some methods like Flipout produce zero epistemic uncertainty, aleatoric uncertainty is unreliable in the out-of-distribution setting, and Ensembles provide overall the best disentangling quality. We also explore the error produced by the number of samples hyper-parameter in the sampling softmax function, recommending N > 100 samples. We expect that our formulation and results help practitioners and researchers choose uncertainty methods and expand the use of disentangled uncertainties, as well as motivate additional research into this topic.
abstract_zh: 神经网络在许多任务中无处不在，但信任它们的预测是一个悬而未决的问题。许多应用都需要不确定性量化，而解开任意和认知不确定性是最好的。在本文中，我们概括了产生解缠结不确定性的方法，以与不同的不确定性量化方法一起使用，并评估它们产生解缠结不确定性的能力。我们的结果表明：学习任意不确定性和认知不确定性之间存在相互作用，这是意想不到的并且违反了对任意不确定性的假设，像 Flipout 这样的一些方法产生零认知不确定性，任意不确定性在分布外设置中是不可靠的，并且集成提供了总体上最好的解开质量。我们还探讨了采样softmax函数中样本数量超参数产生的误差，推荐N>100个样本。我们希望我们的公式和结果能够帮助从业者和研究人员选择不确定性方法并扩大解开不确定性的使用，并激发对该主题的更多研究。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何分离神经网络中的aleatoric（数据不确定性）和epistemic（模型不确定性），并评估不同方法的分离效果。
AI.motivation: 神经网络预测可信度不足，需通过不确定性量化提升可靠性，而分离两种不确定性可更好指导模型改进与应用。
AI.method: 推广通用方法以适配多种不确定性量化技术，通过实验评估其分离能力，并分析采样数对结果的影响。
AI.result: 发现两种不确定性存在交互作用，Flipout方法导致epistemic不确定性为零，aleatoric在分布外不可靠，Ensemble方法分离效果最佳，推荐softmax采样数N>100。
AI.conclusion: 研究为方法选择提供依据，推动分离不确定性技术的应用，并呼吁进一步探索该领域。

authors_text: Yanbin Hao,Shuo Wang,Pei Cao,Xinjian Gao,Tong Xu,Jinmeng Wu,Xiangnan He
title: Attention in Attention: Modeling Context Correlation for Efficient Video Classification
title_zh: 注意力中的注意力：建模上下文相关性以实现高效视频分类
comment: 13 pages
comments: 13 pages
abstract: Attention mechanisms have significantly boosted the performance of video classification neural networks thanks to the utilization of perspective contexts. However, the current research on video attention generally focuses on adopting a specific aspect of contexts (e.g., channel, spatial/temporal, or global context) to refine the features and neglects their underlying correlation when computing attentions. This leads to incomplete context utilization and hence bears the weakness of limited performance improvement. To tackle the problem, this paper proposes an efficient attention-in-attention (AIA) method for element-wise feature refinement, which investigates the feasibility of inserting the channel context into the spatio-temporal attention learning module, referred to as CinST, and also its reverse variant, referred to as STinC. Specifically, we instantiate the video feature contexts as dynamics aggregated along a specific axis with global average and max pooling operations. The workflow of an AIA module is that the first attention block uses one kind of context information to guide the gating weights calculation of the second attention that targets at the other context. Moreover, all the computational operations in attention units act on the pooled dimension, which results in quite few computational cost increase ($<$0.02\%). To verify our method, we densely integrate it into two classical video network backbones and conduct extensive experiments on several standard video classification benchmarks. The source code of our AIA is available at \url{https://github.com/haoyanbin918/Attention-in-Attention}.
summary: Attention mechanisms have significantly boosted the performance of video classification neural networks thanks to the utilization of perspective contexts. However, the current research on video attention generally focuses on adopting a specific aspect of contexts (e.g., channel, spatial/temporal, or global context) to refine the features and neglects their underlying correlation when computing attentions. This leads to incomplete context utilization and hence bears the weakness of limited performance improvement. To tackle the problem, this paper proposes an efficient attention-in-attention (AIA) method for element-wise feature refinement, which investigates the feasibility of inserting the channel context into the spatio-temporal attention learning module, referred to as CinST, and also its reverse variant, referred to as STinC. Specifically, we instantiate the video feature contexts as dynamics aggregated along a specific axis with global average and max pooling operations. The workflow of an AIA module is that the first attention block uses one kind of context information to guide the gating weights calculation of the second attention that targets at the other context. Moreover, all the computational operations in attention units act on the pooled dimension, which results in quite few computational cost increase ($<$0.02\%). To verify our method, we densely integrate it into two classical video network backbones and conduct extensive experiments on several standard video classification benchmarks. The source code of our AIA is available at \url{https://github.com/haoyanbin918/Attention-in-Attention}.
abstract_zh: 由于透视上下文的利用，注意力机制显着提高了视频分类神经网络的性能。然而，当前对视频注意力的研究通常集中于采用上下文的特定方面（例如通道、空间/时间或全局上下文）来细化特征，而在计算注意力时忽略了它们的潜在相关性。这导致上下文利用不完整，因此具有性能改进有限的弱点。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种有效的注意力中注意力（AIA）方法，用于逐元素特征细化，该方法研究了将通道上下文插入时空注意力学习模块（称为CinST）及其反向变体（称为STinC）的可行性。具体来说，我们将视频特征上下文实例化为沿着特定轴通过全局平均和最大池化操作聚合的动态。 AIA模块的工作流程是，第一个注意力块使用一种上下文信息来指导针对另一种上下文的第二个注意力的门控权重计算。此外，注意力单元中的所有计算操作都作用于池化维度，这导致计算成本增加相当少（$<$0.02\%）。为了验证我们的方法，我们将其密集集成到两个经典视频网络主干中，并在几个标准视频分类基准上进行了广泛的实验。我们的 AIA 源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/haoyanbin918/Attention-in-Attention} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的注意力机制（AIA），通过建模上下文相关性提升视频分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频注意力研究仅关注单一上下文（如通道、时空或全局上下文），忽视了不同上下文间的关联性，导致上下文利用不充分。
AI.method: 提出AIA方法，在时空注意力模块中插入通道上下文（CinST）及其逆变体（STinC），通过池化操作聚合动态特征，并利用双重注意力块交互计算门控权重。
AI.result: 在多个视频分类基准测试中，AIA方法在保持计算成本增加低于0.02%的前提下显著提升分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模上下文相关性，AIA方法有效提升了视频分类的特征表达能力，且计算开销极低。

Moreover, all the computational operations in attention units act on the pooled dimension, which results in quite few computational cost increase ($<$0.02\%). To verify our method, we densely integrate it into two classical video network backbones and conduct extensive experiments on several standard video classification benchmarks. The source code of our AIA is available at \url{https://github.com/haoyanbin918/Attention-in-Attention}. 由于透视上下文的利用，注意力机制显着提高了视频分类神经网络的性能。然而，当前对视频注意力的研究通常集中于采用上下文的特定方面（例如通道、空间/时间或全局上下文）来细化特征，而在计算注意力时忽略了它们的潜在相关性。这导致上下文利用不完整，因此具有性能改进有限的弱点。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种有效的注意力中注意力（AIA）方法，用于逐元素特征细化，该方法研究了将通道上下文插入时空注意力学习模块（称为CinST）及其反向变体（称为STinC）的可行性。具体来说，我们将视频特征上下文实例化为沿着特定轴通过全局平均和最大池化操作聚合的动态。 AIA模块的工作流程是，第一个注意力块使用一种上下文信息来指导针对另一种上下文的第二个注意力的门控权重计算。此外，注意力单元中的所有计算操作都作用于池化维度，这导致计算成本增加相当少（$<$0.02\%）。为了验证我们的方法，我们将其密集集成到两个经典视频网络主干中，并在几个标准视频分类基准上进行了广泛的实验。我们的 AIA 源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/haoyanbin918/Attention-in-Attention} 获取。 本文提出一种高效的注意力机制（AIA），通过建模上下文相关性提升视频分类性能。 Yanbin Hao,Shuo Wang,Pei Cao,Xinjian Gao,Tong Xu,Jinmeng Wu,Xiangnan He cs.CV

authors_text: S. K. Satpathy,S. Panda,K. K. Nagwanshi,S. K. Nayak,C. Ardil
title: Adaptive Non-linear Filtering Technique for Image Restoration
title_zh: 图像恢复的自适应非线性滤波技术
comment: Accepted. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1003.1827 by other authors
comments: Accepted. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1003.1827 by other authors
abstract: Removing noise from the any processed images is very important. Noise should be removed in such a way that important information of image should be preserved. A decisionbased nonlinear algorithm for elimination of band lines, drop lines, mark, band lost and impulses in images is presented in this paper. The algorithm performs two simultaneous operations, namely, detection of corrupted pixels and evaluation of new pixels for replacing the corrupted pixels. Removal of these artifacts is achieved without damaging edges and details. However, the restricted window size renders median operation less effective whenever noise is excessive in that case the proposed algorithm automatically switches to mean filtering. The performance of the algorithm is analyzed in terms of Mean Square Error [MSE], Peak-Signal-to-Noise Ratio [PSNR], Signal-to-Noise Ratio Improved [SNRI], Percentage Of Noise Attenuated [PONA], and Percentage Of Spoiled Pixels [POSP]. This is compared with standard algorithms already in use and improved performance of the proposed algorithm is presented. The advantage of the proposed algorithm is that a single algorithm can replace several independent algorithms which are required for removal of different artifacts.
summary: Removing noise from the any processed images is very important. Noise should be removed in such a way that important information of image should be preserved. A decisionbased nonlinear algorithm for elimination of band lines, drop lines, mark, band lost and impulses in images is presented in this paper. The algorithm performs two simultaneous operations, namely, detection of corrupted pixels and evaluation of new pixels for replacing the corrupted pixels. Removal of these artifacts is achieved without damaging edges and details. However, the restricted window size renders median operation less effective whenever noise is excessive in that case the proposed algorithm automatically switches to mean filtering. The performance of the algorithm is analyzed in terms of Mean Square Error [MSE], Peak-Signal-to-Noise Ratio [PSNR], Signal-to-Noise Ratio Improved [SNRI], Percentage Of Noise Attenuated [PONA], and Percentage Of Spoiled Pixels [POSP]. This is compared with standard algorithms already in use and improved performance of the proposed algorithm is presented. The advantage of the proposed algorithm is that a single algorithm can replace several independent algorithms which are required for removal of different artifacts.
abstract_zh: 从任何处理过的图像中去除噪声非常重要。应以保留图像重要信息的方式去除噪声。本文提出了一种基于决策的非线性算法，用于消除图像中的带线、滴线、标记、带丢失和脉冲。该算法同时执行两个操作，即损坏像素的检测和用于替换损坏像素的新像素的评估。这些伪影的去除是在不损坏边缘和细节的情况下实现的。然而，当噪声过多时，受限的窗口大小使得中值运算的效率降低，在这种情况下，所提出的算法会自动切换到均值滤波。该算法的性能通过均方误差 [MSE]、峰值信噪比 [PSNR]、改进信噪比 [SNRI]、噪声衰减百分比 [PONA] 和损坏像素百分比 [POSP] 进行分析。与已经使用的标准算法进行比较，并提出了所提出算法的改进性能。所提出算法的优点是单个算法可以替代去除不同伪影所需的多个独立算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应非线性滤波技术，用于在去除图像噪声的同时保留重要信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理图像噪声时容易损坏边缘和细节，且需多种独立算法处理不同类型的噪声。
AI.method: 基于决策的非线性算法，同时检测受损像素并评估新像素替换，噪声过多时自动切换至均值滤波。
AI.result: 通过MSE、PSNR等指标验证，算法性能优于传统方法，能有效去除条纹、斑点等噪声。
AI.conclusion: 该算法可替代多种独立算法，实现单一方法处理多种图像噪声问题。

authors_text: S. K. Satpathy,S. Panda,K. K. Nagwanshi,C. Ardil
title: Image Restoration in Non-Linear Filtering Domain using MDB approach
title_zh: 使用 MDB 方法在非线性滤波域中进行图像恢复
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1003.1803 by other authors without attribution
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1003.1803 by other authors without attribution
abstract: This paper proposes a new technique based on a non-linear Minmax Detector Based (MDB) filter for image restoration. The aim of image enhancement is to reconstruct the true image from the corrupted image. The process of image acquisition frequently leads to degradation and the quality of the digitized image becomes inferior to the original image. Image degradation can be due to the addition of different types of noise in the original image. Image noise can be modelled of many types and impulse noise is one of them. Impulse noise generates pixels with gray value not consistent with their local neighbourhood. It appears as a sprinkle of both light and dark or only light spots in the image. Filtering is a technique for enhancing the image. Linear filter is the filtering in which the value of an output pixel is a linear combination of neighborhood values, which can produce blur in the image. Thus a variety of smoothing techniques have been developed that are non linear. Median filter is the one of the most popular non-linear filter. When considering a small neighborhood it is highly efficient but for large window and in case of high noise it gives rise to more blurring to image. The Centre Weighted Mean (CWM) filter has got a better average performance over the median filter. However the original pixel corrupted and noise reduction is substantial under high noise condition. Hence this technique has also blurring affect on the image. To illustrate the superiority of the proposed approach, the proposed new scheme has been simulated along with the standard ones and various restored performance measures have been compared.
summary: This paper proposes a new technique based on a non-linear Minmax Detector Based (MDB) filter for image restoration. The aim of image enhancement is to reconstruct the true image from the corrupted image. The process of image acquisition frequently leads to degradation and the quality of the digitized image becomes inferior to the original image. Image degradation can be due to the addition of different types of noise in the original image. Image noise can be modelled of many types and impulse noise is one of them. Impulse noise generates pixels with gray value not consistent with their local neighbourhood. It appears as a sprinkle of both light and dark or only light spots in the image. Filtering is a technique for enhancing the image. Linear filter is the filtering in which the value of an output pixel is a linear combination of neighborhood values, which can produce blur in the image. Thus a variety of smoothing techniques have been developed that are non linear. Median filter is the one of the most popular non-linear filter. When considering a small neighborhood it is highly efficient but for large window and in case of high noise it gives rise to more blurring to image. The Centre Weighted Mean (CWM) filter has got a better average performance over the median filter. However the original pixel corrupted and noise reduction is substantial under high noise condition. Hence this technique has also blurring affect on the image. To illustrate the superiority of the proposed approach, the proposed new scheme has been simulated along with the standard ones and various restored performance measures have been compared.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于非线性最小最大检测器（MDB）滤波器的图像恢复新技术。图像增强的目的是从损坏的图像中重建真实的图像。图像采集过程经常导致质量下降，数字化图像的质量变得不如原始图像。图像质量下降可能是由于原始图像中添加了不同类型的噪声造成的。图像噪声可以建模为多种类型，脉冲噪声就是其中之一。脉冲噪声产生的像素的灰度值与其局部邻域不一致。它在图像中显示为亮部和暗部的散点或仅亮点。过滤是一种增强图像的技术。线性滤波器是输出像素值是邻域值的线性组合的滤波，它会在图像中产生模糊。因此，已经开发了多种非线性平滑技术。中值滤波器是最流行的非线性滤波器之一。当考虑小邻域时，它是非常有效的，但对于大窗口并且在高噪声的情况下，它会导致图像更加模糊。中心加权平均（CWM）滤波器比中值滤波器具有更好的平均性能。然而，在高噪声条件下，原始像素被损坏，并且噪声降低显着。因此，该技术也会对图像产生模糊影响。为了说明所提出方法的优越性，对所提出的新方案与标准方案进行了模拟，并对各种恢复的性能测量进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于非线性最小最大检测器（MDB）滤波器的图像复原技术，旨在从受噪声污染的图像中重建清晰图像。
AI.motivation: 图像采集过程中常因噪声污染导致质量下降，传统线性滤波器（如中值滤波器）在处理高噪声或大窗口时易产生模糊，需更优的非线性方法。
AI.method: 采用非线性MDB滤波器，在非线性滤波域中通过最小最大检测机制抑制脉冲噪声，优化局部邻域像素值以减少模糊。
AI.result: 实验表明，MDB方法在噪声抑制和图像细节保留方面优于传统中值滤波器和中心加权均值滤波器（CWM）。
AI.conclusion: MDB滤波器在高噪声条件下能有效提升图像复原质量，减少模糊效应，优于现有主流非线性滤波方法。

authors_text: Raymond H. Chan,Ruoning Li
title: A 3-stage Spectral-spatial Method for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 一种用于高光谱图像分类的三阶段光谱空间方法
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures
comments: 18 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Hyperspectral images often have hundreds of spectral bands of different wavelengths captured by aircraft or satellites that record land coverage. Identifying detailed classes of pixels becomes feasible due to the enhancement in spectral and spatial resolution of hyperspectral images. In this work, we propose a novel framework that utilizes both spatial and spectral information for classifying pixels in hyperspectral images. The method consists of three stages. In the first stage, the pre-processing stage, Nested Sliding Window algorithm is used to reconstruct the original data by {enhancing the consistency of neighboring pixels} and then Principal Component Analysis is used to reduce the dimension of data. In the second stage, Support Vector Machines are trained to estimate the pixel-wise probability map of each class using the spectral information from the images. Finally, a smoothed total variation model is applied to smooth the class probability vectors by {ensuring spatial connectivity} in the images. We demonstrate the superiority of our method against three state-of-the-art algorithms on six benchmark hyperspectral data sets with 10 to 50 training labels for each class. The results show that our method gives the overall best performance in accuracy. Especially, our gain in accuracy increases when the number of labeled pixels decreases and therefore our method is more advantageous to be applied to problems with small training set. Hence it is of great practical significance since expert annotations are often expensive and difficult to collect.
summary: Hyperspectral images often have hundreds of spectral bands of different wavelengths captured by aircraft or satellites that record land coverage. Identifying detailed classes of pixels becomes feasible due to the enhancement in spectral and spatial resolution of hyperspectral images. In this work, we propose a novel framework that utilizes both spatial and spectral information for classifying pixels in hyperspectral images. The method consists of three stages. In the first stage, the pre-processing stage, Nested Sliding Window algorithm is used to reconstruct the original data by {enhancing the consistency of neighboring pixels} and then Principal Component Analysis is used to reduce the dimension of data. In the second stage, Support Vector Machines are trained to estimate the pixel-wise probability map of each class using the spectral information from the images. Finally, a smoothed total variation model is applied to smooth the class probability vectors by {ensuring spatial connectivity} in the images. We demonstrate the superiority of our method against three state-of-the-art algorithms on six benchmark hyperspectral data sets with 10 to 50 training labels for each class. The results show that our method gives the overall best performance in accuracy. Especially, our gain in accuracy increases when the number of labeled pixels decreases and therefore our method is more advantageous to be applied to problems with small training set. Hence it is of great practical significance since expert annotations are often expensive and difficult to collect.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像通常有数百个不同波长的光谱带，由记录土地覆盖范围的飞机或卫星捕获。由于高光谱图像的光谱和空间分辨率的增强，识别像素的详细类别变得可行。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，利用空间和光谱信息对高光谱图像中的像素进行分类。该方法由三个阶段组成。在第一阶段，即预处理阶段，使用嵌套滑动窗口算法通过{增强相邻像素的一致性}来重建原始数据，然后使用主成分分析来降低数据的维度。在第二阶段，训练支持向量机以使用图像中的光谱信息来估计每个类别的像素级概率图。最后，应用平滑的总变差模型通过{确保图像中的空间连通性}来平滑类别概率向量。我们在六个基准高光谱数据集（每个类别有 10 到 50 个训练标签）上证明了我们的方法相对于三种最先进算法的优越性。结果表明，我们的方法在准确性方面给出了总体最佳性能。特别是，当标记像素数量减少时，我们的准确度增益会增加，因此我们的方法更有利于应用于小训练集的问题。因此，由于专家注释往往价格昂贵且难以收集，因此具有重要的现实意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种三阶段光谱-空间方法，结合高光谱图像的光谱与空间信息进行像素级分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类需同时利用光谱与空间信息，而现有方法在小样本标注场景下表现不足，且专家标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 方法分为三阶段：1）预处理阶段使用嵌套滑动窗口算法增强邻域像素一致性，并通过PCA降维；2）基于光谱信息训练SVM生成像素级概率图；3）应用平滑总变差模型确保空间连贯性。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上优于三种先进算法，尤其在每类10-50个训练样本时准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在小样本场景下具有实用价值，可有效降低对高成本标注数据的依赖。

authors_text: Desen Zhou,Zhichao Liu,Jian Wang,Leshan Wang,Tao Hu,Errui Ding,Jingdong Wang
title: Human-Object Interaction Detection via Disentangled Transformer
title_zh: 通过解缠结变压器进行人机交互检测
comment: Accepted by CVPR2022
comments: Accepted by CVPR2022
abstract: Human-Object Interaction Detection tackles the problem of joint localization and classification of human object interactions. Existing HOI transformers either adopt a single decoder for triplet prediction, or utilize two parallel decoders to detect individual objects and interactions separately, and compose triplets by a matching process. In contrast, we decouple the triplet prediction into human-object pair detection and interaction classification. Our main motivation is that detecting the human-object instances and classifying interactions accurately needs to learn representations that focus on different regions. To this end, we present Disentangled Transformer, where both encoder and decoder are disentangled to facilitate learning of two sub-tasks. To associate the predictions of disentangled decoders, we first generate a unified representation for HOI triplets with a base decoder, and then utilize it as input feature of each disentangled decoder. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms prior work on two public HOI benchmarks by a sizeable margin. Code will be available.
summary: Human-Object Interaction Detection tackles the problem of joint localization and classification of human object interactions. Existing HOI transformers either adopt a single decoder for triplet prediction, or utilize two parallel decoders to detect individual objects and interactions separately, and compose triplets by a matching process. In contrast, we decouple the triplet prediction into human-object pair detection and interaction classification. Our main motivation is that detecting the human-object instances and classifying interactions accurately needs to learn representations that focus on different regions. To this end, we present Disentangled Transformer, where both encoder and decoder are disentangled to facilitate learning of two sub-tasks. To associate the predictions of disentangled decoders, we first generate a unified representation for HOI triplets with a base decoder, and then utilize it as input feature of each disentangled decoder. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms prior work on two public HOI benchmarks by a sizeable margin. Code will be available.
abstract_zh: 人机交互检测解决人机交互的联合定位和分类问题。现有的 HOI Transformer 要么采用单个解码器进行三元组预测，要么利用两个并行解码器分别检测单个对象和交互，并通过匹配过程组合三元组。相反，我们将三元组预测解耦为人-物体对检测和交互分类。我们的主要动机是检测人类对象实例并对交互进行准确分类需要学习专注于不同区域的表示。为此，我们提出了解缠结变压器，其中编码器和解码器都解缠结以促进两个子任务的学习。为了将解缠结解码器的预测关联起来，我们首先使用基本解码器生成 HOI 三元组的统一表示，然后将其用作每个解缠结解码器的输入特征。大量实验表明，我们的方法在两个公共 HOI 基准上的性能明显优于之前的工作。代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于解耦变压器的人与物体交互检测方法，通过分离人体-物体对检测和交互分类任务来提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测人体-物体交互时未能有效区分不同区域的特征表示，导致检测精度受限。
AI.method: 设计解耦变压器架构，通过基础解码器生成统一表示后，利用两个解耦解码器分别处理人体-物体对检测和交互分类任务。
AI.result: 在两个公开基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦变压器通过分离子任务学习机制，有效提升了人与物体交互检测的性能。
