authors_text: Jinyu Chen,Chen Gao,Erli Meng,Qiong Zhang,Si Liu
title: Reinforced Structured State-Evolution for Vision-Language Navigation
title_zh: 视觉语言导航的强化结构化状态演化
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022
abstract: Vision-and-language Navigation (VLN) task requires an embodied agent to navigate to a remote location following a natural language instruction. Previous methods usually adopt a sequence model (e.g., Transformer and LSTM) as the navigator. In such a paradigm, the sequence model predicts action at each step through a maintained navigation state, which is generally represented as a one-dimensional vector. However, the crucial navigation clues (i.e., object-level environment layout) for embodied navigation task is discarded since the maintained vector is essentially unstructured. In this paper, we propose a novel Structured state-Evolution (SEvol) model to effectively maintain the environment layout clues for VLN. Specifically, we utilise the graph-based feature to represent the navigation state instead of the vector-based state. Accordingly, we devise a Reinforced Layout clues Miner (RLM) to mine and detect the most crucial layout graph for long-term navigation via a customised reinforcement learning strategy. Moreover, the Structured Evolving Module (SEM) is proposed to maintain the structured graph-based state during navigation, where the state is gradually evolved to learn the object-level spatial-temporal relationship. The experiments on the R2R and R4R datasets show that the proposed SEvol model improves VLN models' performance by large margins, e.g., +3% absolute SPL accuracy for NvEM and +8% for EnvDrop on the R2R test set.
summary: Vision-and-language Navigation (VLN) task requires an embodied agent to navigate to a remote location following a natural language instruction. Previous methods usually adopt a sequence model (e.g., Transformer and LSTM) as the navigator. In such a paradigm, the sequence model predicts action at each step through a maintained navigation state, which is generally represented as a one-dimensional vector. However, the crucial navigation clues (i.e., object-level environment layout) for embodied navigation task is discarded since the maintained vector is essentially unstructured. In this paper, we propose a novel Structured state-Evolution (SEvol) model to effectively maintain the environment layout clues for VLN. Specifically, we utilise the graph-based feature to represent the navigation state instead of the vector-based state. Accordingly, we devise a Reinforced Layout clues Miner (RLM) to mine and detect the most crucial layout graph for long-term navigation via a customised reinforcement learning strategy. Moreover, the Structured Evolving Module (SEM) is proposed to maintain the structured graph-based state during navigation, where the state is gradually evolved to learn the object-level spatial-temporal relationship. The experiments on the R2R and R4R datasets show that the proposed SEvol model improves VLN models' performance by large margins, e.g., +3% absolute SPL accuracy for NvEM and +8% for EnvDrop on the R2R test set.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言导航（VLN）任务需要实体代理按照自然语言指令导航到远程位置。以前的方法通常采用序列模型（例如 Transformer 和 LSTM）作为导航器。在这样的范例中，序列模型通过维护的导航状态来预测每一步的动作，该导航状态通常表示为一维向量。然而，由于维护的向量本质上是非结构化的，因此体现导航任务的关键导航线索（即对象级环境布局）被丢弃。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的结构化状态演化（SEvol）模型来有效维护 VLN 的环境布局线索。具体来说，我们利用基于图的特征来表示导航状态而不是基于向量的状态。因此，我们设计了一个强化布局线索矿工（RLM），通过定制的强化学习策略来挖掘和检测长期导航的最关键的布局图。此外，提出了结构化进化模块（SEM）来在导航过程中维持基于结构化图的状态，其中状态逐渐进化以学习对象级时空关系。 R2R 和 R4R 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 SEvol 模型大幅提高了 VLN 模型的性能，例如，在 R2R 测试集上，NvEM 的绝对 SPL 精度提高了 3%，EnvDrop 的绝对 SPL 精度提高了 8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构化状态演化模型（SEvol），用于改进视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务中的环境布局信息维护方法。
AI.motivation: 传统序列模型（如Transformer/LSTM）使用一维向量表示导航状态，导致关键的物体级环境布局线索被丢失，影响导航性能。
AI.method: 设计基于图结构的状态表示（SEvol），包含两个模块：1）强化布局线索挖掘器（RLM）通过定制强化学习策略提取关键布局图；2）结构化演化模块（SEM）维护并逐步演化图结构状态以学习时空关系。
AI.result: 在R2R和R4R数据集上，SEvol模型显著提升性能，例如R2R测试集上NvEM方法SPL准确率提升3%，EnvDrop方法提升8%。
AI.conclusion: 结构化状态表示能有效捕捉物体级空间-时间关系，为VLN任务提供更准确的环境布局建模方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结构化状态演化模型（SEvol），用于改进视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务中的环境布局信息维护方法。

ai_content.result: 在R2R和R4R数据集上，SEvol模型显著提升性能，例如R2R测试集上NvEM方法SPL准确率提升3%，EnvDrop方法提升8%。
ai_content.conclusion: 结构化状态表示能有效捕捉物体级空间-时间关系，为VLN任务提供更准确的环境布局建模方法。

search_text: Reinforced Structured State-Evolution for Vision-Language Navigation 视觉语言导航的强化结构化状态演化 Vision-and-language Navigation (VLN) task requires an embodied agent to navigate to a remote location following a natural language instruction. Previous methods usually adopt a sequence model (e.g., Transformer and LSTM) as the navigator. In such a paradigm, the sequence model predicts action at each step through a maintained navigation state, which is generally represented as a one-dimensional vector. However, the crucial navigation clues (i.e., object-level environment layout) for embodied navigation task is discarded since the maintained vector is essentially unstructured. In this paper, we propose a novel Structured state-Evolution (SEvol) model to effectively maintain the environment layout clues for VLN. Specifically, we utilise the graph-based feature to represent the navigation state instead of the vector-based state. Accordingly, we devise a Reinforced Layout clues Miner (RLM) to mine and detect the most crucial layout graph for long-term navigation via a customised reinforcement learning strategy. Moreover, the Structured Evolving Module (SEM) is proposed to maintain the structured graph-based state during navigation, where the state is gradually evolved to learn the object-level spatial-temporal relationship. The experiments on the R2R and R4R datasets show that the proposed SEvol model improves VLN models' performance by large margins, e.g., +3% absolute SPL accuracy for NvEM and +8% for EnvDrop on the R2R test set. 视觉和语言导航（VLN）任务需要实体代理按照自然语言指令导航到远程位置。以前的方法通常采用序列模型（例如 Transformer 和 LSTM）作为导航器。在这样的范例中，序列模型通过维护的导航状态来预测每一步的动作，该导航状态通常表示为一维向量。然而，由于维护的向量本质上是非结构化的，因此体现导航任务的关键导航线索（即对象级环境布局）被丢弃。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的结构化状态演化（SEvol）模型来有效维护 VLN 的环境布局线索。具体来说，我们利用基于图的特征来表示导航状态而不是基于向量的状态。因此，我们设计了一个强化布局线索矿工（RLM），通过定制的强化学习策略来挖掘和检测长期导航的最关键的布局图。此外，提出了结构化进化模块（SEM）来在导航过程中维持基于结构化图的状态，其中状态逐渐进化以学习对象级时空关系。 R2R 和 R4R 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 SEvol 模型大幅提高了 VLN 模型的性能，例如，在 R2R 测试集上，NvEM 的绝对 SPL 精度提高了 3%，EnvDrop 的绝对 SPL 精度提高了 8%。 本文提出一种结构化状态演化模型（SEvol），用于改进视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务中的环境布局信息维护方法。 Jinyu Chen,Chen Gao,Erli Meng,Qiong Zhang,Si Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Bo Xu,Jiake Xie,Han Huang,Ziwen Li,Cheng Lu,Yong Tang,Yandong Guo
title: Situational Perception Guided Image Matting
title_zh: 情境感知引导图像抠图
comment: 14 pages, 8 figures
comments: 14 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Most automatic matting methods try to separate the salient foreground from the background. However, the insufficient quantity and subjective bias of the current existing matting datasets make it difficult to fully explore the semantic association between object-to-object and object-to-environment in a given image. In this paper, we propose a Situational Perception Guided Image Matting (SPG-IM) method that mitigates subjective bias of matting annotations and captures sufficient situational perception information for better global saliency distilled from the visual-to-textual task. SPG-IM can better associate inter-objects and object-to-environment saliency, and compensate the subjective nature of image matting and its expensive annotation. We also introduce a textual Semantic Transformation (TST) module that can effectively transform and integrate the semantic feature stream to guide the visual representations. In addition, an Adaptive Focal Transformation (AFT) Refinement Network is proposed to adaptively switch multi-scale receptive fields and focal points to enhance both global and local details. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of situational perception guidance from the visual-to-textual tasks on image matting, and our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. We also analyze the significance of different components in our model. The code will be released soon.
summary: Most automatic matting methods try to separate the salient foreground from the background. However, the insufficient quantity and subjective bias of the current existing matting datasets make it difficult to fully explore the semantic association between object-to-object and object-to-environment in a given image. In this paper, we propose a Situational Perception Guided Image Matting (SPG-IM) method that mitigates subjective bias of matting annotations and captures sufficient situational perception information for better global saliency distilled from the visual-to-textual task. SPG-IM can better associate inter-objects and object-to-environment saliency, and compensate the subjective nature of image matting and its expensive annotation. We also introduce a textual Semantic Transformation (TST) module that can effectively transform and integrate the semantic feature stream to guide the visual representations. In addition, an Adaptive Focal Transformation (AFT) Refinement Network is proposed to adaptively switch multi-scale receptive fields and focal points to enhance both global and local details. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of situational perception guidance from the visual-to-textual tasks on image matting, and our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. We also analyze the significance of different components in our model. The code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 大多数自动抠图方法都会尝试将显着的前景与背景分开。然而，当前现有抠图数据集的数量不足和主观偏见使得难以充分探索给定图像中对象到对象和对象到环境之间的语义关联。在本文中，我们提出了一种情境感知引导图像抠图（SPG-IM）方法，该方法可以减轻抠图注释的主观偏差，并捕获足够的情境感知信息，以便从视觉到文本任务中提取出更好的全局显着性。 SPG-IM 可以更好地关联对象间和对象与环境的显着性，并补偿图像抠图的主观性质及其昂贵的注释。我们还引入了文本语义转换（TST）模块，可以有效地转换和集成语义特征流以指导视觉表示。此外，提出了自适应焦点变换（AFT）细化网络来自适应切换多尺度感受野和焦点，以增强全局和局部细节。大量的实验证明了从视觉到文本任务对图像抠图的情境感知指导的有效性，并且我们的模型优于最先进的方法。我们还分析了模型中不同组成部分的重要性。该代码即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于情境感知引导的图像抠图方法（SPG-IM），旨在解决现有数据集主观偏差和语义关联不足的问题，提升图像抠图效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像抠图方法因数据集主观偏差和语义关联信息不足，难以准确捕捉对象间及对象与环境间的关联，导致抠图效果受限。
AI.method: 提出SPG-IM方法，包含文本语义转换模块（TST）和自适应焦点变换（AFT）精修网络，通过视觉-文本任务引导语义学习，并自适应多尺度特征增强细节。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在图像抠图任务上优于现有最先进方法，验证了情境感知引导的有效性，并分析了模型各组件的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 情境感知引导的视觉-文本语义融合能有效提升图像抠图性能，所提方法及组件设计具有显著意义。

authors_text: Bing Sun,Jun Sun,Hong Long Pham,Jie Shi
title: Causality-based Neural Network Repair
title_zh: 基于因果关系的神经网络修复
abstract: Neural networks have had discernible achievements in a wide range of applications. The wide-spread adoption also raises the concern of their dependability and reliability. Similar to traditional decision-making programs, neural networks can have defects that need to be repaired. The defects may cause unsafe behaviors, raise security concerns or unjust societal impacts. In this work, we address the problem of repairing a neural network for desirable properties such as fairness and the absence of backdoor. The goal is to construct a neural network that satisfies the property by (minimally) adjusting the given neural network's parameters (i.e., weights). Specifically, we propose CARE (\textbf{CA}usality-based \textbf{RE}pair), a causality-based neural network repair technique that 1) performs causality-based fault localization to identify the `guilty' neurons and 2) optimizes the parameters of the identified neurons to reduce the misbehavior. We have empirically evaluated CARE on various tasks such as backdoor removal, neural network repair for fairness and safety properties. Our experiment results show that CARE is able to repair all neural networks efficiently and effectively. For fairness repair tasks, CARE successfully improves fairness by $61.91\%$ on average. For backdoor removal tasks, CARE reduces the attack success rate from over $98\%$ to less than $1\%$. For safety property repair tasks, CARE reduces the property violation rate to less than $1\%$. Results also show that thanks to the causality-based fault localization, CARE's repair focuses on the misbehavior and preserves the accuracy of the neural networks.
summary: Neural networks have had discernible achievements in a wide range of applications. The wide-spread adoption also raises the concern of their dependability and reliability. Similar to traditional decision-making programs, neural networks can have defects that need to be repaired. The defects may cause unsafe behaviors, raise security concerns or unjust societal impacts. In this work, we address the problem of repairing a neural network for desirable properties such as fairness and the absence of backdoor. The goal is to construct a neural network that satisfies the property by (minimally) adjusting the given neural network's parameters (i.e., weights). Specifically, we propose CARE (\textbf{CA}usality-based \textbf{RE}pair), a causality-based neural network repair technique that 1) performs causality-based fault localization to identify the `guilty' neurons and 2) optimizes the parameters of the identified neurons to reduce the misbehavior. We have empirically evaluated CARE on various tasks such as backdoor removal, neural network repair for fairness and safety properties. Our experiment results show that CARE is able to repair all neural networks efficiently and effectively. For fairness repair tasks, CARE successfully improves fairness by $61.91\%$ on average. For backdoor removal tasks, CARE reduces the attack success rate from over $98\%$ to less than $1\%$. For safety property repair tasks, CARE reduces the property violation rate to less than $1\%$. Results also show that thanks to the causality-based fault localization, CARE's repair focuses on the misbehavior and preserves the accuracy of the neural networks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络在广泛的应用中取得了明显的成就。广泛采用也引起了人们对其可靠性和可靠性的担忧。与传统的决策程序类似，神经网络也可能存在需要修复的缺陷。这些缺陷可能会导致不安全行为、引发安全问题或不公正的社会影响。在这项工作中，我们解决了修复神经网络以获得所需属性（例如公平性和没有后门）的问题。目标是通过（最小化）调整给定神经网络的参数（即权重）来构造一个满足该属性的神经网络。具体来说，我们提出了 CARE（\textbf{CA}usality-based \textbf{RE}pair），这是一种基于因果关系的神经网络修复技术，1）执行基于因果关系的故障定位以识别“有罪”神经元，2）优化已识别神经元的参数以减少不当行为。我们对 CARE 的各种任务进行了实证评估，例如后门去除、神经网络修复的公平性和安全性。我们的实验结果表明，CARE 能够高效且有效地修复所有神经网络。对于公平性修复任务，CARE 成功地将公平性平均提高了 $61.91\%$。对于后门清除任务，CARE 将攻击成功率从超过 $98\%$ 降低到低于 $1\%$。对于安全财产修复任务，CARE将财产违规率降低到$1\%$以下。结果还表明，得益于基于因果关系的故障定位，CARE 的修复重点关注不当行为并保持神经网络的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于因果关系的神经网络修复方法CARE，通过最小化参数调整来修复神经网络的公平性、后门攻击和安全性问题。
AI.motivation: 神经网络的广泛应用引发对其可靠性和安全性的担忧，缺陷可能导致不安全行为或社会不公，亟需有效修复方法。
AI.method: CARE方法包含两步：1）基于因果关系定位故障神经元；2）优化这些神经元参数以减少不良行为，同时保持模型准确性。
AI.result: 实验显示，CARE在公平性修复任务中平均提升61.91%，后门攻击成功率从98%降至1%以下，安全属性违规率降至1%以下。
AI.conclusion: CARE通过因果关系定位有效修复神经网络缺陷，在保证精度的同时显著提升模型安全性与公平性。

search_text: Causality-based Neural Network Repair 基于因果关系的神经网络修复 Neural networks have had discernible achievements in a wide range of applications. The wide-spread adoption also raises the concern of their dependability and reliability. Similar to traditional decision-making programs, neural networks can have defects that need to be repaired. The defects may cause unsafe behaviors, raise security concerns or unjust societal impacts. In this work, we address the problem of repairing a neural network for desirable properties such as fairness and the absence of backdoor. The goal is to construct a neural network that satisfies the property by (minimally) adjusting the given neural network's parameters (i.e., weights). Specifically, we propose CARE (\textbf{CA}usality-based \textbf{RE}pair), a causality-based neural network repair technique that 1) performs causality-based fault localization to identify the `guilty' neurons and 2) optimizes the parameters of the identified neurons to reduce the misbehavior. We have empirically evaluated CARE on various tasks such as backdoor removal, neural network repair for fairness and safety properties. Our experiment results show that CARE is able to repair all neural networks efficiently and effectively. For fairness repair tasks, CARE successfully improves fairness by $61.91\%$ on average. For backdoor removal tasks, CARE reduces the attack success rate from over $98\%$ to less than $1\%$. For safety property repair tasks, CARE reduces the property violation rate to less than $1\%$. Results also show that thanks to the causality-based fault localization, CARE's repair focuses on the misbehavior and preserves the accuracy of the neural networks. 神经网络在广泛的应用中取得了明显的成就。广泛采用也引起了人们对其可靠性和可靠性的担忧。与传统的决策程序类似，神经网络也可能存在需要修复的缺陷。这些缺陷可能会导致不安全行为、引发安全问题或不公正的社会影响。在这项工作中，我们解决了修复神经网络以获得所需属性（例如公平性和没有后门）的问题。目标是通过（最小化）调整给定神经网络的参数（即权重）来构造一个满足该属性的神经网络。具体来说，我们提出了 CARE（\textbf{CA}usality-based \textbf{RE}pair），这是一种基于因果关系的神经网络修复技术，1）执行基于因果关系的故障定位以识别“有罪”神经元，2）优化已识别神经元的参数以减少不当行为。我们对 CARE 的各种任务进行了实证评估，例如后门去除、神经网络修复的公平性和安全性。我们的实验结果表明，CARE 能够高效且有效地修复所有神经网络。对于公平性修复任务，CARE 成功地将公平性平均提高了 $61.91\%$。对于后门清除任务，CARE 将攻击成功率从超过 $98\%$ 降低到低于 $1\%$。对于安全财产修复任务，CARE将财产违规率降低到$1\%$以下。结果还表明，得益于基于因果关系的故障定位，CARE 的修复重点关注不当行为并保持神经网络的准确性。 本文提出基于因果关系的神经网络修复方法CARE，通过最小化参数调整来修复神经网络的公平性、后门攻击和安全性问题。 Bing Sun,Jun Sun,Hong Long Pham,Jie Shi cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Seung Hyun Lee,Gyeongrok Oh,Wonmin Byeon,Chanyoung Kim,Won Jeong Ryoo,Sang Ho Yoon,Hyunjun Cho,Jihyun Bae,Jinkyu Kim,Sangpil Kim
title: Sound-Guided Semantic Video Generation
title_zh: 声音引导语义视频生成
abstract: The recent success in StyleGAN demonstrates that pre-trained StyleGAN latent space is useful for realistic video generation. However, the generated motion in the video is usually not semantically meaningful due to the difficulty of determining the direction and magnitude in the StyleGAN latent space. In this paper, we propose a framework to generate realistic videos by leveraging multimodal (sound-image-text) embedding space. As sound provides the temporal contexts of the scene, our framework learns to generate a video that is semantically consistent with sound. First, our sound inversion module maps the audio directly into the StyleGAN latent space. We then incorporate the CLIP-based multimodal embedding space to further provide the audio-visual relationships. Finally, the proposed frame generator learns to find the trajectory in the latent space which is coherent with the corresponding sound and generates a video in a hierarchical manner. We provide the new high-resolution landscape video dataset (audio-visual pair) for the sound-guided video generation task. The experiments show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of video quality. We further show several applications including image and video editing to verify the effectiveness of our method.
summary: The recent success in StyleGAN demonstrates that pre-trained StyleGAN latent space is useful for realistic video generation. However, the generated motion in the video is usually not semantically meaningful due to the difficulty of determining the direction and magnitude in the StyleGAN latent space. In this paper, we propose a framework to generate realistic videos by leveraging multimodal (sound-image-text) embedding space. As sound provides the temporal contexts of the scene, our framework learns to generate a video that is semantically consistent with sound. First, our sound inversion module maps the audio directly into the StyleGAN latent space. We then incorporate the CLIP-based multimodal embedding space to further provide the audio-visual relationships. Finally, the proposed frame generator learns to find the trajectory in the latent space which is coherent with the corresponding sound and generates a video in a hierarchical manner. We provide the new high-resolution landscape video dataset (audio-visual pair) for the sound-guided video generation task. The experiments show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of video quality. We further show several applications including image and video editing to verify the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: StyleGAN 最近的成功表明，预训练的 StyleGAN 潜在空间对于真实的视频生成非常有用。然而，由于很难确定 StyleGAN 潜在空间中的方向和大小，视频中生成的运动通常没有语义意义。在本文中，我们提出了一个利用多模态（声音-图像-文本）嵌入空间生成逼真视频的框架。由于声音提供了场景的时间上下文，我们的框架学习生成在语义上与声音一致的视频。首先，我们的声音反转模块将音频直接映射到 StyleGAN 潜在空间。然后，我们结合基于 CLIP 的多模态嵌入空间来进一步提供视听关系。最后，所提出的帧生成器学习寻找潜在空间中与相应声音一致的轨迹，并以分层方式生成视频。我们为声音引导视频生成任务提供新的高分辨率景观视频数据集（视听对）。实验表明，我们的模型在视频质量方面优于最先进的方法。我们进一步展示了包括图像和视频编辑在内的几种应用程序，以验证我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于声音引导的语义视频生成框架，通过多模态嵌入空间实现音频与视频内容的语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有StyleGAN视频生成方法难以控制潜在空间中运动方向和幅度，导致生成视频缺乏语义关联性。
AI.method: 构建包含声音反演模块、CLIP多模态嵌入和分层帧生成器的框架，将音频映射至StyleGAN潜在空间并生成语义连贯的视频。
AI.result: 在视频质量指标上超越现有方法，发布高分辨率音视频数据集，并验证了图像/视频编辑等应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了声音引导下的高质量语义视频生成，为多模态内容创作提供了有效技术路径。

authors_text: Shunli Wang,Dingkang Yang,Peng Zhai,Qing Yu,Tao Suo,Zhan Sun,Ka Li,Lihua Zhang
title: A Survey of Video-based Action Quality Assessment
title_zh: 基于视频的动作质量评估调查
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, conference paper
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, conference paper
abstract: Human action recognition and analysis have great demand and important application significance in video surveillance, video retrieval, and human-computer interaction. The task of human action quality evaluation requires the intelligent system to automatically and objectively evaluate the action completed by the human. The action quality assessment model can reduce the human and material resources spent in action evaluation and reduce subjectivity. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey of existing papers on video-based action quality assessment. Different from human action recognition, the application scenario of action quality assessment is relatively narrow. Most of the existing work focuses on sports and medical care. We first introduce the definition and challenges of human action quality assessment. Then we present the existing datasets and evaluation metrics. In addition, we summarized the methods of sports and medical care according to the model categories and publishing institutions according to the characteristics of the two fields. At the end, combined with recent work, the promising development direction in action quality assessment is discussed.
summary: Human action recognition and analysis have great demand and important application significance in video surveillance, video retrieval, and human-computer interaction. The task of human action quality evaluation requires the intelligent system to automatically and objectively evaluate the action completed by the human. The action quality assessment model can reduce the human and material resources spent in action evaluation and reduce subjectivity. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey of existing papers on video-based action quality assessment. Different from human action recognition, the application scenario of action quality assessment is relatively narrow. Most of the existing work focuses on sports and medical care. We first introduce the definition and challenges of human action quality assessment. Then we present the existing datasets and evaluation metrics. In addition, we summarized the methods of sports and medical care according to the model categories and publishing institutions according to the characteristics of the two fields. At the end, combined with recent work, the promising development direction in action quality assessment is discussed.
abstract_zh: 人体动作识别与分析在视频监控、视频检索、人机交互等方面有着巨大的需求和重要的应用意义。人类动作质量评价任务需要智能系统自动、客观地评价人类完成的动作。行动质量评估模型可以减少行动评估所花费的人力、物力，减少主观性。在本文中，我们对基于视频的动作质量评估的现有论文进行了全面的调查。与人类动作识别不同，动作质量评估的应用场景相对狭窄。现有的工作大部分集中在体育和医疗方面。我们首先介绍人类行为质量评估的定义和挑战。然后我们展示现有的数据集和评估指标。另外，我们根据体育和医疗两个领域的特点，按照模型类别和发布机构总结了体育和医疗的方法。最后结合近期工作，讨论了行动质量评估的有前景的发展方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于视频的人类动作质量评估领域的现有研究，分析了其定义、挑战、数据集、评估指标及方法分类。
AI.motivation: 动作质量评估可降低人工评估的成本和主观性，但现有研究应用场景有限，需系统梳理现有成果以指导未来方向。
AI.method: 通过归纳动作质量评估的定义与挑战，总结现有数据集和评估指标，并按模型类别及领域特征（体育与医疗）分类梳理方法。
AI.result: 总结了体育和医疗领域的典型数据集与评估指标，按模型类型和机构特征分类整理方法，并探讨了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 当前研究集中于体育与医疗场景，未来需拓展更多应用场景并提升模型鲁棒性与泛化能力。

We first introduce the definition and challenges of human action quality assessment. Then we present the existing datasets and evaluation metrics. In addition, we summarized the methods of sports and medical care according to the model categories and publishing institutions according to the characteristics of the two fields. At the end, combined with recent work, the promising development direction in action quality assessment is discussed. 人体动作识别与分析在视频监控、视频检索、人机交互等方面有着巨大的需求和重要的应用意义。人类动作质量评价任务需要智能系统自动、客观地评价人类完成的动作。行动质量评估模型可以减少行动评估所花费的人力、物力，减少主观性。在本文中，我们对基于视频的动作质量评估的现有论文进行了全面的调查。与人类动作识别不同，动作质量评估的应用场景相对狭窄。现有的工作大部分集中在体育和医疗方面。我们首先介绍人类行为质量评估的定义和挑战。然后我们展示现有的数据集和评估指标。另外，我们根据体育和医疗两个领域的特点，按照模型类别和发布机构总结了体育和医疗的方法。最后结合近期工作，讨论了行动质量评估的有前景的发展方向。 本文综述了基于视频的人类动作质量评估领域的现有研究，分析了其定义、挑战、数据集、评估指标及方法分类。 Shunli Wang,Dingkang Yang,Peng Zhai,Qing Yu,Tao Suo,Zhan Sun,Ka Li,Lihua Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Leila Pishdad,Ran Zhang,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Allan Jepson,Afsaneh Fazly
title: Uncertainty-based Cross-Modal Retrieval with Probabilistic Representations
title_zh: 基于不确定性的概率表示跨模态检索
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Probabilistic embeddings have proven useful for capturing polysemous word meanings, as well as ambiguity in image matching. In this paper, we study the advantages of probabilistic embeddings in a cross-modal setting (i.e., text and images), and propose a simple approach that replaces the standard vector point embeddings in extant image-text matching models with probabilistic distributions that are parametrically learned. Our guiding hypothesis is that the uncertainty encoded in the probabilistic embeddings captures the cross-modal ambiguity in the input instances, and that it is through capturing this uncertainty that the probabilistic models can perform better at downstream tasks, such as image-to-text or text-to-image retrieval. Through extensive experiments on standard and new benchmarks, we show a consistent advantage for probabilistic representations in cross-modal retrieval, and validate the ability of our embeddings to capture uncertainty.
summary: Probabilistic embeddings have proven useful for capturing polysemous word meanings, as well as ambiguity in image matching. In this paper, we study the advantages of probabilistic embeddings in a cross-modal setting (i.e., text and images), and propose a simple approach that replaces the standard vector point embeddings in extant image-text matching models with probabilistic distributions that are parametrically learned. Our guiding hypothesis is that the uncertainty encoded in the probabilistic embeddings captures the cross-modal ambiguity in the input instances, and that it is through capturing this uncertainty that the probabilistic models can perform better at downstream tasks, such as image-to-text or text-to-image retrieval. Through extensive experiments on standard and new benchmarks, we show a consistent advantage for probabilistic representations in cross-modal retrieval, and validate the ability of our embeddings to capture uncertainty.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，概率嵌入对于捕获多义词含义以及图像匹配中的歧义非常有用。在本文中，我们研究了跨模式设置（即文本和图像）中概率嵌入的优势，并提出了一种简单的方法，用参数学习的概率分布替换现有图像-文本匹配模型中的标准向量点嵌入。我们的指导性假设是，概率嵌入中编码的不确定性捕获了输入实例中的跨模态模糊性，并且通过捕获这种不确定性，概率模型可以在下游任务（例如图像到文本或文本到图像检索）中表现更好。通过对标准和新基准的广泛实验，我们展示了跨模式检索中概率表示的一致优势，并验证了我们的嵌入捕获不确定性的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率表示的跨模态检索方法，通过引入概率嵌入来捕捉文本与图像间的歧义性，提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统向量嵌入难以有效处理多义词和图像匹配中的歧义性，而概率嵌入能通过编码不确定性更好地建模跨模态模糊性，从而提升下游任务表现。
AI.method: 将现有图像-文本匹配模型中的固定向量嵌入替换为参数化学习的概率分布，通过概率表示捕捉输入实例的跨模态不确定性。
AI.result: 在标准和新基准数据集上的实验表明，概率表示在跨模态检索任务中具有持续优势，验证了嵌入对不确定性的捕捉能力。
AI.conclusion: 概率嵌入能有效建模跨模态歧义性，为图像-文本检索任务提供了更鲁棒的表示方法。

authors_text: Junlong Guo,Zhiren Xun,Shuang Geng,Yi Lin,Chao Xu,Fei Gao
title: Dynamic Free-Space Roadmap for Safe Quadrotor Motion Planning
title_zh: 用于安全四旋翼运动规划的动态自由空间路线图
abstract: Free-space-oriented roadmaps typically generate a series of convex geometric primitives, which constitute the safe region for motion planning. However, a static environment is assumed for this kind of roadmap. This assumption makes it unable to deal with dynamic obstacles and limits its applications. In this paper, we present a dynamic free-space roadmap, which provides feasible spaces and a navigation graph for safe quadrotor motion planning. Our roadmap is constructed by continuously seeding and extracting free regions in the environment. In order to adapt our map to environments with dynamic obstacles, we incrementally decompose the polyhedra intersecting with obstacles into obstacle-free regions, while the graph is also updated by our well-designed mechanism. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that our method is practically applicable and efficient.
summary: Free-space-oriented roadmaps typically generate a series of convex geometric primitives, which constitute the safe region for motion planning. However, a static environment is assumed for this kind of roadmap. This assumption makes it unable to deal with dynamic obstacles and limits its applications. In this paper, we present a dynamic free-space roadmap, which provides feasible spaces and a navigation graph for safe quadrotor motion planning. Our roadmap is constructed by continuously seeding and extracting free regions in the environment. In order to adapt our map to environments with dynamic obstacles, we incrementally decompose the polyhedra intersecting with obstacles into obstacle-free regions, while the graph is also updated by our well-designed mechanism. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments demonstrate that our method is practically applicable and efficient.
abstract_zh: 面向自由空间的路线图通常生成一系列凸几何图元，它们构成运动规划的安全区域。然而，这种路线图假定静态环境。这种假设使其无法处理动态障碍并限制了其应用。在本文中，我们提出了一个动态自由空间路线图，它为安全四旋翼运动规划提供了可行的空间和导航图。我们的路线图是通过不断播种和提取环境中的自由区域来构建的。为了使我们的地图适应有动态障碍物的环境，我们逐步将与障碍物相交的多面体分解为无障碍区域，同时图形也通过我们精心设计的机制进行更新。广泛的模拟和现实世界的实验表明我们的方法是实际适用且有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态自由空间路线图方法，用于四旋翼飞行器在动态障碍物环境中的安全运动规划。
AI.motivation: 传统自由空间路线图假设静态环境，无法处理动态障碍物，限制了其在实际应用中的有效性。
AI.method: 通过持续生成和提取环境中的自由区域，增量分解与障碍物相交的多面体为无障区域，并设计机制动态更新导航图。
AI.result: 仿真和真实实验验证了该方法在动态环境中的实用性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态自由空间路线图有效解决了四旋翼飞行器在动态障碍物环境中的安全路径规划问题。

authors_text: Shuokai Li,Ruobing Xie,Yongchun Zhu,Xiang Ao,Fuzhen Zhuang,Qing He
title: User-Centric Conversational Recommendation with Multi-Aspect User Modeling
title_zh: 具有多方面用户建模的以用户为中心的对话推荐
comment: Accepted by SIGIR 2022
comments: Accepted by SIGIR 2022
abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to provide highquality recommendations in conversations. However, most conventional CRS models mainly focus on the dialogue understanding of the current session, ignoring other rich multi-aspect information of the central subjects (i.e., users) in recommendation. In this work, we highlight that the user's historical dialogue sessions and look-alike users are essential sources of user preferences besides the current dialogue session in CRS. To systematically model the multi-aspect information, we propose a User-Centric Conversational Recommendation (UCCR) model, which returns to the essence of user preference learning in CRS tasks. Specifically, we propose a historical session learner to capture users' multi-view preferences from knowledge, semantic, and consuming views as supplements to the current preference signals. A multi-view preference mapper is conducted to learn the intrinsic correlations among different views in current and historical sessions via self-supervised objectives. We also design a temporal look-alike user selector to understand users via their similar users. The learned multi-aspect multi-view user preferences are then used for the recommendation and dialogue generation. In experiments, we conduct comprehensive evaluations on both Chinese and English CRS datasets. The significant improvements over competitive models in both recommendation and dialogue generation verify the superiority of UCCR.
summary: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to provide highquality recommendations in conversations. However, most conventional CRS models mainly focus on the dialogue understanding of the current session, ignoring other rich multi-aspect information of the central subjects (i.e., users) in recommendation. In this work, we highlight that the user's historical dialogue sessions and look-alike users are essential sources of user preferences besides the current dialogue session in CRS. To systematically model the multi-aspect information, we propose a User-Centric Conversational Recommendation (UCCR) model, which returns to the essence of user preference learning in CRS tasks. Specifically, we propose a historical session learner to capture users' multi-view preferences from knowledge, semantic, and consuming views as supplements to the current preference signals. A multi-view preference mapper is conducted to learn the intrinsic correlations among different views in current and historical sessions via self-supervised objectives. We also design a temporal look-alike user selector to understand users via their similar users. The learned multi-aspect multi-view user preferences are then used for the recommendation and dialogue generation. In experiments, we conduct comprehensive evaluations on both Chinese and English CRS datasets. The significant improvements over competitive models in both recommendation and dialogue generation verify the superiority of UCCR.
abstract_zh: 会话推荐系统（CRS）旨在在会话中提供高质量的推荐。然而，大多数传统的CRS模型主要关注当前会话的对话理解，忽略了推荐中的中心主体（即用户）的其他丰富的多方面信息。在这项工作中，我们强调，除了 CRS 中的当前对话会话之外，用户的历史对话会话和相似用户也是用户偏好的重要来源。为了系统地建模多方面信息，我们提出了一种以用户为中心的会话推荐（UCCR）模型，该模型回归了 CRS 任务中用户偏好学习的本质。具体来说，我们提出了一个历史会话学习器，从知识、语义和消费视图中捕获用户的多视图偏好，作为当前偏好信号的补充。进行多视图偏好映射器，通过自我监督的目标来学习当前和历史会话中不同视图之间的内在相关性。我们还设计了一个时间相似的用户选择器，通过相似的用户来了解用户。然后将学习到的多方面多视图用户偏好用于推荐和对话生成。在实验中，我们对中文和英文CRS数据集进行了综合评估。在推荐和对话生成方面相对于竞争模型的显着改进验证了 UCCR 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以用户为中心的对话推荐模型UCCR，通过整合用户历史对话和相似用户信息提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 传统对话推荐系统仅关注当前对话会话，忽视了用户历史行为和相似用户等多维度信息，导致推荐效果受限。
AI.method: 设计历史会话学习器提取用户多视角偏好，构建多视角偏好映射器学习会话间关联，并引入时序相似用户选择器挖掘用户相似性，最终融合多方面信息进行推荐与对话生成。
AI.result: 在中英文对话推荐数据集上均显著优于对比模型，推荐准确率和对话生成质量均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统建模用户多维度信息，UCCR有效提升了对话推荐系统的性能，验证了用户中心建模的重要性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种以用户为中心的对话推荐模型UCCR，通过整合用户历史对话和相似用户信息提升推荐效果。
ai_content.motivation: 传统对话推荐系统仅关注当前对话会话，忽视了用户历史行为和相似用户等多维度信息，导致推荐效果受限。
ai_content.method: 设计历史会话学习器提取用户多视角偏好，构建多视角偏好映射器学习会话间关联，并引入时序相似用户选择器挖掘用户相似性，最终融合多方面信息进行推荐与对话生成。

search_text: User-Centric Conversational Recommendation with Multi-Aspect User Modeling 具有多方面用户建模的以用户为中心的对话推荐 Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to provide highquality recommendations in conversations. However, most conventional CRS models mainly focus on the dialogue understanding of the current session, ignoring other rich multi-aspect information of the central subjects (i.e., users) in recommendation. In this work, we highlight that the user's historical dialogue sessions and look-alike users are essential sources of user preferences besides the current dialogue session in CRS. To systematically model the multi-aspect information, we propose a User-Centric Conversational Recommendation (UCCR) model, which returns to the essence of user preference learning in CRS tasks. Specifically, we propose a historical session learner to capture users' multi-view preferences from knowledge, semantic, and consuming views as supplements to the current preference signals. A multi-view preference mapper is conducted to learn the intrinsic correlations among different views in current and historical sessions via self-supervised objectives. We also design a temporal look-alike user selector to understand users via their similar users. The learned multi-aspect multi-view user preferences are then used for the recommendation and dialogue generation. In experiments, we conduct comprehensive evaluations on both Chinese and English CRS datasets. The significant improvements over competitive models in both recommendation and dialogue generation verify the superiority of UCCR. 会话推荐系统（CRS）旨在在会话中提供高质量的推荐。然而，大多数传统的CRS模型主要关注当前会话的对话理解，忽略了推荐中的中心主体（即用户）的其他丰富的多方面信息。在这项工作中，我们强调，除了 CRS 中的当前对话会话之外，用户的历史对话会话和相似用户也是用户偏好的重要来源。为了系统地建模多方面信息，我们提出了一种以用户为中心的会话推荐（UCCR）模型，该模型回归了 CRS 任务中用户偏好学习的本质。具体来说，我们提出了一个历史会话学习器，从知识、语义和消费视图中捕获用户的多视图偏好，作为当前偏好信号的补充。进行多视图偏好映射器，通过自我监督的目标来学习当前和历史会话中不同视图之间的内在相关性。我们还设计了一个时间相似的用户选择器，通过相似的用户来了解用户。然后将学习到的多方面多视图用户偏好用于推荐和对话生成。在实验中，我们对中文和英文CRS数据集进行了综合评估。在推荐和对话生成方面相对于竞争模型的显着改进验证了 UCCR 的优越性。 本文提出了一种以用户为中心的对话推荐模型UCCR，通过整合用户历史对话和相似用户信息提升推荐效果。 Shuokai Li,Ruobing Xie,Yongchun Zhu,Xiang Ao,Fuzhen Zhuang,Qing He cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Cheonbok Park,Hantae Kim,Ioan Calapodescu,Hyunchang Cho,Vassilina Nikoulina
title: DaLC: Domain Adaptation Learning Curve Prediction for Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: DaLC：神经机器翻译的领域适应学习曲线预测
comment: to be published in ACL2021
comments: to be published in ACL2021
abstract: Domain Adaptation (DA) of Neural Machine Translation (NMT) model often relies on a pre-trained general NMT model which is adapted to the new domain on a sample of in-domain parallel data. Without parallel data, there is no way to estimate the potential benefit of DA, nor the amount of parallel samples it would require. It is however a desirable functionality that could help MT practitioners to make an informed decision before investing resources in dataset creation. We propose a Domain adaptation Learning Curve prediction (DaLC) model that predicts prospective DA performance based on in-domain monolingual samples in the source language. Our model relies on the NMT encoder representations combined with various instance and corpus-level features. We demonstrate that instance-level is better able to distinguish between different domains compared to corpus-level frameworks proposed in previous studies. Finally, we perform in-depth analyses of the results highlighting the limitations of our approach, and provide directions for future research.
summary: Domain Adaptation (DA) of Neural Machine Translation (NMT) model often relies on a pre-trained general NMT model which is adapted to the new domain on a sample of in-domain parallel data. Without parallel data, there is no way to estimate the potential benefit of DA, nor the amount of parallel samples it would require. It is however a desirable functionality that could help MT practitioners to make an informed decision before investing resources in dataset creation. We propose a Domain adaptation Learning Curve prediction (DaLC) model that predicts prospective DA performance based on in-domain monolingual samples in the source language. Our model relies on the NMT encoder representations combined with various instance and corpus-level features. We demonstrate that instance-level is better able to distinguish between different domains compared to corpus-level frameworks proposed in previous studies. Finally, we perform in-depth analyses of the results highlighting the limitations of our approach, and provide directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 神经机器翻译 (NMT) 模型的域适应 (DA) 通常依赖于预先训练的通用 NMT 模型，该模型在域内并行数据样本上适应新域。如果没有并行数据，就无法估计 DA 的潜在优势，也无法估计所需的并行样本量。然而，它是一个理想的功能，可以帮助机器翻译从业者在投入资源创建数据集之前做出明智的决定。我们提出了一种领域适应学习曲线预测（DaLC）模型，该模型根据源语言中的域内单语样本来预测未来的 DA 性能。我们的模型依赖于 NMT 编码器表示与各种实例和语料库级特征的结合。我们证明，与之前研究中提出的语料库级框架相比，实例级能够更好地区分不同的领域。最后，我们对结果进行深入分析，突出我们方法的局限性，并为未来的研究提供方向。

AI.tldr: 提出DaLC模型，基于源语言单语样本预测神经机器翻译的领域适应学习曲线，无需平行数据。
AI.motivation: 在没有平行数据的情况下，无法评估领域适应的潜在收益及所需样本量，需提供预测工具以帮助从业者决策。
AI.method: 结合NMT编码器表示与实例及语料库级特征，实例级特征更有效区分不同领域。
AI.result: 实例级特征优于语料库级方法，但存在局限性，需进一步研究。
AI.conclusion: DaLC模型有效预测领域适应性能，但需改进以克服当前局限性。

authors_text: Renhui Zhang,Tiancheng Lin,Rui Zhang,Yi Xu
title: Solving The Long-Tailed Problem via Intra- and Inter-Category Balance
title_zh: 通过品类内和品类间平衡解决长尾问题
comment: 4 pages. Accepted by ICASSP2022
comments: 4 pages. Accepted by ICASSP2022
abstract: Benchmark datasets for visual recognition assume that data is uniformly distributed, while real-world datasets obey long-tailed distribution. Current approaches handle the long-tailed problem to transform the long-tailed dataset to uniform distribution by re-sampling or re-weighting strategies. These approaches emphasize the tail classes but ignore the hard examples in head classes, which result in performance degradation. In this paper, we propose a novel gradient harmonized mechanism with category-wise adaptive precision to decouple the difficulty and sample size imbalance in the long-tailed problem, which are correspondingly solved via intra- and inter-category balance strategies. Specifically, intra-category balance focuses on the hard examples in each category to optimize the decision boundary, while inter-category balance aims to correct the shift of decision boundary by taking each category as a unit. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms other approaches on all the datasets.
summary: Benchmark datasets for visual recognition assume that data is uniformly distributed, while real-world datasets obey long-tailed distribution. Current approaches handle the long-tailed problem to transform the long-tailed dataset to uniform distribution by re-sampling or re-weighting strategies. These approaches emphasize the tail classes but ignore the hard examples in head classes, which result in performance degradation. In this paper, we propose a novel gradient harmonized mechanism with category-wise adaptive precision to decouple the difficulty and sample size imbalance in the long-tailed problem, which are correspondingly solved via intra- and inter-category balance strategies. Specifically, intra-category balance focuses on the hard examples in each category to optimize the decision boundary, while inter-category balance aims to correct the shift of decision boundary by taking each category as a unit. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms other approaches on all the datasets.
abstract_zh: 视觉识别的基准数据集假设数据是均匀分布的，而现实世界的数据集服从长尾分布。当前的方法处理长尾问题，通过重新采样或重新加权策略将长尾数据集转换为均匀分布。这些方法强调尾部类，但忽略头部类中的困难示例，从而导致性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有类别自适应精度的新型梯度协调机制，以解耦长尾问题中的难度和样本量不平衡，并通过类别内和类别间平衡策略相应地解决。具体来说，类内平衡侧重于每个类别中的难例来优化决策边界，而类间平衡则旨在以每个类别为单位来纠正决策边界的偏移。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法在所有数据集上始终优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过类内和类间平衡策略解决视觉识别中的长尾分布问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过重采样或重加权策略将长尾数据集转换为均匀分布，但过度关注尾部类别而忽略头部类别的难例，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计梯度协调机制与类别自适应精度，通过类内平衡优化决策边界（聚焦难例）和类间平衡修正决策边界（以类别为单位调整）。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，该方法性能优于其他现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过同时平衡类内难例与类间分布偏移，有效解决了长尾问题。

authors_text: Somnuk Phon-Amnuaisuk,Ken T. Murata,La-Or Kovavisaruch,Tiong-Hoo Lim,Praphan Pavarangkoon,Takamichi Mizuhara
title: Visual-based Positioning and Pose Estimation
title_zh: 基于视觉的定位和姿态估计
comment: This paper is the expanded version of our paper titled Visual-based Positioning and Pose Estimation, ICONIP (4) 2020: 410-417
comments: This paper is the expanded version of our paper titled Visual-based Positioning and Pose Estimation, ICONIP (4) 2020: 410-417
abstract: Recent advances in deep learning and computer vision offer an excellent opportunity to investigate high-level visual analysis tasks such as human localization and human pose estimation. Although the performance of human localization and human pose estimation has significantly improved in recent reports, they are not perfect and erroneous localization and pose estimation can be expected among video frames. Studies on the integration of these techniques into a generic pipeline that is robust to noise introduced from those errors are still lacking. This paper fills the missing study. We explored and developed two working pipelines that suited the visual-based positioning and pose estimation tasks. Analyses of the proposed pipelines were conducted on a badminton game. We showed that the concept of tracking by detection could work well, and errors in position and pose could be effectively handled by a linear interpolation technique using information from nearby frames. The results showed that the Visual-based Positioning and Pose Estimation could deliver position and pose estimations with good spatial and temporal resolutions.
summary: Recent advances in deep learning and computer vision offer an excellent opportunity to investigate high-level visual analysis tasks such as human localization and human pose estimation. Although the performance of human localization and human pose estimation has significantly improved in recent reports, they are not perfect and erroneous localization and pose estimation can be expected among video frames. Studies on the integration of these techniques into a generic pipeline that is robust to noise introduced from those errors are still lacking. This paper fills the missing study. We explored and developed two working pipelines that suited the visual-based positioning and pose estimation tasks. Analyses of the proposed pipelines were conducted on a badminton game. We showed that the concept of tracking by detection could work well, and errors in position and pose could be effectively handled by a linear interpolation technique using information from nearby frames. The results showed that the Visual-based Positioning and Pose Estimation could deliver position and pose estimations with good spatial and temporal resolutions.
abstract_zh: 深度学习和计算机视觉的最新进展为研究高级视觉分析任务（例如人体定位和人体姿势估计）提供了绝佳的机会。尽管在最近的报告中人体定位和人体姿势估计的性能有了显着提高，但它们并不完美，并且在视频帧中可能会出现错误的定位和姿势估计。仍然缺乏将这些技术集成到对这些错误引入的噪声具有鲁棒性的通用管道中的研究。这篇论文填补了这项研究的缺失。我们探索并开发了两个适合基于视觉的定位和姿势估计任务的工作流程。对拟议管道的分析是在羽毛球比赛中进行的。我们表明，通过检测进行跟踪的概念可以很好地发挥作用，并且可以使用附近帧的信息通过线性插值技术有效地处理位置和姿态的错误。结果表明，基于视觉的定位和姿态估计可以提供具有良好空间和时间分辨率的位置和姿态估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉的定位与姿态估计方法，通过集成深度学习技术解决视频帧中的定位和姿态估计误差问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在人体定位和姿态估计上取得进展，但视频帧中仍存在误差，且现有研究缺乏对噪声鲁棒的通用处理流程。
AI.method: 开发两种视觉定位与姿态估计流程，利用相邻帧信息通过线性插值技术处理定位和姿态误差。
AI.result: 在羽毛球比赛数据集上验证，方法实现了良好的时空分辨率，有效降低了定位和姿态估计误差。
AI.conclusion: 基于视觉的定位与姿态估计方法通过检测跟踪与线性插值结合，可有效处理视频序列中的误差问题。

search_text: Visual-based Positioning and Pose Estimation 基于视觉的定位和姿态估计 Recent advances in deep learning and computer vision offer an excellent opportunity to investigate high-level visual analysis tasks such as human localization and human pose estimation. Although the performance of human localization and human pose estimation has significantly improved in recent reports, they are not perfect and erroneous localization and pose estimation can be expected among video frames. Studies on the integration of these techniques into a generic pipeline that is robust to noise introduced from those errors are still lacking. This paper fills the missing study. We explored and developed two working pipelines that suited the visual-based positioning and pose estimation tasks. Analyses of the proposed pipelines were conducted on a badminton game. We showed that the concept of tracking by detection could work well, and errors in position and pose could be effectively handled by a linear interpolation technique using information from nearby frames. The results showed that the Visual-based Positioning and Pose Estimation could deliver position and pose estimations with good spatial and temporal resolutions. 深度学习和计算机视觉的最新进展为研究高级视觉分析任务（例如人体定位和人体姿势估计）提供了绝佳的机会。尽管在最近的报告中人体定位和人体姿势估计的性能有了显着提高，但它们并不完美，并且在视频帧中可能会出现错误的定位和姿势估计。仍然缺乏将这些技术集成到对这些错误引入的噪声具有鲁棒性的通用管道中的研究。这篇论文填补了这项研究的缺失。我们探索并开发了两个适合基于视觉的定位和姿势估计任务的工作流程。对拟议管道的分析是在羽毛球比赛中进行的。我们表明，通过检测进行跟踪的概念可以很好地发挥作用，并且可以使用附近帧的信息通过线性插值技术有效地处理位置和姿态的错误。结果表明，基于视觉的定位和姿态估计可以提供具有良好空间和时间分辨率的位置和姿态估计。 本文提出基于视觉的定位与姿态估计方法，通过集成深度学习技术解决视频帧中的定位和姿态估计误差问题。 Somnuk Phon-Amnuaisuk,Ken T. Murata,La-Or Kovavisaruch,Tiong-Hoo Lim,Praphan Pavarangkoon,Takamichi Mizuhara cs.CV

authors_text: Xiaojian Liu,Yansheng Li
title: Dark Spot Detection from SAR Images Based on Superpixel Deeper Graph Convolutional Network
title_zh: 基于超像素深层图卷积网络的SAR图像暗点检测
abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) is the main instrument utilized for the detection of oil slicks on the ocean surface. In SAR images, some areas affected by ocean phenomena, such as rain cells, upwellings, and internal waves, or discharge from oil spills appear as dark spots on images. Dark spot detection is the first step in the detection of oil spills, which then become oil slick candidates. The accuracy of dark spot segmentation ultimately affects the accuracy of oil slick identification. Although some advanced deep learning methods that use pixels as processing units perform well in remote sensing image semantic segmentation, detecting some dark spots with weak boundaries from noisy SAR images remains a huge challenge. We propose a dark spot detection method based on superpixels deeper graph convolutional networks (SGDCN) in this paper, which takes the superpixels as the processing units and extracts features for each superpixel. The features calculated from superpixel regions are more robust than those from fixed pixel neighborhoods. To reduce the difficulty of learning tasks, we discard irrelevant features and obtain an optimal subset of features. After superpixel segmentation, the images are transformed into graphs with superpixels as nodes, which are fed into the deeper graph convolutional neural network for node classification. This graph neural network uses a differentiable aggregation function to aggregate the features of nodes and neighbors to form more advanced features. It is the first time using it for dark spot detection. To validate our method, we mark all dark spots on six SAR images covering the Baltic Sea and construct a dark spots detection dataset, which has been made publicly available (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12UavrntkDSPrItISQ8iGefXn2gIZHxJ6?usp=sharing). The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed SGDCN is robust and effective.
summary: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) is the main instrument utilized for the detection of oil slicks on the ocean surface. In SAR images, some areas affected by ocean phenomena, such as rain cells, upwellings, and internal waves, or discharge from oil spills appear as dark spots on images. Dark spot detection is the first step in the detection of oil spills, which then become oil slick candidates. The accuracy of dark spot segmentation ultimately affects the accuracy of oil slick identification. Although some advanced deep learning methods that use pixels as processing units perform well in remote sensing image semantic segmentation, detecting some dark spots with weak boundaries from noisy SAR images remains a huge challenge. We propose a dark spot detection method based on superpixels deeper graph convolutional networks (SGDCN) in this paper, which takes the superpixels as the processing units and extracts features for each superpixel. The features calculated from superpixel regions are more robust than those from fixed pixel neighborhoods. To reduce the difficulty of learning tasks, we discard irrelevant features and obtain an optimal subset of features. After superpixel segmentation, the images are transformed into graphs with superpixels as nodes, which are fed into the deeper graph convolutional neural network for node classification. This graph neural network uses a differentiable aggregation function to aggregate the features of nodes and neighbors to form more advanced features. It is the first time using it for dark spot detection. To validate our method, we mark all dark spots on six SAR images covering the Baltic Sea and construct a dark spots detection dataset, which has been made publicly available (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12UavrntkDSPrItISQ8iGefXn2gIZHxJ6?usp=sharing). The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed SGDCN is robust and effective.
abstract_zh: 合成孔径雷达（SAR）是用于探测海洋表面浮油的主要仪器。在 SAR 图像中，一些受海洋现象（例如雨团、上升流和内波）或石油泄漏排放物影响的区域在图像上显示为黑点。黑点检测是检测漏油的第一步，然后漏油就成为浮油候选者。暗点分割的准确性最终影响浮油识别的准确性。尽管一些使用像素作为处理单元的先进深度学习方法在遥感图像语义分割中表现良好，但从噪声SAR图像中检测一些边界较弱的暗点仍然是一个巨大的挑战。本文提出了一种基于超像素更深图卷积网络（SGDCN）的暗点检测方法，该方法以超像素为处理单元，提取每个超像素的特征。从超像素区域计算的特征比从固定像素邻域计算的特征更稳健。为了降低学习任务的难度，我们丢弃不相关的特征并获得最佳的特征子集。经过超像素分割后，图像被转换为​​以超像素为节点的图，这些图被馈送到更深的图卷积神经网络中进行节点分类。该图神经网络使用可微聚合函数来聚合节点和邻居的特征以形成更高级的特征。这是第一次将其用于黑点检测。为了验证我们的方法，我们标记了覆盖波罗的海的六张 SAR 图像上的所有黑点，并构建了一个黑点检测数据集，该数据集已公开可用 (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/12UavrntkDSPrItISQ8iGefXn2gIZHxJ6?usp=sharing)。实验结果表明我们提出的 SGDCN 是稳健且有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于超像素更深图卷积网络（SGDCN）的合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像暗斑检测方法，旨在提高海洋油污检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理SAR图像中边界模糊、噪声干扰的暗斑时效果有限，需更鲁棒的特征提取与分割策略。
AI.method: 以超像素为处理单元，提取更稳定的特征并筛选关键特征；将图像转化为超像素节点图，通过更深图卷积网络进行节点分类。
AI.result: 实验表明SGDCN方法在 Baltic Sea 的六幅SAR图像数据集上表现稳健有效，验证了其对暗斑检测的优越性。
AI.conclusion: SGDCN通过超像素图网络结构提升了SAR暗斑检测性能，为油污识别提供了新思路，并公开了检测数据集以促进研究。

authors_text: Yang Cai,Argyris Oikonomou,Weiqiang Zheng
title: Tight Last-Iterate Convergence of the Extragradient and the Optimistic Gradient Descent-Ascent Algorithm for Constrained Monotone Variational Inequalities
title_zh: 约束单调变分不等式的外梯度与乐观梯度下降-上升算法的最后迭代紧收敛
comment: We are including the OGDA result for unconstrained and constrained settings in this version. We further simplified the proof for EG and OGDA algorithm
comments: We are including the OGDA result for unconstrained and constrained settings in this version. We further simplified the proof for EG and OGDA algorithm
abstract: The monotone variational inequality is a central problem in mathematical programming that unifies and generalizes many important settings such as smooth convex optimization, two-player zero-sum games, convex-concave saddle point problems, etc. The extragradient algorithm by Korpelevich [1976] and the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm by Popov [1980] are arguably the two most classical and popular methods for solving monotone variational inequalities. Despite their long histories, the following major problem remains open. What is the last-iterate convergence rate of the extragradient algorithm or the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm for monotone and Lipschitz variational inequalities with constraints? We resolve this open problem by showing that both the extragradient algorithm and the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm have a tight $O\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}}\right)$ last-iterate convergence rate for arbitrary convex feasible sets, which matches the lower bound by Golowich et al. [2020a,b]. Our rate is measured in terms of the standard gap function. At the core of our results lies a non-standard performance measure -- the tangent residual, which can be viewed as an adaptation of the norm of the operator that takes the local constraints into account. We use the tangent residual (or a slight variation of the tangent residual) as the the potential function in our analysis of the extragradient algorithm (or the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm) and prove that it is non-increasing between two consecutive iterates.

We resolve this open problem by showing that both the extragradient algorithm and the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm have a tight $O\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}}\right)$ last-iterate convergence rate for arbitrary convex feasible sets, which matches the lower bound by Golowich et al. [2020a,b]. Our rate is measured in terms of the standard gap function. At the core of our results lies a non-standard performance measure -- the tangent residual, which can be viewed as an adaptation of the norm of the operator that takes the local constraints into account. We use the tangent residual (or a slight variation of the tangent residual) as the the potential function in our analysis of the extragradient algorithm (or the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm) and prove that it is non-increasing between two consecutive iterates.
abstract_zh: 单调变分不等式是数学规划中的一个核心问题，它统一并概括了许多重要的设置，如平滑凸优化、两人零和博弈、凸凹鞍点问题等。Korpelevich [1976]的超梯度算法和Popov [1980]的乐观梯度下降-上升算法可以说是解决单调变分不等式的两种最经典和最流行的方法。尽管它们有着悠久的历史，但以下主要问题仍然存在。对于带约束的单调和 Lipschitz 变分不等式，外梯度算法或乐观梯度下降-上升算法的最后迭代收敛率是多少？我们通过证明外梯度算法和乐观梯度下降-上升算法对于任意凸可行集都具有严格的 $O\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}}\right)$ 最后迭代收敛率来解决这个开放问题，这与 Golowich 等人的下界相匹配。 [2020a，b]。我们的比率是根据标准差距函数来衡量的。我们结果的核心在于一个非标准的性能测量——正切残差，它可以被视为对考虑局部约束的算子规范的适应。我们在外梯度算法（或乐观梯度下降-上升算法）的分析中使用切线残差（或切线残差的轻微变化）作为势函数，并证明它在两次连续迭代之间不增加。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了约束单调变分不等式的外梯度算法和乐观梯度下降-上升算法的最后迭代收敛率问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管外梯度算法和乐观梯度下降-上升算法是求解单调变分不等式的经典方法，但其最后迭代收敛率的理论分析长期未被解决，尤其是针对有约束情况下的收敛速率。
AI.method: 通过引入一种非标准的性能度量——切线残差（考虑局部约束的算子范数），并将其作为势函数，证明了算法在连续迭代中的非递增性。
AI.result: 证明了两种算法在任意凸可行集上的最后迭代收敛速率为O(1/√T)，且该结果与现有下界一致。
AI.conclusion: 本文解决了该领域长期存在的开放性问题，为约束单调变分不等式的算法分析提供了理论保证。

search_text: Tight Last-Iterate Convergence of the Extragradient and the Optimistic Gradient Descent-Ascent Algorithm for Constrained Monotone Variational Inequalities 约束单调变分不等式的外梯度与乐观梯度下降-上升算法的最后迭代紧收敛 The monotone variational inequality is a central problem in mathematical programming that unifies and generalizes many important settings such as smooth convex optimization, two-player zero-sum games, convex-concave saddle point problems, etc. The extragradient algorithm by Korpelevich [1976] and the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm by Popov [1980] are arguably the two most classical and popular methods for solving monotone variational inequalities. Despite their long histories, the following major problem remains open. What is the last-iterate convergence rate of the extragradient algorithm or the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm for monotone and Lipschitz variational inequalities with constraints? We resolve this open problem by showing that both the extragradient algorithm and the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm have a tight $O\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}}\right)$ last-iterate convergence rate for arbitrary convex feasible sets, which matches the lower bound by Golowich et al. [2020a,b]. Our rate is measured in terms of the standard gap function. At the core of our results lies a non-standard performance measure -- the tangent residual, which can be viewed as an adaptation of the norm of the operator that takes the local constraints into account. We use the tangent residual (or a slight variation of the tangent residual) as the the potential function in our analysis of the extragradient algorithm (or the optimistic gradient descent-ascent algorithm) and prove that it is non-increasing between two consecutive iterates. 单调变分不等式是数学规划中的一个核心问题，它统一并概括了许多重要的设置，如平滑凸优化、两人零和博弈、凸凹鞍点问题等。Korpelevich [1976]的超梯度算法和Popov [1980]的乐观梯度下降-上升算法可以说是解决单调变分不等式的两种最经典和最流行的方法。尽管它们有着悠久的历史，但以下主要问题仍然存在。对于带约束的单调和 Lipschitz 变分不等式，外梯度算法或乐观梯度下降-上升算法的最后迭代收敛率是多少？我们通过证明外梯度算法和乐观梯度下降-上升算法对于任意凸可行集都具有严格的 $O\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}}\right)$ 最后迭代收敛率来解决这个开放问题，这与 Golowich 等人的下界相匹配。 [2020a，b]。我们的比率是根据标准差距函数来衡量的。我们结果的核心在于一个非标准的性能测量——正切残差，它可以被视为对考虑局部约束的算子规范的适应。我们在外梯度算法（或乐观梯度下降-上升算法）的分析中使用切线残差（或切线残差的轻微变化）作为势函数，并证明它在两次连续迭代之间不增加。 本文研究了约束单调变分不等式的外梯度算法和乐观梯度下降-上升算法的最后迭代收敛率问题。 Yang Cai,Argyris Oikonomou,Weiqiang Zheng math.OC,cs.DS,cs.GT,cs.LG

authors_text: Karan Singla,Daniel Pressel,Ryan Price,Bhargav Srinivas Chinnari,Yeon-Jun Kim,Srinivas Bangalore
title: Cross-stitched Multi-modal Encoders
title_zh: 十字缝合多模态编码器
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel architecture for multi-modal speech and text input. We combine pretrained speech and text encoders using multi-headed cross-modal attention and jointly fine-tune on the target problem. The resultant architecture can be used for continuous token-level classification or utterance-level prediction acting on simultaneous text and speech. The resultant encoder efficiently captures both acoustic-prosodic and lexical information. We compare the benefits of multi-headed attention-based fusion for multi-modal utterance-level classification against a simple concatenation of pre-pooled, modality-specific representations. Our model architecture is compact, resource efficient, and can be trained on a single consumer GPU card.
summary: In this paper, we propose a novel architecture for multi-modal speech and text input. We combine pretrained speech and text encoders using multi-headed cross-modal attention and jointly fine-tune on the target problem. The resultant architecture can be used for continuous token-level classification or utterance-level prediction acting on simultaneous text and speech. The resultant encoder efficiently captures both acoustic-prosodic and lexical information. We compare the benefits of multi-headed attention-based fusion for multi-modal utterance-level classification against a simple concatenation of pre-pooled, modality-specific representations. Our model architecture is compact, resource efficient, and can be trained on a single consumer GPU card.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于多模式语音和文本输入的新颖架构。我们使用多头跨模态注意力将预训练的语音和文本编码器结合起来，并对目标问题进行联合微调。由此产生的架构可用于作用于同时文本和语音的连续标记级分类或话语级预测。由此产生的编码器有效地捕获声学韵律和词汇信息。我们比较了基于多头注意力的融合对于多模态话语级分类的好处与预池化的、特定于模态的表示的简单串联的好处。我们的模型架构紧凑、资源高效，并且可以在单个消费级 GPU 卡上进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语音和文本信息的多模态编码器架构，用于同时处理语音和文本输入的分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多模态信息融合上存在效率或性能不足，需更高效地结合语音与文本特征以提升模型表现。
AI.method: 采用多头交叉模态注意力机制融合预训练的语音和文本编码器，并通过联合微调优化模型，对比实验验证其优于简单拼接方法。
AI.result: 模型在资源效率和性能上表现优异，可在单块消费级GPU上训练，且在多模态分类任务中优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的交叉缝合多模态编码器能有效融合语音与文本信息，在保持计算效率的同时提升多模态任务性能。

authors_text: Xiaowei Yu,Lu Zhang,Lin Zhao,Yanjun Lyu,Tianming Liu,Dajiang Zhu
title: Disentangling Spatial-Temporal Functional Brain Networks via Twin-Transformers
title_zh: 通过双变压器解开时空功能大脑网络
comment: full pages
comments: full pages
abstract: How to identify and characterize functional brain networks (BN) is fundamental to gain system-level insights into the mechanisms of brain organizational architecture. Current functional magnetic resonance (fMRI) analysis highly relies on prior knowledge of specific patterns in either spatial (e.g., resting-state network) or temporal (e.g., task stimulus) domain. In addition, most approaches aim to find group-wise common functional networks, individual-specific functional networks have been rarely studied. In this work, we propose a novel Twin-Transformers framework to simultaneously infer common and individual functional networks in both spatial and temporal space, in a self-supervised manner. The first transformer takes space-divided information as input and generates spatial features, while the second transformer takes time-related information as input and outputs temporal features. The spatial and temporal features are further separated into common and individual ones via interactions (weights sharing) and constraints between the two transformers. We applied our TwinTransformers to Human Connectome Project (HCP) motor task-fMRI dataset and identified multiple common brain networks, including both task-related and resting-state networks (e.g., default mode network). Interestingly, we also successfully recovered a set of individual-specific networks that are not related to task stimulus and only exist at the individual level.
summary: How to identify and characterize functional brain networks (BN) is fundamental to gain system-level insights into the mechanisms of brain organizational architecture. Current functional magnetic resonance (fMRI) analysis highly relies on prior knowledge of specific patterns in either spatial (e.g., resting-state network) or temporal (e.g., task stimulus) domain. In addition, most approaches aim to find group-wise common functional networks, individual-specific functional networks have been rarely studied. In this work, we propose a novel Twin-Transformers framework to simultaneously infer common and individual functional networks in both spatial and temporal space, in a self-supervised manner. The first transformer takes space-divided information as input and generates spatial features, while the second transformer takes time-related information as input and outputs temporal features. The spatial and temporal features are further separated into common and individual ones via interactions (weights sharing) and constraints between the two transformers. We applied our TwinTransformers to Human Connectome Project (HCP) motor task-fMRI dataset and identified multiple common brain networks, including both task-related and resting-state networks (e.g., default mode network). Interestingly, we also successfully recovered a set of individual-specific networks that are not related to task stimulus and only exist at the individual level.
abstract_zh: 如何识别和表征功能性大脑网络（BN）是获得对大脑组织结构机制的系统级洞察的基础。当前的功能磁共振（fMRI）分析高度依赖于空间（例如静息态网络）或时间（例如任务刺激）域中特定模式的先验知识。此外，大多数方法旨在寻找群体共同的功能网络，而个体特定的功能网络却很少被研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 Twin-Transformers 框架，以自我监督的方式同时推断空间和时间空间中的公共和个体功能网络。第一个变换器以空间划分的信息作为输入并生成空间特征，而第二个变换器以时间相关的信息作为输入并输出时间特征。通过两个变压器之间的交互（权重共享）和约束，空间和时间特征进一步分为公共特征和个体特征。我们将 TwinTransformers 应用于人类连接组计划 (HCP) 运动任务功能磁共振成像数据集，并识别了多个常见的大脑网络，包括任务相关网络和静息状态网络（例如默认模式网络）。有趣的是，我们还成功恢复了一组与任务刺激无关、仅存在于个体层面的个体特定网络。

AI.tldr: 提出一种双Transformer框架，同时识别群体共有的和个体特异性的时空功能脑网络
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖先验知识且多关注群体共性，缺乏对个体特异性网络的研究
AI.method: 采用双Transformer架构，分别处理空间和时间信息，通过权重共享和约束分离共同与个体特征
AI.result: 识别出任务相关和默认模式等共同网络，并发现与任务无关的个体特异性网络
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效分离时空功能网络，揭示群体共性和个体差异，为脑机制研究提供新视角

conclusion: 该框架有效分离时空功能网络，揭示群体共性和个体差异，为脑机制研究提供新视角
search_text: Disentangling Spatial-Temporal Functional Brain Networks via Twin-Transformers 通过双变压器解开时空功能大脑网络 How to identify and characterize functional brain networks (BN) is fundamental to gain system-level insights into the mechanisms of brain organizational architecture. Current functional magnetic resonance (fMRI) analysis highly relies on prior knowledge of specific patterns in either spatial (e.g., resting-state network) or temporal (e.g., task stimulus) domain. In addition, most approaches aim to find group-wise common functional networks, individual-specific functional networks have been rarely studied. In this work, we propose a novel Twin-Transformers framework to simultaneously infer common and individual functional networks in both spatial and temporal space, in a self-supervised manner. The first transformer takes space-divided information as input and generates spatial features, while the second transformer takes time-related information as input and outputs temporal features. The spatial and temporal features are further separated into common and individual ones via interactions (weights sharing) and constraints between the two transformers. We applied our TwinTransformers to Human Connectome Project (HCP) motor task-fMRI dataset and identified multiple common brain networks, including both task-related and resting-state networks (e.g., default mode network). Interestingly, we also successfully recovered a set of individual-specific networks that are not related to task stimulus and only exist at the individual level. 如何识别和表征功能性大脑网络（BN）是获得对大脑组织结构机制的系统级洞察的基础。当前的功能磁共振（fMRI）分析高度依赖于空间（例如静息态网络）或时间（例如任务刺激）域中特定模式的先验知识。此外，大多数方法旨在寻找群体共同的功能网络，而个体特定的功能网络却很少被研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的 Twin-Transformers 框架，以自我监督的方式同时推断空间和时间空间中的公共和个体功能网络。第一个变换器以空间划分的信息作为输入并生成空间特征，而第二个变换器以时间相关的信息作为输入并输出时间特征。通过两个变压器之间的交互（权重共享）和约束，空间和时间特征进一步分为公共特征和个体特征。我们将 TwinTransformers 应用于人类连接组计划 (HCP) 运动任务功能磁共振成像数据集，并识别了多个常见的大脑网络，包括任务相关网络和静息状态网络（例如默认模式网络）。有趣的是，我们还成功恢复了一组与任务刺激无关、仅存在于个体层面的个体特定网络。 提出一种双Transformer框架，同时识别群体共有的和个体特异性的时空功能脑网络 Xiaowei Yu,Lu Zhang,Lin Zhao,Yanjun Lyu,Tianming Liu,Dajiang Zhu q-bio.NC,cs.AI

authors_text: Kaizhi Qian,Yang Zhang,Heting Gao,Junrui Ni,Cheng-I Lai,David Cox,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson,Shiyu Chang
title: ContentVec: An Improved Self-Supervised Speech Representation by Disentangling Speakers
title_zh: ContentVec：通过解开演讲者改进的自我监督语音表示
abstract: Self-supervised learning in speech involves training a speech representation network on a large-scale unannotated speech corpus, and then applying the learned representations to downstream tasks. Since the majority of the downstream tasks of SSL learning in speech largely focus on the content information in speech, the most desirable speech representations should be able to disentangle unwanted variations, such as speaker variations, from the content. However, disentangling speakers is very challenging, because removing the speaker information could easily result in a loss of content as well, and the damage of the latter usually far outweighs the benefit of the former. In this paper, we propose a new SSL method that can achieve speaker disentanglement without severe loss of content. Our approach is adapted from the HuBERT framework, and incorporates disentangling mechanisms to regularize both the teacher labels and the learned representations. We evaluate the benefit of speaker disentanglement on a set of content-related downstream tasks, and observe a consistent and notable performance advantage of our speaker-disentangled representations.
summary: Self-supervised learning in speech involves training a speech representation network on a large-scale unannotated speech corpus, and then applying the learned representations to downstream tasks. Since the majority of the downstream tasks of SSL learning in speech largely focus on the content information in speech, the most desirable speech representations should be able to disentangle unwanted variations, such as speaker variations, from the content. However, disentangling speakers is very challenging, because removing the speaker information could easily result in a loss of content as well, and the damage of the latter usually far outweighs the benefit of the former. In this paper, we propose a new SSL method that can achieve speaker disentanglement without severe loss of content. Our approach is adapted from the HuBERT framework, and incorporates disentangling mechanisms to regularize both the teacher labels and the learned representations. We evaluate the benefit of speaker disentanglement on a set of content-related downstream tasks, and observe a consistent and notable performance advantage of our speaker-disentangled representations.
abstract_zh: 语音中的自监督学习涉及在大规模未注释的语音语料库上训练语音表示网络，然后将学习到的表示应用到下游任务。由于 SSL 语音学习的大多数下游任务主要集中在语音的内容信息上，因此最理想的语音表示应该能够从内容中分离出不需要的变化，例如说话者的变化。然而，解开扬声器是非常具有挑战性的，因为删除扬声器信息也很容易导致内容丢失，而后者的损害通常远远超过前者的好处。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 SSL 方法，可以在不严重丢失内容的情况下实现说话者解缠结。我们的方法改编自 HuBERT 框架，并结合了解缠结机制来规范教师标签和学习到的表示。我们评估了说话人解缠对一组与内容相关的下游任务的好处，并观察到我们的说话人解缠表示具有一致且显着的性能优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的自监督语音表示方法ContentVec，通过解耦说话人信息以提升语音内容表征能力。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督语音学习方法在分离说话人信息时易导致内容信息丢失，而内容信息对下游任务至关重要，需解决此矛盾以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 基于HuBERT框架，引入解耦机制对教师标签和学习表征进行正则化，通过约束条件实现说话人信息与内容信息的分离。
AI.result: 在多个内容相关下游任务中，解耦后的语音表征展现出持续且显著的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了说话人解耦而不显著损害内容信息，为内容导向的语音任务提供了更优的表征学习方案。

authors_text: Sheng Shen,Chunyuan Li,Xiaowei Hu,Jianwei Yang,Yujia Xie,Pengchuan Zhang,Zhe Gan,Lijuan Wang,Lu Yuan,Ce Liu,Kurt Keutzer,Trevor Darrell,Anna Rohrbach,Jianfeng Gao
title: K-LITE: Learning Transferable Visual Models with External Knowledge
title_zh: K-LITE：利用外部知识学习可迁移的视觉模型
comment: NeurIPS 2022 camera ready
comments: NeurIPS 2022 camera ready
abstract: The new generation of state-of-the-art computer vision systems are trained from natural language supervision, ranging from simple object category names to descriptive captions. This form of supervision ensures high generality and usability of the learned visual models, due to the broad concept coverage achieved via large-scale data collection process. Alternatively, we argue that learning with external knowledge is a promising way which leverages a much more structured source of supervision and offers sample efficiency. We propose K-LITE, a simple strategy to leverage external knowledge for building transferable visual systems: In training, it enriches entities in text with WordNet and Wiktionary knowledge, leading to an efficient and scalable approach to learning image representations that uses knowledge about the visual concepts. In evaluation, the text is also augmented with external knowledge and then used to reference learned visual concepts (or describe new ones) to enable zero-shot and few-shot transfer of the pre-trained models. We study the performance of K-LITE on two important computer vision problems, image classification and object detection, benchmarking on 20 and 13 different existing datasets, respectively. The proposed knowledge-augmented models show significant improvement in transfer learning performance over existing methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/klite.
summary: The new generation of state-of-the-art computer vision systems are trained from natural language supervision, ranging from simple object category names to descriptive captions. This form of supervision ensures high generality and usability of the learned visual models, due to the broad concept coverage achieved via large-scale data collection process. Alternatively, we argue that learning with external knowledge is a promising way which leverages a much more structured source of supervision and offers sample efficiency. We propose K-LITE, a simple strategy to leverage external knowledge for building transferable visual systems: In training, it enriches entities in text with WordNet and Wiktionary knowledge, leading to an efficient and scalable approach to learning image representations that uses knowledge about the visual concepts. In evaluation, the text is also augmented with external knowledge and then used to reference learned visual concepts (or describe new ones) to enable zero-shot and few-shot transfer of the pre-trained models. We study the performance of K-LITE on two important computer vision problems, image classification and object detection, benchmarking on 20 and 13 different existing datasets, respectively. The proposed knowledge-augmented models show significant improvement in transfer learning performance over existing methods. Our code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/klite.
abstract_zh: 新一代最先进的计算机视觉系统是通过自然语言监督进行训练的，范围从简单的对象类别名称到描述性标题。由于通过大规模数据收集过程实现了广泛的概念覆盖，这种形式的监督确保了所学习的视觉模型的高度通用性和可用性。或者，我们认为利用外部知识学习是一种有前途的方法，它利用了更加结构化的监督来源并提供了样本效率。我们提出了 K-LITE，这是一种利用外部知识构建可转移视觉系统的简单策略：在训练中，它利用 WordNet 和维基词典知识丰富文本中的实体，从而形成一种高效且可扩展的方法来学习使用视觉概念知识的图像表示。在评估中，文本还通过外部知识进行增强，然后用于参考学习的视觉概念（或描述新的视觉概念），以实现预训练模型的零样本和少样本迁移。我们研究了 K-LITE 在图像分类和目标检测这两个重要计算机视觉问题上的性能，分别对 20 个和 13 个不同的现有数据集进行了基准测试。所提出的知识增强模型显示出迁移学习性能比现有方法有显着提高。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/microsoft/klite 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出K-LITE方法，通过引入外部知识（如WordNet和Wiktionary）提升视觉模型的可迁移性，显著改进图像分类和目标检测任务的迁移学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自然语言监督的视觉模型虽具通用性，但样本效率较低。外部知识能提供更结构化的监督，有望提高模型学习效率与迁移能力。
AI.method: 训练阶段通过WordNet和Wiktionary扩展文本实体，增强视觉概念表示；评估阶段利用外部知识增强文本，实现零样本/少样本迁移。
AI.result: 在20个图像分类和13个目标检测数据集上，K-LITE模型在迁移学习性能上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: K-LITE通过融合外部知识有效提升了视觉模型的迁移能力，为构建高效可迁移的视觉系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Seongwook Yoon,Gayoung Kim,Myungpyo Hong,Sanghoon Sull
title: Vision System of Curling Robots: Thrower and Skip
title_zh: 冰壶机器人视觉系统：投掷器和跳冰器
abstract: We built a vision system of curling robot which can be expected to play with human curling player. Basically, we built two types of vision systems for thrower and skip robots, respectively. First, the thrower robot drives towards a given point of curling sheet to release a stone. Our vision system in the thrower robot initialize 3DoF pose on two dimensional curling sheet and updates the pose to decide for the decision of stone release. Second, the skip robot stands at the opposite side of the thrower robot and monitors the state of the game to make a strategic decision. Our vision system in the skip robot recognize every stones on the curling sheet precisely. Since the viewpoint is quite perspective, many stones are occluded by each others so it is challenging to estimate the accurate position of stone. Thus, we recognize the ellipses of stone handles outline to find the exact midpoint of the stones using perspective Hough transform. Furthermore, we perform tracking of a thrown stone to produce a trajectory for ice condition analysis. Finally, we implemented our vision systems on two mobile robots and successfully perform a single turn and even careful gameplay. Specifically, our vision system includes three cameras with different viewpoint for their respective purposes.

abstract_zh: 我们构建了冰壶机器人的视觉系统，有望与人类冰壶运动员比赛。基本上，我们分别为投掷机器人和跳跃机器人构建了两种类型的视觉系统。首先，投掷机器人朝冰壶片的给定点行驶以释放石头。我们投掷机器人中的视觉系统在二维冰壶片上初始化 3DoF 位姿，并更新该位姿以决定石块释放的决定。其次，跳跃机器人站在投掷机器人的对面，监视比赛状态以做出战略决策。我们的跳跃机器人中的视觉系统可以精确地识别冰壶片上的每一颗石头。由于视角较远，许多石头相互遮挡，因此很难估计石头的准确位置。因此，我们识别石头手柄轮廓的椭圆，以使用透视霍夫变换找到石头的精确中点。此外，我们对投掷的石头进行跟踪，以生成用于冰况分析的轨迹。最后，我们在两个移动机器人上实现了我们的视觉系统，并成功地执行了单轮甚至仔细的游戏。具体来说，我们的视觉系统包括三个具有不同视点的摄像机，用于各自的目的。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了冰壶机器人（投掷机器人和指挥机器人）的视觉系统，实现冰壶位置识别、轨迹跟踪及策略决策。
AI.motivation: 为使冰壶机器人能够与人类选手对战，需开发精准的视觉系统以解决冰壶遮挡、视角透视等挑战。
AI.method: 投掷机器人通过二维平面初始化3DoF姿态并更新以确定投掷时机；指挥机器人采用透视霍夫变换识别冰壶椭圆轮廓，结合多视角摄像头和轨迹跟踪分析冰面状态。
AI.result: 成功在移动机器人上实现单轮比赛及精细操作，准确识别冰壶位置并完成策略决策。
AI.conclusion: 该视觉系统为冰壶机器人提供了可靠的技术方案，验证了多视角感知与透视校正方法的有效性。

authors_text: Fei Xia,Bin Li,Yixuan Weng,Shizhu He,Kang Liu,Bin Sun,Shutao Li,Jun Zhao
title: LingYi: Medical Conversational Question Answering System based on Multi-modal Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: LingYi：基于多模态知识图谱的医学对话式问答系统
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
comments: 9 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables
abstract: The medical conversational system can relieve the burden of doctors and improve the efficiency of healthcare, especially during the pandemic. This paper presents a medical conversational question answering (CQA) system based on the multi-modal knowledge graph, namely "LingYi", which is designed as a pipeline framework to maintain high flexibility. Our system utilizes automated medical procedures including medical triage, consultation, image-text drug recommendation and record. To conduct knowledge-grounded dialogues with patients, we first construct a Chinese Medical Multi-Modal Knowledge Graph (CM3KG) and collect a large-scale Chinese Medical CQA (CMCQA) dataset. Compared with the other existing medical question-answering systems, our system adopts several state-of-the-art technologies including medical entity disambiguation and medical dialogue generation, which is more friendly to provide medical services to patients. In addition, we have open-sourced our codes which contain back-end models and front-end web pages at https://github.com/WENGSYX/LingYi. The datasets including CM3KG at https://github.com/WENGSYX/CM3KG and CMCQA at https://github.com/WENGSYX/CMCQA are also released to further promote future research.
summary: The medical conversational system can relieve the burden of doctors and improve the efficiency of healthcare, especially during the pandemic. This paper presents a medical conversational question answering (CQA) system based on the multi-modal knowledge graph, namely "LingYi", which is designed as a pipeline framework to maintain high flexibility. Our system utilizes automated medical procedures including medical triage, consultation, image-text drug recommendation and record. To conduct knowledge-grounded dialogues with patients, we first construct a Chinese Medical Multi-Modal Knowledge Graph (CM3KG) and collect a large-scale Chinese Medical CQA (CMCQA) dataset. Compared with the other existing medical question-answering systems, our system adopts several state-of-the-art technologies including medical entity disambiguation and medical dialogue generation, which is more friendly to provide medical services to patients. In addition, we have open-sourced our codes which contain back-end models and front-end web pages at https://github.com/WENGSYX/LingYi. The datasets including CM3KG at https://github.com/WENGSYX/CM3KG and CMCQA at https://github.com/WENGSYX/CMCQA are also released to further promote future research.
abstract_zh: 医疗对话系统可以减轻医生的负担，提高医疗效率，尤其是在疫情期间。本文提出了一种基于多模态知识图谱的医学会话问答（CQA）系统，即“灵医”，该系统被设计为管道框架以保持高度灵活性。我们的系统采用自动化医疗程序，包括医疗分诊、咨询、图文药物推荐和记录。为了与患者进行基于知识的对话，我们首先构建了中医多模态知识图（CM3KG）并收集了大规模的中医CQA（CMCQA）数据集。与现有的其他医疗问答系统相比，我们的系统采用了医疗实体消歧、医疗对话生成等多项先进技术，更加友好地为患者提供医疗服务。此外，我们还开源了包含后端模型和前端网页的代码：https://github.com/WENGSYX/LingYi。包括 https://github.com/WENGSYX/CM3KG 的 CM3KG 和 https://github.com/WENGSYX/CMCQA 的 CMCQA 数据集也已发布，以进一步促进未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多模态知识图谱的医疗对话问答系统LingYi，旨在提升医疗效率并缓解医生负担。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间医疗需求激增，传统医疗模式面临压力，需通过智能化系统提高诊疗效率并优化患者服务体验。
AI.method: 构建中文医疗多模态知识图谱（CM3KG）与大规模医疗对话问答数据集（CMCQA），结合医疗实体消歧、对话生成等技术，设计灵活的流水线框架实现问诊、分诊、药物推荐等功能。
AI.result: 系统在医疗对话任务中表现优于现有方案，开源代码、数据集及前端界面，为后续研究提供基础支持。
AI.conclusion: LingYi通过多模态知识图谱与前沿技术融合，实现了更友好高效的医疗对话服务，推动医疗AI领域发展。

authors_text: Charl Maree,Christian W. Omlin
title: Reinforcement Learning with Intrinsic Affinity for Personalized Prosperity Management
title_zh: 具有内在亲和力的强化学习，实现个性化繁荣管理
comment: ef:Digit Finance 2022
comments: ef:Digit Finance 2022
abstract: The common purpose of applying reinforcement learning (RL) to asset management is the maximization of profit. The extrinsic reward function used to learn an optimal strategy typically does not take into account any other preferences or constraints. We have developed a regularization method that ensures that strategies have global intrinsic affinities, i.e., different personalities may have preferences for certain assets which may change over time. We capitalize on these intrinsic policy affinities to make our RL model inherently interpretable. We demonstrate how RL agents can be trained to orchestrate such individual policies for particular personality profiles and still achieve high returns.
summary: The common purpose of applying reinforcement learning (RL) to asset management is the maximization of profit. The extrinsic reward function used to learn an optimal strategy typically does not take into account any other preferences or constraints. We have developed a regularization method that ensures that strategies have global intrinsic affinities, i.e., different personalities may have preferences for certain assets which may change over time. We capitalize on these intrinsic policy affinities to make our RL model inherently interpretable. We demonstrate how RL agents can be trained to orchestrate such individual policies for particular personality profiles and still achieve high returns.
abstract_zh: 将强化学习（RL）应用于资产管理的共同目的是利润最大化。用于学习最优策略的外在奖励函数通常不考虑任何其他偏好或约束。我们开发了一种正则化方法，确保策略具有全局内在亲和力，即不同性格的人可能对某些资产有偏好，这些偏好可能会随着时间的推移而改变。我们利用这些内在的政策亲和力来使我们的强化学习模型具有内在的可解释性。我们展示了如何训练 RL 代理来针对特定的个性特征协调此类个人策略，并且仍然获得高回报。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内在亲和力的强化学习方法，用于个性化财富管理，通过考虑用户偏好和策略可解释性来优化资产管理策略。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在资产管理中仅追求利润最大化，忽视用户个性化偏好和策略可解释性，导致模型缺乏灵活性和透明度。
AI.method: 开发正则化方法，将用户内在策略亲和力（如不同个性对资产的动态偏好）嵌入强化学习框架，提升模型可解释性并协调个性化策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能训练出针对不同个性配置的RL代理，在保持高投资回报的同时实现策略的个性化和可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合内在亲和力的正则化方法，强化学习在资产管理中可兼顾收益优化与用户偏好适配，为个性化财富管理提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于内在亲和力的强化学习方法，用于个性化财富管理，通过考虑用户偏好和策略可解释性来优化资产管理策略。
ai_content.motivation: 传统强化学习在资产管理中仅追求利润最大化，忽视用户个性化偏好和策略可解释性，导致模型缺乏灵活性和透明度。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning with Intrinsic Affinity for Personalized Prosperity Management 具有内在亲和力的强化学习，实现个性化繁荣管理 The common purpose of applying reinforcement learning (RL) to asset management is the maximization of profit. The extrinsic reward function used to learn an optimal strategy typically does not take into account any other preferences or constraints. We have developed a regularization method that ensures that strategies have global intrinsic affinities, i.e., different personalities may have preferences for certain assets which may change over time. We capitalize on these intrinsic policy affinities to make our RL model inherently interpretable. We demonstrate how RL agents can be trained to orchestrate such individual policies for particular personality profiles and still achieve high returns. 将强化学习（RL）应用于资产管理的共同目的是利润最大化。用于学习最优策略的外在奖励函数通常不考虑任何其他偏好或约束。我们开发了一种正则化方法，确保策略具有全局内在亲和力，即不同性格的人可能对某些资产有偏好，这些偏好可能会随着时间的推移而改变。我们利用这些内在的政策亲和力来使我们的强化学习模型具有内在的可解释性。我们展示了如何训练 RL 代理来针对特定的个性特征协调此类个人策略，并且仍然获得高回报。 本文提出一种基于内在亲和力的强化学习方法，用于个性化财富管理，通过考虑用户偏好和策略可解释性来优化资产管理策略。 Charl Maree,Christian W. Omlin cs.LG,cs.AI
